source: skillinfo/*.lua + skilldescript.lub (English descriptions) + rAthena skill_db.yml (names / fallback)

nv_basic.name: Basic Skill
nv_basic.description:
Basic Skill
Max Level: 9
Enables the use of Basic Interface Skills.
[Lv 1]: Enables Trading
Allows the trading of items with other
character.
Right click on a character to initiate.
[Lv 2]: Enables Emotions
Alt+(0~9) and Ctrl+(1,-,=.)
Alt+L opens additional Emotion icons.
[Lv 3]: Enables Sitting
Sitting doubles HP and SP regeneration
speed.
Press the Insert key or type /sit.
[Lv 4]: Enables Chat Room Creation
Alt+C to open a Chat Room or click the
Chat button in the Basic Information
Window.
[Lv 5]: Join a Party
Character can join a party.
[Lv 6]: Enables Use of Kafra Storage
Allows use of Kafra Storage.
[Lv 7]: Organize a Party
Create a party by typing
/organize ''Party Name''
Set party options in the Party Window (Alt+Z).
[Lv 9]: Enables Change to First Job Class
Qualifies character for change from Novice
to one of the First classes.

nv_firstaid.name: First Aid
nv_firstaid.description:
First Aid
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Recovery
Target: Caster
Description: Uses 3 SP to restore 5 HP.

nv_trickdead.name: Play Dead
nv_trickdead.description:
Play Dead
Requirement: Finish Quest, Novice Only
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Feigns death to avoid the
menace of nearby enemies. The Play
Dead status is canceled by casting
this skill again.

Comments: This skill ceases to function after
jobchanging to any other class, including
Super Novice. Swordsman's Provoke and
Sage's Dispel can cancel the effect. All
monsters will be fooled, even Bosses and
MvPs.

sm_sword.name: Sword Mastery
sm_sword.description:
Sword Mastery
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases damage with
One-Handed Sword and Dagger class weapon.
[Lv 1]: Damage +4
[Lv 2]: Damage +8
[Lv 3]: Damage +12
[Lv 4]: Damage +16
[Lv 5]: Damage +20
[Lv 6]: Damage +24
[Lv 7]: Damage +28
[Lv 8]: Damage +32
[Lv 9]: Damage +36
[Lv 10]: Damage +40

Comments: Mastery skills only get added up
at the end of damage calculation. In most
situations, it only results in a flat addition of
damage.

sm_bash.name: Bash
sm_bash.description:
Bash
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: HITs an enemy with crushing
force. If Fatal Blow skill is learned, Bash
will have an added Stun effect at
Level 6 and higher. Damage and HIT
are increased every level.
[Lv 1]: 130% damage, +5% HIT
[Lv 2]: 160% damage, +10% HIT
[Lv 3]: 190% damage, +15% HIT
[Lv 4]: 220% damage, +20% HIT
[Lv 5]: 250% damage, +25% HIT
[Lv 6]: 280% damage, +30% HIT
[Lv 7]: 310% damage, +35% HIT
[Lv 8]: 340% damage, +40% HIT
[Lv 9]: 370% damage, +45% HIT
[Lv 10]: 400% damage, +50% HIT

Comments: Costs 8 SP up to Lv 5, after
which it costs 15.
Damage skills unlocked after jobchanging to
your next job will outclass Bash, however this
skill will continue to be relevant as a means of
stunning enemies.
Wearing Bongun Card grants this skill a new
effect: Shoving back targets 5 cells. This effect
stacks.

sm_provoke.name: Provoke
sm_provoke.description:
Provoke
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: 1 Character
Description: Enrages a target, reducing
Defense by VIT on Player and physical
defense on Monster, while increasing it's
Attack Power. Can't be used on Undead
and Boss monsters.
[Lv 1]: Damage +5%, DEF -10%
[Lv 2]: Damage +8%, DEF -15%
[Lv 3]: Damage +11%, DEF -20%
[Lv 4]: Damage +14%, DEF -25%
[Lv 5]: Damage +17%, DEF -30%
[Lv 6]: Damage +20%, DEF -35%
[Lv 7]: Damage +23%, DEF -40%
[Lv 8]: Damage +26%, DEF -45%
[Lv 9]: Damage +29%, DEF -50%
[Lv 10]: Damage +32%, DEF -55%

Comments: Provoke reduces both Hard and
Soft Defense of monsters, but only the
Soft Defense of players. Provoking frozen
targets will unfreeze them. Provoke can also
be used to interrupt skills, so long as the skill
is interruptable in the first place
Provoke counts as a hit and will cause
Rude Teleportation on monsters that are stuck
and have the ability to do so. If the skill fails
continuously against a player, you can be sure
that the player is wearing Evil Druid Card.

tf_double.name: Double Attack
tf_double.description:
Double Attack
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: When attacking with Dagger
class weapon, there is chance of
inflicting double attacks. This skill also affects
Left-Hand damage of Katar class weapons.
[Lv 1]: 5% chance, Katar Off-Hand +3%
[Lv 2]: 10% chance, Katar Off-Hand +5%
[Lv 3]: 15% chance, Katar Off-Hand +7%
[Lv 4]: 20% chance, Katar Off-Hand +9%
[Lv 5]: 25% chance, Katar Off-Hand +11%
[Lv 6]: 30% chance, Katar Off-Hand +13%
[Lv 7]: 35% chance, Katar Off-Hand +15%
[Lv 8]: 40% chance, Katar Off-Hand +17%
[Lv 9]: 45% chance, Katar Off-Hand +19%
[Lv 10]: 50% chance, Katar Off-Hand +21%

Comments: Double Attacks cannot crit, also
Double Attacks are calculated before crits,
therefore if you have a crit based build you do
not want Double Attacks to occur. Use a
non-Dagger weapon on the Right Hand to
inhibit the skill from functioning.
The items Sidewinder Card, Nagan and Chick
Hat allow Double Attacks to be performed with
any weapon. In those cases, if the user knows
the skill, it will use the highest level learned.
Therefore, those items will allow up to Level 10
usage of the skill with any weapon.

tf_steal.name: Steal
tf_steal.description:
Steal
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Steals an item from a monster.
Higher skill levels increase success chance.

[Lv 1]: 10% +(User DEX - Target DEX/2)
[Lv 2]: 16% +(User DEX - Target DEX/2)
[Lv 3]: 22% +(User DEX - Target DEX/2)
[Lv 4]: 28% +(User DEX - Target DEX/2)
[Lv 5]: 34% +(User DEX - Target DEX/2)
[Lv 6]: 40% +(User DEX - Target DEX/2)
[Lv 7]: 46% +(User DEX - Target DEX/2)
[Lv 8]: 52% +(User DEX - Target DEX/2)
[Lv 9]: 58% +(User DEX - Target DEX/2)
[Lv 10]: 64% +(User DEX - Target DEX/2)

Comments: Steal does not remove items
from the monster's drops table. You can steal
an item from a monster, kill it and receive the
same item again.
The success chance is affected by the user's
and target's DEX. Which item will be stolen is
also determined by DEX. Items at the
beginning of the drop table are easier to steal.
Cards can never be stolen.

Despite being one of the most used skills in
the game, it's often misunderstood by players.
When the skill is used, it attempts to steal
each item from the monster's drop table, from
top to bottom, one at a time. This method has
interesting consequences. For example, if your
goal is to steal an item at the beginning of a
monster's drop table, high DEX will increase
your odds. However, if you're aiming for an item
at the end of the list, low DEX is necessary.
This is because, if your DEX is too high, you
will always success in stealing the first few
items on the drop table, and the game will
never roll for stealing items towards the end
of the list.

tf_poison.name: Envenom
tf_poison.description:
Envenom
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: Deals Poison elemental
damage to a target that has a chance
of inflicting Poison status.
[Lv 1]: 14% chance, 100% ATK +15 ATK
[Lv 2]: 18% chance, 100% ATK +30 ATK
[Lv 3]: 22% chance, 100% ATK +45 ATK
[Lv 4]: 26% chance, 100% ATK +60 ATK
[Lv 5]: 30% chance, 100% ATK +75 ATK
[Lv 6]: 34% chance, 100% ATK +90 ATK
[Lv 7]: 38% chance, 100% ATK +105 ATK
[Lv 8]: 42% chance, 100% ATK +120 ATK
[Lv 9]: 46% chance, 100% ATK +135 ATK
[Lv 10]: 50% chance, 100% ATK +150 ATK

Comments: As in most RPGs, poisoning
enemies is rarely worth the effort.
Similar to Swordsman's Bash, using the
Poisonous Toad Card grants this skill a new
effect: shoving the target back. And in the
same manner as Bash and Bongun Card,
the shove distance increases with more cards.

From a damage perspective, Envenom has
terrible scaling. Additional skill levels only
increase the fixed damage bonus. This skill
is a pre-requirement for several Assassin
skills, however.

sm_recovery.name: Increase HP Recovery
sm_recovery.description:
Increase HP Recovery
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Restores HP every
10 seconds while idle. MaxHP affects how much
HP is restored by this skill.
[Lv 1]: HP+5 +(0.2% of Max HP)
[Lv 2]: HP+10 +(0.4% of Max HP)
[Lv 3]: HP+15 +(0.6% of Max HP)
[Lv 4]: HP+20 +(0.8% of Max HP)
[Lv 5]: HP+25 +(1.0% of Max HP)
[Lv 6]: HP+30 +(1.2% of Max HP)
[Lv 7]: HP+35 +(1.4% of Max HP)
[Lv 8]: HP+40 +(1.6% of Max HP)
[Lv 9]: HP+45 +(1.8% of Max HP)
[Lv 10]: HP+50 +(2.0% of Max HP)

Comments: Every skill level also increases
the effectiveness of HP healing items by 10%.
The healing ticks occur so long as the player
does not walk to to another tile, even if the
player is standing and in combat. The healing
ticks will not occur if the player is overweight.
It's also possible to receive healing ticks
while teleporting, so long as the player does
not walk.

sm_magnum.name: Magnum Break
sm_magnum.description:
Magnum Break
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Bash 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: Enemies around the caster
Description: Drains a small amount of the
caster's HP to inflict Fire
elemental damage on 5x5 AoE around the
caster and push enemies 2 cells backward.
For 10 seconds after Magnum Break,
caster's weapon will receive 20% Fire
elemental attack enhancement.
[Lv 1]: 120% damage, 110% Accuracy Bonus
[Lv 2]: 140% damage, 120% Accuracy Bonus
[Lv 3]: 160% damage, 130% Accuracy Bonus
[Lv 4]: 180% damage, 140% Accuracy Bonus
[Lv 5]: 200% damage, 150% Accuracy Bonus
[Lv 6]: 220% damage, 160% Accuracy Bonus
[Lv 7]: 240% damage, 170% Accuracy Bonus
[Lv 8]: 260% damage, 180% Accuracy Bonus
[Lv 9]: 280% damage, 190% Accuracy Bonus
[Lv 10]: 300% damage, 200% Accuracy Bonus

Comments: Although the damage scaling on
Magnum Break might not be large, the SP cost
is the same on all levels.
The extra Fire Damage Bonus ignores DEF.

sm_endure.name: Endure
sm_endure.description:
Endure
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Provoke 5
Requirement: Provoke 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Removes attack and movement
delay that occurs when a character receives
damage. Disabled in War of Emperium
but still grants the MDEF bonus.
[Lv 1]: 10 sec, MDEF +1
[Lv 2]: 13 sec, MDEF +2
[Lv 3]: 16 sec, MDEF +3
[Lv 4]: 19 sec, MDEF +4
[Lv 5]: 22 sec, MDEF +5
[Lv 6]: 25 sec, MDEF +6
[Lv 7]: 28 sec, MDEF +7
[Lv 8]: 31 sec, MDEF +8
[Lv 9]: 34 sec, MDEF +9
[Lv 10]: 37 sec, MDEF +10

Comments: What Endure does exactly is
preventing your character from displaying
flinching animations when taking hits. It is
extremely useful when doing any sort of
tanking, or handling a large number of
enemies.

tf_miss.name: Improve Dodge
tf_miss.description:
Improve Dodge
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases FLEE. FLEE
receives additional bonus upon
reaching 2nd classes. This skill also
slightly enhances the Movement Speed
of Assassin classes.
[Lv 1]: FLEE +3(4 if 2nd),
Assassin MovSpeed +1%
[Lv 2]: FLEE +6(8 if 2nd),
Assassin MovSpeed +1%
[Lv 3]: FLEE +9(12 if 2nd),
Assassin MovSpeed +2%
[Lv 4]: FLEE +12(16 if 2nd),
Assassin MovSpeed +2%
[Lv 5]: FLEE +15(20 if 2nd),
Assassin MovSpeed +3%
[Lv 6]: FLEE +18(24 if 2nd),
Assassin MovSpeed +3%
[Lv 7]: FLEE +21(28 if 2nd),
Assassin MovSpeed +4%
[Lv 8]: FLEE +24(32 if 2nd),
Assassin MovSpeed +4%
[Lv 9]: FLEE +27(36 if 2nd),
Assassin MovSpeed +5%
[Lv 10]: FLEE +30(40 if 2nd),
Assassin MovSpeed +5%

tf_hiding.name: Hiding
tf_hiding.description:
Hiding
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Steal 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Hides under the ground to
avoid enemy attack. Detection skills
can cancel Hiding status. Demon, Insect
and Boss monsters can detect character
in Hiding status. Can be canceled by
using the skill again.

Comments: This is the most basic stealth skill
in the game. It prevents you from doing
anything except using Hiding again to cancel
the effect. Assassins can use Grimtooth from
hiding. Rogues can use Raid and Backstab
from hiding, as well as learn a passive skill
that permits them to move during while
hiding.

tf_detoxify.name: Detoxify
tf_detoxify.description:
Detoxify
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Envenom 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Removes Poison status from
a targeted character.

Comments: The status effect removing skills
from Acolyte and Priest job do not work on
poison. Only this skill does, although many
items such as Green Potions and Green
Herbs will also cure the status.

mg_srecovery.description:

Skill Form: Passive

It's also possible to receive healing ticks

al_holywater.name: Aqua Benedicta
al_holywater.description:
Aqua Benedicta
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Crafting
Target: Caster
Description: Creates Holy Water with
1 Empty Bottle while standing in water.

Comments: The skill will only work when used
on a water tile. The underwater segments of
Byalan Dungeon are NOT water tiles. Similar
to other skills that require water tiles, they can
also be used on top of a Sage's Deluge, or a
Ninja's Water Evasion.

mc_inccarry.name: Enlarge Weight Limit
mc_inccarry.description:
Enlarge Weight Limit
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases maximum Weight Limit.
[Lv 1]: Weight capacity +200
[Lv 2]: Weight capacity +400
[Lv 3]: Weight capacity +600
[Lv 4]: Weight capacity +800
[Lv 5]: Weight capacity +1000
[Lv 6]: Weight capacity +1200
[Lv 7]: Weight capacity +1400
[Lv 8]: Weight capacity +1600
[Lv 9]: Weight capacity +1800
[Lv 10]: Weight capacity +2000

Comments: It is possible to have both this
skill and the Gym Pass version of this skill
simultaneously.

mg_coldbolt.name: Cold Bolt
mg_coldbolt.description:
Cold Bolt
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: Enemy
Description: Summons bolts of frigid ice
to strike at an enemy which inflicts
Water elemental magic damage per hit.
One bolt for every skill level.
[Lv 1]: 100% MATK, 0.7 sec Cast Time,
1.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 2]: 200% MATK, 1.4 sec Cast Time,
1.2 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 3]: 300% MATK, 2.1 sec Cast Time,
1.4 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 4]: 400% MATK, 2.8 sec Cast Time,
1.6 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 5]: 500% MATK, 3.5 sec Cast Time,
1.8 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 6]: 600% MATK, 4.2 sec Cast Time,
2.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 7]: 700% MATK, 4.9 sec Cast Time,
2.2 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 8]: 800% MATK, 5.6 sec Cast Time,
2.4 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 9]: 900% MATK, 6.3 sec Cast Time,
2.6 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 10]: 1000% MATK, 7.0 sec Cast Time,
2.8 sec After Cast Delay

Comments: The basic Water spell of a Mage.
Higher levels of the skill dramatically increase
SP Cost and Cast Time. Different skill levels
of this skill can be set to individual hotkeys.
The skill is greatly enhanced by using Siroma
Card.

mg_lightningbolt.name: Lightning Bolt
mg_lightningbolt.description:
Lightning Bolt
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: 1 Character
Description: Drops lightning on target
inflicting Wind elemental
magic damage per hit.
One bolt for every skill level.
[Lv 1]: 100% MATK, 0.7 sec Cast Time,
1.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 2]: 200% MATK, 1.4 sec Cast Time,
1.2 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 3]: 300% MATK, 2.1 sec Cast Time,
1.4 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 4]: 400% MATK, 2.8 sec Cast Time,
1.6 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 5]: 500% MATK, 3.5 sec Cast Time,
1.8 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 6]: 600% MATK, 4.2 sec Cast Time,
2.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 7]: 700% MATK, 4.9 sec Cast Time,
2.2 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 8]: 800% MATK, 5.6 sec Cast Time,
2.4 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 9]: 900% MATK, 6.3 sec Cast Time,
2.6 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 10]: 1000% MATK, 7.0 sec Cast Time,
2.8 sec After Cast Delay

Comments: The basic Wind spell of a mage.
Higher levels of the skill dramatically increase
SP Cost and Cast Time. Different skill levels
of this skill can be set to individual hotkeys.
Unlike Fire and Cold bolts, there is no card
that will enhance Lightning bolt in the
same manner.

mg_firebolt.description:
Fire Bolt
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: 1 Character
Description: Attacks a target with arrow
made of fire inflicting Fire
elemental magic damage per hit.
One bolt for every skill level.
[Lv 1]: 100% MATK, 0.7 sec Cast Time,
1.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 2]: 200% MATK, 1.4 sec Cast Time,
1.2 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 3]: 300% MATK, 2.1 sec Cast Time,

[Lv 4]: 400% MATK, 2.8 sec Cast Time,

[Lv 5]: 500% MATK, 3.5 sec Cast Time,

[Lv 8]: 800% MATK, 5.6 sec Cast Time,

[Lv 9]: 900% MATK, 6.3 sec Cast Time,

[Lv 10]: 1000% MATK, 7.0 sec Cast Time,

mg_napalmbeat.name: Napalm Beat
mg_napalmbeat.description:
Napalm Beat
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: 1 Character
Description: Uses telekinesis power to
attack a target and 3x3 cells around it
with Ghost elemental magic. The damage
portion is divided among the targets.
[Lv 1]: 80% MATK, 1.0 sec Cast Time
[Lv 2]: 90% MATK, 1.0 sec Cast Time
[Lv 3]: 100% MATK, 1.0 sec Cast Time
[Lv 4]: 110% MATK, 0.9 sec Cast Time
[Lv 5]: 120% MATK, 0.9 sec Cast Time
[Lv 6]: 130% MATK, 0.8 sec Cast Time
[Lv 7]: 140% MATK, 0.8 sec Cast Time
[Lv 8]: 150% MATK, 0.7 sec Cast Time
[Lv 9]: 160% MATK, 0.6 sec Cast Time
[Lv 10]: 170% MATK, 0.5 sec Cast Time

Comments: Mage's Ghost spells are weak
compared to elemental bolts, however they
are much faster casting and do adequate
damage against the Undead.
Damage will be split between the targets.

al_dp.name: Divine Protection
al_dp.description:
Divine Protection
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Cure 1
Description: Reduces damage taken from
Demon and Undead monsters. Character's
Level affects the damage reduction. Damage
reduction is added after final damage
is calculated.
[Lv 1]: DEF +3
[Lv 2]: DEF +6
[Lv 3]: DEF +9
[Lv 4]: DEF +12
[Lv 5]: DEF +15
[Lv 6]: DEF +18
[Lv 7]: DEF +21
[Lv 8]: DEF +24
[Lv 9]: DEF +27
[Lv 10]: DEF +30

Comments: This defense works like Soft DEF,
it's a flat reduction of the final damage.
Reductions of this level are normally
insignificant except in the case of a Monk
taking hits during Steel Body.
Players planning to jobchange into Monks
must max this skill to unlock the basic Monk
skill.

mg_stonecurse.name: Stone Curse
mg_stonecurse.description:
Stone Curse
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: 1 Character
Description: Inflicts Stone Curse to a
target. Consumes 1 Red Gemstone.
[Lv 1]: 24% Chance
[Lv 2]: 28% Chance
[Lv 3]: 32% Chance
[Lv 4]: 36% Chance
[Lv 5]: 40% Chance
[Lv 6]: 44% Chance
[Lv 7]: 48% Chance
[Lv 8]: 52% Chance
[Lv 9]: 56% Chance
[Lv 10]: 60% Chance

Comments: Using this skill requires a
Gemstone and is very short range, however
Stone Curse is generally considered to be a
more crippling disable than Freeze. Stone
cursed enemies are vulnerable to Fire.
Bosses and Undead are immune.
Using the skill on a target that's already stone
cursed will immediately undo the effect, even if
it's an enemy.

mc_discount.name: Discount
mc_discount.description:
Discount
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Enlarge Weight Limit 3
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Decreases the price of
items sold by NPC shops.
[Lv 1]: 7% Discount
[Lv 2]: 9% Discount
[Lv 3]: 11% Discount
[Lv 4]: 13% Discount
[Lv 5]: 15% Discount
[Lv 6]: 17% Discount
[Lv 7]: 19% Discount
[Lv 8]: 21% Discount
[Lv 9]: 23% Discount
[Lv 10]: 24% Discount

mg_frostdiver.name: Frost Diver
mg_frostdiver.description:
Frost Diver
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Cold Bolt 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical, Debuff
Target: 1 Character
Description: Inflicts Water magic
damage on a target, which has a chance to
inflict Freezing status. The Freezing
chance and duration are affected
by target's MDEF.
[Lv 1]: 110% MATK, 3 sec Freeze Duration,
38% Freeze Chance
[Lv 2]: 120% MATK, 6 sec Freeze Duration,
41% Freeze Chance
[Lv 3]: 130% MATK, 9 sec Freeze Duration,
44% Freeze Chance
[Lv 4]: 140% MATK, 12 sec Freeze Duration,
47% Freeze Chance
[Lv 5]: 150% MATK, 15 sec Freeze Duration,
50% Freeze Chance
[Lv 6]: 160% MATK, 18 sec Freeze Duration,
53% Freeze Chance
[Lv 7]: 170% MATK, 21 sec Freeze Duration,
56% Freeze Chance
[Lv 8]: 180% MATK, 24 sec Freeze Duration,
59% Freeze Chance
[Lv 9]: 190% MATK, 27 sec Freeze Duration,
62% Freeze Chance
[Lv 10]: 200% MATK, 30 sec Freeze Duration,
65% Freeze Chance

Comments: Frost Diver is a Mage's disabling
skill. Frozen targets cannot retaliate until the
freeze duration ends. Keep in mind that
enemies that are Undead Element cannot be
frozen, and enemies with high MDEF have
lower chance of being frozen, and will remain
frozen for less time.

mg_thunderstorm.name: Thunderstorm
mg_thunderstorm.description:
Thunder Storm
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Lightning Bolt 4
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: Ground
Description: Drops lightning bolt on
specific location, inflicting Wind
elemental magic per hit in a 5x5 cell area.
[Lv 1]: 80% MATK, 1 sec Cast Time
[Lv 2]: 160% MATK, 2 sec Cast Time
[Lv 3]: 240% MATK, 3 sec Cast Time
[Lv 4]: 320% MATK, 4 sec Cast Time
[Lv 5]: 400% MATK, 5 sec Cast Time
[Lv 6]: 480% MATK, 6 sec Cast Time
[Lv 7]: 560% MATK, 7 sec Cast Time
[Lv 8]: 640% MATK, 8 sec Cast Time
[Lv 9]: 720% MATK, 9 sec Cast Time
[Lv 10]: 800% MATK, 10 sec Cast Time

Comments: The strongest AoE spell available
to Mages, however it also has a massive 10
second cast at max level.

mg_fireball.name: Fire Ball
mg_fireball.description:
Fire Ball
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Fire Bolt 4
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical, AoE
Target: 1 Character
Description: Summons a fire ball to
damage a target and all enemies within
x5 cells area with Fire elemental
magical damage. Nearby enemies receives
3/4 of the damage given to the
center enemy. Cast Time and After Cast
Delay are reduced upon learning level 6
or higher.
[Lv 1]: 80% MATK, 1.5 sec Cast Time,
1.5 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 2]: 90% MATK, 1.5 sec Cast Time,
1.5 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 3]: 100% MATK, 1.5 sec Cast Time,
1.5 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 4]: 110% MATK, 1.5 sec Cast Time,
1.5 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 5]: 120% MATK, 1.5 sec Cast Time,
1.5 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 6]: 130% MATK, 1.0 sec Cast Time,
1.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 7]: 140% MATK, 1.0 sec Cast Time,
1.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 8]: 150% MATK, 1.0 sec Cast Time,
1.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 9]: 160% MATK, 1.0 sec Cast Time,
1.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 10]: 170% MATK, 1.0 sec Cast Time,
1.0 sec After Cast Delay

Comments: Weak but very quick casting.

mg_soulstrike.name: Soul Strike
mg_soulstrike.description:
Soul Strike
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Napalm Beat 4
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: 1 Character
Description: Summons holy spirit to
inflict 100% MATK Ghost elemental
magical damage per hit on a target.
This skill inflicts additional damage
against Undead monsters.
[Lv 1]: 1 Hit, 1.2 sec After Cast Delay,
+5% damage to Undead
[Lv 2]: 1 Hit, 1.4 sec After Cast Delay,
+10% damage to Undead
[Lv 3]: 2 Hits, 1.6 sec After Cast Delay,
+15% damage to Undead
[Lv 4]: 2 Hits, 1.8 sec After Cast Delay,
+20% damage to Undead
[Lv 5]: 3 Hits, 2.0 sec After Cast Delay,
+25% damage to Undead
[Lv 6]: 3 Hits, 2.2 sec After Cast Delay,
+30% damage to Undead
[Lv 7]: 4 Hits, 2.4 sec After Cast Delay,
+35% damage to Undead
[Lv 8]: 4 Hits, 2.6 sec After Cast Delay,
+40% damage to Undead
[Lv 9]: 5 Hits, 2.8 sec After Cast Delay,
+45% damage to Undead
[Lv 10]: 5 Hits, 2.7 sec After Cast Delay,
+50% damage to Undead

Comments: Cast time is 0.5 sec at all levels.
Additional levels of this skill increase damage
at the cost of longer delays after cast.

al_demonbane.name: Demon Bane
al_demonbane.description:
Demon Bane
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Divine Protection 3
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases damage
against Demon and Undead monsters.
Base Level affects damage bonus.
Damage increased by this skill is added
after final damage is calculated.
[Lv 1]: Damage +3
[Lv 2]: Damage +6
[Lv 3]: Damage +9
[Lv 4]: Damage +12
[Lv 5]: Damage +15
[Lv 6]: Damage +18
[Lv 7]: Damage +21
[Lv 8]: Damage +24
[Lv 9]: Damage +27
[Lv 10]: Damage +30

Comments: The bonus from this skill is similar
to Weapon Masteries, in which they only offers
a flat increase at the end of damage
calculation. Players planning to jobchange
into Monks must max this skill to unlock the
basic Monk skill.

mc_overcharge.name: Overcharge
mc_overcharge.description:
Overcharge
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Discount 3
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases amount of Zeny
received for items sold to NPC shops.
[Lv 1]: 7% Overcharge
[Lv 2]: 9% Overcharge
[Lv 3]: 11% Overcharge
[Lv 4]: 13% Overcharge
[Lv 5]: 15% Overcharge
[Lv 6]: 17% Overcharge
[Lv 7]: 19% Overcharge
[Lv 8]: 21% Overcharge
[Lv 9]: 23% Overcharge
[Lv 10]: 24% Overcharge

al_ruwach.name: Ruwach
al_ruwach.description:
Ruwach
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Uses 10 SP to summon Holy
Spirit that will detect hidden
characters in 5x5 cells area around the
caster for 10 sec. If target is enemy,
this skill will inflict Holy elemental
magic damage that equal to 145% MATK.

Comments: Because the skill deals damage,
revealing an enemy may cause a short
animation lock.

al_heal.name: Heal
al_heal.description:
Heal
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Faith 10, Demon Bane 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Recovery
Target: 1 Character
Description: Restores target's HP.
Skill level, caster's Base Level and
total INT affect the amount of HP
restored.

Comments: This is the most basic healing
skill in the game. Using lower levels of Heal is
an effective way of not squandering your SP.
You can shortcut several levels of Heal to your
keyboard, or use the scrolling wheel.
Using Heal on undead enemies is commonly
refeered to as 'Heal Bombing' and in order to
do so, you must either hold the shift key, or
use the /ns command.

mg_sight.name: Sight
mg_sight.description:
Sight
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Uses 10 SP to summon a fire
ball that for 10 seconds will detect hidden
characters in 7x7 AoE around the caster.

Comments: If the skill is used by the means of
a Horong Card, removing the item containing
the card will immediately cancel the skill,
however the visual effect persists the entire duration.
Does not work against Stalker's Chase Walk.

mg_safetywall.name: Safety Wall
mg_safetywall.description:
Safety Wall
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Napalm Beat 7, Soul Strike 5
Requirement: Napalm Beat 7, Soul Strike 5
Requirement: Aspersio 4, Sanctuary 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Ground
Description: Creates a magic barrier on a
targeted spot that will block melee physical
attacks for the duration of the Safety Wall.
Consumes 1 Blue Gemstone.
[Lv 1]: Blocks 2 Hits, 4.0 sec Cast Time,
5 sec duration
[Lv 2]: Blocks 3 Hits, 3.5 sec Cast Time,
10 sec duration
[Lv 3]: Blocks 4 Hits, 3.0 sec Cast Time,
15 sec duration
[Lv 4]: Blocks 5 Hits, 2.5 sec Cast Time,
20 sec duration
[Lv 5]: Blocks 6 Hits, 2.0 sec Cast Time,
25 sec duration
[Lv 6]: Blocks 7 Hits, 1.5 sec Cast Time,
30 sec duration
[Lv 7]: Blocks 8 Hits, 1.0 sec Cast Time,
35 sec duration
[Lv 8]: Blocks 9 Hits, 1.0 sec Cast Time,
40 sec duration
[Lv 9]: Blocks 10 Hits, 1.0 sec Cast Time,
45 sec duration
[Lv 10]: Blocks 11 Hits, 1.0 sec Cast Time,
50 sec duration

Comments: Safety Wall blocks 1 melee hit,
regardless of how much damage it would
have dealt. This is a key skill for both
self preservation and to support allies,
in particular against MvPs.
Pneuma and Safety wall are mutually
exclusive, and where one exists the other
is inhibited. You can deny the use of Pneuma
by placing a Safety Wall near a target.

al_crucis.name: Signum Crucis
al_crucis.description:
Signum Crucis
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Demon Bane 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: Caster's View Range
Description: Reduces physical defense of
Undead elemental and Demon monsters in
the caster's vicinity.
[Lv 1]: DEF Reduction 14%,
27% success chance
[Lv 2]: DEF Reduction 18%,
31% success chance
[Lv 3]: DEF Reduction 22%,
35% success chance
[Lv 4]: DEF Reduction 26%,
39% success chance
[Lv 5]: DEF Reduction 30%,
43% success chance
[Lv 6]: DEF Reduction 34%,
47% success chance
[Lv 7]: DEF Reduction 38%,
51% success chance
[Lv 8]: DEF Reduction 42%,
55% success chance
[Lv 9]: DEF Reduction 46%,
59% success chance
[Lv 10]: DEF Reduction 50%,
63% success chance

Comments: One of the few debuffs that works
on Bosses and MvPs, shredding their Hard
DEF. Another useful aspect of this skill is that
it affects every enemy on screen, even
non-Demon/Undead. In a party, you can use
Signum Crucis to 'tap' all monsters on screen,
increasing the EXP wield.
A monster successfully affected will use
the /swt emote.

ac_owl.name: Owl's Eye
ac_owl.description:
Owl's Eye
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases DEX.
[Lv 1]: Dex +1
[Lv 2]: Dex +2
[Lv 3]: Dex +3
[Lv 4]: Dex +4
[Lv 5]: Dex +5
[Lv 6]: Dex +6
[Lv 7]: Dex +7
[Lv 8]: Dex +8
[Lv 9]: Dex +9
[Lv 10]: Dex +10

mc_pushcart.name: Pushcart
mc_pushcart.description:
Pushcart
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Enlarge Weight Limit 5
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Enables rental and use of
Pushcart which provide additional
storage for items, although items cannot
be directly used or equipped from
a Pushcart. Pushcart can be rented
from Kafra Employees.
Pushcart shortcut: (Alt+W)
[Lv 1]: 55% Movement speed
[Lv 2]: 60% Movement speed
[Lv 3]: 65% Movement speed
[Lv 4]: 70% Movement speed
[Lv 5]: 75% Movement speed
[Lv 6]: 80% Movement speed
[Lv 7]: 85% Movement speed
[Lv 8]: 90% Movement speed
[Lv 9]: 95% Movement speed
[Lv 10]: 100% Movement speed

al_teleport.name: Teleport
al_teleport.description:
Teleport
Max Level: 2
Requirement: Ruwach 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Teleports caster to another area.
[Lv 1]: Teleport to a random cell
[Lv 2]: Teleport to save point

Comments: Most servers allow players to
bypass the menu when using Teleport Lv 1.
Teleporting around a map is the most efficient
way of traversing large distances or seeking
dispersed enemies. Creamy Card allows
any character to learn Lv 1 of this skill.

al_cure.name: Cure
al_cure.description:
Cure
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Heal 2
Requirement: Faith 5
Requirement: Heal 2
Skill Form: Recovery
Description: Cures target from Silence,
Confusion and Blind status effects. When used
on Undead monster, this skill will inflicts
Confusion status.

Comments: You cannot cure Silence on
yourself since you cannot cast in the first
place. The Priest skill Status Recovery covers
most of the rest of common status effects.

mg_firewall.name: Fire Wall
mg_firewall.description:
Fire Wall
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Sight 1, Fire Ball 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: Ground
Description: Uses 40 SP to create a fire
barrier that inflicts 50% MATK Fire
elemental magic damage on upcoming enemies
and knock them 2 cells backward.
The Undead are not affected by the pushback.
Duration is 4 seconds +1 extra for every
skill level.

Comments: The wall occupies three cells and
is placed perpendicular from the line between
the caster and the target cell. Each cell can do
2 hits +1 per skill level. Because undead
enemies are not pushed back, they will be
instantly hit with every single 'charge' of the
Fire Wall tile. Using the skill on
the tile where the caster stands will result in a
North-South Fire Wall.

al_angelus.name: Angelus
al_angelus.description:
Angelus
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Divine Protection 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster and Party Members
Description: Temporarily increases
Defense of yourself and party members on
screen for the duration of skill.
[Lv 1]: DEF +5%
[Lv 2]: DEF +10%
[Lv 3]: DEF +15%
[Lv 4]: DEF +20%
[Lv 5]: DEF +25%
[Lv 6]: DEF +30%
[Lv 7]: DEF +35%
[Lv 8]: DEF +40%
[Lv 9]: DEF +45%
[Lv 10]: DEF +50%

Comments: Soft Defense is obtained almost
exclusively from investment into VIT, and thus
only characters with significant amounts of
VIT will reap any benefits from this skill.

ac_vulture.name: Vulture's Eye
ac_vulture.description:
Vulture's Eye
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Owl's Eye 3
Requirement: Owl's Eye 3
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases Attack Range
and HIT with Bow class weapons.
[Lv 1]: Range and HIT +1
[Lv 2]: Range and HIT +2
[Lv 3]: Range and HIT +3
[Lv 4]: Range and HIT +4
[Lv 5]: Range and HIT +5
[Lv 6]: Range and HIT +6
[Lv 7]: Range and HIT +7
[Lv 8]: Range and HIT +8
[Lv 9]: Range and HIT +9
[Lv 10]: Range and HIT +10

mc_vending.name: Vending
mc_vending.description:
Vending
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Pushcart 3
Skill Form: Active
Description: Opens a street stall for
selling items to other players. Skill
level affects the number of items that
can be vended at a time. The items you
want to sell must be in the Pushcart, and the
character must have his Pushcart equipped.
[Lv 1]: Vend 3 items
[Lv 2]: Vend 4 items
[Lv 3]: Vend 5 items
[Lv 4]: Vend 6 items
[Lv 5]: Vend 7 items
[Lv 6]: Vend 8 items
[Lv 7]: Vend 9 items
[Lv 8]: Vend 10 items
[Lv 9]: Vend 11 items
[Lv 10]: Vend 12 items

Comments: Double check your items to make
sure you're not selling things at the wrong
value! Depending on your server's rules and
configuration, there might be a predetermined
area for opening shops. Also depending on
server configuration, you may have to pay tax
on every sale. You must remain logged in for
the shop to be visible to players, unless the
server allows the use of @autotrade
command.

al_warp.name: Warp Portal
al_warp.description:
Warp Portal
Max Level: 4
Requirement: Teleport 2
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Ground
Description: Creates a Warp Portal that
will teleport those who enter it to
another area. Each Warp Portal can
teleport up to 8 people.
Consumes 1 Blue Gemstone.
[Lv 1]: Warp to Save Point
[Lv 2]: Enable 1 Memo point
[Lv 3]: Enable 2 Memo points
[Lv 4]: Enable 3 Memo points
[Memo Point]: Specific map area memorized
as a destination for a Warp Portal.
Type/memo in a target area to set
location as a Memo Point.

Comments: Indoor locations and Dungeon
floors cannot be memorized. Most servers will
block the ability to /memo on field maps that
contain MvPs or Boss monsters.

al_incagi.name: Increase AGI
al_incagi.description:
Increase Agility
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Heal 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Increases targeted
character's Movement and Attack Speed
for the duration of skill. Drains 15
HP from the caster after each cast
and will fail if the caster has less than 16 HP.
The increase is 2 +1 extra for every skill level.
Duration: 40 sec +20 extra for each skill level.

Comments: The increase in movement speed
is very significant.

al_blessing.name: Blessing
al_blessing.description:
Blessing
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Divine Protection 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Temporarily increases STR, DEX
and INT of the target and removes Curse and
Stone Curse effect(only on second stage). The
bonus is 1 point of STR, DEX and INT
respectively per skill level. Duration is
40 seconds +20 extra for each skill level.

Comments: When used to cure Curse status,
the target will not receive the buff. The skill can
be used offensively against Undead and
Demon monsters by holding shift, or using /ns
command. Players cannot be
offensively Blessed.

ac_concentration.name: Improve Concentration
ac_concentration.description:
Improve Concentration
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Vulture's Eye 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Boosts AGI and DEX
temporarily as well as detects nearby
hidden characters in 3x3 AoE.
[Lv 1]: Agi and Dex +3% for 60 sec
[Lv 2]: Agi and Dex +4% for 80 sec
[Lv 3]: Agi and Dex +5% for 100 sec
[Lv 4]: Agi and Dex +6% for 120 sec
[Lv 5]: Agi and Dex +7% for 140 sec
[Lv 6]: Agi and Dex +8% for 160 sec
[Lv 7]: Agi and Dex +9% for 180 sec
[Lv 8]: Agi and Dex +10% for 200 sec
[Lv 9]: Agi and Dex +11% for 220 sec
[Lv 10]: Agi and Dex +12% for 240 sec

mc_mammonite.name: Mammonite
mc_mammonite.description:
Mammonite
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: Uses the power of greed to
strike a single target with a strong
blow, dealing high damage. Consumes
some Zeny.
[Lv 1]: 150% damage, Cost 100 Zeny
[Lv 2]: 200% damage, Cost 200 Zeny
[Lv 3]: 250% damage, Cost 300 Zeny
[Lv 4]: 300% damage, Cost 400 Zeny
[Lv 5]: 350% damage, Cost 500 Zeny
[Lv 6]: 400% damage, Cost 600 Zeny
[Lv 7]: 450% damage, Cost 700 Zeny
[Lv 8]: 500% damage, Cost 800 Zeny
[Lv 9]: 550% damage, Cost 900 Zeny
[Lv 10]: 600% damage, Cost 1000 Zeny

Comments: The common way to use
Mammonite is to look for 'Zeny Positive'
monsters, whose drops will sell for more
than the cost of killing them.

al_pneuma.name: Pneuma
al_pneuma.description:
Pneuma
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Warp Portal 4
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Ground
Description: Uses 10 SP to create
barrier in 3x3 cells around targeted
cell that for 10 sec will protect
anyone inside it from long range
physical attacks.

Comments: Pneuma is an almost absolute
defense against any ranged damage. This skill
is vital for supporting parties, in particular
against Bosses and MvPs.
Pneuma cannot be cast to overlap an existing
Pneuma or Safety Wall. Pneumas will inhibit
enemies from positioning Safety Walls.
Furthermore, Pneumas will block ranged
damage, but targets can still be affected by an
attack's other effects, such as being
Stunned or Frozen.

al_decagi.name: Decrease AGI
al_decagi.description:
Decrease Agility
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Increase Agility 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: 1 Character
Description: Reduces target's Movement
Speed and AGI stat for the skill's duration.
[Lv 1]: AGI -3, 42% success,
lasts 30(monster) or 20(player) sec
[Lv 2]: AGI -4, 44% success,
lasts 40(monster) or 25(player) sec
[Lv 3]: AGI -5, 46% success,
lasts 50(monster) or 30(player) sec
[Lv 4]: AGI -6, 48% success,
lasts 60(monster) or 35(player) sec
[Lv 5]: AGI -7, 50% success,
lasts 70(monster) or 40(player) sec
[Lv 6]: AGI -8, 52% success,
lasts 80(monster) or 45(player) sec
[Lv 7]: AGI -9, 54% success,
lasts 90(monster) or 50(player) sec
[Lv 8]: AGI -10, 56% success,
lasts 100(monster) or 55(player) sec
[Lv 9]: AGI -11, 58% success,
lasts 110(monster) or 60(player) sec
[Lv 10]: AGI -12, 60% success,
lasts 120(monster) or 65(player) sec

Comments: This skill is a reverse
Increase Agility, to be used against enemies.
Both skills cancel each other.

mc_identify.name: Item Appraisal
mc_identify.description:
Item Appraisal
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Identifies an unknown item,
making it available for use.

nv_firstaid.name: First Aid
nv_firstaid.description:
First Aid
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Recovery
Target: Caster
Description: Uses 3 SP to restore 5 HP.

nv_trickdead.name: Play Dead
nv_trickdead.description:
Play Dead
Requirement: Finish Quest, Novice Only
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Feigns death to avoid the
menace of nearby enemies. The Play
Dead status is canceled by casting
this skill again.

Comments: This skill ceases to function after
jobchanging to any other class, including
Super Novice. Swordsman's Provoke and
Sage's Dispel can cancel the effect. All
monsters will be fooled, even Bosses and
MvPs.

nv_basic.name: Basic Skill
nv_basic.description:
Basic Skill
Max Level: 9
Enables the use of Basic Interface Skills.
[Lv 1]: Enables Trading
Allows the trading of items with other
character.
Right click on a character to initiate.
[Lv 2]: Enables Emotions
Alt+(0~9) and Ctrl+(1,-,=.)
Alt+L opens additional Emotion icons.
[Lv 3]: Enables Sitting
Sitting doubles HP and SP regeneration
speed.
Press the Insert key or type /sit.
[Lv 4]: Enables Chat Room Creation
Alt+C to open a Chat Room or click the
Chat button in the Basic Information
Window.
[Lv 5]: Join a Party
Character can join a party.
[Lv 6]: Enables Use of Kafra Storage
Allows use of Kafra Storage.
[Lv 7]: Organize a Party
Create a party by typing
/organize ''Party Name''
Set party options in the Party Window (Alt+Z).
[Lv 9]: Enables Change to First Job Class
Qualifies character for change from Novice
to one of the First classes.

tk_run.name: Running
tk_run.description:
Running
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Enables the caster to run with
incredible speed in a straight line. Using the
skill again while Running makes you stop.
At Lv7 and above, this skill has no Cast Time.
If the skill is used at Lv7 and above and then
immediately cancelled, the user will gain an
effect called Spurt.
Simply having the Running skill learned
will increase your auto-attack damage and
the damage of your Taekwon kicks. These
bonuses are ONLY for when you are unarmed.
[Lv 1]: 6 sec Cast Time, 100 SP, +10 damage
on Auto Attacks, +10% damage to Kicks
[Lv 2]: 5 sec Cast Time, 90 SP, +20 damage
on Auto Attacks, +20% damage to Kicks
[Lv 3]: 4 sec Cast Time, 80 SP, +30 damage
on Auto Attacks, +30% damage to Kicks
[Lv 4]: 3 sec Cast Time, 70 SP, +40 damage
on Auto Attacks, +40% damage to Kicks
[Lv 5]: 2 sec Cast Time, 60 SP, +50 damage
on Auto Attacks, +50% damage to Kicks
[Lv 6]: 1 sec Cast Time, 50 SP, +60 damage
on Auto Attacks, +60% damage to Kicks
[Lv 7]: 0 sec Cast Time, 40 SP, +70 damage
on Auto Attacks, +70% damage to Kicks
[Lv 8]: 0 sec Cast Time, 30 SP, +80 damage
on Auto Attacks, +80% damage to Kicks
[Lv 9]: 0 sec Cast Time, 20 SP, +90 damage
on Auto Attacks, +90% damage to Kicks
[Lv 10]: 0 sec Cast Time, 10 SP, +100 damage
on Auto Attacks, +100% damage to Kicks

Spurt:
STR +10.
Break Fall will activate on Melee attacks.
Doubles the damage of Flywing Side Kick
when it is used during Running.

Comments: ASPD determines how long you
must run before you're able to stop or use
Flying Side Kick. High ASPD means you can
do it sooner.
Using /bingbing and /bangbang can help you
change the direction you wish to run without
moving, although you still need to stop to
change directions.

tk_stormkick.name: Tornado Kick
tk_stormkick.description:
Tornado Kick
Max Level: 7
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: Enemies around the caster
Description: Caster must be in Tornado Stance
to perform this skill which will attack all
enemies within a 5*5 cell area around the
caster.
Soul Linkers cannot perform this skill.
[Lv 1]: 14 SP, 180% damage
[Lv 2]: 12 SP, 200% damage
[Lv 3]: 10 SP, 220% damage
[Lv 4]: 8 SP, 240% damage
[Lv 5]: 6 SP, 260% damage
[Lv 6]: 4 SP, 280% damage
[Lv 7]: 2 SP, 300% damage

Comments: This is the only Taekwon kick
that does AoE damage.

tk_downkick.name: Heel Drop
tk_downkick.description:
Heel Drop
Max Level: 7
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: Caster must be in Heel Drop
Stance to perform this skill which will inflict
damage and cause the Stun effect for 3
seconds on the targeted enemy.
Soul Linkers cannot perform this skill.
[Lv 1]: 14 SP, 180% damage
[Lv 2]: 12 SP, 200% damage
[Lv 3]: 10 SP, 220% damage
[Lv 4]: 8 SP, 240% damage
[Lv 5]: 6 SP, 260% damage
[Lv 6]: 4 SP, 280% damage
[Lv 7]: 2 SP, 300% damage

tk_turnkick.name: Roundhouse Kick
tk_turnkick.description:
Roundhouse Kick
Max Level: 7
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: Caster must be in Roundhouse
Stance to perform this skill which will damage
its target and push back enemies around the
target. Enemies that are pushed do not
receive any damage but will be stunned.
Soul Linkers cannot perform this skill.
[Lv 1]: 14 SP, 220% damage
[Lv 2]: 12 SP, 250% damage
[Lv 3]: 10 SP, 280% damage
[Lv 4]: 8 SP, 310% damage
[Lv 5]: 6 SP, 340% damage
[Lv 6]: 4 SP, 370% damage
[Lv 7]: 2 SP, 400% damage

tk_counter.name: Counter Kick
tk_counter.description:
Counter Kick
Max Level: 7
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: Caster must be in Counter Kick
Stance to perform this skill which will always
hit its target.
Soul Linkers cannot perform this skill.
[Lv 1]: 14 SP, 220% damage
[Lv 2]: 12 SP, 250% damage
[Lv 3]: 10 SP, 280% damage
[Lv 4]: 8 SP, 310% damage
[Lv 5]: 6 SP, 340% damage
[Lv 6]: 4 SP, 370% damage
[Lv 7]: 2 SP, 400% damage

tk_jumpkick.name: Flying Kick
tk_jumpkick.description:
Flying Side Kick
Max Level: 7
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: Attacks a distant enemy with a kick
that instantly closes the gap between the
target and the player.
When activated by Break Fall, the user's Base
Level will influence the damage.
Damage is further improved when used it is
used by a player that is in Spurt status.
Flying Side Kick will remove most Taekwon
related buffs on targets, including Soul Links
and Linker buffs.
[Lv 1]: 70 SP, 40% ATK when used normally
[Lv 2]: 60 SP, 50% ATK when used normally
[Lv 3]: 50 SP, 60% ATK when used normally
[Lv 4]: 40 SP, 70% ATK when used normally
[Lv 5]: 30 SP, 80% ATK when used normally
[Lv 6]: 20 SP, 90% ATK when used normally
[Lv 7]: 10 SP, 100% ATK when used normally
[Break Fall]: (4*BaseLevel)% ATK
[Running]: (4*BaseLevel)% ATK
[Spurt]: Multiply damage by 2

Comments: Removes all Soul Links, Kaite,
Kaahi, One-Hand Quicken, Full Adrenaline
Rush and Berserk Potion Pitcher.

tk_highjump.name: Taekwon Jump
tk_highjump.description:
High Jump
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Leaps to a targeted cell within the
skill's range.
So long as the targeted cell is accessible, the
caster can leap over walls and obstacles.
Leap cannot be used in areas where Fly
Wings are disabled, except for WoE maps.
[Lv 1]: 5 sec Cast Time, 2 cells
[Lv 2]: 4 sec Cast Time, 4 cells
[Lv 3]: 3 sec Cast Time, 6 cells
[Lv 4]: 2 sec Cast Time, 8 cells
[Lv 5]: 1 sec Cast Time, 10 cells

Comments: Attemping to jump into a cell that
cannot be entered will cause the character to
jump in place.
This skill works on WoE 1.0 castles but not
WoE 2.0 zones.
Using /bingbing and /bangbang can help you
change the direction you wish to jump without
moving.

tk_readystorm.name: Tornado Stance
tk_readystorm.description:
Tornado Stance
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Tornado Kick 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Stance Skill
Target: Caster
Description: Enables a 15% chance of
automatically entering Tornado Stance when
the caster successfully hits a target.
Soul Linkers cannot perform this skill.
[Lv 1]: 0 Sec Cast Time, 1 SP

Comments: All Stance Prepare skills work the
same way. You need to have the Preparation
active(you will see a Buff icon) and auto-attack
enemies. By chance, you will trigger a Stance
and then you must use the Kick skill itself to
activate it.
AGI and DEX will reduce the time it takes for
you to be able to resume your auto-attacks.

tk_readydown.name: Heel Drop Stance
tk_readydown.description:
Heel Drop Stance
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Heel Drop 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Stance Skill
Target: Caster
Description: Enables a 15% chance of
automatically entering Heel Drop Stance when
the caster successfully hits a target.
Soul Linkers cannot perform this skill.
[Lv 1]: 0 Sec Cast Time, 1 SP

Comments: All Stance Prepare skills work the
same way. You need to have the Preparation

tk_readyturn.description:

Skill Form: Active
Type: Stance Skill
Target: Caster
Description: Enables a 15% chance of
automatically entering Roundhouse Stance

tk_readycounter.description:

Skill Form: Active

Target: Caster
Description: Enables a 20% chance of
automatically entering Counter Kick Stance
when the caster successfully hits a target.

AGI and DEX will reduce the time it takes for

tk_dodge.name: Tumbling
tk_dodge.description:
Break Fall
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Flying Kick 7
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Enables a 20% chance of
blocking long ranged physical attacks.
When caster is in Spurt status (after
performing Lv 7 Sprint or higher), Break Fall
will also block other kinds of attacks.
[Lv 1]: 0 Sec Cast Time, 1 SP

Comments: Using Flying Side Kick after
Break Fall activates will immediately cast the
skill against the enemy that targeted you.
Using Flying Side Kick in this way doesn't
require aiming and clicking the skill.
Soul Linkers can use this skill and benefit
from the dodge effects, but cannot use
Flying Side Kick.

tk_hptime.name: Peaceful Break
tk_hptime.description:
Peaceful Rest
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: When two or more Taekwon class
characters sit next to each other, HP will be
restored for you.
This HP restoration is affected by your MaxHP.
[Lv 1]: 30 HP +[(1*MaxHP)/500]
[Lv 2]: 60 HP +[(2*MaxHP)/500]
[Lv 3]: 90 HP +[(3*MaxHP)/500]
[Lv 4]: 120 HP +[(4*MaxHP)/500]
[Lv 5]: 160 HP +[(5*MaxHP)/500]
[Lv 6]: 180 HP +[(6*MaxHP)/500]
[Lv 7]: 210 HP +[(7*MaxHP)/500]
[Lv 8]: 240 HP +[(8*MaxHP)/500]
[Lv 9]: 270 HP +[(9*MaxHP)/500]
[Lv 10]: 300 HP +[(10*MaxHP)/500]

Comments: For these Rest skills to work, the
other Taekwon needs to have learned the skill.
Even if they only have the skill at Lv1, you will
activate the effect at the level you have learned,
but if they do not have the skill at all, it will not
work. Each one will recover at the level they
will have learned.

tk_sptime.name: Happy Break
tk_sptime.description:
Enjoyable Rest
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: When two or more Taekwon class
characters sit next to each other, SP will be
restored for you.
This SP restoration is affected by your MaxSP.
If the user user does /doridori while this
skill is active, you will gain a special effect
called Happy Break. While under this effect,
you are able to use any Earth Spike Scroll
while only having a very small chance of
consuming the item.
The Soul Linker passive Kaina further
improves the recovery from this skill.
[Lv 1]: 3 SP +[(1*MaxSP)/500] SP, 10% chance
to consume Earth Spike Scroll
[Lv 2]: 6 SP +[(2*MaxSP)/500] SP, 9% chance
to consume Earth Spike Scroll
[Lv 3]: 9 SP +[(3*MaxSP)/500] SP, 8% chance
to consume Earth Spike Scroll
[Lv 4]: 12 SP +[(4*MaxSP)/500] SP, 7% chance
to consume Earth Spike Scroll
[Lv 5]: 16 SP +[(5*MaxSP)/500] SP, 6% chance
to consume Earth Spike Scroll
[Lv 6]: 18 SP +[(6*MaxSP)/500] SP, 5% chance
to consume Earth Spike Scroll
[Lv 7]: 21 SP +[(7*MaxSP)/500] SP, 4% chance
to consume Earth Spike Scroll
[Lv 8]: 24 SP +[(8*MaxSP)/500] SP, 3% chance
to consume Earth Spike Scroll
[Lv 9]: 27 SP +[(9*MaxSP)/500] SP, 2% chance
to consume Earth Spike Scroll
[Lv 10]: 30 SP +[(10*MaxSP)/500] SP, 1% chance
to consume Earth Spike Scroll

Comments: If you want to trigger Happy Break,
sit next to another Taekwon, Star Gladiator or
Soul Linker, do /doridori a few times and wait
for the SP tick to appear. They don't need to be
in the same party. You do need the SP recovery
tick to happen, so you must not be full SP.

tk_power.name: Kihop
tk_power.description:
Kihop
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases Attack Power based on
the number of Party Members on the same
map. The Taekwon himself is excluded.
[Lv 1]: 2% per person in party
[Lv 2]: 4% per person in party
[Lv 3]: 6% per person in party
[Lv 4]: 8% per person in party
[Lv 5]: 10% per person in party

Comments: This is a boost directly applied
to your ATK. It is not visible on the Stat Window
but it will increase your damage significantly.
The party members must be on the same
map but don't need to be on screen or even
alive.

tk_sevenwind.name: Mild Wind
tk_sevenwind.description:
Warm Wind
Max Level: 7
Requirement: Peaceful Break 5,
Happy Break 5, Kihop 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Summons a wind that will enchant
the caster's attacks for 5 minutes with an
elemental property based on the level of the
casted skill.
[Lv 1]: Earth
[Lv 2]: Wind
[Lv 3]: Water
[Lv 4]: Fire
[Lv 5]: Ghost
[Lv 6]: Shadow
[Lv 7]: Holy

Comments: Assign different skill levels of this
skill to different keys so that you can quickly
switch elements. The four basic elements
cost 20 SP while Holy, Shadow and Ghost
cost 50. The visual effect displays the Kanji
for each element's name.

tk_mission.name: Taekwon Mission
tk_mission.description:
TaeKwon Mission
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Kihop 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Ranking (/taekwon)
Target: Caster
Description: This skill is disabled once a
character changes to an advanced job, such
as Star Gladiator or Soul Linker.
Activating this skill will display the current
monster target for the Taekwon Mission.
Taekwons will earn 1 Taekwon
Mission Point by defeating 100 of the target
monster.
Fulfilling the 100 target monster quota will
begin a new Taekwon Mission with a randomly
chosen target.
Taekwon's that achieve the Top 10
Taekwon Ranking by earning the most
Taekwon Mission Points can string combos
with the Tornado Kick, Roundhouse, Heel
Drop, and Counter Kick skills.
Taekwon Rankers at Base Level 90 and
above with have tripled MaxHP and MaxSP,
and will be able to use all Taekwon skills.
The '/taekwon' command will show rankings.

Comments: The benefits granted by becoming
a Ranker can turn Taekwon into a viable class,
even if they cannot jobchange.
There is a 1% chance of resetting your Target
Monster every time you use this skill, but this
will only happen if you are at 0% progress.
In order to keep a Kick Chain going, you must
alternate different kicks. Using the same kick
twice will end the combo. You must activate a
kick's stance to begin the combo.
The default list of Target Monsters includes
Mini Bosses(such as Ghostring and
Deviling), monsters with very limited spawn
amounts(Alice, Giant Whispe), monsters that
only spawn inside Guild Dungeons(Giant
Spider, Gajomart), monsters that you would
likely never be able to kill on your own(such
as Bio 3 enemies), and even monsters that
do not spawn at all(Boiled Rice, Photon
Cannon). As such, it's very likely that you would
have to reset at least a few times.
Jobchanging after becoming a Ranker will
cause you to lose all benefits from this.

nv_firstaid.name: First Aid
nv_firstaid.description:
First Aid
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Recovery
Target: Caster
Description: Uses 3 SP to restore 5 HP.

nv_trickdead.name: Play Dead
nv_trickdead.description:
Play Dead
Requirement: Finish Quest, Novice Only
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Feigns death to avoid the
menace of nearby enemies. The Play
Dead status is canceled by casting
this skill again.

Comments: This skill ceases to function after
jobchanging to any other class, including
Super Novice. Swordsman's Provoke and
Sage's Dispel can cancel the effect. All
monsters will be fooled, even Bosses and
MvPs.

nv_basic.name: Basic Skill
nv_basic.description:
Basic Skill
Max Level: 9
Enables the use of Basic Interface Skills.
[Lv 1]: Enables Trading
Allows the trading of items with other
character.
Right click on a character to initiate.
[Lv 2]: Enables Emotions
Alt+(0~9) and Ctrl+(1,-,=.)
Alt+L opens additional Emotion icons.
[Lv 3]: Enables Sitting
Sitting doubles HP and SP regeneration
speed.
Press the Insert key or type /sit.
[Lv 4]: Enables Chat Room Creation
Alt+C to open a Chat Room or click the
Chat button in the Basic Information
Window.
[Lv 5]: Join a Party
Character can join a party.
[Lv 6]: Enables Use of Kafra Storage
Allows use of Kafra Storage.
[Lv 7]: Organize a Party
Create a party by typing
/organize ''Party Name''
Set party options in the Party Window (Alt+Z).
[Lv 9]: Enables Change to First Job Class
Qualifies character for change from Novice
to one of the First classes.

tk_run.name: Running
tk_run.description:
Running
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Enables the caster to run with
incredible speed in a straight line. Using the
skill again while Running makes you stop.
At Lv7 and above, this skill has no Cast Time.
If the skill is used at Lv7 and above and then
immediately cancelled, the user will gain an
effect called Spurt.
Simply having the Running skill learned
will increase your auto-attack damage and
the damage of your Taekwon kicks. These
bonuses are ONLY for when you are unarmed.
[Lv 1]: 6 sec Cast Time, 100 SP, +10 damage
on Auto Attacks, +10% damage to Kicks
[Lv 2]: 5 sec Cast Time, 90 SP, +20 damage
on Auto Attacks, +20% damage to Kicks
[Lv 3]: 4 sec Cast Time, 80 SP, +30 damage
on Auto Attacks, +30% damage to Kicks
[Lv 4]: 3 sec Cast Time, 70 SP, +40 damage
on Auto Attacks, +40% damage to Kicks
[Lv 5]: 2 sec Cast Time, 60 SP, +50 damage
on Auto Attacks, +50% damage to Kicks
[Lv 6]: 1 sec Cast Time, 50 SP, +60 damage
on Auto Attacks, +60% damage to Kicks
[Lv 7]: 0 sec Cast Time, 40 SP, +70 damage
on Auto Attacks, +70% damage to Kicks
[Lv 8]: 0 sec Cast Time, 30 SP, +80 damage
on Auto Attacks, +80% damage to Kicks
[Lv 9]: 0 sec Cast Time, 20 SP, +90 damage
on Auto Attacks, +90% damage to Kicks
[Lv 10]: 0 sec Cast Time, 10 SP, +100 damage
on Auto Attacks, +100% damage to Kicks

Spurt:
STR +10.
Break Fall will activate on Melee attacks.
Doubles the damage of Flywing Side Kick
when it is used during Running.

Comments: ASPD determines how long you
must run before you're able to stop or use
Flying Side Kick. High ASPD means you can
do it sooner.
Using /bingbing and /bangbang can help you
change the direction you wish to run without
moving, although you still need to stop to
change directions.

tk_stormkick.name: Tornado Kick
tk_stormkick.description:
Tornado Kick
Max Level: 7
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: Enemies around the caster
Description: Caster must be in Tornado Stance
to perform this skill which will attack all
enemies within a 5*5 cell area around the
caster.
Soul Linkers cannot perform this skill.
[Lv 1]: 14 SP, 180% damage
[Lv 2]: 12 SP, 200% damage
[Lv 3]: 10 SP, 220% damage
[Lv 4]: 8 SP, 240% damage
[Lv 5]: 6 SP, 260% damage
[Lv 6]: 4 SP, 280% damage
[Lv 7]: 2 SP, 300% damage

Comments: This is the only Taekwon kick
that does AoE damage.

tk_downkick.name: Heel Drop
tk_downkick.description:
Heel Drop
Max Level: 7
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: Caster must be in Heel Drop
Stance to perform this skill which will inflict
damage and cause the Stun effect for 3
seconds on the targeted enemy.
Soul Linkers cannot perform this skill.
[Lv 1]: 14 SP, 180% damage
[Lv 2]: 12 SP, 200% damage
[Lv 3]: 10 SP, 220% damage
[Lv 4]: 8 SP, 240% damage
[Lv 5]: 6 SP, 260% damage
[Lv 6]: 4 SP, 280% damage
[Lv 7]: 2 SP, 300% damage

tk_turnkick.description:

Max Level: 7
Skill Form: Active

Soul Linkers cannot perform this skill.

[Lv 3]: 10 SP, 280% damage
[Lv 4]: 8 SP, 310% damage
[Lv 5]: 6 SP, 340% damage
[Lv 6]: 4 SP, 370% damage
[Lv 7]: 2 SP, 400% damage

[Lv 6]: 4 SP, 370% damage
[Lv 7]: 2 SP, 400% damage

characters sit next to each other, SP will be
restored for you.
This SP restoration is affected by your MaxSP.
If the user user does /doridori while this
skill is active, you will gain a special effect
called Happy Break. While under this effect,
you are able to use any Earth Spike Scroll
while only having a very small chance of
consuming the item.
The Soul Linker passive Kaina further
improves the recovery from this skill.
[Lv 1]: 3 SP +[(1*MaxSP)/500] SP, 10% chance
to consume Earth Spike Scroll
[Lv 2]: 6 SP +[(2*MaxSP)/500] SP, 9% chance
to consume Earth Spike Scroll
[Lv 3]: 9 SP +[(3*MaxSP)/500] SP, 8% chance
to consume Earth Spike Scroll
[Lv 4]: 12 SP +[(4*MaxSP)/500] SP, 7% chance
to consume Earth Spike Scroll
[Lv 5]: 16 SP +[(5*MaxSP)/500] SP, 6% chance
to consume Earth Spike Scroll
[Lv 6]: 18 SP +[(6*MaxSP)/500] SP, 5% chance
to consume Earth Spike Scroll
[Lv 7]: 21 SP +[(7*MaxSP)/500] SP, 4% chance
to consume Earth Spike Scroll
[Lv 8]: 24 SP +[(8*MaxSP)/500] SP, 3% chance
to consume Earth Spike Scroll
[Lv 9]: 27 SP +[(9*MaxSP)/500] SP, 2% chance
to consume Earth Spike Scroll
[Lv 10]: 30 SP +[(10*MaxSP)/500] SP, 1% chance
to consume Earth Spike Scroll

Comments: If you want to trigger Happy Break,
sit next to another Taekwon, Star Gladiator or
Soul Linker, do /doridori a few times and wait
for the SP tick to appear. They don't need to be
in the same party. You do need the SP recovery
tick to happen, so you must not be full SP.

tk_power.name: Kihop
tk_power.description:
Kihop
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases Attack Power based on
the number of Party Members on the same
map. The Taekwon himself is excluded.
[Lv 1]: 2% per person in party
[Lv 2]: 4% per person in party
[Lv 3]: 6% per person in party
[Lv 4]: 8% per person in party
[Lv 5]: 10% per person in party

Comments: This is a boost directly applied
to your ATK. It is not visible on the Stat Window
but it will increase your damage significantly.
The party members must be on the same
map but don't need to be on screen or even
alive.

tk_sevenwind.name: Mild Wind
tk_sevenwind.description:
Warm Wind
Max Level: 7
Requirement: Peaceful Break 5,
Happy Break 5, Kihop 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Summons a wind that will enchant
the caster's attacks for 5 minutes with an
elemental property based on the level of the
casted skill.
[Lv 1]: Earth
[Lv 2]: Wind
[Lv 3]: Water
[Lv 4]: Fire
[Lv 5]: Ghost
[Lv 6]: Shadow
[Lv 7]: Holy

Comments: Assign different skill levels of this
skill to different keys so that you can quickly
switch elements. The four basic elements
cost 20 SP while Holy, Shadow and Ghost
cost 50. The visual effect displays the Kanji
for each element's name.

tk_mission.name: Taekwon Mission
tk_mission.description:
TaeKwon Mission
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Kihop 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Ranking (/taekwon)
Target: Caster
Description: This skill is disabled once a
character changes to an advanced job, such
as Star Gladiator or Soul Linker.
Activating this skill will display the current
monster target for the Taekwon Mission.
Taekwons will earn 1 Taekwon
Mission Point by defeating 100 of the target
monster.
Fulfilling the 100 target monster quota will
begin a new Taekwon Mission with a randomly
chosen target.
Taekwon's that achieve the Top 10
Taekwon Ranking by earning the most
Taekwon Mission Points can string combos
with the Tornado Kick, Roundhouse, Heel
Drop, and Counter Kick skills.
Taekwon Rankers at Base Level 90 and
above with have tripled MaxHP and MaxSP,
and will be able to use all Taekwon skills.
The '/taekwon' command will show rankings.

Comments: The benefits granted by becoming
a Ranker can turn Taekwon into a viable class,
even if they cannot jobchange.
There is a 1% chance of resetting your Target
Monster every time you use this skill, but this
will only happen if you are at 0% progress.
In order to keep a Kick Chain going, you must
alternate different kicks. Using the same kick
twice will end the combo. You must activate a
kick's stance to begin the combo.
The default list of Target Monsters includes
Mini Bosses(such as Ghostring and
Deviling), monsters with very limited spawn
amounts(Alice, Giant Whispe), monsters that
only spawn inside Guild Dungeons(Giant
Spider, Gajomart), monsters that you would
likely never be able to kill on your own(such
as Bio 3 enemies), and even monsters that
do not spawn at all(Boiled Rice, Photon
Cannon). As such, it's very likely that you would
have to reset at least a few times.
Jobchanging after becoming a Ranker will
cause you to lose all benefits from this.

sg_feel.name: Feeling the Sun Moon and Stars
sg_feel.description:
Feeling of the Sun, Moon and Stars
Max Level: 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Designation
Target: Caster
Description: Designate the current map
as one of the cosmic alignments,
Sun, Moon or Star, for the use of
certain skills.
This designation is semi-permanent unless
your server has implemented resets for it.
Using the skill again after you've already set
a location will simply remind you of your
choice.
Only 1 map may be designated for each
cosmic alignment.
[Lv 1]: Designate current map as the Place
of the Sun
[Lv 2]: Designate current map as the Place
of the Moon
[Lv 3]: Designate current map as the Place
of the Stars

Comments: Certain skills will only function
on those maps, so make sure you're 100%
certain about using this skill before you commit.
Resetting this choice requires going through
the procedure for obtaining Angel of the Sun,
Moon and Stars.

sg_hate.name: Hatred of the Sun Moon and Stars
sg_hate.description:
Hatred of the Sun, Moon, and Stars
Max Level: 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Designation
Target: 1 Character
Description: When you use this skill, the name
of the monster whom you just marked will be
displayed and marked.
You can also use this on player characters,
and they will be categorized by class, ignoring
size and HP.
Example: It will show above the player
characters, Champion, if target player was a
Champion character, and on all other
characters who are of Champion class.
Those choices are semi-permanent unless
your server has implemented ways of resetting
these options.
[Lv 1]: Mark as Target of the Sun. On mobs, it
can only be used on Small monsters.
[Lv 2]: Mark as Target of the Moon. On mobs, it
can only be used on Medium size monsters
that have a Maximum HP higher than 6,000.
[Lv 3]: Mark as Target of the Stars. On mobs, it
can only be used on Large size monsters that
have a Maximum HP higher than 20,000.

Comments: This skill will set which monsters
will be your targets. Only up to three targets.
Resetting these options require going through
the procedure for obtaining Angel of the Sun,
Moon and Stars.

sg_devil.name: Demon of the Sun Moon and Stars
sg_devil.description:
Demon of the Sun, Moon and Stars
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Job Level 50
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increasing this skills' level will
permanently increase Attack Speed and reduce
character's vision, similarly to the Blind effect.
[Lv 1]: ASPD +3%
[Lv 2]: ASPD +6%
[Lv 3]: ASPD +9%
[Lv 4]: ASPD +12%
[Lv 5]: ASPD +15%
[Lv 6]: ASPD +18%
[Lv 7]: ASPD +21%
[Lv 8]: ASPD +24%
[Lv 9]: ASPD +27%
[Lv 10]: ASPD +30%

Comments: Be very careful with this skill. The
blindness caused by Demon can be very
crippling to gameplay. The blindness has
gradual steps for each skill level. Up to Lv3,
you should still be able to see most of the
screen but beyond that, it's very much like
being permanently under the Blind effect.
This Blindness is not the same as the status
effect, and the reductions to HIT and FLEE are
not present. This visual effect CANNOT be
bypassed by using /effect or /mineffect.
Putting points before you've maxed your Job
Level does absolutely nothing. But once you do
hit that level, the blindness will hit you all at
once.
Using this skill combined with Comfort of
the Stars will allow you to reach 190 ASPD
very easily.
If your server has increased Max Level for Job,
this skill will only work when you've reached
that max.

sg_knowledge.name: Knowledge of the Sun Moon and Stars
sg_knowledge.description:
Knowledge of the Sun, Moon and Stars
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: When you login the game on a
map (only login, NOT by walking/teleporting), if
that map is designated as Place of the Sun,
or Moon, or Stars, this passive skill grants you
increased Maximum Weight Limit.
If you stay outside the Place of the Sun, or
Moon, or Stars for too long, this effect end.
[Lv 1]: +10%
[Lv 2]: +20%
[Lv 3]: +30%
[Lv 4]: +40%
[Lv 5]: +50%
[Lv 6]: +60%
[Lv 7]: +70%
[Lv 8]: +80%
[Lv 9]: +90%
[Lv 10]: +100%

Comments: This skill does not work unless
the user logs into the character from the
Character Selection screen, into the map that
was saved. This makes it impossible to use
the skill on maps that send you back to your
Save Point if you relog.
The effect persists for 10 minutes after leaving
the map, but will end immediately if you die.

sg_sun_warm.name: Warmth of the Sun
sg_sun_warm.description:
Warmth of the Sun
Max Level: 3
Requirement: Feeling of Sun Moon Star 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: Enemies around the caster
Description: You can use this skill anytime
on a map designated as 'Place of the Sun'.
When this skill is used, it creates an offensive
barrier around you, affecting 3x3 cells
centered on you. It deals 100% ATK damage
to monsters right next to you, and push them
back by 2 cells. Enemy players suffer
SP drain instead of HP, and no push back.
Every time the barrier hits, it takes away 2 SP. If
you do not have enough SP, the barrier will
disappear without making damage.
[Lv 1]: lasts 10 sec
[Lv 2]: lasts 20 sec
[Lv 3]: lasts 60 sec

Comments: If the barrier is unable to push the
monster back, it will simply keep hitting it
until either one of you dies or your SP ends.
The speed in which it hits is extremely fast.
Bosses cannot be pushed back and will take
the full brunt of this skill every time.
This skill is dispelled when you teleport or
use a Fly Wing. If you have triggered the effect
of Miracle of the Sun, Moon and Stars, you can
use this on any map.

sg_sun_comfort.name: Comfort of the Sun
sg_sun_comfort.description:
Comfort of the Sun
Max Level: 4
Requirement: Feeling of Sun Moon Star 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: It can be used anytime when you
are on the Day of the Sun in the map that is
memorized as 'Place of the Sun'.
This skill increases your DEF by
[(BaseLevel+DEX+LUK)/2].
[Lv 1]: 80 sec
[Lv 2]: 160 sec
[Lv 3]: 240 sec
[Lv 4]: 320 sec

Comments: Days of the Sun are the even
numbered days. When Miracle of the Sun,
Moon and Stars is active, this can be used
anytime, anywhere.

sg_sun_anger.name: Anger of the Sun
sg_sun_anger.description:
Anger of the Sun
Max Level: 3
Requirement: Hatred of Sun Moon Star 1
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Grants Attack Power against
monsters which are marked as the Target
of the Sun.
[Lv 1]: +((BaseLevel+LUK+DEX)/9)% damage
[Lv 2]: +((BaseLevel+LUK+DEX)/6)% damage
[Lv 3]: +((BaseLevel+LUK+DEX)/3)% damage

sg_sun_bless.name: Blessing of the Sun
sg_sun_bless.description:
Blessing of the Sun
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Feeling of Sun Moon Star 1,
Hatred of Sun Moon Star 1
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases EXP given by Target of
the Sun monsters during the Day of the Sun.
[Lv 1]: +10% EXP
[Lv 2]: +20% EXP
[Lv 3]: +30% EXP
[Lv 4]: +40% EXP
[Lv 5]: +50% EXP

Comments: Days of the Sun are those which
are Even Numbered. The Bonus EXP is
applied to the monster and will affect party
members if EXP Share is enabled.
Stacks multiplicatively with EXP Manuals.
For example, if you have +50% EXP from this
skill and consume a +50% manual, the result
is NOT 200%, but rather 225%(150% of 150%).

sg_friend.name: Friend of the Sun Moon and Stars
sg_friend.description:
Friend of the Sun, Moon and Stars
Max Level: 3
Skill Form: Passive
Target: Monk Class Party Member
Description: When a Star Gladiator uses
Counter Kick, all Monks in the same party will
have their Triple Attack chance increased.
If the Monks who are in same party as a Star
Gladiator activate a Combo Finish, Star
Gladiator's chance of Counter Kick increases.
[Lv 1]: +100%, base chance x 1.2
[Lv 2]: +150%, base chance x 1.5
[Lv 3]: +200%, base chance x 2

sg_moon_warm.name: Warmth of the Moon
sg_moon_warm.description:
Warmth of the Moon
Max Level: 3
Requirement: Feeling of Sun Moon Star 2
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: Enemies around the caster
Description: You can use this skill anytime
on a map designated as 'Place of the Moon'.
When this skill is used, it creates an offensive
barrier around you, affecting 3x3 cells
centered on you. It deals 100% ATK damage
to monsters right next to you, and push them
back by 2 cells. Enemy players suffer
SP drain instead of HP, and no push back.
Every time the barrier hits, it takes away 2 SP. If
you do not have enough SP, the barrier will
disappear without making damage.
[Lv 1]: lasts 10 sec
[Lv 2]: lasts 20 sec
[Lv 3]: lasts 60 sec

Comments: If the barrier is unable to push the
monster back, it will simply keep hitting it
until either one of you dies or your SP ends.
The speed in which it hits is extremely fast.
Bosses cannot be pushed back and will take
the full brunt of this skill every time.
This skill is dispelled when you teleport or
use a Fly Wing. If you have triggered the effect
of Miracle of the Sun, Moon and Stars, you can
use this on any map.

sg_moon_comfort.name: Comfort of the Moon
sg_moon_comfort.description:
Comfort of the Moon
Max Level: 4
Requirement: Feeling of Sun Moon Star 2
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: It can be used anytime when
you are on the Day of the Moon in the map that
is memorized as 'Place of the Moon'.
This skill increases your FLEE by
[(BaseLevel+DEX+LUK)/10].
[Lv 1]: 80 sec
[Lv 2]: 160 sec
[Lv 3]: 240 sec
[Lv 4]: 320 sec

Comments: Days of the Moon are the odd
numbered days. When Miracle of the Sun,
Moon and Stars is active, this can be used
anytime, anywhere.

sg_moon_anger.name: Anger of the Moon
sg_moon_anger.description:
Anger of the Moon
Max Level: 3
Requirement: Hatred of Sun Moon Star 2
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Grants Attack Power against
monsters which are marked as the Target
of the Moon.
[Lv 1]: +((BaseLevel+LUK+DEX)/9)% damage
[Lv 2]: +((BaseLevel+LUK+DEX)/6)% damage
[Lv 3]: +((BaseLevel+LUK+DEX)/3)% damage

sg_moon_bless.name: Blessing of the Moon
sg_moon_bless.description:
Blessing of the Moon
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Feeling of Sun Moon Star 2,
Hatred of Sun Moon Star 2
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases EXP given by Target of
the Moon monsters during the Day of the
Moon by (10*SkillLV)%.
[Lv 1]: +10% EXP
[Lv 2]: +20% EXP
[Lv 3]: +30% EXP
[Lv 4]: +40% EXP
[Lv 5]: +50% EXP

Comments: Days of the Moon are those which
are Odd Numbered. The Bonus EXP is
applied to the monster and will affect party
members if EXP Share is enabled.
Stacks multiplicatively with EXP Manuals.
For example, if you have +50% EXP from this
skill and consume a +50% manual, the result
is NOT 200%, but rather 225%(150% of 150%).

sg_star_warm.name: Warmth of the Stars
sg_star_warm.description:
Warmth of the Stars
Max Level: 3
Requirement: Feeling of Sun Moon Star 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: Enemies around the caster
Description: You can use this skill anytime
on a map designated as 'Place of the Stars'.
When this skill is used, it creates an offensive
barrier around you, affecting 3x3 cells
centered on you. It deals 100% ATK damage
to monsters right next to you, and push them
back by 2 cells. Enemy players suffer
SP drain instead of HP, and no push back.
Every time the barrier hits, it takes away 2 SP. If
you do not have enough SP, the barrier will
disappear without making damage.
[Lv 1]: lasts 10 sec
[Lv 2]: lasts 20 sec
[Lv 3]: lasts 60 sec

Comments: If the barrier is unable to push the
monster back, it will simply keep hitting it
until either one of you dies or your SP ends.
The speed in which it hits is extremely fast.
Bosses cannot be pushed back and will take
the full brunt of this skill every time.
This skill is dispelled when you teleport or
use a Fly Wing. If you have triggered the effect
of Miracle of the Sun, Moon and Stars, you can
use this on any map.

sg_star_comfort.name: Comfort of the Stars
sg_star_comfort.description:
Comfort of the Stars
Max Level: 4
Requirement: Feeling of Sun Moon Star 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: It can be used anytime when you
are on the Day of the Stars in the map that is
memorized as 'Place of the Stars'.
This skill increases your ASPD by
[(BaseLevel+DEX+LUK)/10]%.
[Lv 1]: 80 sec
[Lv 2]: 160 sec
[Lv 3]: 240 sec
[Lv 4]: 320 sec

Comments: Days of the Stars are the multiples
of 5. When Miracle of the Sun, Moon and Stars
is active, this can be used anytime, anywhere.

sg_star_anger.name: Anger of the Stars
sg_star_anger.description:
Anger of the Stars
Max Level: 3
Requirement: Hatred of Sun Moon Star 3
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Grants Attack Power against
monsters which are marked as the Target
of the Stars.
[Lv 1]: +((BaseLevel+LUK+DEX+STR)/9)%
damage
[Lv 2]: +((BaseLevel+LUK+DEX+STR)/6)%
damage
[Lv 3]: +((BaseLevel+LUK+DEX+STR)/3)%
damage

Comments: The Lunar version of Anger is
better than the other two. It features STR
scaling as well. When you are under the effect
of Miracle of the Sun, Moon and Stars, this is
the version of Anger that will be applied to all
monsters.

sg_star_bless.name: Blessing of the Stars
sg_star_bless.description:
Blessing of the Stars
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Feeling of Sun Moon Star 3,
Hatred of Sun Moon Star 3
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases EXP given by Target of
the Stars monsters in the Day of the Stars by
(20*SkillLV)%.
[Lv 1]: +20% EXP
[Lv 2]: +40% EXP
[Lv 3]: +60% EXP
[Lv 4]: +80% EXP
[Lv 5]: +100% EXP

Comments: Days of the Stars are those which
are multiples of 5. The Bonus EXP is applied to
the monster and will affect party members if
EXP Share is enabled.
Stacks multiplicatively with EXP Manuals.
For example, if you have +100% EXP from this
skill and consume a +50% manual, the result
is NOT 250%, but rather 300%(150% of 200%).
It is important to note that this version of the
skill is superior to the Sun and Moon versions.
When Miracle of the Sun, Moon and Stars is
active, this is the version of the skill that will be
applied to every monster.

nv_firstaid.name: First Aid
nv_firstaid.description:
First Aid
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Recovery
Target: Caster
Description: Uses 3 SP to restore 5 HP.

nv_trickdead.name: Play Dead
nv_trickdead.description:
Play Dead
Requirement: Finish Quest, Novice Only
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Feigns death to avoid the
menace of nearby enemies. The Play
Dead status is canceled by casting
this skill again.

Comments: This skill ceases to function after
jobchanging to any other class, including
Super Novice. Swordsman's Provoke and
Sage's Dispel can cancel the effect. All
monsters will be fooled, even Bosses and
MvPs.

sg_fusion.name: Union of the Sun Moon and Stars
sg_fusion.description:
Union of the Sun, Moon and Stars
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Knowledge of Sun Moon Star 9,
Spirit State
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: The power of this skill is
unleashed when linked to a Soul Linker using
the Star Gladiator Spirit.
When linked, your Movement Speed is
increased, your attacks ignore DEF and FLEE,
but you lose 2% of your HP every time you
attack a monster and 8% HP if the target is a
player. If the enemy being attacked is a player
and you perform an attack while under
20% HP, you will die immediately.

Comments: The Movement Speed granted by
Union is very significant. Combined with a
simple Increase Agility or similar buff, Star
Gladiators can move as fast as Soul Linked
Stalkers.
When using this skill, be prepared with plenty
of healing items on hand, because it will drain
your HP at an alarming rate, specially when
used in combination with a Warmth skill.
This skill is not unlocked automatically when
a Soul Link is given to you, the user must
have spent a Skill Point to learn the skill. You
must have 9 points into Knowledge in order to
unlock Union.
Sometimes, the client will not allow you to put
a point into this skill due to a glitch. If that
happens, make sure you have the necessary
points into Knowledge, switch the Skill Window
format to the alternative List Mode and assign
the point in this manner.

nv_basic.name: Basic Skill
nv_basic.description:
Basic Skill
Max Level: 9
Enables the use of Basic Interface Skills.
[Lv 1]: Enables Trading
Allows the trading of items with other
character.
Right click on a character to initiate.
[Lv 2]: Enables Emotions
Alt+(0~9) and Ctrl+(1,-,=.)
Alt+L opens additional Emotion icons.
[Lv 3]: Enables Sitting
Sitting doubles HP and SP regeneration
speed.
Press the Insert key or type /sit.
[Lv 4]: Enables Chat Room Creation
Alt+C to open a Chat Room or click the
Chat button in the Basic Information
Window.
[Lv 5]: Join a Party
