Character can join a party.
[Lv 6]: Enables Use of Kafra Storage
Allows use of Kafra Storage.
[Lv 7]: Organize a Party
Create a party by typing
/organize ''Party Name''
Set party options in the Party Window (Alt+Z).
[Lv 9]: Enables Change to First Job Class
Qualifies character for change from Novice
to one of the First classes.

tk_run.name: Running
tk_run.description:
Running
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Enables the caster to run with
incredible speed in a straight line. Using the
skill again while Running makes you stop.
At Lv7 and above, this skill has no Cast Time.
If the skill is used at Lv7 and above and then
immediately cancelled, the user will gain an
effect called Spurt.
Simply having the Running skill learned
will increase your auto-attack damage and
the damage of your Taekwon kicks. These
bonuses are ONLY for when you are unarmed.
[Lv 1]: 6 sec Cast Time, 100 SP, +10 damage
on Auto Attacks, +10% damage to Kicks
[Lv 2]: 5 sec Cast Time, 90 SP, +20 damage
on Auto Attacks, +20% damage to Kicks
[Lv 3]: 4 sec Cast Time, 80 SP, +30 damage
on Auto Attacks, +30% damage to Kicks
[Lv 4]: 3 sec Cast Time, 70 SP, +40 damage
on Auto Attacks, +40% damage to Kicks
[Lv 5]: 2 sec Cast Time, 60 SP, +50 damage
on Auto Attacks, +50% damage to Kicks
[Lv 6]: 1 sec Cast Time, 50 SP, +60 damage
on Auto Attacks, +60% damage to Kicks
[Lv 7]: 0 sec Cast Time, 40 SP, +70 damage
on Auto Attacks, +70% damage to Kicks
[Lv 8]: 0 sec Cast Time, 30 SP, +80 damage
on Auto Attacks, +80% damage to Kicks
[Lv 9]: 0 sec Cast Time, 20 SP, +90 damage
on Auto Attacks, +90% damage to Kicks
[Lv 10]: 0 sec Cast Time, 10 SP, +100 damage
on Auto Attacks, +100% damage to Kicks

Spurt:
STR +10.
Break Fall will activate on Melee attacks.
Doubles the damage of Flywing Side Kick
when it is used during Running.

Comments: ASPD determines how long you
must run before you're able to stop or use
Flying Side Kick. High ASPD means you can
do it sooner.
Using /bingbing and /bangbang can help you
change the direction you wish to run without
moving, although you still need to stop to
change directions.

tk_stormkick.name: Tornado Kick
tk_stormkick.description:
Tornado Kick
Max Level: 7
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: Enemies around the caster
Description: Caster must be in Tornado Stance
to perform this skill which will attack all
enemies within a 5*5 cell area around the
caster.
Soul Linkers cannot perform this skill.
[Lv 1]: 14 SP, 180% damage
[Lv 2]: 12 SP, 200% damage
[Lv 3]: 10 SP, 220% damage
[Lv 4]: 8 SP, 240% damage
[Lv 5]: 6 SP, 260% damage
[Lv 6]: 4 SP, 280% damage
[Lv 7]: 2 SP, 300% damage

Comments: This is the only Taekwon kick
that does AoE damage.

tk_downkick.name: Heel Drop
tk_downkick.description:
Heel Drop
Max Level: 7
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: Caster must be in Heel Drop
Stance to perform this skill which will inflict
damage and cause the Stun effect for 3
seconds on the targeted enemy.
Soul Linkers cannot perform this skill.
[Lv 1]: 14 SP, 180% damage
[Lv 2]: 12 SP, 200% damage
[Lv 3]: 10 SP, 220% damage
[Lv 4]: 8 SP, 240% damage
[Lv 5]: 6 SP, 260% damage
[Lv 6]: 4 SP, 280% damage
[Lv 7]: 2 SP, 300% damage

tk_turnkick.name: Roundhouse Kick
tk_turnkick.description:
Roundhouse Kick
Max Level: 7
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: Caster must be in Roundhouse
Stance to perform this skill which will damage
its target and push back enemies around the
target. Enemies that are pushed do not
receive any damage but will be stunned.
Soul Linkers cannot perform this skill.
[Lv 1]: 14 SP, 220% damage
[Lv 2]: 12 SP, 250% damage
[Lv 3]: 10 SP, 280% damage
[Lv 4]: 8 SP, 310% damage
[Lv 5]: 6 SP, 340% damage
[Lv 6]: 4 SP, 370% damage
[Lv 7]: 2 SP, 400% damage

tk_counter.name: Counter Kick
tk_counter.description:
Counter Kick
Max Level: 7
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: Caster must be in Counter Kick
Stance to perform this skill which will always
hit its target.
Soul Linkers cannot perform this skill.
[Lv 1]: 14 SP, 220% damage
[Lv 2]: 12 SP, 250% damage
[Lv 3]: 10 SP, 280% damage
[Lv 4]: 8 SP, 310% damage
[Lv 5]: 6 SP, 340% damage
[Lv 6]: 4 SP, 370% damage
[Lv 7]: 2 SP, 400% damage

tk_jumpkick.name: Flying Kick
tk_jumpkick.description:
Flying Side Kick
Max Level: 7
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: Attacks a distant enemy with a kick
that instantly closes the gap between the
target and the player.
When activated by Break Fall, the user's Base
Level will influence the damage.
Damage is further improved when used it is
used by a player that is in Spurt status.
Flying Side Kick will remove most Taekwon
related buffs on targets, including Soul Links
and Linker buffs.
[Lv 1]: 70 SP, 40% ATK when used normally
[Lv 2]: 60 SP, 50% ATK when used normally
[Lv 3]: 50 SP, 60% ATK when used normally
[Lv 4]: 40 SP, 70% ATK when used normally
[Lv 5]: 30 SP, 80% ATK when used normally
[Lv 6]: 20 SP, 90% ATK when used normally
[Lv 7]: 10 SP, 100% ATK when used normally
[Break Fall]: (4*BaseLevel)% ATK
[Running]: (4*BaseLevel)% ATK
[Spurt]: Multiply damage by 2

Comments: Removes all Soul Links, Kaite,
Kaahi, One-Hand Quicken, Full Adrenaline
Rush and Berserk Potion Pitcher.

tk_highjump.name: Taekwon Jump
tk_highjump.description:
High Jump
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Leaps to a targeted cell within the
skill's range.
So long as the targeted cell is accessible, the
caster can leap over walls and obstacles.
Leap cannot be used in areas where Fly
Wings are disabled, except for WoE maps.
[Lv 1]: 5 sec Cast Time, 2 cells
[Lv 2]: 4 sec Cast Time, 4 cells
[Lv 3]: 3 sec Cast Time, 6 cells
[Lv 4]: 2 sec Cast Time, 8 cells
[Lv 5]: 1 sec Cast Time, 10 cells

Comments: Attemping to jump into a cell that
cannot be entered will cause the character to
jump in place.
This skill works on WoE 1.0 castles but not
WoE 2.0 zones.
Using /bingbing and /bangbang can help you
change the direction you wish to jump without
moving.

tk_readystorm.name: Tornado Stance
tk_readystorm.description:
Tornado Stance
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Tornado Kick 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Stance Skill
Target: Caster
Description: Enables a 15% chance of
automatically entering Tornado Stance when
the caster successfully hits a target.
Soul Linkers cannot perform this skill.
[Lv 1]: 0 Sec Cast Time, 1 SP

Comments: All Stance Prepare skills work the
same way. You need to have the Preparation
active(you will see a Buff icon) and auto-attack
enemies. By chance, you will trigger a Stance
and then you must use the Kick skill itself to
activate it.
AGI and DEX will reduce the time it takes for
you to be able to resume your auto-attacks.

tk_readydown.name: Heel Drop Stance
tk_readydown.description:
Heel Drop Stance
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Heel Drop 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Stance Skill
Target: Caster
Description: Enables a 15% chance of
automatically entering Heel Drop Stance when
the caster successfully hits a target.
Soul Linkers cannot perform this skill.
[Lv 1]: 0 Sec Cast Time, 1 SP

Comments: All Stance Prepare skills work the
same way. You need to have the Preparation
active(you will see a Buff icon) and auto-attack
enemies. By chance, you will trigger a Stance
and then you must use the Kick skill itself to
activate it.
AGI and DEX will reduce the time it takes for
you to be able to resume your auto-attacks.

tk_readyturn.name: Roundhouse Stance
tk_readyturn.description:
Roundhouse Stance
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Roundhouse Kick 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Stance Skill
Target: Caster
Description: Enables a 15% chance of
automatically entering Roundhouse Stance
when the caster successfully hits a target.
Soul Linkers cannot perform this skill.
[Lv 1]: 0 Sec Cast Time, 1 SP

Comments: All Stance Prepare skills work the
same way. You need to have the Preparation
active(you will see a Buff icon) and auto-attack
enemies. By chance, you will trigger a Stance
and then you must use the Kick skill itself to
activate it.
AGI and DEX will reduce the time it takes for
you to be able to resume your auto-attacks.

tk_readycounter.name: Counter Kick Stance
tk_readycounter.description:
Counter Kick Stance
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Counter Kick 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Stance Skill
Target: Caster
Description: Enables a 20% chance of
automatically entering Counter Kick Stance
when the caster successfully hits a target.
Soul Linkers cannot perform this skill.
[Lv 1]: 0 Sec Cast Time, 1 SP

Comments: All Stance Prepare skills work the
same way. You need to have the Preparation
active(you will see a Buff icon) and auto-attack
enemies. By chance, you will trigger a Stance
and then you must use the Kick skill itself to
activate it.
AGI and DEX will reduce the time it takes for
you to be able to resume your auto-attacks.

tk_dodge.name: Tumbling
tk_dodge.description:
Break Fall
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Flying Kick 7
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Enables a 20% chance of
blocking long ranged physical attacks.
When caster is in Spurt status (after
performing Lv 7 Sprint or higher), Break Fall
will also block other kinds of attacks.
[Lv 1]: 0 Sec Cast Time, 1 SP

Comments: Using Flying Side Kick after
Break Fall activates will immediately cast the
skill against the enemy that targeted you.
Using Flying Side Kick in this way doesn't
require aiming and clicking the skill.
Soul Linkers can use this skill and benefit
from the dodge effects, but cannot use
Flying Side Kick.

tk_hptime.name: Peaceful Break
tk_hptime.description:
Peaceful Rest
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: When two or more Taekwon class
characters sit next to each other, HP will be
restored for you.
This HP restoration is affected by your MaxHP.
[Lv 1]: 30 HP +[(1*MaxHP)/500]
[Lv 2]: 60 HP +[(2*MaxHP)/500]
[Lv 3]: 90 HP +[(3*MaxHP)/500]
[Lv 4]: 120 HP +[(4*MaxHP)/500]
[Lv 5]: 160 HP +[(5*MaxHP)/500]
[Lv 6]: 180 HP +[(6*MaxHP)/500]
[Lv 7]: 210 HP +[(7*MaxHP)/500]
[Lv 8]: 240 HP +[(8*MaxHP)/500]
[Lv 9]: 270 HP +[(9*MaxHP)/500]
[Lv 10]: 300 HP +[(10*MaxHP)/500]

Comments: For these Rest skills to work, the
other Taekwon needs to have learned the skill.
Even if they only have the skill at Lv1, you will
activate the effect at the level you have learned,
but if they do not have the skill at all, it will not
work. Each one will recover at the level they
will have learned.

tk_sptime.name: Happy Break
tk_sptime.description:
Enjoyable Rest
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: When two or more Taekwon class
characters sit next to each other, SP will be
restored for you.
This SP restoration is affected by your MaxSP.
If the user user does /doridori while this
skill is active, you will gain a special effect
called Happy Break. While under this effect,
you are able to use any Earth Spike Scroll
while only having a very small chance of
consuming the item.
The Soul Linker passive Kaina further
improves the recovery from this skill.
[Lv 1]: 3 SP +[(1*MaxSP)/500] SP, 10% chance
to consume Earth Spike Scroll
[Lv 2]: 6 SP +[(2*MaxSP)/500] SP, 9% chance
to consume Earth Spike Scroll
[Lv 3]: 9 SP +[(3*MaxSP)/500] SP, 8% chance
to consume Earth Spike Scroll
[Lv 4]: 12 SP +[(4*MaxSP)/500] SP, 7% chance
to consume Earth Spike Scroll
[Lv 5]: 16 SP +[(5*MaxSP)/500] SP, 6% chance
to consume Earth Spike Scroll
[Lv 6]: 18 SP +[(6*MaxSP)/500] SP, 5% chance
to consume Earth Spike Scroll
[Lv 7]: 21 SP +[(7*MaxSP)/500] SP, 4% chance
to consume Earth Spike Scroll
[Lv 8]: 24 SP +[(8*MaxSP)/500] SP, 3% chance
to consume Earth Spike Scroll
[Lv 9]: 27 SP +[(9*MaxSP)/500] SP, 2% chance
to consume Earth Spike Scroll
[Lv 10]: 30 SP +[(10*MaxSP)/500] SP, 1% chance
to consume Earth Spike Scroll

Comments: If you want to trigger Happy Break,
sit next to another Taekwon, Star Gladiator or
Soul Linker, do /doridori a few times and wait
for the SP tick to appear. They don't need to be
in the same party. You do need the SP recovery
tick to happen, so you must not be full SP.

tk_power.name: Kihop
tk_power.description:
Kihop
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases Attack Power based on
the number of Party Members on the same
map. The Taekwon himself is excluded.
[Lv 1]: 2% per person in party
[Lv 2]: 4% per person in party
[Lv 3]: 6% per person in party
[Lv 4]: 8% per person in party
[Lv 5]: 10% per person in party

Comments: This is a boost directly applied
to your ATK. It is not visible on the Stat Window
but it will increase your damage significantly.
The party members must be on the same
map but don't need to be on screen or even
alive.

tk_sevenwind.name: Mild Wind
tk_sevenwind.description:
Warm Wind
Max Level: 7
Requirement: Peaceful Break 5,
Happy Break 5, Kihop 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Summons a wind that will enchant
the caster's attacks for 5 minutes with an
elemental property based on the level of the
casted skill.
[Lv 1]: Earth
[Lv 2]: Wind
[Lv 3]: Water
[Lv 4]: Fire
[Lv 5]: Ghost
[Lv 6]: Shadow
[Lv 7]: Holy

Comments: Assign different skill levels of this
skill to different keys so that you can quickly
switch elements. The four basic elements
cost 20 SP while Holy, Shadow and Ghost
cost 50. The visual effect displays the Kanji
for each element's name.

tk_mission.name: Taekwon Mission
tk_mission.description:
TaeKwon Mission
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Kihop 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Ranking (/taekwon)
Target: Caster
Description: This skill is disabled once a
character changes to an advanced job, such
as Star Gladiator or Soul Linker.
Activating this skill will display the current
monster target for the Taekwon Mission.
Taekwons will earn 1 Taekwon
Mission Point by defeating 100 of the target
monster.
Fulfilling the 100 target monster quota will
begin a new Taekwon Mission with a randomly
chosen target.
Taekwon's that achieve the Top 10
Taekwon Ranking by earning the most
Taekwon Mission Points can string combos
with the Tornado Kick, Roundhouse, Heel
Drop, and Counter Kick skills.
Taekwon Rankers at Base Level 90 and
above with have tripled MaxHP and MaxSP,
and will be able to use all Taekwon skills.
The '/taekwon' command will show rankings.

Comments: The benefits granted by becoming
a Ranker can turn Taekwon into a viable class,
even if they cannot jobchange.
There is a 1% chance of resetting your Target
Monster every time you use this skill, but this
will only happen if you are at 0% progress.
In order to keep a Kick Chain going, you must
alternate different kicks. Using the same kick
twice will end the combo. You must activate a
kick's stance to begin the combo.
The default list of Target Monsters includes
Mini Bosses(such as Ghostring and
Deviling), monsters with very limited spawn
amounts(Alice, Giant Whispe), monsters that
only spawn inside Guild Dungeons(Giant
Spider, Gajomart), monsters that you would
likely never be able to kill on your own(such
as Bio 3 enemies), and even monsters that
do not spawn at all(Boiled Rice, Photon
Cannon). As such, it's very likely that you would
have to reset at least a few times.
Jobchanging after becoming a Ranker will
cause you to lose all benefits from this.

sl_alchemist.name: Spirit of the Alchemist
sl_alchemist.description:
Alchemist Spirit
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Alchemist Classes
Description: Soul Links to Alchemists and
Creators, giving them special buffs.
- Increases effectiveness of Potion Pitcher by
1% per Base Level of the Alchemist.
- Allows usage of Berserk Pitcher skill.
- Alchemists having Pharmacy LV 10 are
allowed to use Twilight Alchemy I, II and III.

Comments: The bonus to Potion Pitcher is
a multiplicative bonus for the healed value.
A Lv99 Alchemist or Creator will heal for +99%
more.
Twilight Alchemy skills have very specific
requirements to use, including some party
members needed to use. Make sure to read
their descriptions closely to avoid losing your
precious materials.

sl_star.name: Spirit of the Star Gladiator
sl_star.description:
Star Gladiator Spirit
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Star Gladiator Classes
Description: Soul Links to Star Gladiators,
allowing the usage of the Union of the Sun,
Moon and Stars skill.

Comments: The Star Gladiator still needs to
have learned the skill by spending a Skill
Point.

sl_assasin.name: Spirit of the Assasin
sl_assasin.description:
Assassin Spirit
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Assassin Classes
Description: Soul Links to Assassins and
Assassins Cross, boosting their Sonic Blow
by doubling its damage and halving the After
Cast Delay for the skill's duration.
However, the bonuses are reduced to +25%
bonus damage and no Cool Down bonus
during WoE.

Comments: There's a few things to keep in
mind about this Soul Link's effect.
Sonic Blow, in addition to having After Cast
Delay, has an additional effect that prevents the
user from moving for a few moments after use.
This movement binding effect lasts 2 seconds,
which perfectly matches After Cast Delay of
the skill. This Soul Link will release the
Assassin from the delay but they still won't be
able to move.
Originally, Sonic Blow would display a very long
animation, showing the Assassin character
dealing multiple blows to the enemy. However,
Ragnarok Online clients dated at 2018-11-21
and newer had this effect removed. When the
animation existed, Assassins could not spam
the skill faster than the animation would play,
but with the visual animation effect removed,
the After Cast Delay does indeed result in the
ability to use Sonic Blow twice as fast.

sl_crusader.name: Spirit of the Crusader
sl_crusader.description:
Crusader Spirit
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Crusader Classes
Description: Soul Links to Crusaders and
Paladins, making their Shield Boomerang
never miss, do double the damage, and
halving its after cast delay.

sl_barddancer.name: Spirit of the Artist
sl_barddancer.description:
Bard and Dancer Spirits
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Bard & Dancer Classes
Description: Soul Links to Bards, Clowns,
Dancers and Gypsies, giving them special
buffs.
- All Songs and Dances will affect the
Bard/Dancer him/herself.
- Reduces the Movement Speed penalty while
performing. For a Bard or Dancer that has
mastered Musical/Dancing Lesson, the
penalty is entirely removed.
- If a Bard or Dancer has mastered a solo
song or dance, they will be allowed to use
the Lv10 version of the equivalent song or
dance belonging to the other genre.

Comments: It's important to keep in mind that
Musical Lessons and Dancing Lesson are
distinct skills and will not improve the effect of
songs and dances that belong to the other
genre.

sl_supernovice.name: Spirit of the Supernovice
sl_supernovice.description:
Super Novice Spirit
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Star Gladiator Spirit 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Super Novice Classes
Description: Soul Links to Super Novices,
giving them special buffs.
- Super Novices above LV 90 will be
temporarily able to equip ALL
Upper/Middle/Lower headgears.
- Super Novices above LV 90 have 1% chance
to 'erase' the death record, enabling them to
once more obtain the +10 to All Stats effect
from never having died.
- Super Novices above LV 96 will be
temporarily able to equip LV 4 Daggers,
H Swords, Axes, Maces, and Staves.

Comments: The Helm and Weapon benefits
allow Super Novices to use hats and weapons
that normally they would not be able to wear.
Even gear that is only usable by Trans Jobs
can be used in this case. However, once the
Soul Link ends, those pieces will be removed
upon relog.

sl_blacksmith.name: Spirit of the Blacksmith
sl_blacksmith.description:
Blacksmith Spirit
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Alchemist Spirit 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Blacksmith Classes
Description: Soul Links to Blacksmiths and
Whitesmiths, allowing players that have
mastered Adrenaline Rush to use the skill Full
Adrenaline Rush.

Comments: This version of the skill gives
+30% ASPD to the user and +20% to everyone
else in the party. However, unlike the regular
Adrenaline Rush, it works for every non-ranged
weapon, not just Axes or Maces.

sl_soullinker.name: Spirit of the Soul Linker
sl_soullinker.description:
Soul Linker Spirit
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Star Gladiator Spirit 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Soul Linker Classes
Description: Soul Links to other Soul Linkers,
allowing them to use 'Ka- Type' skills on any
other character, for the skill's duration.

Comments: Normally, a Soul Linker can only
use Ka- Type skills on himself, his own family,
or other Soul Linkers. With this effect, they can
use it on any character without restrictions.

sl_rogue.name: Spirit of the Rogue
sl_rogue.description:
Rogue Spirit
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Assassin Spirit 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Rogue Classes
Description: Soul Links to Rogues and
Stalkers, giving them special buffs.
- Becomes entirely immune to Sage's Dispel.
- If Preserve is active, also becomes immune
to the Dispeling effect of Flying Side Kick
- Potions created by ranked Alchemists will
heal even more.
- STR bonus from Chase Walk will last
5 minutes instead of 30 seconds.
- Increases Movement Speed while in Chase
Walk.

Comments: The Movement Speed gain from
this link is very significant and will stack with
other Move Speed buffs such as Increase
Agility.

sl_knight.name: Spirit of the Knight
sl_knight.description:
Knight Spirit
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Crusader Spirit 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Knight Classes
Description: Soul Links to Knights and Lord
Knights, allowing those who have Two-Hand
Quicken LV 10 to use One-Hand Quicken for
the skill's duration.

sl_hunter.name: Spirit of the Hunter
sl_hunter.description:
Hunter Spirit
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Bard and Dancer Spirit 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Blacksmith Classes
Description: Soul Links to Hunters and
Snipers, giving them special buffs for the
skill's duration.
- Effectiveness of Beast Bane is increased by
Hunters/Snipers STR.
- If the character has mastered Double Srafe,
they will be able to use Beast Strafing.

Comments: Beast Strafing is a skill that scales
very strongly with STR.
The improvement to Beast Bane is simply
adding +1 mastery damage for every point of
STR.

sl_high.name: Spirit of Rebirth
sl_high.description:
Rebirth Spirit
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Super Novice Spirit 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1st Transcendent Classes
Description: Calls upon the spirits of the most
powerful 1st Transcendent Class warriors
ever so that they can lend their powers to their
successors.
This skill will increase every Stat for friendly
st Transcendent characters based on their
Base Level, but each Stat bonus will not
exceed +50.
[Lv 1]: 460 SP, 150 sec duration
[Lv 2]: 360 SP, 200 sec duration
[Lv 3]: 260 SP, 250 sec duration
[Lv 4]: 160 SP, 300 sec duration
[Lv 5]: 60 SP, 350 sec duration

Comments: This skill will attempt to boost
each of your stats, so that they will be equal to
your Base Level - 10. This works similar to
Marionette Control.
Only usable up to Base Level 69.

sl_monk.name: Spirit of the Monk
sl_monk.description:
Monk Spirit
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Monk Classes
Description: Soul Links to Monks and
Champions, giving them special buffs.
- Combo Finish attack becomes a 5x5 cell
splash attack.
- SP Cost of combo skills is decreased.
- Allow SP regeneration in Critical Explosion
state, and after Asura Strike as well.

sl_kaupe.name: Kaupe
sl_kaupe.description:
Kaupe
Max Level: 3
Requirement: Assassin Spirit 1,
Rogue Spirit 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
[Ka-] Skills: Can only be used on
family members and other Soul Linkers
Description: Allows the target to absolutely
evade an enemy attack. Evades all types of
attacks (normal, skills, spells), but for area
multi-hit spells(such as Storm Gust or Lord of
Vermilion) only the 1st hit is dodged.
When you evade even once, the effect
disappears.
[Lv 1]: 33% evade chance
[Lv 2]: 66% evade chance
[Lv 3]: 100% evade chance

Comments: Can be used to block the first hit
of an MvP's Earthquake.

sl_ske.name: Eske
sl_ske.description:
Eske
Max Level: 3
Requirement: Knight Spirit 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: 1 Character
[Es-] Skills: Can only be used on monsters.
Description: Increases the monster's ATK by
+300% but halves their DEF. You can cast
Esma within 3 seconds after using Eske.
If it is used on a player character, nothing
happens and the caster will be stunned for 0.5
seconds.
[Lv 1]: Lasts 10 seconds, 45 SP
[Lv 2]: Lasts 20 seconds, 30 SP
[Lv 3]: Lasts 30 seconds, 15 SP

Comments: This is the easiest way there is to
buff a monster on purpose. Keep in mind that
many servers have rules that prohibit such
griefing behavior.

sl_sage.name: Spirit of the Sage
sl_sage.description:
Sage Spirit
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Sage Classes
Description: Soul Links to Sages and
Professors, allowing their Auto Spell skill to
always produce LV 10 Bolts if the Sage has
learned that much in the Bolt skill.

sl_kaina.name: Kaina
sl_kaina.description:
Kaina
Max Level: 7
Requirement: Happy Break 1
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Improves the power of Enjoyable
Rest and increases your MaxSP. Also reduces
the SP Cost of Estin, Estun and Esma by tiers
depending on your Base Level. This reduction
is 3% per Skill Level between Base 70~79,
5% between 80~89 and 7% above Lv90.
[Lv 1]: +30 MaxSP, +40% SP recovery from
Enjoyable Rest, 3/5/7% Cost Reduction
[Lv 2]: +60 MaxSP, +50% SP recovery from
Enjoyable Rest, 6/10/14% Cost Reduction
[Lv 3]: +90 MaxSP, +60% SP recovery from
Enjoyable Rest, 9/15/21% Cost Reduction
[Lv 4]: +120 MaxSP, +70% SP recovery from
Enjoyable Rest, 12/20/28% Cost Reduction
[Lv 5]: +150 MaxSP, +80% SP recovery from
Enjoyable Rest, 15/25/35% Cost Reduction
[Lv 6]: +180 MaxSP, +90% SP recovery from
Enjoyable Rest, 18/30/42% Cost Reduction
[Lv 7]: +210 MaxSP, +100% SP recovery from
Enjoyable Rest, 21/35/49% Cost Reduction

sl_priest.name: Spirit of the Priest
sl_priest.description:
Priest Spirit
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Monk Spirit 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Priest Classes
Description: Soul Links to Priests and High
Priests, boosting the power of Holy Light by
a factor of 5x, but also increasing its SP Cost
by 5x as well for the skill's duration.

sl_ska.name: Eska
sl_ska.description:
Eska
Max Level: 3
Requirement: Monk Spirit 1
Type: Debuff
Target: 1 Character
[Es-] Skills: Can only be used on monsters.
Description: Force the target monster to enter
a state similar to Monk's Steel Body. Soft MDEF
is set to 90, Movement Speed and ASPD are
reduced. On every attack, a random value
between 0 and 100 Soft DEF is added.
Works on MvPs and Bosses.
If it is used on a player character, nothing
happens and the caster will be stunned for 0.5
seconds.
[Lv 1]: Lasts 10 seconds, 100 SP
[Lv 2]: Lasts 20 seconds, 80 SP
[Lv 3]: Lasts 30 seconds, 60 SP

Comments: This skill does absolutely nothing
to the Hard DEF and Hard MDEF values, only
the Soft values are altered.
If a monster has very high INT, using Eska on
it before doing magical damage with Esma
should result in higher damage. The value
for Soft MDEF will be set to 90, regardless of
whether it was higher or lower.
When supporting an ally that is using an Ice
Pick or Thanatos Card, it is always worth it to
use Eska on an enemy, since it will increase
the Soft DEF value instead of setting it to a fixed
value.

sl_wizard.name: Spirit of the Wizard
sl_wizard.description:
Wizard Spirit
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Sage Spirit 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Wizard Classes
Description: Soul Links to Wizards and High
Wizards, allowing them to cast all Gemstone
requiring skills without using them up for the
skill's duration.
Additionally, while Soul Linked, Wizard's spells
that hit enemy players under the protection of
Soul Linker's Kaite will not be reflected back
to the Wizard. However, in order for this effect
to take place, you must have a Crystal
Fragment in your inventory, and for each reflect
that was countered, one Crystal Fragment will
be consumed.

Comments: The Reflect protection from this
Soul Link is only effective against Kaite.
Equipment based reflect effects, such as the
ones granted by Maya Card and Frus Card,
will not be covered by this.
You still need at least one Gemstone in your
inventory to use the skills, even if they won't
be consumed. The skill Ganbantein is not
affected by this at all and will still require both
Gemstones.

sl_kaite.name: Kaite
sl_kaite.description:
Kaite
Max Level: 7
Requirement: Wizard Spirit 1,
Sage Spirit 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
[Ka-] Skills: Can only be used on
family members and other Soul Linkers
Description: Reflects all Magic and Heals back
to the caster. It does not reflect skills that do
not deal damage.
Will not reflect spells from Boss monsters
and monsters above LV 80.
[Lv 1]: 1 reflect, 6.0 sec Cast Time, 1 minute
[Lv 2]: 1 reflect, 5.5 sec Cast Time, 2 minutes
[Lv 3]: 1 reflect, 5.0 sec Cast Time, 3 minutes
[Lv 4]: 1 reflect, 4.5 sec Cast Time, 4 minutes
[Lv 5]: 2 reflects, 4.0 sec Cast Time, 5 minutes
[Lv 6]: 2 reflects, 3.5 sec Cast Time, 6 minutes
[Lv 7]: 2 reflects, 3.0 sec Cast Time, 10 minutes

Comments: Using this on yourself or an ally
during party play will make it hard for Priests in
your party to heal.
In PvP scenarios, if an enemy Wizard is under
the effect of a Soul Link, they can consume an
item to counter the effects of the reflection.

sl_kaahi.name: Kaahi
sl_kaahi.description:
Kaahi
Max Level: 7
Requirement: Priest Spirit 1,
Monk Spirit 1, Crusader Spirit 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
[Ka-] Skills: Can only be used on
family members and other Soul Linkers
Description: While this buff lasts, every time
the user is attacked by a normal attack, it will
consume their SP and Heal them.
[Lv 1]: 5 SP taken, 200 HP healed
[Lv 2]: 10 SP taken, 400 HP healed
[Lv 3]: 15 SP taken, 600 HP healed
[Lv 4]: 20 SP taken, 800 HP healed
[Lv 5]: 25 SP taken, 1000 HP healed
[Lv 6]: 30 SP taken, 1200 HP healed
[Lv 7]: 35 SP taken, 1400 HP healed

Comments: The purpose of Kaahi is to enable
a character to tank with their SP. As long as
they have SP, they will heal any damage
received. Keep in mind that being targeted by
Skills does not activate Kaahi's effect.
The effect triggers even if the attack misses or
gets blocked by an effect such as Safety Wall
or Kaupe.

sl_kaizel.name: Kaizel
sl_kaizel.description:
Kaizel
Max Level: 7
Requirement: Priest Spirit 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
[Ka-] Skills: Can only be used on family
members and other Soul Linkers
Description: When the target dies, they will be
immediatelly resurrected. They will still lose
Experience and buffs upon death.
This skill has no effect in WoE.
[Lv 1]: 10% HP at res
[Lv 2]: 20% HP at res
[Lv 3]: 30% HP at res
[Lv 4]: 40% HP at res
[Lv 5]: 50% HP at res
[Lv 6]: 60% HP at res
[Lv 7]: 70% HP at res

Comments: Upon reviving, you will have the
protection of Lv10 Kyrie Eleison but only for
a fraction of a second. Similar to when being
revived normally, entering a map or teleporting,
you will be immune to attacks and detection for
3 seconds.
The Cast Time of Kaizel cannot be reduced
by DEX. Being revived in this manner will
activate the effects of Osiris Card.

sl_swoo.name: Eswoo
sl_swoo.description:
Eswoo
Max Level: 7
Requirement: Priest Spirit 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: 1 Character
[Es-] Skills: Can only be used on monsters.
Description: Makes the target monster tiny,
greatly reducing their Movement Speed. If this is
used on a Boss monster, the effect only lasts
1/5 of the duration.
If used on a monster that is already under the
effect of Eswoo, it will cause the user to be
stunned for 10 seconds.
If it is used on a player character, nothing
happens and the caster will be stunned for
0.5 seconds.
[Lv 1]: 1 second duration, 75 SP Cost
[Lv 2]: 2 seconds duration, 65 SP Cost
[Lv 3]: 3 seconds duration, 55 SP Cost
[Lv 4]: 4 seconds duration, 45 SP Cost
[Lv 5]: 5 seconds duration, 35 SP Cost
[Lv 6]: 6 seconds duration, 25 SP Cost
[Lv 7]: 7 seconds duration, 15 SP Cost

Comments: The Size attribute is not changed.
The reduction in size is merely a visual effect.
The Movement Speed penalty applied by
Eswoo is very significant, even more so than
the penalty applied by Eska.

sl_stin.name: Estin
sl_stin.description:
Estin
Max Level: 7
Requirement: Wizard Spirit 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: 1 Character
[Es-] Skills: Can only be used on monsters.
Description: A magical skill for attacking small
monsters. The affected monster is pushed
back by 2 cells. When this is used on
monsters that are not Small, it will do only 1%
MATK damage but still push them back.
When the Lv7 version of this skill is used, you
can use Esma for next 3 seconds.
If it is used on a player character, nothing
happens and the caster will be stunned for 0.5
seconds.
[Lv 1]: 110% MATK
[Lv 2]: 120% MATK
[Lv 3]: 130% MATK
[Lv 4]: 140% MATK
[Lv 5]: 150% MATK
[Lv 6]: 160% MATK
[Lv 7]: 170% MATK

Comments: This skill's damage is influenced
by Warm Wind.

sl_stun.name: Estun
sl_stun.description:
Estun
Max Level: 7
Requirement: Wizard Spirit 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: 1 Character
[Es-] Skills: Can only be used on monsters.
Description: A magical skill for attacking
Medium monsters. If the target monster is
Medium, they will be Stunned. Large and Small
monsters will take full damage but not be
stunned.
When the Lv7 version of this skill is used, you
can use sma for next 3 seconds.
If it is used on a player character, nothing
happens and the caster will be stunned for 0.5
seconds.
[Lv 1]: 5% MATK
[Lv 2]: 10% MATK
[Lv 3]: 15% MATK
[Lv 4]: 20% MATK
[Lv 5]: 25% MATK
[Lv 6]: 30% MATK
[Lv 7]: 35% MATK

Comments: This skill's damage is influenced
by Warm Wind.

sl_sma.name: Esma
sl_sma.description:
Esma
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Estin 7, Estun 7
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: 1 Character
[Es-] Skills: Can only be used on monsters.
Description: A strong Magic attack that
changes its element depending on Warm
Wind. Esma can only be used for a short
period after using Estin, Estun, Eske or a Soul
Link.
If it is used on a player character, nothing
happens and the caster will be stunned for 0.5
seconds.
[Lv 1]: (40+BaseLevel)% MATK x 1 Missile
[Lv 2]: (40+BaseLevel)% MATK x 2 Missiles
[Lv 3]: (40+BaseLevel)% MATK x 3 Missiles
[Lv 4]: (40+BaseLevel)% MATK x 4 Missiles
[Lv 5]: (40+BaseLevel)% MATK x 5 Missiles
[Lv 6]: (40+BaseLevel)% MATK x 6 Missiles
[Lv 7]: (40+BaseLevel)% MATK x 7 Missiles
[Lv 8]: (40+BaseLevel)% MATK x 8 Missiles
[Lv 9]: (40+BaseLevel)% MATK x 9 Missiles
[Lv 10]: (40+BaseLevel)% MATK x 10 Missiles

Comments: Esma is a very hard hitting magic
spell that has the distinction of being any
element you want, except Poison and
Undead. Using Esma without a Warm Wind
active will result in Neutral magical damage.
For a Level 99 Soul Linker that has mastered
this skill, Esma will do 1390% MATK damage.
With only 2 seconds Cast Time and 0.5 sec
After Cast Delay, Esma is also a very quick
casting spell compared to other strong single
target skills from Mage and Wizard.

nv_firstaid.name: First Aid
nv_firstaid.description:
First Aid
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Recovery
Target: Caster
Description: Uses 3 SP to restore 5 HP.

nv_trickdead.name: Play Dead
nv_trickdead.description:
Play Dead
Requirement: Finish Quest, Novice Only
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Feigns death to avoid the
menace of nearby enemies. The Play
Dead status is canceled by casting
this skill again.

Comments: This skill ceases to function after
jobchanging to any other class, including
Super Novice. Swordsman's Provoke and
Sage's Dispel can cancel the effect. All
monsters will be fooled, even Bosses and
MvPs.

nv_basic.name: Basic Skill
nv_basic.description:
Basic Skill
Max Level: 9
Enables the use of Basic Interface Skills.
[Lv 1]: Enables Trading
Allows the trading of items with other
character.
Right click on a character to initiate.
[Lv 2]: Enables Emotions
Alt+(0~9) and Ctrl+(1,-,=.)
Alt+L opens additional Emotion icons.
[Lv 3]: Enables Sitting
Sitting doubles HP and SP regeneration
speed.
Press the Insert key or type /sit.
[Lv 4]: Enables Chat Room Creation
Alt+C to open a Chat Room or click the
Chat button in the Basic Information
Window.
[Lv 5]: Join a Party
Character can join a party.
[Lv 6]: Enables Use of Kafra Storage
Allows use of Kafra Storage.
[Lv 7]: Organize a Party
Create a party by typing
/organize ''Party Name''
Set party options in the Party Window (Alt+Z).
[Lv 9]: Enables Change to First Job Class
Qualifies character for change from Novice
to one of the First classes.

nj_tobidougu.name: Shuriken Training
nj_tobidougu.description:
Throwing Mastery
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases Throw Shuriken
damage.
[Lv 1]: Damage +3
[Lv 2]: Damage +6
[Lv 3]: Damage +9
[Lv 4]: Damage +12
[Lv 5]: Damage +15
[Lv 6]: Damage +18
[Lv 7]: Damage +21
[Lv 8]: Damage +24
[Lv 9]: Damage +27
[Lv 10]: Damage +30

Comments: Mastery skills only get added up
at the end of damage calculation. In most
situations, it only results in a flat addition of
damage.

nj_tatamigaeshi.name: Improvised Defense
nj_tatamigaeshi.description:
Flip Tatami
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: Caster
Description: Flips tatami mats, damaging
enemies in a vertical and horizontal line from
where the user is standing, pushing them.
For 3 seconds after using Flip Tatami, the user
will be immune to ranged attacks.
This skill has 3 seconds After Cast Delay.
[Lv 1]: 1 cell range, 110% damage
[Lv 2]: 1 cell range, 120% damage
[Lv 3]: 2 cells range, 130% damage
[Lv 4]: 2 cells range, 140% damage
[Lv 5]: 3 cells range, 150% damage

Comments: The protection granted by Flip
Tatami works by the same rules as Pneuma.
However, this is only applied to the user. You
cannot protect another player using tatamis.
Moving will immediatelly cancel the effect of
Flip Tatami, you must stay on the same cell in
order to benefit from the protection.
Because the effect and the After Cast Delay
have the same duration, unless you have a
buff or equipment that reduces delay, you will
not be able to fight back while protecting
yourself with this skill.

nj_ninpou.name: Spirit of the Blade
nj_ninpou.description:
Ninja Training
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases SP regen by training in
the Ninja Arts. The amount of SP restored by
this skill is affected by the character's MaxSP.
[Lv 1]: SP+3 +(0.2% of Max SP) every 10 sec
[Lv 2]: SP+6 +(0.4% of Max SP) every 10 sec
[Lv 3]: SP+9 +(0.6% of Max SP) every 10 sec
[Lv 4]: SP+12 +(0.8% of Max SP) every 10 sec
[Lv 5]: SP+15 +(1.0% of Max SP) every 10 sec
[Lv 6]: SP+18 +(1.2% of Max SP) every 10 sec
[Lv 7]: SP+21 +(1.4% of Max SP) every 10 sec
[Lv 8]: SP+24 +(1.6% of Max SP) every 10 sec
[Lv 9]: SP+27 +(1.8% of Max SP) every 10 sec
[Lv 10]: SP+30 +(2.0% of Max SP) every 10 sec

Comments: The SP recovery granted by this
passive is identical to Mage's Increase SP
Recovery skill, but without the boost to SP
recovery items.

nj_syuriken.name: Throw Shuriken
nj_syuriken.description:
Throw Shuriken
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Throwing Mastery 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Ranged
Target: 1 Character
Description: Throws a Shuriken at a target
from a distance of up to 9 cells away from the
caster.
Previously, this skill would ignore all FLEE.
However, with the current implementation, only
the fixed bonus damage ignores FLEE checks,
the ATK% based portion can still miss, similar
to Monk's Spirit Sphere and Blacksmith's
Weaponry Research.
Consumes 1 Shuriken.
[Lv 1]: 100% ATK +Damage +4
[Lv 2]: 100% ATK +Damage +8
[Lv 3]: 100% ATK +Damage +12
[Lv 4]: 100% ATK +Damage +16
[Lv 5]: 100% ATK +Damage +20
[Lv 6]: 100% ATK +Damage +24
[Lv 7]: 100% ATK +Damage +28
[Lv 8]: 100% ATK +Damage +32
[Lv 9]: 100% ATK +Damage +36
[Lv 10]: 100% ATK +Damage +40

Comments: This skill is not affected by any
+% damage cards, although flat +ATK options
will work. The bonus damage granted by
this skill is not a Mastery bonus, it is added
before other calculations, whereas masteries
are added at the end.
The rate at which Shurikens can be thrown
is limited by your ASPD. Although Kunais are
widely considered to be superior, with
sufficiently high Attack Speed, it's possible for
Shurikens to outdamage Kunais.

Shurikens are Pseudo-Elemental, meaning they
benefit from elemental boosts, but will always
do less damage(or miss entirely) against
Ghost property enemies. Previously, Shurikens
were affected by +% Cards but that is no longer
the case. The final damage of a thrown
Shuriken is equal to 100% of your ATK +the
Shuriken's ATK +4*SkillLv +3*Throwing
Mastery's SkillLv.

nj_shadowjump.name: Shadow Leap
nj_shadowjump.description:
Shadow Leap
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Flip Tatami 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Ground
Description: Shadow Leap can only be
performed when the caster is in Hiding status,
which can be enabled by the Haze Slasher skill
or any equipment that grants Hiding.
This skill instantly moves the caster to a
targeted cell.
[Lv 1]: 5 cells range
[Lv 2]: 6 cells range
[Lv 3]: 7 cells range
[Lv 4]: 8 cells range
[Lv 5]: 9 cells range

Comments: Similar to Monk's Body Relocation
but better in one key way: you can Shadow
Jump across snipable tiles. In the game, there
are many areas which you cannot walk
through but can shoot across. This skill lets
you traverse these paths. It is possible, for
example, to jump up and down cliffs.

nj_nen.name: Soul
nj_nen.description:
Ninja Aura
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Ninja Mastery 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Focuses spritual energy to enter
Ninja Aura status, which endows the caster
with INT and STR bonuses.
Ninja Aura status enables the use of the Mirror
Image and Killing Strike skills, although using
those skills will cancel Ninja Aura status.
Casting Ninja Aura costs 5% of your HP.
[Lv 1]: STR and INT +1, 30 sec
[Lv 2]: STR and INT +2, 45 sec
[Lv 3]: STR and INT +3, 60 sec
[Lv 4]: STR and INT +4, 75 sec
[Lv 5]: STR and INT +5, 90 sec

Comments: Ninja Aura is required to use
Killing Strike, the same way Critical Explosion
is needed for Asura Strike.

nj_kouenka.name: Crimson Fire Petal
nj_kouenka.description:
Flaming Petals
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Ninja Mastery 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: 1 Character
Description: Inflicts Fire elemental damage at a
target by shooting flaming petals.
This skill's level affects the number of strikes.
Each strike inflicts an amount of damage equal
to 90% MATK.
[Lv 1]: 1 Petal, 0.7 seconds Cast Time
[Lv 2]: 2 Petals, 1.4 seconds Cast Time
[Lv 3]: 3 Petals, 2.1 seconds Cast Time
[Lv 4]: 4 Petals, 2.8 seconds Cast Time
[Lv 5]: 5 Petals, 3.5 seconds Cast Time
[Lv 6]: 6 Petals, 4.2 seconds Cast Time
[Lv 7]: 7 Petals, 4.9 seconds Cast Time
[Lv 8]: 8 Petals, 5.6 seconds Cast Time
[Lv 9]: 9 Petals, 6.3 seconds Cast Time
[Lv 10]: 10 Petals, 7.0 seconds Cast Time

nj_hyousensou.name: Spear of Ice
nj_hyousensou.description:
Freezing Spear
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Ninja Mastery 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: 1 Character
Description: Summons spears of ice that will
strike a targeted enemy multiple times.
Hits three times at Lv1 and each additional
Skill Level adds an extra hit. Each hit does
100% MATK Water
elemental magical damage.
[Lv 1]: 3 Spears, 0.7 sec Cast Time
[Lv 2]: 4 Spears, 1.4 sec Cast Time
[Lv 3]: 5 Spears, 2.1 sec Cast Time
[Lv 4]: 6 Spears, 2.8 sec Cast Time
[Lv 5]: 7 Spears, 3.5 sec Cast Time
[Lv 6]: 8 Spears, 4.2 sec Cast Time
[Lv 7]: 9 Spears, 4.9 sec Cast Time
[Lv 8]: 10 Spears, 5.6 sec Cast Time
[Lv 9]: 11 Spears, 6.3 sec Cast Time
[Lv 10]: 12 Spears, 7.0 sec Cast Time

Comments: Official translations of this skill will
sometimes state that each strike of this skill
does 70% MATK damage. However, in reality
it does 100% MATK per hit.
Another translation error in Watery Evasion
states that Freezing spear will do more
damage when cast atop its AoE. That is also
not correct.

nj_huujin.name: Wind Blade
nj_huujin.description:
Wind Blade
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Ninja Mastery 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: 1 Character
Description: Shoots a shearing blade of air
that will inflict Wind elemental damage to a
target enemy for 100% MATK on each hit.
[Lv 1]: 1 Blade, 1 second Cast Time
[Lv 2]: 2 Blades, 2 seconds Cast Time
[Lv 3]: 2 Blades, 2 seconds Cast Time
[Lv 4]: 3 Blades, 3 seconds Cast Time
[Lv 5]: 3 Blades, 3 seconds Cast Time
[Lv 6]: 4 Blades, 4 seconds Cast Time
[Lv 7]: 4 Blades, 4 seconds Cast Time
[Lv 8]: 5 Blades, 5 seconds Cast Time
[Lv 9]: 5 Blades, 5 seconds Cast Time
[Lv 10]: 6 Blades, 6 seconds Cast Time

Comments: Skill Levels 3, 5, 7 and 9 offer no
improvement over the previous Skill Level, but
cost more SP to use.
This skill is strictly worse damage than a
Freezing Spear of the same level, doing about
half of the damage. It's only worth using
against Water Element enemies, which will
take more damage from Wind and less from
Water.

nj_kunai.name: Throw Kunai
nj_kunai.description:
Throw Kunai
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Throwing Shuriken 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Ranged
Target: 1 Character
Description: Throws a Kunai that will strike
its target 3 times in one attack. Each of the
three hits will do 100% ATK +fixed damage
equal to 3x the Kunai's ATK. Every Kunai in
Pre-Renewal has 30 ATK, meaning each thrown
Kunai deals a total of 300% ATK +270 damage.
Previously, this skill would ignore all FLEE.
However, with the current implementation, only
the fixed bonus damage ignores FLEE checks,
the ATK% based portion can still miss, similar
to Monk's Spirit Sphere and Blacksmith's
Weaponry Research.
The attack's element is affected by the type of
Kunai thrown.
Consumes 1 Kunai.
[Lv 1]: 30 SP Cost
[Lv 2]: 25 SP Cost
[Lv 3]: 20 SP Cost
[Lv 4]: 15 SP Cost
[Lv 5]: 10 SP Cost

Comments: This skill is not affected by any
+% damage cards, although flat +ATK options
will work. Unlike Throw Shuriken, this skill has
a 1 second Cooldown acting as the limiter.
Kunais are more expensive and SP intensive
compared to Shurikens, but very strong. The
only way to throw Kunais faster is by means
of Aftercast Delay reductions, such as Poem
of Bragi and Kiel Card.

Kunais are Pseudo-Elemental, meaning they
benefit from elemental boosts, but will always
do less damage(or miss entirely) against
Ghost property enemies.

nj_kasumikiri.name: Vanishing Slash
nj_kasumikiri.description:
Haze Slash
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Shadow Leap 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: Strikes an enemy, and then
immediately enter the Hiding status, can be
followed by the Shadow Leap or Shadow Slash
skill.
[Lv 1]: 110% damage
[Lv 2]: 120% damage
[Lv 3]: 130% damage
[Lv 4]: 140% damage
[Lv 5]: 150% damage
[Lv 6]: 160% damage
[Lv 7]: 170% damage
[Lv 8]: 180% damage
[Lv 9]: 190% damage
[Lv 10]: 200% damage

Comments: The Hiding effect granted by this
skill is the exact same one as Thief's Hiding.
This is the only way a Ninja can enter into
Hiding without using equipment, such as
Smokie Card. You will only enter into Hiding if
the skill hits. If it misses, it won't work.

nj_utsusemi.name: Cicada Skin Sheeding
nj_utsusemi.description:
Cicada Skin Shed
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Shadow Leap 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Enables Cicada Skin Shed status,
which enables the caster to automatically
dodge a set number of attacks.
Each special dodge is followed by a backward
movement of 7 cells.
When the number of attacks reaches the skill's
limit, Cicada Skin Shed status ends.
[Lv 1]: 20 sec, 1 Attack
[Lv 2]: 30 sec, 1 Attack
[Lv 3]: 40 sec, 2 Attacks
[Lv 4]: 50 sec, 2 Attacks
[Lv 5]: 60 sec, 3 Attacks

Comments: Grants protection against most
forms of physical damage, both melee and
long range, but does nothing to protect from
magic. Several skills are capable of ignoring
Cicada Skin Shed: Cart Termination, Meteor
Assault, Soul Breaker's INT portion, all types
of damage Traps, Acid Terror, Demonstration,
Acid Demonstration, Blitz Beat, Falcon Assault,
Gunslinger's Bull's Eye, Throw Venom Knife,
Throw Zeny and Pressure. All sources of Misc
Damage will bypass Cicada Skin Shedding.

nj_kaensin.name: Crimson Fire Formation
nj_kaensin.description:
Blaze Shield
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Flaming Petals 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: Enemies around the caster
Description: Summons a blazing storm in a
x5 cell area around the user that will deliver
multiple strikes to enemies within its range.
Each strike deals 50% MATK damage.
The Blaze Shield lasts for 20 seconds, but is
automatically canceled after inflicting its
maximum number of strikes.
Consumes 1 Flame Stone.
[Lv 1]: 5 Hits, 6.0 sec Cast Time
[Lv 2]: 5 Hits, 5.5 sec Cast Time
[Lv 3]: 6 Hits, 5.0 sec Cast Time
[Lv 4]: 6 Hits, 4.5 sec Cast Time
[Lv 5]: 7 Hits, 4.0 sec Cast Time
[Lv 6]: 7 Hits, 3.5 sec Cast Time
[Lv 7]: 8 Hits, 3.0 sec Cast Time
[Lv 8]: 8 Hits, 2.5 sec Cast Time
[Lv 9]: 9 Hits, 2.0 sec Cast Time
[Lv 10]: 9 Hits, 1.5 sec Cast Time

Comments: You can only have one instance of
Blaze Shield or Watery Evasion active at one
time. Casting either skill will immediatelly
terminate any previous instances of these
skills you may have had active.
Each cell in the 5x5 grid has its own
independent number of hits, similar to Firewall.
Once all hits are consumed on a tile, that cell's
effect ends but others will continue.

nj_suiton.name: Hidden Water
nj_suiton.description:
Watery Evasion
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Freezing Spear 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Around the caster
Description: Creates a water pool that will
affect enemies within range by decreasing
their AGI and reducing Movement Speed by
half. All Ninja class characters, including the
caster, are immune to these AGI and
Movement Speed penalties.
Enables the use of Water Ball and Aqua
Benedicta for other players.
Consumes 1 Ice Stone.
[Lv 1]: Area 3x3, 15 sec, Agi -0
[Lv 2]: Area 3x3, 20 sec, Agi -3
[Lv 3]: Area 3x3, 25 sec, Agi -3
[Lv 4]: Area 5x5, 30 sec, Agi -3
[Lv 5]: Area 5x5, 35 sec, Agi -5
[Lv 6]: Area 5x5, 40 sec, Agi -5
[Lv 7]: Area 7x7, 45 sec, Agi -5
[Lv 8]: Area 7x7, 50 sec, Agi -8
[Lv 9]: Area 7x7, 55 sec, Agi -8
[Lv 10]: Area 9x9, 60 sec, Agi -8

Comments: Watery Evasion has no effect on
the damage of Freezing Spear, despite older
translations stating otherwise. That effect is
only present post Renewal.
Similar to Quagmire, this skill will affect allies
in PvP environments, such as WoE. However,
unlike other speed debilitating skills, it does
not force cancels effects such as Increase AGI,
Two-Hand Quicken or Adrenaline Rush.

A rather unique property of Watery Evasion is
that it has the ability to force stop enemies
from moving. This effect only takes place the
instant in which a target enters the area of the
spell. There is no binding effect, the victim is
able to move immediately after being force
stopped.
Using Watery Evasion while a Blaze Shield is
active will remove the Blaze Shield. Likewise,
using Blaze Shield removes any active Watery
Evasion you may have placed previously.

nj_raigekisai.name: Lightning Strike of Destruction
nj_raigekisai.description:
Lightning Jolt
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Wind Blade 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: Enemies around the caster
Description: Summons lightning bolts around
the caster to damage enemies within the
skill's range.
Consumes 1 Wind Stone.
[Lv 1]: 200% MATK, 5x5 cells
[Lv 2]: 240% MATK, 5x5 cells
[Lv 3]: 280% MATK, 7x7 cells
[Lv 4]: 320% MATK, 7x7 cells
[Lv 5]: 360% MATK, 9x9 cells

Comments: Deals low damage but has zero
After Cast Delay.

nj_huuma.name: Throw Huuma Shuriken
nj_huuma.description:
Throw Huuma Shuriken
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Throwing Mastery 5,
Throw Kunai 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Ranged
Target: 1 Character
Description: Throws your Huuma Shuriken to
damage its target and any nearby enemies.
The total amount of damage is divided among
the enemies damaged by this skill.
[Lv 1]: 300% damage
[Lv 2]: 450% damage
[Lv 3]: 600% damage
[Lv 4]: 750% damage
[Lv 5]: 900% damage

Comments: Unlike Kunais and Shurikens,
Throwing Huumas does not ignore FLEE and
can miss.

nj_kirikage.name: Shadow Slash
nj_kirikage.description:
Shadow Slash
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Haze Slasher 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: Shadow Slash can only be
performed during Hiding status, which can be
enabled by the Haze Slasher skill or any
equipment that grants Hiding.
Strikes a target with an attack whose range is
equal to the caster's Shadow Leap range.
Casting this skill will cancel Hiding status.
[Lv 1]: 100% damage, +30% Critical Rate
[Lv 2]: 200% damage, +35% Critical Rate
[Lv 3]: 300% damage, +40% Critical Rate
[Lv 4]: 400% damage, +45% Critical Rate
[Lv 5]: 500% damage, +50% Critical Rate

Comments: This is one of the very few skills in
the game that can Crit. Cannot be used in GvG
or WoE.

nj_bakuenryu.name: Raging Fire Dragon
nj_bakuenryu.description:
Exploding Dragon
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Ninja Mastery 10,
Blaze Shield 7
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: 1 Character
Description: Summons a flaming dragon that
will inflict 3 strikes on all enemies in a 5x5 cell
area around the cell targeted by this skill.
Consumes 1 Flame Stone.
[Lv 1]: 300% MATK
[Lv 2]: 450% MATK
[Lv 3]: 600% MATK
[Lv 4]: 750% MATK
[Lv 5]: 900% MATK

Comments: Using this skill requires targeting
an enemy. However, it has the properties of an
AoE spell. Magic Rod does NOT catch it, but
Land Protector prevents it entirely. Single target
spell reflecting items such as Maya Card do
not work on Exploding Dragon either.

nj_hyousyouraku.name: Ice Meteor
nj_hyousyouraku.description:
Snow Flake Draft
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Ninja Mastery 10,
Watery Evasion 7
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: Caster
Description: Summons a meteor of ice that will
damage enemies in a 7*7 cell area around the
caster.
Consumes 1 Ice Stone.
[Lv 1]: 150% MATK, Freeze Chance 20%
[Lv 2]: 200% MATK, Freeze Chance 30%
[Lv 3]: 250% MATK, Freeze Chance 40%
[Lv 4]: 300% MATK, Freeze Chance 50%
[Lv 5]: 350% MATK, Freeze Chance 60%

Comments: Similar to Storm Gust and Frost
Nova, this skill will not hit enemies which are
already frozen. If your goal is to freeze an
enemy, it's safe to spam this skill.

nj_kamaitachi.name: Kamaitachi
nj_kamaitachi.description:
First Wind
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Ninja Mastery 10,
Lightning Jolt 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: 1 Character
Description: Target an enemy and shoot a wind
blade that damages every enemy between the
user and the target. The blade continues its
path behind the target, further damaging
enemies.
Consumes 1 Wind Stone.
[Lv 1]: 200% MATK, Damage Range 5 cells
[Lv 2]: 300% MATK, Damage Range 6 cells
[Lv 3]: 400% MATK, Damage Range 7 cells
[Lv 4]: 500% MATK, Damage Range 8 cells
[Lv 5]: 600% MATK, Damage Range 9 cells

Comments: This is an AoE spell similar to
Sniper's Sharpshooting. It creates a corridor
shaped AoE that is 3 cells wide between the
user and the target. The default and official
behavior of these skills is that those AoEs are
fixed as one of the 4 directional(+) and
4 diagonal(x) directions. Server admins can
bypass this limitation by disabling
eightpath_algorithm within the server's
configuration.

nj_zenynage.name: Throw Zeny
nj_zenynage.description:
Throw Zeny
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Throwing Mastery 10,
Throw Huuma Shuriken 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Special Physical Ranged
Target: 1 Character
Description: Throws coins at a target to inflict
an amount of DEF piercing damage equal to
the amount of Zeny spent in the attack.
Damage is only 1/3 against Boss monsters
and 1/2 against players. However, the Zeny
consumed is also reduced
This skill has 5 seconds After Cast Delay.
[Lv 1]: 500~1000 Zeny
[Lv 2]: 1000~2000 Zeny
[Lv 3]: 1500~3000 Zeny
[Lv 4]: 2000~4000 Zeny
[Lv 5]: 2500~5000 Zeny
[Lv 6]: 3000~6000 Zeny
[Lv 7]: 3500~7000 Zeny
[Lv 8]: 4000~8000 Zeny
[Lv 9]: 4500~9000 Zeny
[Lv 10]: 5000~10000 Zeny

Comments: Ignores DEF and FLEE. Damage
is not reduced by Crusader's Defender. Cannot
be blocked by Parrying, Auto-Guard, or Cicada
Skin Shedding. Kyrie Eleison does not block
the damage either and will also consume the
health of the shield.
Ignore the damage reduction modifiers for GvG,
Battlegrounds and WoE.

nj_bunsinjyutsu.name: Mirror Image
nj_bunsinjyutsu.description:
Mirror Image
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Shadow Slash 3,
Ninja Aura 1, Cicada Skid Shed 4
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Mirror Image can only be cast
during Ninja Aura status, consumes the buff
and 1 Shadow Orb.
Create a mirror image that will enable the user
to dodge a set number of  physical attacks.
This skill cannot be used to block or evade
magic based attacks.
[Lv 1]: 1 Attack, 60 sec duration,
4.0 sec Cast Time
[Lv 2]: 1 Attack, 80 sec duration,
3.5 sec Cast Time
[Lv 3]: 2 Attacks, 100 sec duration,
3.0 sec Cast Time
[Lv 4]: 2 Attacks, 120 sec duration,
2.5 sec Cast Time
[Lv 5]: 3 Attacks, 140 sec duration,
2.0 sec Cast Time
[Lv 6]: 3 Attacks, 160 sec duration,
1.5 sec Cast Time
[Lv 7]: 4 Attacks, 180 sec duration,
1.0 sec Cast Time
[Lv 8]: 4 Attacks, 200 sec duration,
1.0 sec Cast Time
[Lv 9]: 5 Attacks, 220 sec duration,
1.0 sec Cast Time
[Lv 10]: 5 Attacks, 240 sec duration,
1.0 sec Cast Time

Comments: Has the exact same properties as
Cicada Skin Shedding except it does not
perform pushback upon evading.
Having both skills active does not stack the
number of evasions. For example, if both buffs
are active at once and the Ninja takes a hit,
it will be evaded and both effects will lose 1
charge. If both skills are maxed, the result is
3 dodges with pushback and 2 without,
because the first 3 charges of Mirror Image
were consumed alongside the Cicada charges.

nj_issen.name: Final Strike
nj_issen.description:
Killing Strike
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Throwing Mastery 7,
Shadow Slash 5, Ninja Aura 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Special Physical Ranged
Target: 1 Character
Description: Sacrifices the caster's remaining
HP to inflict devastating damage to the target
enemy. The amount of remaining HP affects
the damage inflicted, and each cast of this
skill will always reduce the caster's HP to 1.
Older descriptions of this skill will sometimes
state that it does reduced damage against
Players and Bosses, but that is not correct.
That is a property of Throw Zeny, but not this
skill.
[Lv 1]: (STR*40) +(8% of RemainingHP)
[Lv 2]: (STR*40) +(16% of RemainingHP)
[Lv 3]: (STR*40) +(24% of RemainingHP)
[Lv 4]: (STR*40) +(32% of RemainingHP)
[Lv 5]: (STR*40) +(40% of RemainingHP)
[Lv 6]: (STR*40) +(48% of RemainingHP)
[Lv 7]: (STR*40) +(56% of RemainingHP)
[Lv 8]: (STR*40) +(64% of RemainingHP)
[Lv 9]: (STR*40) +(72% of RemainingHP)
[Lv 10]: (STR*40) +(80% of RemainingHP)
Comments: On Hercules based servers, the skill
uses 10% of the Ninja's HP per level instead
of 8%.
This skill is similar to Asura Strike
but using HP instead. Here is how the two are
similar:
-Damage is Forced Neutral;
-Affected by +% Cards and effects, such as
Hydra, Abysmal Knight and The Sign;
-Requires a buff to be cast(Ninja Aura), will
remove the buff after used;

However, there are a few key differences:
-Damage is Ranged and blocked by Pneuma,
but not by Safety Wall;
-Ignores FLEE, but does NOT ignore Defense.
Effects such as Thanatos Card and Ice Pick
will work with Killing Strike;
-Ignores your ATK completely and calculates
damage looking only at your STR;
-Ranged damage reductions such as
Defender and Alligator Card will reduce the
damage received;
-Has no Cast Time and no After Cast Delay;
-If the enemy is a Stalker and has the Reject
Sword buff, and a Ninja equipping a dagger
uses Killing Strike on them, the Ninja is
immediately killed by the reflected damage;

The best way to increase this skill's damage is
to increase your MaxHP, which can be rather
difficult considering Ninjas have low Base HP
and suffer from severe equipment restrictions.

nv_firstaid.name: First Aid
nv_firstaid.description:
First Aid
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Recovery
Target: Caster
Description: Uses 3 SP to restore 5 HP.

nv_trickdead.name: Play Dead
nv_trickdead.description:
Play Dead
Requirement: Finish Quest, Novice Only
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Feigns death to avoid the
menace of nearby enemies. The Play
Dead status is canceled by casting
this skill again.

Comments: This skill ceases to function after
jobchanging to any other class, including
Super Novice. Swordsman's Provoke and
Sage's Dispel can cancel the effect. All
monsters will be fooled, even Bosses and
MvPs.

nv_basic.name: Basic Skill
nv_basic.description:
Basic Skill
Max Level: 9
Enables the use of Basic Interface Skills.
[Lv 1]: Enables Trading
Allows the trading of items with other
character.
Right click on a character to initiate.
[Lv 2]: Enables Emotions
Alt+(0~9) and Ctrl+(1,-,=.)
Alt+L opens additional Emotion icons.
[Lv 3]: Enables Sitting
Sitting doubles HP and SP regeneration
speed.
Press the Insert key or type /sit.
[Lv 4]: Enables Chat Room Creation
Alt+C to open a Chat Room or click the
Chat button in the Basic Information
Window.
[Lv 5]: Join a Party
Character can join a party.
[Lv 6]: Enables Use of Kafra Storage
Allows use of Kafra Storage.
[Lv 7]: Organize a Party
Create a party by typing
/organize ''Party Name''
Set party options in the Party Window (Alt+Z).
[Lv 9]: Enables Change to First Job Class
Qualifies character for change from Novice
to one of the First classes.

gs_glittering.name: Flip the Coin
gs_glittering.description:
Flip the Coin
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Consumes 1 Zeny to flip a coin.
If it lands showing heads, the caster will
gain 1 Coin, but if it shows tails, the caster will
lose 1 Coin.
The caster can have a maximum of 10 Coins,
and increasing this skill's level raises the
success rate of flipping a Coin that will show
heads.
Gunslinger Coins are displayed as glowing
orbs around the caster.
[Lv 1]: 30% success chance
[Lv 2]: 40% success chance
[Lv 3]: 50% success chance
[Lv 4]: 60% success chance
[Lv 5]: 70% success chance

Comments: Coins are needed in order to use
many Gunslinger skills. In order to spam this
skill fast and regain Coins quickly, you need
high ASPD. In most cases, unequipping your
weapon will result in the highest ASPD.
From the game's perspective, Gunslinger's
Coins are exactly the same thing as a Monk's
Spiritual Spheres. They give the same +3
Mastery damage per Coin/Sphere that never
misses.

gs_singleaction.name: Single Action
gs_singleaction.description:
Single Action
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Essential Gunslinger skill that
enables Gunslingers to fire their weapon more
quickly and accurately.
[Lv 1]: HIT +2, ASPD +1%
[Lv 2]: HIT +4, ASPD +1%
[Lv 3]: HIT +6, ASPD +2%
[Lv 4]: HIT +8, ASPD +2%
[Lv 5]: HIT +10, ASPD +3%
[Lv 6]: HIT +12, ASPD +3%
[Lv 7]: HIT +14, ASPD +4%
[Lv 8]: HIT +16, ASPD +4%
[Lv 9]: HIT +18, ASPD +5%
[Lv 10]: HIT +20, ASPD +5%

Comments: Works with every kind of Gun. If
all you care about is the ASPD boost, Lv9 of
this skill is enough.

gs_cracker.name: Cracker
gs_cracker.description:
Cracker
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Flip the Coin 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: 1 Character
Description: Fires a bullet that will Stun an
enemy. The nearer the target is to the caster,
the greater the chance of inflicting Stun.
Consumes 1 Coin.

Comments: The base chance is 65%, which
decreases by 5% for every 1 cell distance
between the user and the target. Requires
an equipped Gun and consumes a bullet, even
though it doesn't do any damage.

gs_magicalbullet.name: Magical Bullet
gs_magicalbullet.description:
Magical Bullet
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Flip the Coin 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Special Physical Ranged
Target: 1 Character
Description: Fires a magic shot that does not
use any bullets, inflicting an amount of Ghost
elemental damage equal to the caster's
ATK + MATK.
Consumes 1 Coin.

gs_chainaction.name: Chain Action
gs_chainaction.description:
Chain Action
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Single Action 1
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Enables a chance of firing two
shots in single attack while attacking
enemies when equipped with Revolver class
weapon.
Raising this skill's level increases the rate of
firing double shots.
Consumes 1 Bullet.
Requires Revolver class weapon.
[Lv 1]: 5% Chance
[Lv 2]: 10% Chance
[Lv 3]: 15% Chance
[Lv 4]: 20% Chance
[Lv 5]: 25% Chance
[Lv 6]: 30% Chance
[Lv 7]: 35% Chance
[Lv 8]: 40% Chance
[Lv 9]: 45% Chance
[Lv 10]: 50% Chance

Comments: This is functionally the same as
Thief's Double Attack, but for Revolvers. Has
all the same properties. Chain Actions take
precedence over Critical Attacks, cannot be
Crits themselves.
Unlike Double Attack, using a Sidewinder Card
will not apply the currently known level of the
skill to any weapon.

gs_tracking.name: Tracking
gs_tracking.description:
Tracking
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Single Action 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Ranged
Target: 1 Character
Description: Carefully aims at a target to inflict
devastating damage. Raising this skill's level
increases Casting Time and damage.
Requires Revolver or Rifle class weapon.
[Lv 1]: 300% damage, Aim Time 1.2 sec
[Lv 2]: 400% damage, Aim Time 1.4 sec
[Lv 3]: 500% damage, Aim Time 1.6 sec
[Lv 4]: 600% damage, Aim Time 1.8 sec
[Lv 5]: 700% damage, Aim Time 2 sec
[Lv 6]: 800% damage, Aim Time 2.2 sec
[Lv 7]: 900% damage, Aim Time 2.4 sec
[Lv 8]: 1000% damage, Aim Time 2.6 sec
[Lv 9]: 1100% damage, Aim Time 2.8 sec
[Lv 10]: 1200% damage, Aim Time 3 sec

Comments: The Cast Time of this skill is not
affected by your DEX or any buffs, such as
Poem of Bragi. However, it can still be reduced
by Equipment-based effects, such as Dark
Illusion Card, Berzebub Card, Kathryne
Keyron Card or Tower Keeper Card. This does
go both way, and as such, gear can also make
it longer(Phen Card).

gs_dust.name: Dust
gs_dust.description:
Dust
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Single Action 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Ranged
Target: 1 Character
Description: Fires a close range shot that will
push an enemy 5 cells backward.
Requires Shotgun class weapon.
[Lv 1]: 150% damage
[Lv 2]: 200% damage
[Lv 3]: 250% damage
[Lv 4]: 300% damage
[Lv 5]: 350% damage
[Lv 6]: 400% damage
[Lv 7]: 450% damage
[Lv 8]: 500% damage
[Lv 9]: 550% damage
[Lv 10]: 600% damage

Comments: This is a Malee Physical damage
skill, not ranged. It's perfect for pushing
enemies out of Pneuma.

gs_spreadattack.name: Spread Attack
gs_spreadattack.description:
Spread Attack
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Full Buster 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Ranged
Target: 1 Character
Description: Consumes 5 Bullets to spread
bullets over a large area.
Requires Shotgun class weapon.
[Lv 1]: 100% damage, Area 3x3 cells
[Lv 2]: 120% damage, Area 3x3 cells
[Lv 3]: 140% damage, Area 3x3 cells
[Lv 4]: 160% damage, Area 5x5 cells
[Lv 5]: 180% damage, Area 5x5 cells
[Lv 6]: 200% damage, Area 5x5 cells
[Lv 7]: 220% damage, Area 7x7 cells
[Lv 8]: 240% damage, Area 7x7 cells
[Lv 9]: 260% damage, Area 7x7 cells
[Lv 10]: 280% damage, Area 9x9 cells

gs_increasing.name: Increasing Accuracy
gs_increasing.description:
Increasing Accuracy
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Flip the Coin 2, Snake's Eye 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Adds +20 HIT, +4 DEX and +4 AGI
for 1 minute duration.
Consumes 4 Coins.

gs_fling.name: Fling
gs_fling.description:
Fling
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Coin Flip 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: 1 Character
Description: Spends Coins to fling them at an
enemy to inflict damage and reduce its DEF.
Fling can consume up to 5 coins in a single
cast, and will reduce more of an enemy's DEF
if more Coins are spent.

Comments: Deals damage equal to your Job
Level. Every coin reduces the Hard and Soft
DEF of the target monster by 5%, or up to 25%
when using all 5 coins.
When used against players, only lowers Soft
DEF.

gs_rapidshower.name: Rapid Shower
gs_rapidshower.description:
Rapid Shower
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Chain Action 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Ranged
Target: 1 Character
Description: Attacks an enemy with 5 rapid fire
attacks. Very ammunition intensive.
Consumes 5 Bullets.
Requires Revolver class weapon.
[Lv 1]: 550% damage
[Lv 2]: 600% damage
[Lv 3]: 650% damage
[Lv 4]: 700% damage
[Lv 5]: 750% damage
[Lv 6]: 800% damage
[Lv 7]: 850% damage
[Lv 8]: 900% damage
[Lv 9]: 950% damage
[Lv 10]: 1000% damage

gs_piercingshot.name: Piercing Shot
gs_piercingshot.description:
Piercing Shot
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Tracking 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Ranged
Target: 1 Character
Description: Inflicts Defense piercing damage
that has a chance of causing Bleeding status
on its target.
Requires Revolver or Rifle class weapon.
[Lv 1]: 120% damage, Bleeding Chance 3%
[Lv 2]: 140% damage, Bleeding Chance 6%
[Lv 3]: 160% damage, Bleeding Chance 9%
[Lv 4]: 180% damage, Bleeding Chance 12%
[Lv 5]: 200% damage, Bleeding Chance 15%

gs_fullbuster.name: Full Buster
gs_fullbuster.description:
Full Buster
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Dust 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Ranged
Target: 1 Character
Description: Inflicts devastating damage to an
enemy by firing multiple bullets at once.
This skill has a small chance of causing Blind
status to the caster.
Requires Shotgun class weapon.
[Lv 1]: 400% ATK, 1.2 sec After Cast Delay,
2% chance to Blind self,consumes 2 bullets
[Lv 2]: 500% ATK, 1.4 sec After Cast Delay,
4% chance to Blind self,consumes 2 bullets
[Lv 3]: 600% ATK, 1.6 sec After Cast Delay,
6% chance to Blind self,consumes 4 bullets
[Lv 4]: 700% ATK, 1.8 sec After Cast Delay,
8% chance to Blind self,consumes 4 bullets
[Lv 5]: 800% ATK, 2.0 sec After Cast Delay,
10% chance to Blind self,consumes 6 bullets
[Lv 6]: 900% ATK, 2.2 sec After Cast Delay,
12% chance to Blind self,consumes 6 bullets
[Lv 7]: 1000% ATK, 2.4 sec After Cast Delay,
14% chance to Blind self,consumes 8 bullets
[Lv 8]: 1100% ATK, 2.6 sec After Cast Delay,
16% chance to Blind self,consumes 8 bullets
[Lv 9]: 1200% ATK, 2.8 sec After Cast Delay,
18% chance to Blind self,consumes 10 bullets
[Lv 10]: 1300% ATK, 3.0 sec After Cast Delay,
20% chance to Blind self,consumes 10 bullets

Comments: Extremely ammunition and SP
intensive but does amazing damage. Hard to
use for solo play because of the SP costs and
intense delay, but very viable in party play.
The chance to Blind checks for normal status
resistances, such as VIT and equipment
based reductions.

gs_grounddrift.name: Ground Drift
gs_grounddrift.description:
Ground Drift
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Spread Attack 7, Full Buster 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Trap
Target: Ground
Description: Plants Spheres into the ground
that will explode upon enemy approach.
The explosion's effect varies according to the
type of Sphere.
Requires Grenade Launcher class weapon
and consumes a Sphere for each mine.
[Lv 1]: Damage +50, lasts 3 sec
[Lv 2]: Damage +100, lasts 6 sec
[Lv 3]: Damage +150, lasts 9 sec
[Lv 4]: Damage +200, lasts 12 sec
[Lv 5]: Damage +250, lasts 15 sec
[Lv 6]: Damage +300, lasts 18 sec
[Lv 7]: Damage +350, lasts 21 sec
[Lv 8]: Damage +400, lasts 24 sec
[Lv 9]: Damage +450, lasts 27 sec
[Lv 10]: Damage +500, lasts 30 sec
Flame Sphere: Pushes targets back 3 cells.
Water Sphere: 50% chance to Freeze.
Wind Sphere: 50% chance to Stun.
Poison Sphere: 50% chance to Poison.
Blind Sphere: 50% chance to Blind.

Comments: These mines can be stacked on
top of each other and will trigger all at once.
There is no limit to how many you can have
active at once, but keep in mind that even at
Lv10 they have a very short 30 sec duration.
Can be placed directly under targets.
The type of trap placed depends on the Sphere
equipped when the skill is used, but the
damage and effects are based on whatever
the Gunslinger has equipped when it is
activated. It is possible, for example, to place
traps using any Grenade Launcher and switch
to a weapon with +% damage cards or that
causes Status Effects, and those will be
activated along with the mine.
Sphere Mines do 100% ATK damage plus
the bonus damage listed by Skill Level.

gs_madnesscancel.name: Madness Canceller
gs_madnesscancel.description:
Madness Canceller
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Flip the Coin 4, Gatling Fever 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: The caster is immobilized, but
adds 100 ATK and 20% ASPD.
Madness Canceler has a 15 second duration
and cannot be used with Adjustment skill.
Consumes 4 Coins.

Comments: Using the skill again during its
duration will cancel it prematurely, but doing
so still costs 4 Coins.
Madness Canceller and Adjustment are
mutually exclusive and will cancel one another.

gs_tripleaction.name: Triple Action
gs_tripleaction.description:
Triple Action
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Flip the Coin 1, Chain Action 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Ranged
Target: 1 Character
Description: Shoots an enemy 3 times in one
attack.
Consumes 1 Coin.

Comments: This is one of the only three
damage dealing skills that a Gunslinger can
use while equipped with a Gatling or Grenade
Launcher. Bull's Eye only works on specific
targets while Magical Bullet is a forced Ghost
attack. Does 150% ATK x 3 hits.

gs_desperado.name: Desperado
gs_desperado.description:
Desperado
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Rapid Shower 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Ranged
Target: Caster
Description: Consumes 10 Bullets to
perform a haphazard attack that may damage
enemies within a 7 cell radius around the
caster.
Each cast has a maximum of 10 strikes.
Requires Revolver class weapon.
[Lv 1]: 100% damage
[Lv 2]: 150% damage
[Lv 3]: 200% damage
[Lv 4]: 250% damage
[Lv 5]: 300% damage
[Lv 6]: 350% damage
[Lv 7]: 400% damage
[Lv 8]: 450% damage
[Lv 9]: 500% damage
[Lv 10]: 550% damage

Comments: The above values are for each hit
on the target. The number of hits each target
inside the skill's range receives is random,
however, targets closer to the user have a
higher chance of receiving more hits.
Desperado is a Melee Physical Attack, not
ranged. As such, it will hit inside Pneuma.
This skill will not work inside Land Protector.

gs_disarm.name: Disarm
gs_disarm.description:
Disarm
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Tracking 7
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: 1 Character
Description: Shoots target's hand to disarm it.
Skill level affects the success rate.
When used on monster, this skill will reduce
their Attack by 25%, but has no effect on Boss
monsters.
Disarm has a range of 9 cells and lasts
30 seconds.
Requires Revolver or Rifle class weapon.
[Lv 1]: [(DEX/24)+(LUK/20)]% Base Chance
[Lv 2]: [(DEX/20)+(LUK/16)]% Base Chance
[Lv 3]: [(DEX/16)+(LUK/12)]% Base Chance
[Lv 4]: [(DEX/12)+(LUK/8)]% Base Chance
[Lv 5]: [(DEX/8)+(LUK/4)]% Base Chance

Comments: Unlike Rogue's Strip skills, this
skill does not check for the difference between
the user's and target's DEX. Instead, the final
chance of success is based on the following:
+1% for each Base Level of the User
-1% for each Base Level of the Target
-1% for every point of LUK of the Target
-[(Target's AGI*Base Chance)/100]%

Because each of those factors is added
linearly, the final chance can be 0%.
Targets with considerably high LUK, AGI or
that have a large level advantage will most
likely be immune to this skill's effect altogether.

gs_adjustment.name: Adjustment
gs_adjustment.description:
Adjustment
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Flip the Coin 4, Disarm 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Caster gains +30 FLEE and
receives 20% less damage from ranged
physical attacks, but loses 30 HIT.
This skill has a 30 second duration and
cannot be used together with the Madness
Canceller skill.
Consumes 2 Coins.

Comments: Unlike Madness Canceller, using
the skill again within its duration does not
cancel the effect. Adjustment and Madness
Canceller are mutually exclusive and will
cancel one another.

gs_gatlingfever.name: Gatling Fever
gs_gatlingfever.description:
Gatling Fever
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Rapid Shower 7,
Desperado 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Temporarily increases
Attack Speed and ATK at the cost of
reducing FLEE and Movement Speed.
Gatling Fever status is cancelled when the
skill is used again.
Requires Gatling Gun class weapon.
[Lv 1]: ATK +30, ASPD +2 %, FLEE -5,
30 seconds duration
[Lv 2]: ATK +40, ASPD +4%, FLEE -10,
45 seconds duration
[Lv 3]: ATK +50, ASPD +6%, FLEE -15,
60 seconds duration
[Lv 4]: ATK +60, ASPD +8%, FLEE -20,
75 seconds duration
[Lv 5]: ATK +70, ASPD +10%, FLEE -25,
90 seconds duration
[Lv 6]: ATK +80, ASPD +12%, FLEE -30,
105 seconds duration
[Lv 7]: ATK +90, ASPD +14%, FLEE -35,
120 seconds duration
[Lv 8]: ATK +100, ASPD +16%, FLEE -40,
135 seconds duration
[Lv 9]: ATK +110, ASPD +18%, FLEE -45,
150 seconds duration
[Lv 10]: ATK +120, ASPD +20%, FLEE -50,
165 seconds duration

Comments: By themselves, Gatling Guns are
not faster than Revolvers. This is the master
skill for Gatling Gunslingers, and the only skill
that is unique to Gatlings.
The ATK boost granted by this skill is directly
added to your Stat Window and will affect every
skill. The skill can be freely toggled on and off.
You have to pay the SP cost every time you turn
it on, but toggling off is free.
Being under this buff's effect will severely limit
your Movement Speed and effectively make you
unable to evade any attacks, but is essential
for using Gatlings.

gs_snakeeye.name: Snake Eye
gs_snakeeye.description:
Snake's Eye
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases Attack Range and HIT
when equipped with Gun class weapons.
[Lv 1]: HIT +1, Range +1
[Lv 2]: HIT +2, Range +2
[Lv 3]: HIT +3, Range +3
[Lv 4]: HIT +4, Range +4
[Lv 5]: HIT +5, Range +5
[Lv 6]: HIT +6, Range +6
[Lv 7]: HIT +7, Range +7
[Lv 8]: HIT +8, Range +8
[Lv 9]: HIT +9, Range +9
[Lv 10]: HIT +10, Range +10

Comments: This skill's Range increase is for
Auto-Attacks and a few specific skills.
The affected skills are: Piercing Shot, Rapid
Shower, Full Buster, Spread Attack and Ground
Drift.

gs_bullseye.name: Bulls Eye
gs_bullseye.description:
Bull's Eye
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Flip the Coin 5, Tracking 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Ranged
Target: 1 Character
Description: Inflicts 500% damage to
Demi-Human and Brute monsters.
Bull's Eye has a 0.1% chance to inflict Coma
status on all enemies except Boss monsters.
Consumes 1 Coin.

Comments: Can be used with any gun, that
includes Gatlings and Grenade Launchers.
Does not work against other races.

nv_firstaid.name: First Aid
nv_firstaid.description:
First Aid
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Recovery
Target: Caster
Description: Uses 3 SP to restore 5 HP.

nv_trickdead.name: Play Dead
nv_trickdead.description:
Play Dead
Requirement: Finish Quest, Novice Only
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Feigns death to avoid the
menace of nearby enemies. The Play
Dead status is canceled by casting
this skill again.

Comments: This skill ceases to function after
jobchanging to any other class, including
Super Novice. Swordsman's Provoke and
Sage's Dispel can cancel the effect. All
monsters will be fooled, even Bosses and
MvPs.

nv_basic.name: Basic Skill
nv_basic.description:
