Basic Skill
Max Level: 9
Enables the use of Basic Interface Skills.
[Lv 1]: Enables Trading
Allows the trading of items with other
character.
Right click on a character to initiate.
[Lv 2]: Enables Emotions
Alt+(0~9) and Ctrl+(1,-,=.)
Alt+L opens additional Emotion icons.
[Lv 3]: Enables Sitting
Sitting doubles HP and SP regeneration
speed.
Press the Insert key or type /sit.
[Lv 4]: Enables Chat Room Creation
Alt+C to open a Chat Room or click the
Chat button in the Basic Information
Window.
[Lv 5]: Join a Party
Character can join a party.
[Lv 6]: Enables Use of Kafra Storage
Allows use of Kafra Storage.
[Lv 7]: Organize a Party
Create a party by typing
/organize ''Party Name''
Set party options in the Party Window (Alt+Z).
[Lv 9]: Enables Change to First Job Class
Qualifies character for change from Novice
to one of the First classes.

sm_sword.name: Sword Mastery
sm_sword.description:
Sword Mastery
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases damage with
One-Handed Sword and Dagger class weapon.
[Lv 1]: Damage +4
[Lv 2]: Damage +8
[Lv 3]: Damage +12
[Lv 4]: Damage +16
[Lv 5]: Damage +20
[Lv 6]: Damage +24
[Lv 7]: Damage +28
[Lv 8]: Damage +32
[Lv 9]: Damage +36
[Lv 10]: Damage +40

Comments: Mastery skills only get added up
at the end of damage calculation. In most
situations, it only results in a flat addition of
damage.

sm_recovery.name: Increase HP Recovery
sm_recovery.description:
Increase HP Recovery
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Restores HP every
10 seconds while idle. MaxHP affects how much
HP is restored by this skill.
[Lv 1]: HP+5 +(0.2% of Max HP)
[Lv 2]: HP+10 +(0.4% of Max HP)
[Lv 3]: HP+15 +(0.6% of Max HP)
[Lv 4]: HP+20 +(0.8% of Max HP)
[Lv 5]: HP+25 +(1.0% of Max HP)
[Lv 6]: HP+30 +(1.2% of Max HP)
[Lv 7]: HP+35 +(1.4% of Max HP)
[Lv 8]: HP+40 +(1.6% of Max HP)
[Lv 9]: HP+45 +(1.8% of Max HP)
[Lv 10]: HP+50 +(2.0% of Max HP)

Comments: Every skill level also increases
the effectiveness of HP healing items by 10%.
The healing ticks occur so long as the player
does not walk to to another tile, even if the
player is standing and in combat. The healing
ticks will not occur if the player is overweight.
It's also possible to receive healing ticks
while teleporting, so long as the player does
not walk.

sm_bash.name: Bash
sm_bash.description:
Bash
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: HITs an enemy with crushing
force. If Fatal Blow skill is learned, Bash
will have an added Stun effect at
Level 6 and higher. Damage and HIT
are increased every level.
[Lv 1]: 130% damage, +5% HIT
[Lv 2]: 160% damage, +10% HIT
[Lv 3]: 190% damage, +15% HIT
[Lv 4]: 220% damage, +20% HIT
[Lv 5]: 250% damage, +25% HIT
[Lv 6]: 280% damage, +30% HIT
[Lv 7]: 310% damage, +35% HIT
[Lv 8]: 340% damage, +40% HIT
[Lv 9]: 370% damage, +45% HIT
[Lv 10]: 400% damage, +50% HIT

Comments: Costs 8 SP up to Lv 5, after
which it costs 15.
Damage skills unlocked after jobchanging to
your next job will outclass Bash, however this
skill will continue to be relevant as a means of
stunning enemies.
Wearing Bongun Card grants this skill a new
effect: Shoving back targets 5 cells. This effect
stacks.

sm_provoke.name: Provoke
sm_provoke.description:
Provoke
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: 1 Character
Description: Enrages a target, reducing
Defense by VIT on Player and physical
defense on Monster, while increasing it's
Attack Power. Can't be used on Undead
and Boss monsters.
[Lv 1]: Damage +5%, DEF -10%
[Lv 2]: Damage +8%, DEF -15%
[Lv 3]: Damage +11%, DEF -20%
[Lv 4]: Damage +14%, DEF -25%
[Lv 5]: Damage +17%, DEF -30%
[Lv 6]: Damage +20%, DEF -35%
[Lv 7]: Damage +23%, DEF -40%
[Lv 8]: Damage +26%, DEF -45%
[Lv 9]: Damage +29%, DEF -50%
[Lv 10]: Damage +32%, DEF -55%

Comments: Provoke reduces both Hard and
Soft Defense of monsters, but only the
Soft Defense of players. Provoking frozen
targets will unfreeze them. Provoke can also
be used to interrupt skills, so long as the skill
is interruptable in the first place
Provoke counts as a hit and will cause
Rude Teleportation on monsters that are stuck
and have the ability to do so. If the skill fails
continuously against a player, you can be sure
that the player is wearing Evil Druid Card.

sm_twohand.name: Two-Handed Sword Mastery
sm_twohand.description:
Two-Handed Sword Mastery
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Sword Mastery 1
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases damage with
Two-Handed Sword class weapon.
[Lv 1]: Damage +4
[Lv 2]: Damage +8
[Lv 3]: Damage +12
[Lv 4]: Damage +16
[Lv 5]: Damage +20
[Lv 6]: Damage +24
[Lv 7]: Damage +28
[Lv 8]: Damage +32
[Lv 9]: Damage +36
[Lv 10]: Damage +40

Comments: Mastery skills only get added up
at the end of damage calculation. In most
situations, it only results in a flat addition of
damage.

sm_magnum.name: Magnum Break
sm_magnum.description:
Magnum Break
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Bash 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: Enemies around the caster
Description: Drains a small amount of the
caster's HP to inflict Fire
elemental damage on 5x5 AoE around the
caster and push enemies 2 cells backward.
For 10 seconds after Magnum Break,
caster's weapon will receive 20% Fire
elemental attack enhancement.
[Lv 1]: 120% damage, 110% Accuracy Bonus
[Lv 2]: 140% damage, 120% Accuracy Bonus
[Lv 3]: 160% damage, 130% Accuracy Bonus
[Lv 4]: 180% damage, 140% Accuracy Bonus
[Lv 5]: 200% damage, 150% Accuracy Bonus
[Lv 6]: 220% damage, 160% Accuracy Bonus
[Lv 7]: 240% damage, 170% Accuracy Bonus
[Lv 8]: 260% damage, 180% Accuracy Bonus
[Lv 9]: 280% damage, 190% Accuracy Bonus
[Lv 10]: 300% damage, 200% Accuracy Bonus

Comments: Although the damage scaling on
Magnum Break might not be large, the SP cost
is the same on all levels.
The extra Fire Damage Bonus ignores DEF.

sm_endure.name: Endure
sm_endure.description:
Endure
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Provoke 5
Requirement: Provoke 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Removes attack and movement
delay that occurs when a character receives
damage. Disabled in War of Emperium
but still grants the MDEF bonus.
[Lv 1]: 10 sec, MDEF +1
[Lv 2]: 13 sec, MDEF +2
[Lv 3]: 16 sec, MDEF +3
[Lv 4]: 19 sec, MDEF +4
[Lv 5]: 22 sec, MDEF +5
[Lv 6]: 25 sec, MDEF +6
[Lv 7]: 28 sec, MDEF +7
[Lv 8]: 31 sec, MDEF +8
[Lv 9]: 34 sec, MDEF +9
[Lv 10]: 37 sec, MDEF +10

Comments: What Endure does exactly is
preventing your character from displaying
flinching animations when taking hits. It is
extremely useful when doing any sort of
tanking, or handling a large number of
enemies.

nv_firstaid.name: First Aid
nv_firstaid.description:
First Aid
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Recovery
Target: Caster
Description: Uses 3 SP to restore 5 HP.

nv_trickdead.name: Play Dead
nv_trickdead.description:
Play Dead
Requirement: Finish Quest, Novice Only
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Feigns death to avoid the
menace of nearby enemies. The Play
Dead status is canceled by casting
this skill again.

Comments: This skill ceases to function after
jobchanging to any other class, including
Super Novice. Swordsman's Provoke and
Sage's Dispel can cancel the effect. All
monsters will be fooled, even Bosses and
MvPs.

sm_autoberserk.name: Auto Berserk
sm_autoberserk.description:
Auto Berserk
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active (Toggle)
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Empowered by rage,
character enters a condition that is
equivalent to Level 10 Provoke status
when HP is reduced to less than 25% of
MaxHP. Provoked status lasts until
character HP is restored to more than
25% of MaxHP or if Provoke effect is
nullified.

sm_fatalblow.name: Fatal Blow
sm_fatalblow.description:
Fatal Blow
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Inflicts Stun status on
target when using Level 6 Bash or
higher. The chance of inflicting Stun
increases with Bash skill level and
Base Level of the caster.

sm_movingrecovery.name: Moving HP-Recovery
sm_movingrecovery.description:
Moving HP Recovery
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Enables natural regen of
HP while moving. Only 25% of the HP that
is recovered while standing is restored
during movement. The Increase
HP Recovery skill does not affect Moving
HP Recovery.

nv_basic.name: Basic Skill
nv_basic.description:
Basic Skill
Max Level: 9
Enables the use of Basic Interface Skills.
[Lv 1]: Enables Trading
Allows the trading of items with other
character.
Right click on a character to initiate.
[Lv 2]: Enables Emotions
Alt+(0~9) and Ctrl+(1,-,=.)
Alt+L opens additional Emotion icons.
[Lv 3]: Enables Sitting
Sitting doubles HP and SP regeneration
speed.
Press the Insert key or type /sit.
[Lv 4]: Enables Chat Room Creation
Alt+C to open a Chat Room or click the
Chat button in the Basic Information
Window.
[Lv 5]: Join a Party
Character can join a party.
[Lv 6]: Enables Use of Kafra Storage
Allows use of Kafra Storage.
[Lv 7]: Organize a Party
Create a party by typing
/organize ''Party Name''
Set party options in the Party Window (Alt+Z).
[Lv 9]: Enables Change to First Job Class
Qualifies character for change from Novice
to one of the First classes.

mg_stonecurse.name: Stone Curse
mg_stonecurse.description:
Stone Curse
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: 1 Character
Description: Inflicts Stone Curse to a
target. Consumes 1 Red Gemstone.
[Lv 1]: 24% Chance
[Lv 2]: 28% Chance
[Lv 3]: 32% Chance
[Lv 4]: 36% Chance
[Lv 5]: 40% Chance
[Lv 6]: 44% Chance
[Lv 7]: 48% Chance
[Lv 8]: 52% Chance
[Lv 9]: 56% Chance
[Lv 10]: 60% Chance

Comments: Using this skill requires a
Gemstone and is very short range, however
Stone Curse is generally considered to be a
more crippling disable than Freeze. Stone
cursed enemies are vulnerable to Fire.
Bosses and Undead are immune.
Using the skill on a target that's already stone
cursed will immediately undo the effect, even if
it's an enemy.

mg_coldbolt.name: Cold Bolt
mg_coldbolt.description:
Cold Bolt
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: Enemy
Description: Summons bolts of frigid ice
to strike at an enemy which inflicts
Water elemental magic damage per hit.
One bolt for every skill level.
[Lv 1]: 100% MATK, 0.7 sec Cast Time,
1.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 2]: 200% MATK, 1.4 sec Cast Time,
1.2 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 3]: 300% MATK, 2.1 sec Cast Time,
1.4 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 4]: 400% MATK, 2.8 sec Cast Time,
1.6 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 5]: 500% MATK, 3.5 sec Cast Time,
1.8 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 6]: 600% MATK, 4.2 sec Cast Time,
2.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 7]: 700% MATK, 4.9 sec Cast Time,
2.2 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 8]: 800% MATK, 5.6 sec Cast Time,
2.4 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 9]: 900% MATK, 6.3 sec Cast Time,
2.6 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 10]: 1000% MATK, 7.0 sec Cast Time,
2.8 sec After Cast Delay

Comments: The basic Water spell of a Mage.
Higher levels of the skill dramatically increase
SP Cost and Cast Time. Different skill levels
of this skill can be set to individual hotkeys.
The skill is greatly enhanced by using Siroma
Card.

mg_lightningbolt.name: Lightning Bolt
mg_lightningbolt.description:
Lightning Bolt
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: 1 Character
Description: Drops lightning on target
inflicting Wind elemental
magic damage per hit.
One bolt for every skill level.
[Lv 1]: 100% MATK, 0.7 sec Cast Time,
1.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 2]: 200% MATK, 1.4 sec Cast Time,
1.2 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 3]: 300% MATK, 2.1 sec Cast Time,
1.4 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 4]: 400% MATK, 2.8 sec Cast Time,
1.6 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 5]: 500% MATK, 3.5 sec Cast Time,
1.8 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 6]: 600% MATK, 4.2 sec Cast Time,
2.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 7]: 700% MATK, 4.9 sec Cast Time,
2.2 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 8]: 800% MATK, 5.6 sec Cast Time,
2.4 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 9]: 900% MATK, 6.3 sec Cast Time,
2.6 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 10]: 1000% MATK, 7.0 sec Cast Time,
2.8 sec After Cast Delay

Comments: The basic Wind spell of a mage.
Higher levels of the skill dramatically increase
SP Cost and Cast Time. Different skill levels
of this skill can be set to individual hotkeys.
Unlike Fire and Cold bolts, there is no card
that will enhance Lightning bolt in the
same manner.

mg_napalmbeat.name: Napalm Beat
mg_napalmbeat.description:
Napalm Beat
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: 1 Character
Description: Uses telekinesis power to
attack a target and 3x3 cells around it
with Ghost elemental magic. The damage
portion is divided among the targets.
[Lv 1]: 80% MATK, 1.0 sec Cast Time
[Lv 2]: 90% MATK, 1.0 sec Cast Time
[Lv 3]: 100% MATK, 1.0 sec Cast Time
[Lv 4]: 110% MATK, 0.9 sec Cast Time
[Lv 5]: 120% MATK, 0.9 sec Cast Time
[Lv 6]: 130% MATK, 0.8 sec Cast Time
[Lv 7]: 140% MATK, 0.8 sec Cast Time
[Lv 8]: 150% MATK, 0.7 sec Cast Time
[Lv 9]: 160% MATK, 0.6 sec Cast Time
[Lv 10]: 170% MATK, 0.5 sec Cast Time

Comments: Mage's Ghost spells are weak
compared to elemental bolts, however they
are much faster casting and do adequate
damage against the Undead.
Damage will be split between the targets.

mg_firebolt.name: Fire Bolt
mg_firebolt.description:
Fire Bolt
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: 1 Character
Description: Attacks a target with arrow
made of fire inflicting Fire
elemental magic damage per hit.
One bolt for every skill level.
[Lv 1]: 100% MATK, 0.7 sec Cast Time,
1.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 2]: 200% MATK, 1.4 sec Cast Time,
1.2 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 3]: 300% MATK, 2.1 sec Cast Time,
1.4 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 4]: 400% MATK, 2.8 sec Cast Time,
1.6 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 5]: 500% MATK, 3.5 sec Cast Time,
1.8 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 6]: 600% MATK, 4.2 sec Cast Time,
2.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 7]: 700% MATK, 4.9 sec Cast Time,
2.2 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 8]: 800% MATK, 5.6 sec Cast Time,
2.4 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 9]: 900% MATK, 6.3 sec Cast Time,
2.6 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 10]: 1000% MATK, 7.0 sec Cast Time,
2.8 sec After Cast Delay

Comments: The basic Fire spell of a Mage.
Higher levels of the skill dramatically increase
SP Cost and Cast Time. Different skill levels
of this skill can be set to individual hotkeys.
The skill is greatly enhanced by using Imp
Card.

mg_sight.name: Sight
mg_sight.description:
Sight
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Uses 10 SP to summon a fire
ball that for 10 seconds will detect hidden
characters in 7x7 AoE around the caster.

Comments: If the skill is used by the means of
a Horong Card, removing the item containing
the card will immediately cancel the skill,
however the visual effect persists the entire duration.
Does not work against Stalker's Chase Walk.

mg_srecovery.name: Increase SP Recovery
mg_srecovery.description:
Increase SP Recovery
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Restores SP every 10
seconds while idle. MaxSP affects how much
SP is restored by this skill.
[Lv 1]: SP+3 +(0.2% of Max SP)
[Lv 2]: SP+6 +(0.4% of Max SP)
[Lv 3]: SP+9 +(0.6% of Max SP)
[Lv 4]: SP+12 +(0.8% of Max SP)
[Lv 5]: SP+15 +(1.0% of Max SP)
[Lv 6]: SP+18 +(1.2% of Max SP)
[Lv 7]: SP+21 +(1.4% of Max SP)
[Lv 8]: SP+24 +(1.6% of Max SP)
[Lv 9]: SP+27 +(1.8% of Max SP)
[Lv 10]: SP+30 +(2.0% of Max SP)

Comments: Every skill level also increases
the effectiveness of SP healing items by 10%.
The healing ticks occur so long as the player
does not walk to to another tile, even if the
player is standing and in combat. The healing
ticks will not occur if the player is overweight.
It's also possible to receive healing ticks
while teleporting, so long as the player does
not walk.

mg_frostdiver.name: Frost Diver
mg_frostdiver.description:
Frost Diver
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Cold Bolt 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical, Debuff
Target: 1 Character
Description: Inflicts Water magic
damage on a target, which has a chance to
inflict Freezing status. The Freezing
chance and duration are affected
by target's MDEF.
[Lv 1]: 110% MATK, 3 sec Freeze Duration,
38% Freeze Chance
[Lv 2]: 120% MATK, 6 sec Freeze Duration,
41% Freeze Chance
[Lv 3]: 130% MATK, 9 sec Freeze Duration,
44% Freeze Chance
[Lv 4]: 140% MATK, 12 sec Freeze Duration,
47% Freeze Chance
[Lv 5]: 150% MATK, 15 sec Freeze Duration,
50% Freeze Chance
[Lv 6]: 160% MATK, 18 sec Freeze Duration,
53% Freeze Chance
[Lv 7]: 170% MATK, 21 sec Freeze Duration,
56% Freeze Chance
[Lv 8]: 180% MATK, 24 sec Freeze Duration,
59% Freeze Chance
[Lv 9]: 190% MATK, 27 sec Freeze Duration,
62% Freeze Chance
[Lv 10]: 200% MATK, 30 sec Freeze Duration,
65% Freeze Chance

Comments: Frost Diver is a Mage's disabling
skill. Frozen targets cannot retaliate until the
freeze duration ends. Keep in mind that
enemies that are Undead Element cannot be
frozen, and enemies with high MDEF have
lower chance of being frozen, and will remain
frozen for less time.

mg_thunderstorm.name: Thunderstorm
mg_thunderstorm.description:
Thunder Storm
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Lightning Bolt 4
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: Ground
Description: Drops lightning bolt on
specific location, inflicting Wind
elemental magic per hit in a 5x5 cell area.
[Lv 1]: 80% MATK, 1 sec Cast Time
[Lv 2]: 160% MATK, 2 sec Cast Time
[Lv 3]: 240% MATK, 3 sec Cast Time
[Lv 4]: 320% MATK, 4 sec Cast Time
[Lv 5]: 400% MATK, 5 sec Cast Time
[Lv 6]: 480% MATK, 6 sec Cast Time
[Lv 7]: 560% MATK, 7 sec Cast Time
[Lv 8]: 640% MATK, 8 sec Cast Time
[Lv 9]: 720% MATK, 9 sec Cast Time
[Lv 10]: 800% MATK, 10 sec Cast Time

Comments: The strongest AoE spell available
to Mages, however it also has a massive 10
second cast at max level.

mg_soulstrike.name: Soul Strike
mg_soulstrike.description:
Soul Strike
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Napalm Beat 4
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: 1 Character
Description: Summons holy spirit to
inflict 100% MATK Ghost elemental
magical damage per hit on a target.
This skill inflicts additional damage
against Undead monsters.
[Lv 1]: 1 Hit, 1.2 sec After Cast Delay,
+5% damage to Undead
[Lv 2]: 1 Hit, 1.4 sec After Cast Delay,
+10% damage to Undead
[Lv 3]: 2 Hits, 1.6 sec After Cast Delay,
+15% damage to Undead
[Lv 4]: 2 Hits, 1.8 sec After Cast Delay,
+20% damage to Undead
[Lv 5]: 3 Hits, 2.0 sec After Cast Delay,
+25% damage to Undead
[Lv 6]: 3 Hits, 2.2 sec After Cast Delay,
+30% damage to Undead
[Lv 7]: 4 Hits, 2.4 sec After Cast Delay,
+35% damage to Undead
[Lv 8]: 4 Hits, 2.6 sec After Cast Delay,
+40% damage to Undead
[Lv 9]: 5 Hits, 2.8 sec After Cast Delay,
+45% damage to Undead
[Lv 10]: 5 Hits, 2.7 sec After Cast Delay,
+50% damage to Undead

Comments: Cast time is 0.5 sec at all levels.
Additional levels of this skill increase damage
at the cost of longer delays after cast.

mg_fireball.name: Fire Ball
mg_fireball.description:
Fire Ball
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Fire Bolt 4
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical, AoE
Target: 1 Character
Description: Summons a fire ball to
damage a target and all enemies within
x5 cells area with Fire elemental
magical damage. Nearby enemies receives
3/4 of the damage given to the
center enemy. Cast Time and After Cast
Delay are reduced upon learning level 6
or higher.
[Lv 1]: 80% MATK, 1.5 sec Cast Time,
1.5 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 2]: 90% MATK, 1.5 sec Cast Time,
1.5 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 3]: 100% MATK, 1.5 sec Cast Time,
1.5 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 4]: 110% MATK, 1.5 sec Cast Time,
1.5 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 5]: 120% MATK, 1.5 sec Cast Time,
1.5 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 6]: 130% MATK, 1.0 sec Cast Time,
1.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 7]: 140% MATK, 1.0 sec Cast Time,
1.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 8]: 150% MATK, 1.0 sec Cast Time,
1.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 9]: 160% MATK, 1.0 sec Cast Time,
1.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 10]: 170% MATK, 1.0 sec Cast Time,
1.0 sec After Cast Delay

Comments: Weak but very quick casting.

mg_safetywall.name: Safety Wall
mg_safetywall.description:
Safety Wall
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Napalm Beat 7, Soul Strike 5
Requirement: Napalm Beat 7, Soul Strike 5
Requirement: Aspersio 4, Sanctuary 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Ground
Description: Creates a magic barrier on a
targeted spot that will block melee physical
attacks for the duration of the Safety Wall.
Consumes 1 Blue Gemstone.
[Lv 1]: Blocks 2 Hits, 4.0 sec Cast Time,
5 sec duration
[Lv 2]: Blocks 3 Hits, 3.5 sec Cast Time,
10 sec duration
[Lv 3]: Blocks 4 Hits, 3.0 sec Cast Time,
15 sec duration
[Lv 4]: Blocks 5 Hits, 2.5 sec Cast Time,
20 sec duration
[Lv 5]: Blocks 6 Hits, 2.0 sec Cast Time,
25 sec duration
[Lv 6]: Blocks 7 Hits, 1.5 sec Cast Time,
30 sec duration
[Lv 7]: Blocks 8 Hits, 1.0 sec Cast Time,
35 sec duration
[Lv 8]: Blocks 9 Hits, 1.0 sec Cast Time,
40 sec duration
[Lv 9]: Blocks 10 Hits, 1.0 sec Cast Time,
45 sec duration
[Lv 10]: Blocks 11 Hits, 1.0 sec Cast Time,
50 sec duration

Comments: Safety Wall blocks 1 melee hit,
regardless of how much damage it would
have dealt. This is a key skill for both
self preservation and to support allies,
in particular against MvPs.
Pneuma and Safety wall are mutually
exclusive, and where one exists the other
is inhibited. You can deny the use of Pneuma
by placing a Safety Wall near a target.

mg_firewall.name: Fire Wall
mg_firewall.description:
Fire Wall
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Sight 1, Fire Ball 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: Ground
Description: Uses 40 SP to create a fire
barrier that inflicts 50% MATK Fire
elemental magic damage on upcoming enemies
and knock them 2 cells backward.
The Undead are not affected by the pushback.
Duration is 4 seconds +1 extra for every
skill level.

Comments: The wall occupies three cells and
is placed perpendicular from the line between
the caster and the target cell. Each cell can do
2 hits +1 per skill level. Because undead
enemies are not pushed back, they will be
instantly hit with every single 'charge' of the
Fire Wall tile. Using the skill on
the tile where the caster stands will result in a
North-South Fire Wall.

mg_energycoat.name: Energy Coat
mg_energycoat.description:
Energy Coat
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Creates a barrier of spiritual
energy that will buffer attacks at the caster.
Caster's remaining SP affects the amount of
damage reduced by the barrier. More SP
is drained as attacks buffered by the barrier
accumulate.
[100~81% SP]: 30% reduction, 3.0% per hit
[80~61% SP]: 24% reduction, 2.5% per hit
[60~41% SP]: 18% reduction, 2.0% per hit
[40~21% SP]: 12% reduction, 1.5% per hit
[20~11% SP]: 6% reduction, 1.0% per hit

Comments: The damage reduction from this
skill is very substantial, however the SP drain
will quickly deplete the character since it
drains a % of your SP. Against fast attacking
enemies that will hit you many times, perhaps
it's better not to use this skill at all.

nv_firstaid.name: First Aid
nv_firstaid.description:
First Aid
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Recovery
Target: Caster
Description: Uses 3 SP to restore 5 HP.

nv_trickdead.name: Play Dead
nv_trickdead.description:
Play Dead
Requirement: Finish Quest, Novice Only
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Feigns death to avoid the
menace of nearby enemies. The Play
Dead status is canceled by casting
this skill again.

Comments: This skill ceases to function after
jobchanging to any other class, including
Super Novice. Swordsman's Provoke and
Sage's Dispel can cancel the effect. All
monsters will be fooled, even Bosses and
MvPs.

nv_basic.name: Basic Skill
nv_basic.description:
Basic Skill
Max Level: 9
Enables the use of Basic Interface Skills.
[Lv 1]: Enables Trading
Allows the trading of items with other
character.
Right click on a character to initiate.
[Lv 2]: Enables Emotions
Alt+(0~9) and Ctrl+(1,-,=.)
Alt+L opens additional Emotion icons.
[Lv 3]: Enables Sitting
Sitting doubles HP and SP regeneration
speed.
Press the Insert key or type /sit.
[Lv 4]: Enables Chat Room Creation
Alt+C to open a Chat Room or click the
Chat button in the Basic Information
Window.
[Lv 5]: Join a Party
Character can join a party.
[Lv 6]: Enables Use of Kafra Storage
Allows use of Kafra Storage.
[Lv 7]: Organize a Party
Create a party by typing
/organize ''Party Name''
Set party options in the Party Window (Alt+Z).
[Lv 9]: Enables Change to First Job Class
Qualifies character for change from Novice
to one of the First classes.

ac_double.name: Double Strafe
ac_double.description:
Double Strafing
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Vulture's Eye 10
Skill Form: Physical attack
Description: A ranged attack, that fires two
arrows. Increases attack range by 3.
Requires Bow class weapon.
Consumes 1 Arrow.
[Lv 1]: 200% damage
[Lv 2]: 220% damage
[Lv 3]: 240% damage
[Lv 4]: 260% damage
[Lv 5]: 280% damage
[Lv 6]: 300% damage
[Lv 7]: 320% damage
[Lv 8]: 340% damage
[Lv 9]: 360% damage
[Lv 10]: 380% damage

Comments: The basic skill attack for Archers.
Capable of dealing a lot of damage from a safe
distance. Increasing your Attack Speed will
allow you to spam this skill even faster.

ac_owl.name: Owl's Eye
ac_owl.description:
Owl's Eye
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases DEX.
[Lv 1]: Dex +1
[Lv 2]: Dex +2
[Lv 3]: Dex +3
[Lv 4]: Dex +4
[Lv 5]: Dex +5
[Lv 6]: Dex +6
[Lv 7]: Dex +7
[Lv 8]: Dex +8
[Lv 9]: Dex +9
[Lv 10]: Dex +10

ac_shower.name: Arrow Shower
ac_shower.description:
Arrow Shower
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Double Strafing 5
Skill Form: Physical attack
Description: A 5x5 splash attack that damages
all enemies around the target. Knock back
enemies by 2 cells.
Requires Bow class weapon.
Consumes 1 Arrow.
[Lv 1]: 80% damage
[Lv 2]: 85% damage
[Lv 3]: 90% damage
[Lv 4]: 95% damage
[Lv 5]: 100% damage
[Lv 6]: 105% damage
[Lv 7]: 110% damage
[Lv 8]: 115% damage
[Lv 9]: 120% damage
[Lv 10]: 125% damage

Comments: This skill is not good for killing
groups of enemies, both because it does low
damage and because it disperses them. The
most common use for it is to push Hunter
traps, or to spread status effects using
specialized bows.
For Trap focused Hunters in particular, this
skill is key to their gameplay. Arrow Shower is
capable if accurately pushing traps in any
direction.

ac_vulture.name: Vulture's Eye
ac_vulture.description:
Vulture's Eye
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Owl's Eye 3
Requirement: Owl's Eye 3
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases Attack Range
and HIT with Bow class weapons.
[Lv 1]: Range and HIT +1
[Lv 2]: Range and HIT +2
[Lv 3]: Range and HIT +3
[Lv 4]: Range and HIT +4
[Lv 5]: Range and HIT +5
[Lv 6]: Range and HIT +6
[Lv 7]: Range and HIT +7
[Lv 8]: Range and HIT +8
[Lv 9]: Range and HIT +9
[Lv 10]: Range and HIT +10

ac_concentration.name: Improve Concentration
ac_concentration.description:
Improve Concentration
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Vulture's Eye 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Boosts AGI and DEX
temporarily as well as detects nearby
hidden characters in 3x3 AoE.
[Lv 1]: Agi and Dex +3% for 60 sec
[Lv 2]: Agi and Dex +4% for 80 sec
[Lv 3]: Agi and Dex +5% for 100 sec
[Lv 4]: Agi and Dex +6% for 120 sec
[Lv 5]: Agi and Dex +7% for 140 sec
[Lv 6]: Agi and Dex +8% for 160 sec
[Lv 7]: Agi and Dex +9% for 180 sec
[Lv 8]: Agi and Dex +10% for 200 sec
[Lv 9]: Agi and Dex +11% for 220 sec
[Lv 10]: Agi and Dex +12% for 240 sec

ac_chargearrow.name: Arrow Repel
ac_chargearrow.description:
Charge Arrow
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Ranged
Target: 1 Character
Description: Draws the bowstring to its limit to
fire a volley of arrows with enough force to
push the target 6 cells back.

ac_makingarrow.name: Arrow Crafting
ac_makingarrow.description:
Arrow Crafting
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Crafting
Target: Caster
Description: Creates Arrows from
specific items. The kind of Arrows
produced, as well as the amount, is
determined by the items used.
This skill fails, if the current Weight
is more than 70%.

nv_firstaid.name: First Aid
nv_firstaid.description:
First Aid
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Recovery
Target: Caster
Description: Uses 3 SP to restore 5 HP.

nv_trickdead.name: Play Dead
nv_trickdead.description:
Play Dead
Requirement: Finish Quest, Novice Only
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Feigns death to avoid the
menace of nearby enemies. The Play
Dead status is canceled by casting
this skill again.

Comments: This skill ceases to function after
jobchanging to any other class, including
Super Novice. Swordsman's Provoke and
Sage's Dispel can cancel the effect. All
monsters will be fooled, even Bosses and
MvPs.

nv_basic.name: Basic Skill
nv_basic.description:
Basic Skill
Max Level: 9
Enables the use of Basic Interface Skills.
[Lv 1]: Enables Trading
Allows the trading of items with other
character.
Right click on a character to initiate.
[Lv 2]: Enables Emotions
Alt+(0~9) and Ctrl+(1,-,=.)
Alt+L opens additional Emotion icons.
[Lv 3]: Enables Sitting
Sitting doubles HP and SP regeneration
speed.
Press the Insert key or type /sit.
[Lv 4]: Enables Chat Room Creation
Alt+C to open a Chat Room or click the
Chat button in the Basic Information
Window.
[Lv 5]: Join a Party
Character can join a party.
[Lv 6]: Enables Use of Kafra Storage
Allows use of Kafra Storage.
[Lv 7]: Organize a Party
Create a party by typing
/organize ''Party Name''
Set party options in the Party Window (Alt+Z).
[Lv 9]: Enables Change to First Job Class
Qualifies character for change from Novice
to one of the First classes.

al_ruwach.name: Ruwach
al_ruwach.description:
Ruwach
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Uses 10 SP to summon Holy
Spirit that will detect hidden
characters in 5x5 cells area around the
caster for 10 sec. If target is enemy,
this skill will inflict Holy elemental
magic damage that equal to 145% MATK.

Comments: Because the skill deals damage,
revealing an enemy may cause a short
animation lock.

al_heal.name: Heal
al_heal.description:
Heal
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Faith 10, Demon Bane 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Recovery
Target: 1 Character
Description: Restores target's HP.
Skill level, caster's Base Level and
total INT affect the amount of HP
restored.

Comments: This is the most basic healing
skill in the game. Using lower levels of Heal is
an effective way of not squandering your SP.
You can shortcut several levels of Heal to your
keyboard, or use the scrolling wheel.
Using Heal on undead enemies is commonly
refeered to as 'Heal Bombing' and in order to
do so, you must either hold the shift key, or
use the /ns command.

al_holywater.name: Aqua Benedicta
al_holywater.description:
Aqua Benedicta
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Crafting
Target: Caster
Description: Creates Holy Water with
1 Empty Bottle while standing in water.

Comments: The skill will only work when used
on a water tile. The underwater segments of
Byalan Dungeon are NOT water tiles. Similar
to other skills that require water tiles, they can
also be used on top of a Sage's Deluge, or a
Ninja's Water Evasion.

al_dp.name: Divine Protection
al_dp.description:
Divine Protection
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Cure 1
Description: Reduces damage taken from
Demon and Undead monsters. Character's
Level affects the damage reduction. Damage
reduction is added after final damage
is calculated.
[Lv 1]: DEF +3
[Lv 2]: DEF +6
[Lv 3]: DEF +9
[Lv 4]: DEF +12
[Lv 5]: DEF +15
[Lv 6]: DEF +18
[Lv 7]: DEF +21
[Lv 8]: DEF +24
[Lv 9]: DEF +27
[Lv 10]: DEF +30

Comments: This defense works like Soft DEF,
it's a flat reduction of the final damage.
Reductions of this level are normally
insignificant except in the case of a Monk
taking hits during Steel Body.
Players planning to jobchange into Monks
must max this skill to unlock the basic Monk
skill.

al_teleport.name: Teleport
al_teleport.description:
Teleport
Max Level: 2
Requirement: Ruwach 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Teleports caster to another area.
[Lv 1]: Teleport to a random cell
[Lv 2]: Teleport to save point

Comments: Most servers allow players to
bypass the menu when using Teleport Lv 1.
Teleporting around a map is the most efficient
way of traversing large distances or seeking
dispersed enemies. Creamy Card allows
any character to learn Lv 1 of this skill.

al_cure.name: Cure
al_cure.description:
Cure
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Heal 2
Requirement: Faith 5
Requirement: Heal 2
Skill Form: Recovery
Description: Cures target from Silence,
Confusion and Blind status effects. When used
on Undead monster, this skill will inflicts
Confusion status.

Comments: You cannot cure Silence on
yourself since you cannot cast in the first
place. The Priest skill Status Recovery covers
most of the rest of common status effects.

al_incagi.name: Increase AGI
al_incagi.description:
Increase Agility
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Heal 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Increases targeted
character's Movement and Attack Speed
for the duration of skill. Drains 15
HP from the caster after each cast
and will fail if the caster has less than 16 HP.
The increase is 2 +1 extra for every skill level.
Duration: 40 sec +20 extra for each skill level.

Comments: The increase in movement speed
is very significant.

al_blessing.name: Blessing
al_blessing.description:
Blessing
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Divine Protection 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Temporarily increases STR, DEX
and INT of the target and removes Curse and
Stone Curse effect(only on second stage). The
bonus is 1 point of STR, DEX and INT
respectively per skill level. Duration is
40 seconds +20 extra for each skill level.

Comments: When used to cure Curse status,
the target will not receive the buff. The skill can
be used offensively against Undead and
Demon monsters by holding shift, or using /ns
command. Players cannot be
offensively Blessed.

al_demonbane.name: Demon Bane
al_demonbane.description:
Demon Bane
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Divine Protection 3
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases damage
against Demon and Undead monsters.
Base Level affects damage bonus.
Damage increased by this skill is added
after final damage is calculated.
[Lv 1]: Damage +3
[Lv 2]: Damage +6
[Lv 3]: Damage +9
[Lv 4]: Damage +12
[Lv 5]: Damage +15
[Lv 6]: Damage +18
[Lv 7]: Damage +21
[Lv 8]: Damage +24
[Lv 9]: Damage +27
[Lv 10]: Damage +30

Comments: The bonus from this skill is similar
to Weapon Masteries, in which they only offers
a flat increase at the end of damage
calculation. Players planning to jobchange
into Monks must max this skill to unlock the
basic Monk skill.

al_angelus.name: Angelus
al_angelus.description:
Angelus
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Divine Protection 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster and Party Members
Description: Temporarily increases
Defense of yourself and party members on
screen for the duration of skill.
[Lv 1]: DEF +5%
[Lv 2]: DEF +10%
[Lv 3]: DEF +15%
[Lv 4]: DEF +20%
[Lv 5]: DEF +25%
[Lv 6]: DEF +30%
[Lv 7]: DEF +35%
[Lv 8]: DEF +40%
[Lv 9]: DEF +45%
[Lv 10]: DEF +50%

Comments: Soft Defense is obtained almost
exclusively from investment into VIT, and thus
only characters with significant amounts of
VIT will reap any benefits from this skill.

al_warp.name: Warp Portal
al_warp.description:
Warp Portal
Max Level: 4
Requirement: Teleport 2
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Ground
Description: Creates a Warp Portal that
will teleport those who enter it to
another area. Each Warp Portal can
teleport up to 8 people.
Consumes 1 Blue Gemstone.
[Lv 1]: Warp to Save Point
[Lv 2]: Enable 1 Memo point
[Lv 3]: Enable 2 Memo points
[Lv 4]: Enable 3 Memo points
[Memo Point]: Specific map area memorized
as a destination for a Warp Portal.
Type/memo in a target area to set
location as a Memo Point.

Comments: Indoor locations and Dungeon
floors cannot be memorized. Most servers will
block the ability to /memo on field maps that
contain MvPs or Boss monsters.

al_decagi.name: Decrease AGI
al_decagi.description:
Decrease Agility
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Increase Agility 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: 1 Character
Description: Reduces target's Movement
Speed and AGI stat for the skill's duration.
[Lv 1]: AGI -3, 42% success,
lasts 30(monster) or 20(player) sec
[Lv 2]: AGI -4, 44% success,
lasts 40(monster) or 25(player) sec
[Lv 3]: AGI -5, 46% success,
lasts 50(monster) or 30(player) sec
[Lv 4]: AGI -6, 48% success,
lasts 60(monster) or 35(player) sec
[Lv 5]: AGI -7, 50% success,
lasts 70(monster) or 40(player) sec
[Lv 6]: AGI -8, 52% success,
lasts 80(monster) or 45(player) sec
[Lv 7]: AGI -9, 54% success,
lasts 90(monster) or 50(player) sec
[Lv 8]: AGI -10, 56% success,
lasts 100(monster) or 55(player) sec
[Lv 9]: AGI -11, 58% success,
lasts 110(monster) or 60(player) sec
[Lv 10]: AGI -12, 60% success,
lasts 120(monster) or 65(player) sec

Comments: This skill is a reverse
Increase Agility, to be used against enemies.
Both skills cancel each other.

al_crucis.name: Signum Crucis
al_crucis.description:
Signum Crucis
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Demon Bane 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: Caster's View Range
Description: Reduces physical defense of
Undead elemental and Demon monsters in
the caster's vicinity.
[Lv 1]: DEF Reduction 14%,
27% success chance
[Lv 2]: DEF Reduction 18%,
31% success chance
[Lv 3]: DEF Reduction 22%,
35% success chance
[Lv 4]: DEF Reduction 26%,
39% success chance
[Lv 5]: DEF Reduction 30%,
43% success chance
[Lv 6]: DEF Reduction 34%,
47% success chance
[Lv 7]: DEF Reduction 38%,
51% success chance
[Lv 8]: DEF Reduction 42%,
55% success chance
[Lv 9]: DEF Reduction 46%,
59% success chance
[Lv 10]: DEF Reduction 50%,
63% success chance

Comments: One of the few debuffs that works
on Bosses and MvPs, shredding their Hard
DEF. Another useful aspect of this skill is that
it affects every enemy on screen, even
non-Demon/Undead. In a party, you can use
Signum Crucis to 'tap' all monsters on screen,
increasing the EXP wield.
A monster successfully affected will use
the /swt emote.

al_pneuma.name: Pneuma
al_pneuma.description:
Pneuma
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Warp Portal 4
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Ground
Description: Uses 10 SP to create
barrier in 3x3 cells around targeted
cell that for 10 sec will protect
anyone inside it from long range
physical attacks.

Comments: Pneuma is an almost absolute
defense against any ranged damage. This skill
is vital for supporting parties, in particular
against Bosses and MvPs.
Pneuma cannot be cast to overlap an existing
Pneuma or Safety Wall. Pneumas will inhibit
enemies from positioning Safety Walls.
Furthermore, Pneumas will block ranged
damage, but targets can still be affected by an
attack's other effects, such as being
Stunned or Frozen.

al_holylight.name: Holy Light
al_holylight.description:
Holy Light
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: 1 Character
Description: Summons a holy light to
inflict Holy elemental magic damage
to counter evil.

Comments: This will will immediately dispel
Kyrie Eleison. Being Soul Linked massively
increases this skill's damage. Cookie Cards
will increase damage by 10% each as well.

nv_firstaid.name: First Aid
nv_firstaid.description:
First Aid
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Recovery
Target: Caster
Description: Uses 3 SP to restore 5 HP.

nv_trickdead.name: Play Dead
nv_trickdead.description:
Play Dead
Requirement: Finish Quest, Novice Only
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Feigns death to avoid the
menace of nearby enemies. The Play
Dead status is canceled by casting
this skill again.

Comments: This skill ceases to function after
jobchanging to any other class, including
Super Novice. Swordsman's Provoke and
Sage's Dispel can cancel the effect. All
monsters will be fooled, even Bosses and
MvPs.

nv_basic.name: Basic Skill
nv_basic.description:
Basic Skill
Max Level: 9
Enables the use of Basic Interface Skills.
[Lv 1]: Enables Trading
Allows the trading of items with other
character.
Right click on a character to initiate.
[Lv 2]: Enables Emotions
Alt+(0~9) and Ctrl+(1,-,=.)
Alt+L opens additional Emotion icons.
[Lv 3]: Enables Sitting
Sitting doubles HP and SP regeneration
speed.
Press the Insert key or type /sit.
[Lv 4]: Enables Chat Room Creation
Alt+C to open a Chat Room or click the
Chat button in the Basic Information
Window.
[Lv 5]: Join a Party
Character can join a party.
[Lv 6]: Enables Use of Kafra Storage
Allows use of Kafra Storage.
[Lv 7]: Organize a Party
Create a party by typing
/organize ''Party Name''
Set party options in the Party Window (Alt+Z).
[Lv 9]: Enables Change to First Job Class
Qualifies character for change from Novice
to one of the First classes.

mc_inccarry.name: Enlarge Weight Limit
mc_inccarry.description:
Enlarge Weight Limit
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases maximum Weight Limit.
[Lv 1]: Weight capacity +200
[Lv 2]: Weight capacity +400
[Lv 3]: Weight capacity +600
[Lv 4]: Weight capacity +800
[Lv 5]: Weight capacity +1000
[Lv 6]: Weight capacity +1200
[Lv 7]: Weight capacity +1400
[Lv 8]: Weight capacity +1600
[Lv 9]: Weight capacity +1800
[Lv 10]: Weight capacity +2000

Comments: It is possible to have both this
skill and the Gym Pass version of this skill
simultaneously.

mc_mammonite.name: Mammonite
mc_mammonite.description:
Mammonite
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: Uses the power of greed to
strike a single target with a strong
blow, dealing high damage. Consumes
some Zeny.
[Lv 1]: 150% damage, Cost 100 Zeny
[Lv 2]: 200% damage, Cost 200 Zeny
[Lv 3]: 250% damage, Cost 300 Zeny
[Lv 4]: 300% damage, Cost 400 Zeny
[Lv 5]: 350% damage, Cost 500 Zeny
[Lv 6]: 400% damage, Cost 600 Zeny
[Lv 7]: 450% damage, Cost 700 Zeny
[Lv 8]: 500% damage, Cost 800 Zeny
[Lv 9]: 550% damage, Cost 900 Zeny
[Lv 10]: 600% damage, Cost 1000 Zeny

Comments: The common way to use
Mammonite is to look for 'Zeny Positive'
monsters, whose drops will sell for more
than the cost of killing them.

mc_identify.name: Item Appraisal
mc_identify.description:
Item Appraisal
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Identifies an unknown item,
making it available for use.

mc_discount.name: Discount
mc_discount.description:
Discount
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Enlarge Weight Limit 3
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Decreases the price of
items sold by NPC shops.
[Lv 1]: 7% Discount
[Lv 2]: 9% Discount
[Lv 3]: 11% Discount
[Lv 4]: 13% Discount
[Lv 5]: 15% Discount
[Lv 6]: 17% Discount
[Lv 7]: 19% Discount
[Lv 8]: 21% Discount
[Lv 9]: 23% Discount
[Lv 10]: 24% Discount

mc_pushcart.name: Pushcart
mc_pushcart.description:
Pushcart
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Enlarge Weight Limit 5
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Enables rental and use of
Pushcart which provide additional
storage for items, although items cannot
be directly used or equipped from
a Pushcart. Pushcart can be rented
from Kafra Employees.
Pushcart shortcut: (Alt+W)
[Lv 1]: 55% Movement speed
[Lv 2]: 60% Movement speed
[Lv 3]: 65% Movement speed
[Lv 4]: 70% Movement speed
[Lv 5]: 75% Movement speed
[Lv 6]: 80% Movement speed
[Lv 7]: 85% Movement speed
[Lv 8]: 90% Movement speed
[Lv 9]: 95% Movement speed
[Lv 10]: 100% Movement speed

mc_cartdecorate.name: Decorate Cart
mc_cartdecorate.description:
Change Cart 2
Requirement: Finish Quest
Type: Supportive
Description: You can choose a variety of
cute designs carts.

mc_overcharge.name: Overcharge
mc_overcharge.description:
Overcharge
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Discount 3
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases amount of Zeny
received for items sold to NPC shops.
[Lv 1]: 7% Overcharge
[Lv 2]: 9% Overcharge
[Lv 3]: 11% Overcharge
[Lv 4]: 13% Overcharge
[Lv 5]: 15% Overcharge
[Lv 6]: 17% Overcharge
[Lv 7]: 19% Overcharge
[Lv 8]: 21% Overcharge
[Lv 9]: 23% Overcharge
[Lv 10]: 24% Overcharge

mc_vending.name: Vending
mc_vending.description:
Vending
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Pushcart 3
Skill Form: Active
Description: Opens a street stall for
selling items to other players. Skill
level affects the number of items that
can be vended at a time. The items you
want to sell must be in the Pushcart, and the
character must have his Pushcart equipped.
[Lv 1]: Vend 3 items
[Lv 2]: Vend 4 items
[Lv 3]: Vend 5 items
[Lv 4]: Vend 6 items
[Lv 5]: Vend 7 items
[Lv 6]: Vend 8 items
[Lv 7]: Vend 9 items
[Lv 8]: Vend 10 items
[Lv 9]: Vend 11 items
[Lv 10]: Vend 12 items

Comments: Double check your items to make
sure you're not selling things at the wrong
value! Depending on your server's rules and
configuration, there might be a predetermined
area for opening shops. Also depending on
server configuration, you may have to pay tax
on every sale. You must remain logged in for
the shop to be visible to players, unless the
server allows the use of @autotrade
command.

mc_cartrevolution.name: Cart Revolution
mc_cartrevolution.description:
Cart Revolution
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Special Physical, AoE
Target: 1 Character
Description: A splashed damage attack in
which a Pushcart is smashed into a target.
Inflicts 150% of the damage of a normal attack
+1% for every 1% of the cart's max capacity
filled.

mc_changecart.name: Change Cart
mc_changecart.description:
Change Cart
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Changes the Pushcart
appearance. There are five different Pushcart
styles that are chosen according to the
character's Base Level.

mc_loud.name: Crazy Uproar
mc_loud.description:
Crazy Uproar
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Screams with battle vigor to
add +4 STR for 5 minutes.

nv_firstaid.name: First Aid
nv_firstaid.description:
First Aid
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Recovery
Target: Caster
Description: Uses 3 SP to restore 5 HP.

nv_trickdead.name: Play Dead
nv_trickdead.description:
Play Dead
Requirement: Finish Quest, Novice Only
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Feigns death to avoid the
menace of nearby enemies. The Play
Dead status is canceled by casting
this skill again.

Comments: This skill ceases to function after
jobchanging to any other class, including
Super Novice. Swordsman's Provoke and
Sage's Dispel can cancel the effect. All
monsters will be fooled, even Bosses and
MvPs.

nv_basic.name: Basic Skill
nv_basic.description:
Basic Skill
Max Level: 9
Enables the use of Basic Interface Skills.
[Lv 1]: Enables Trading
Allows the trading of items with other
character.
Right click on a character to initiate.
[Lv 2]: Enables Emotions
Alt+(0~9) and Ctrl+(1,-,=.)
Alt+L opens additional Emotion icons.
[Lv 3]: Enables Sitting
Sitting doubles HP and SP regeneration
speed.
Press the Insert key or type /sit.
[Lv 4]: Enables Chat Room Creation
Alt+C to open a Chat Room or click the
Chat button in the Basic Information
Window.
[Lv 5]: Join a Party
Character can join a party.
[Lv 6]: Enables Use of Kafra Storage
Allows use of Kafra Storage.
[Lv 7]: Organize a Party
Create a party by typing
/organize ''Party Name''
Set party options in the Party Window (Alt+Z).
[Lv 9]: Enables Change to First Job Class
Qualifies character for change from Novice
to one of the First classes.

tf_double.name: Double Attack
tf_double.description:
Double Attack
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: When attacking with Dagger
class weapon, there is chance of
inflicting double attacks. This skill also affects
Left-Hand damage of Katar class weapons.
[Lv 1]: 5% chance, Katar Off-Hand +3%
[Lv 2]: 10% chance, Katar Off-Hand +5%
[Lv 3]: 15% chance, Katar Off-Hand +7%
[Lv 4]: 20% chance, Katar Off-Hand +9%
[Lv 5]: 25% chance, Katar Off-Hand +11%
[Lv 6]: 30% chance, Katar Off-Hand +13%
[Lv 7]: 35% chance, Katar Off-Hand +15%
[Lv 8]: 40% chance, Katar Off-Hand +17%
[Lv 9]: 45% chance, Katar Off-Hand +19%
[Lv 10]: 50% chance, Katar Off-Hand +21%

Comments: Double Attacks cannot crit, also
Double Attacks are calculated before crits,
therefore if you have a crit based build you do
not want Double Attacks to occur. Use a
non-Dagger weapon on the Right Hand to
inhibit the skill from functioning.
The items Sidewinder Card, Nagan and Chick
Hat allow Double Attacks to be performed with
any weapon. In those cases, if the user knows
the skill, it will use the highest level learned.
Therefore, those items will allow up to Level 10
usage of the skill with any weapon.

tf_steal.name: Steal
tf_steal.description:
Steal
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Steals an item from a monster.
Higher skill levels increase success chance.

[Lv 1]: 10% +(User DEX - Target DEX/2)
[Lv 2]: 16% +(User DEX - Target DEX/2)
[Lv 3]: 22% +(User DEX - Target DEX/2)
[Lv 4]: 28% +(User DEX - Target DEX/2)
[Lv 5]: 34% +(User DEX - Target DEX/2)
[Lv 6]: 40% +(User DEX - Target DEX/2)
[Lv 7]: 46% +(User DEX - Target DEX/2)
[Lv 8]: 52% +(User DEX - Target DEX/2)
[Lv 9]: 58% +(User DEX - Target DEX/2)
[Lv 10]: 64% +(User DEX - Target DEX/2)

Comments: Steal does not remove items
from the monster's drops table. You can steal
an item from a monster, kill it and receive the
same item again.
The success chance is affected by the user's
and target's DEX. Which item will be stolen is
also determined by DEX. Items at the
beginning of the drop table are easier to steal.
Cards can never be stolen.

Despite being one of the most used skills in
the game, it's often misunderstood by players.
When the skill is used, it attempts to steal
each item from the monster's drop table, from
top to bottom, one at a time. This method has
interesting consequences. For example, if your
goal is to steal an item at the beginning of a
monster's drop table, high DEX will increase
your odds. However, if you're aiming for an item
at the end of the list, low DEX is necessary.
This is because, if your DEX is too high, you
will always success in stealing the first few
items on the drop table, and the game will
never roll for stealing items towards the end
of the list.

tf_poison.name: Envenom
tf_poison.description:
Envenom
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: Deals Poison elemental
damage to a target that has a chance
of inflicting Poison status.
[Lv 1]: 14% chance, 100% ATK +15 ATK
[Lv 2]: 18% chance, 100% ATK +30 ATK
[Lv 3]: 22% chance, 100% ATK +45 ATK
[Lv 4]: 26% chance, 100% ATK +60 ATK
[Lv 5]: 30% chance, 100% ATK +75 ATK
[Lv 6]: 34% chance, 100% ATK +90 ATK
[Lv 7]: 38% chance, 100% ATK +105 ATK
[Lv 8]: 42% chance, 100% ATK +120 ATK
[Lv 9]: 46% chance, 100% ATK +135 ATK
[Lv 10]: 50% chance, 100% ATK +150 ATK

Comments: As in most RPGs, poisoning
enemies is rarely worth the effort.
Similar to Swordsman's Bash, using the
Poisonous Toad Card grants this skill a new
effect: shoving the target back. And in the
same manner as Bash and Bongun Card,
the shove distance increases with more cards.

From a damage perspective, Envenom has
terrible scaling. Additional skill levels only
increase the fixed damage bonus. This skill
is a pre-requirement for several Assassin
skills, however.

tf_miss.name: Improve Dodge
tf_miss.description:
Improve Dodge
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases FLEE. FLEE
receives additional bonus upon
reaching 2nd classes. This skill also
slightly enhances the Movement Speed
of Assassin classes.
[Lv 1]: FLEE +3(4 if 2nd),
Assassin MovSpeed +1%
[Lv 2]: FLEE +6(8 if 2nd),
Assassin MovSpeed +1%
[Lv 3]: FLEE +9(12 if 2nd),
Assassin MovSpeed +2%
[Lv 4]: FLEE +12(16 if 2nd),
Assassin MovSpeed +2%
[Lv 5]: FLEE +15(20 if 2nd),
Assassin MovSpeed +3%
[Lv 6]: FLEE +18(24 if 2nd),
Assassin MovSpeed +3%
[Lv 7]: FLEE +21(28 if 2nd),
Assassin MovSpeed +4%
[Lv 8]: FLEE +24(32 if 2nd),
Assassin MovSpeed +4%
[Lv 9]: FLEE +27(36 if 2nd),
Assassin MovSpeed +5%
[Lv 10]: FLEE +30(40 if 2nd),
Assassin MovSpeed +5%

tf_hiding.name: Hiding
tf_hiding.description:
Hiding
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Steal 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Hides under the ground to
avoid enemy attack. Detection skills
can cancel Hiding status. Demon, Insect
and Boss monsters can detect character
in Hiding status. Can be canceled by
using the skill again.

Comments: This is the most basic stealth skill
in the game. It prevents you from doing
anything except using Hiding again to cancel
the effect. Assassins can use Grimtooth from
hiding. Rogues can use Raid and Backstab
from hiding, as well as learn a passive skill
that permits them to move during while
hiding.

tf_detoxify.name: Detoxify
tf_detoxify.description:
Detoxify
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Envenom 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Removes Poison status from
a targeted character.

Comments: The status effect removing skills
from Acolyte and Priest job do not work on
poison. Only this skill does, although many
items such as Green Potions and Green
Herbs will also cure the status.

nv_firstaid.name: First Aid
nv_firstaid.description:
First Aid
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Recovery
Target: Caster
Description: Uses 3 SP to restore 5 HP.

nv_trickdead.name: Play Dead
nv_trickdead.description:
Play Dead
Requirement: Finish Quest, Novice Only
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Feigns death to avoid the
menace of nearby enemies. The Play
Dead status is canceled by casting
this skill again.

Comments: This skill ceases to function after
jobchanging to any other class, including
Super Novice. Swordsman's Provoke and
Sage's Dispel can cancel the effect. All
monsters will be fooled, even Bosses and
MvPs.

tf_backsliding.name: Back Slide
tf_backsliding.description:
Back Slide
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Quickly move backwards to
position yourself safely away from threats.

Comments: An extremely useful movement
skill for getting in and out of combat. You can
control the direction you will slide into by
using /bingbing and /bangbang commands.

tf_pickstone.name: Find Stone
tf_pickstone.description:
Pick Stone
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Picks up a Stone from the ground.

Comments: Stones are needed in order to
repair Barriers in WoE 2.0. Any character can
use this skill by equipping a Stapo Card.

tf_sprinklesand.name: Sand Attack
tf_sprinklesand.description:
Sprinkle Sand
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: Kicks sand into enemy face
which will inflict 130% damage and also
chance to cause Blind status on the target.

tf_throwstone.name: Stone Fling
tf_throwstone.description:
Throw Stone
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Special Physical
Target: 1 Character
Description: Attacks an enemy with a Stone
which inflicts 50 damage that will pierce
enemy's defense and has a low chance of
causing the Stun or Blind status.
Consumes 1 Stone.

Comments: Any character can use this skill by
equipping a Stapo Card.

nv_basic.name: Basic Skill
nv_basic.description:
Basic Skill
Max Level: 9
Enables the use of Basic Interface Skills.
[Lv 1]: Enables Trading
Allows the trading of items with other
character.
Right click on a character to initiate.
[Lv 2]: Enables Emotions
Alt+(0~9) and Ctrl+(1,-,=.)
Alt+L opens additional Emotion icons.
[Lv 3]: Enables Sitting
Sitting doubles HP and SP regeneration
speed.
Press the Insert key or type /sit.
[Lv 4]: Enables Chat Room Creation
Alt+C to open a Chat Room or click the
Chat button in the Basic Information
Window.
[Lv 5]: Join a Party
Character can join a party.
[Lv 6]: Enables Use of Kafra Storage
Allows use of Kafra Storage.
[Lv 7]: Organize a Party
Create a party by typing
/organize ''Party Name''
Set party options in the Party Window (Alt+Z).
[Lv 9]: Enables Change to First Job Class
Qualifies character for change from Novice
to one of the First classes.

sm_sword.name: Sword Mastery
sm_sword.description:
Sword Mastery
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases damage with
One-Handed Sword and Dagger class weapon.
[Lv 1]: Damage +4
[Lv 2]: Damage +8
[Lv 3]: Damage +12
[Lv 4]: Damage +16
[Lv 5]: Damage +20
[Lv 6]: Damage +24
[Lv 7]: Damage +28
[Lv 8]: Damage +32
[Lv 9]: Damage +36
[Lv 10]: Damage +40

Comments: Mastery skills only get added up
at the end of damage calculation. In most
situations, it only results in a flat addition of
damage.

sm_recovery.name: Increase HP Recovery
sm_recovery.description:
Increase HP Recovery
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Restores HP every
10 seconds while idle. MaxHP affects how much
HP is restored by this skill.
[Lv 1]: HP+5 +(0.2% of Max HP)
[Lv 2]: HP+10 +(0.4% of Max HP)
[Lv 3]: HP+15 +(0.6% of Max HP)
[Lv 4]: HP+20 +(0.8% of Max HP)
[Lv 5]: HP+25 +(1.0% of Max HP)
[Lv 6]: HP+30 +(1.2% of Max HP)
[Lv 7]: HP+35 +(1.4% of Max HP)
[Lv 8]: HP+40 +(1.6% of Max HP)
[Lv 9]: HP+45 +(1.8% of Max HP)
[Lv 10]: HP+50 +(2.0% of Max HP)

Comments: Every skill level also increases
the effectiveness of HP healing items by 10%.
The healing ticks occur so long as the player
does not walk to to another tile, even if the
player is standing and in combat. The healing
ticks will not occur if the player is overweight.
It's also possible to receive healing ticks
while teleporting, so long as the player does
not walk.

sm_bash.name: Bash
sm_bash.description:
Bash
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: HITs an enemy with crushing
force. If Fatal Blow skill is learned, Bash
will have an added Stun effect at
Level 6 and higher. Damage and HIT
are increased every level.
[Lv 1]: 130% damage, +5% HIT
[Lv 2]: 160% damage, +10% HIT
[Lv 3]: 190% damage, +15% HIT
[Lv 4]: 220% damage, +20% HIT
[Lv 5]: 250% damage, +25% HIT
[Lv 6]: 280% damage, +30% HIT
[Lv 7]: 310% damage, +35% HIT
[Lv 8]: 340% damage, +40% HIT
[Lv 9]: 370% damage, +45% HIT
[Lv 10]: 400% damage, +50% HIT

Comments: Costs 8 SP up to Lv 5, after
which it costs 15.
Damage skills unlocked after jobchanging to
your next job will outclass Bash, however this
skill will continue to be relevant as a means of
stunning enemies.
Wearing Bongun Card grants this skill a new
effect: Shoving back targets 5 cells. This effect
stacks.

sm_provoke.name: Provoke
sm_provoke.description:
Provoke
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: 1 Character
Description: Enrages a target, reducing
Defense by VIT on Player and physical
defense on Monster, while increasing it's
Attack Power. Can't be used on Undead
and Boss monsters.
[Lv 1]: Damage +5%, DEF -10%
[Lv 2]: Damage +8%, DEF -15%
[Lv 3]: Damage +11%, DEF -20%
[Lv 4]: Damage +14%, DEF -25%
[Lv 5]: Damage +17%, DEF -30%
[Lv 6]: Damage +20%, DEF -35%
[Lv 7]: Damage +23%, DEF -40%
[Lv 8]: Damage +26%, DEF -45%
[Lv 9]: Damage +29%, DEF -50%
[Lv 10]: Damage +32%, DEF -55%

Comments: Provoke reduces both Hard and
Soft Defense of monsters, but only the
Soft Defense of players. Provoking frozen
targets will unfreeze them. Provoke can also
be used to interrupt skills, so long as the skill
is interruptable in the first place
Provoke counts as a hit and will cause
Rude Teleportation on monsters that are stuck
and have the ability to do so. If the skill fails
continuously against a player, you can be sure
that the player is wearing Evil Druid Card.

sm_twohand.name: Two-Handed Sword Mastery
sm_twohand.description:
Two-Handed Sword Mastery
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Sword Mastery 1
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases damage with
Two-Handed Sword class weapon.
[Lv 1]: Damage +4
[Lv 2]: Damage +8
[Lv 3]: Damage +12
[Lv 4]: Damage +16
[Lv 5]: Damage +20
[Lv 6]: Damage +24
[Lv 7]: Damage +28
[Lv 8]: Damage +32
[Lv 9]: Damage +36
[Lv 10]: Damage +40

Comments: Mastery skills only get added up
at the end of damage calculation. In most
situations, it only results in a flat addition of
damage.

sm_magnum.name: Magnum Break
sm_magnum.description:
Magnum Break
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Bash 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: Enemies around the caster
Description: Drains a small amount of the
caster's HP to inflict Fire
elemental damage on 5x5 AoE around the
caster and push enemies 2 cells backward.
For 10 seconds after Magnum Break,
caster's weapon will receive 20% Fire
elemental attack enhancement.
[Lv 1]: 120% damage, 110% Accuracy Bonus
[Lv 2]: 140% damage, 120% Accuracy Bonus
[Lv 3]: 160% damage, 130% Accuracy Bonus
[Lv 4]: 180% damage, 140% Accuracy Bonus
[Lv 5]: 200% damage, 150% Accuracy Bonus
[Lv 6]: 220% damage, 160% Accuracy Bonus
[Lv 7]: 240% damage, 170% Accuracy Bonus
[Lv 8]: 260% damage, 180% Accuracy Bonus
[Lv 9]: 280% damage, 190% Accuracy Bonus
[Lv 10]: 300% damage, 200% Accuracy Bonus

Comments: Although the damage scaling on
Magnum Break might not be large, the SP cost
is the same on all levels.
The extra Fire Damage Bonus ignores DEF.

sm_endure.name: Endure
sm_endure.description:
Endure
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Provoke 5
Requirement: Provoke 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Removes attack and movement
delay that occurs when a character receives
damage. Disabled in War of Emperium
but still grants the MDEF bonus.
[Lv 1]: 10 sec, MDEF +1
[Lv 2]: 13 sec, MDEF +2
[Lv 3]: 16 sec, MDEF +3
[Lv 4]: 19 sec, MDEF +4
[Lv 5]: 22 sec, MDEF +5
[Lv 6]: 25 sec, MDEF +6
[Lv 7]: 28 sec, MDEF +7
[Lv 8]: 31 sec, MDEF +8
[Lv 9]: 34 sec, MDEF +9
[Lv 10]: 37 sec, MDEF +10

Comments: What Endure does exactly is
preventing your character from displaying
flinching animations when taking hits. It is
extremely useful when doing any sort of
tanking, or handling a large number of
enemies.

kn_twohandquicken.name: Twohand Quicken
kn_twohandquicken.description:
Two-Hand Quicken
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Two-Handed Sword Mastery 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Temporarily increases Attack
Speed for the duration of skill.
Requires Two-handed Sword.
[Lv 1]: 30 sec duration
[Lv 2]: 60 sec duration
[Lv 3]: 90 sec duration
[Lv 4]: 120 sec duration
[Lv 5]: 150 sec duration
[Lv 6]: 180 sec duration
[Lv 7]: 210 sec duration
[Lv 8]: 240 sec duration
[Lv 9]: 270 sec duration
[Lv 10]: 300 sec duration

kn_autocounter.name: Counter Attack
kn_autocounter.description:
Auto Counter
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Two-Handed Sword Mastery 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: After receiving melee damage
from an enemy, automatically retaliate with
a mighty critical attack.
[Lv 1]: 0.4 sec duration
[Lv 2]: 0.8 sec duration
[Lv 3]: 1.2 sec duration
[Lv 4]: 1.6 sec duration
[Lv 5]: 2.0 sec duration

Comments: Auto Counter will completely
negate attacks and then immediate counter
with a critical against the enemy. The Knight
must be facing the enemy or the counter will
not work. Does not work with skills, only
normal attacks. Counters work against
Bosses, therefore it's a good skill to use while
tanking. Players can spin in place by using
/bingbing and /bangbang commands, which
will help you face the right direction.

kn_riding.name: Peco Peco Riding
kn_riding.description:
Peco Peco Ride
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Endure 1
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Enables riding of Peco Peco.

kn_spearmastery.name: Spear Mastery
kn_spearmastery.description:
Spear Mastery
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases Spear class
weapon damage. When riding a Pecopeco,
the bonus damage increased by 1 per level.
[Lv 1]: Damage +4
[Lv 2]: Damage +8
[Lv 3]: Damage +12
[Lv 4]: Damage +16
[Lv 5]: Damage +20
[Lv 6]: Damage +24
[Lv 7]: Damage +28
[Lv 8]: Damage +32
[Lv 9]: Damage +36
[Lv 10]: Damage +40

Comments: Mastery skills only get added up
at the end of damage calculation. In most
situations, it only results in a flat addition of
damage.

kn_bowlingbash.name: Bowling Bash
kn_bowlingbash.description:
Bowling Bash
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Bash 10, Magnum Break 3,n Two-Handed Sword Mastery 5,n Two-Hand, Quicken 10, Auto Counter 5
4190Requirement: Auto Counter 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: Strikes an enemy with massive
force, causing it to tumble away and damage
other enemies that happen to be in its path.
[Lv 1]: 140% damage
[Lv 2]: 180% damage
[Lv 3]: 220% damage
[Lv 4]: 260% damage
[Lv 5]: 300% damage
[Lv 6]: 340% damage
[Lv 7]: 380% damage
[Lv 8]: 420% damage
[Lv 9]: 460% damage
[Lv 10]: 500% damage

Comments: Possibly one of the best AoE skills
in the game. Enemies are hit twice and
pushed back, hitting other enemies which all
get hit twice as well.
Bowling Bash has a very particular glitch in
which the skill does not function correctly
while standing on cells that are divisible by 40,
or the 2 cells adjacent to those. This effect is
commonly referred to by players as
'Gutterflines', which is an imaginary grid on the
map where the skill will not work.
Some servers will sometimes 'fix' this bug by
changing the way it functions slightly, making it
less authentic to the original game but without
the glitch.
Similar to Brandish Spear, this skill has an
invisible cast time before the skill will activate.

kn_cavaliermastery.name: Cavalier Mastery
kn_cavaliermastery.description:
Cavalry Mastery
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Peco Peco Ride 1
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases Attack Speed
while mounted on a Pecopeco. Mastering
this skill raises the Attack Speed so that
the penalty while mounted on a Pecopeco
is fully nullified.
[Lv 1]: 40% penalty
[Lv 2]: 30% penalty
[Lv 3]: 20% penalty
[Lv 4]: 10% penalty
[Lv 5]: 0% penalty

kn_pierce.name: Pierce
kn_pierce.description:
Pierce
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Spear Mastery 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: Attacks an enemy by using a
thrusting stab with a number of additional
hits that depend on the monster's size.
Requires Spear class weapon.
Small Monsters: 1 hit
Medium Monsters: 2 hits
Large Monsters: 3 hits
[Lv 1]: 110% damage, +5% Accuracy
[Lv 2]: 120% damage, +10% Accuracy
[Lv 3]: 130% damage, +15% Accuracy
[Lv 4]: 140% damage, +20% Accuracy
[Lv 5]: 150% damage, +25% Accuracy
[Lv 6]: 160% damage, +30% Accuracy
[Lv 7]: 170% damage, +35% Accuracy
[Lv 8]: 180% damage, +40% Accuracy
[Lv 9]: 190% damage, +45% Accuracy
[Lv 10]: 200% damage, +50% Accuracy

Comments: Against Medium sized targets it
will deal about the same damage as Bash for
half of the SP cost, and against Large-sized
targets it does much more damage than
a Bash.

kn_spearboomerang.name: Spear Boomerang
kn_spearboomerang.description:
Spear Boomerang
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Pierce 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Ranged
Target: 1 Character
Description: Attacks an enemy from a distance
by hurling a spear.
Requires Spear class weapon.
[Lv 1]: 150% damage
[Lv 2]: 200% damage
[Lv 3]: 250% damage
[Lv 4]: 300% damage
[Lv 5]: 350% damage

Comments: This is the longest range skill that
a Knight has access. The damage is good
but the 10 SP cost per use will quickly deplete
a Knight's meager SP pool.

kn_spearstab.name: Spear Stab
kn_spearstab.description:
Spear Stab
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Pierce 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Ranged
Target: 1 Character
Description: Attacks an enemy with a forceful
spear stab that will knock it back.
Requires Spear class weapon.
[Lv 1]: 120% damage
[Lv 2]: 140% damage
[Lv 3]: 160% damage
[Lv 4]: 180% damage
[Lv 5]: 200% damage
[Lv 6]: 220% damage
[Lv 7]: 240% damage
[Lv 8]: 260% damage
[Lv 9]: 280% damage
[Lv 10]: 300% damage

Comments: Spear Stab is technically an
AoE Splash damage skill that will damage
every monster in a line between the player and
the target. Knights however have access to
better mobbing skills and Spear Stab is
instead used for its pushback property.

kn_brandishspear.name: Brandish Spear
kn_brandishspear.description:
Brandish Spear
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Peco Peco Ride 1, Spear Stab 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Ranged
Target: 1 Character
Description: A powerful lancing strike made
while riding. Can only be performed while
mounted on a Pecopeco.
Requires Spear class weapon.
[Lv 1]: 120% damage, 1 cell splash
[Lv 2]: 140% damage, 1 cell splash
[Lv 3]: 160% damage, 1 cell splash
[Lv 4]: 180% damage, 2 cell splash
[Lv 5]: 200% damage, 2 cell splash
[Lv 6]: 220% damage, 2 cell splash
[Lv 7]: 240% damage, 3 cell splash
[Lv 8]: 260% damage, 3 cell splash
[Lv 9]: 280% damage, 3 cell splash
[Lv 10]: 300% damage, 4 cell splash

Comments: This is an AoE spear attack that
hits enemies in a 180 degrees circle in front of
the Knight. Targets are knocked back. This
skill has an invisible cast time similar to
Bowling Bash.

kn_chargeatk.name: Charge Attack
kn_chargeatk.description:
Charge Attack
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: Charge at the single enemy that's
away from you at range immediately.
Further the enemy is from you, higher your
damage will be, but also increase your casting
time of this skill.

Comments: Damage is 100% ATK for every
3 cells of distance. The user will move to the
cell adjacent to the target, while the target will
be pushed back in the same direction. The
distance which the target is moved is equal
to the distance the knight moved plus 1 cell.

kn_onehand.name: Onehand Quicken
kn_onehand.description:
One-Hand Quicken
Requirement: Two Hand Quicken 10,
Spirit State
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Increases Attack Speed when
using a One-Handed Sword class weapons.
Activating this skill cancels the effect of any
Potions that have a similar effect, but it is
possible to use these Potions after One Hand
Quicken has been cast.
Unequipping the Sword will cancel
this skill's effect.

Comments: Has the same ASPD boost of
a Lv10 Two-Hand Quicken.
In order to use this, you must have mastered
Two-Hand Quicken and be Soul Linked.

nv_firstaid.name: First Aid
nv_firstaid.description:
First Aid
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Recovery
Target: Caster
Description: Uses 3 SP to restore 5 HP.

nv_trickdead.name: Play Dead
nv_trickdead.description:
Play Dead
Requirement: Finish Quest, Novice Only
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Feigns death to avoid the
menace of nearby enemies. The Play
Dead status is canceled by casting
this skill again.

Comments: This skill ceases to function after
jobchanging to any other class, including
Super Novice. Swordsman's Provoke and
Sage's Dispel can cancel the effect. All
monsters will be fooled, even Bosses and
MvPs.

sm_autoberserk.name: Auto Berserk
sm_autoberserk.description:
Auto Berserk
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active (Toggle)
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Empowered by rage,
character enters a condition that is
equivalent to Level 10 Provoke status
when HP is reduced to less than 25% of
MaxHP. Provoked status lasts until
character HP is restored to more than
25% of MaxHP or if Provoke effect is
nullified.

sm_fatalblow.name: Fatal Blow
sm_fatalblow.description:
Fatal Blow
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Inflicts Stun status on
target when using Level 6 Bash or
higher. The chance of inflicting Stun
increases with Bash skill level and
Base Level of the caster.

sm_movingrecovery.name: Moving HP-Recovery
sm_movingrecovery.description:
Moving HP Recovery
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Enables natural regen of
HP while moving. Only 25% of the HP that
is recovered while standing is restored
during movement. The Increase
HP Recovery skill does not affect Moving
HP Recovery.

nv_basic.name: Basic Skill
nv_basic.description:
Basic Skill
Max Level: 9
Enables the use of Basic Interface Skills.
[Lv 1]: Enables Trading
Allows the trading of items with other
character.
Right click on a character to initiate.
[Lv 2]: Enables Emotions
Alt+(0~9) and Ctrl+(1,-,=.)
Alt+L opens additional Emotion icons.
[Lv 3]: Enables Sitting
Sitting doubles HP and SP regeneration
speed.
Press the Insert key or type /sit.
[Lv 4]: Enables Chat Room Creation
Alt+C to open a Chat Room or click the
Chat button in the Basic Information
Window.
[Lv 5]: Join a Party
Character can join a party.
[Lv 6]: Enables Use of Kafra Storage
Allows use of Kafra Storage.
[Lv 7]: Organize a Party
Create a party by typing
/organize ''Party Name''
Set party options in the Party Window (Alt+Z).
[Lv 9]: Enables Change to First Job Class
Qualifies character for change from Novice
to one of the First classes.

al_ruwach.name: Ruwach
al_ruwach.description:
Ruwach
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Uses 10 SP to summon Holy
Spirit that will detect hidden
characters in 5x5 cells area around the
caster for 10 sec. If target is enemy,
this skill will inflict Holy elemental
magic damage that equal to 145% MATK.

Comments: Because the skill deals damage,
revealing an enemy may cause a short
animation lock.

al_heal.name: Heal
al_heal.description:
Heal
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Faith 10, Demon Bane 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Recovery
Target: 1 Character
Description: Restores target's HP.
Skill level, caster's Base Level and
total INT affect the amount of HP
restored.

Comments: This is the most basic healing
skill in the game. Using lower levels of Heal is
an effective way of not squandering your SP.
You can shortcut several levels of Heal to your
keyboard, or use the scrolling wheel.
Using Heal on undead enemies is commonly
refeered to as 'Heal Bombing' and in order to
do so, you must either hold the shift key, or
use the /ns command.

al_holywater.name: Aqua Benedicta
al_holywater.description:
Aqua Benedicta
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Crafting
Target: Caster
Description: Creates Holy Water with
1 Empty Bottle while standing in water.

Comments: The skill will only work when used
on a water tile. The underwater segments of
Byalan Dungeon are NOT water tiles. Similar
to other skills that require water tiles, they can
also be used on top of a Sage's Deluge, or a
Ninja's Water Evasion.

al_dp.name: Divine Protection
al_dp.description:
Divine Protection
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Cure 1
Description: Reduces damage taken from
Demon and Undead monsters. Character's
Level affects the damage reduction. Damage
reduction is added after final damage
is calculated.
[Lv 1]: DEF +3
[Lv 2]: DEF +6
[Lv 3]: DEF +9
[Lv 4]: DEF +12
[Lv 5]: DEF +15
[Lv 6]: DEF +18
[Lv 7]: DEF +21
[Lv 8]: DEF +24
[Lv 9]: DEF +27
[Lv 10]: DEF +30

Comments: This defense works like Soft DEF,
it's a flat reduction of the final damage.
Reductions of this level are normally
insignificant except in the case of a Monk
taking hits during Steel Body.
Players planning to jobchange into Monks
must max this skill to unlock the basic Monk
skill.

al_teleport.name: Teleport
al_teleport.description:
Teleport
Max Level: 2
Requirement: Ruwach 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Teleports caster to another area.
[Lv 1]: Teleport to a random cell
[Lv 2]: Teleport to save point

Comments: Most servers allow players to
bypass the menu when using Teleport Lv 1.
Teleporting around a map is the most efficient
way of traversing large distances or seeking
dispersed enemies. Creamy Card allows
any character to learn Lv 1 of this skill.

al_cure.name: Cure
al_cure.description:
Cure
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Heal 2
Requirement: Faith 5
Requirement: Heal 2
Skill Form: Recovery
Description: Cures target from Silence,
Confusion and Blind status effects. When used
on Undead monster, this skill will inflicts
Confusion status.

Comments: You cannot cure Silence on
yourself since you cannot cast in the first
place. The Priest skill Status Recovery covers
most of the rest of common status effects.

al_incagi.name: Increase AGI
al_incagi.description:
Increase Agility
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Heal 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Increases targeted
character's Movement and Attack Speed
for the duration of skill. Drains 15
HP from the caster after each cast
and will fail if the caster has less than 16 HP.
The increase is 2 +1 extra for every skill level.
Duration: 40 sec +20 extra for each skill level.

Comments: The increase in movement speed
is very significant.

al_blessing.name: Blessing
al_blessing.description:
Blessing
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Divine Protection 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Temporarily increases STR, DEX
and INT of the target and removes Curse and
Stone Curse effect(only on second stage). The
bonus is 1 point of STR, DEX and INT
respectively per skill level. Duration is
40 seconds +20 extra for each skill level.

Comments: When used to cure Curse status,
the target will not receive the buff. The skill can
be used offensively against Undead and
Demon monsters by holding shift, or using /ns
command. Players cannot be
offensively Blessed.

al_demonbane.name: Demon Bane
al_demonbane.description:
Demon Bane
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Divine Protection 3
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases damage
against Demon and Undead monsters.
Base Level affects damage bonus.
Damage increased by this skill is added
after final damage is calculated.
[Lv 1]: Damage +3
[Lv 2]: Damage +6
[Lv 3]: Damage +9
[Lv 4]: Damage +12
[Lv 5]: Damage +15
[Lv 6]: Damage +18
[Lv 7]: Damage +21
[Lv 8]: Damage +24
[Lv 9]: Damage +27
[Lv 10]: Damage +30

Comments: The bonus from this skill is similar
to Weapon Masteries, in which they only offers
a flat increase at the end of damage
calculation. Players planning to jobchange
into Monks must max this skill to unlock the
basic Monk skill.

al_angelus.name: Angelus
al_angelus.description:
Angelus
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Divine Protection 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster and Party Members
Description: Temporarily increases
Defense of yourself and party members on
screen for the duration of skill.
[Lv 1]: DEF +5%
[Lv 2]: DEF +10%
[Lv 3]: DEF +15%
[Lv 4]: DEF +20%
[Lv 5]: DEF +25%
[Lv 6]: DEF +30%
[Lv 7]: DEF +35%
[Lv 8]: DEF +40%
[Lv 9]: DEF +45%
[Lv 10]: DEF +50%

Comments: Soft Defense is obtained almost
exclusively from investment into VIT, and thus
only characters with significant amounts of
VIT will reap any benefits from this skill.

al_warp.name: Warp Portal
al_warp.description:
Warp Portal
Max Level: 4
Requirement: Teleport 2
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Ground
Description: Creates a Warp Portal that
will teleport those who enter it to
another area. Each Warp Portal can
teleport up to 8 people.
Consumes 1 Blue Gemstone.
[Lv 1]: Warp to Save Point
[Lv 2]: Enable 1 Memo point
[Lv 3]: Enable 2 Memo points
[Lv 4]: Enable 3 Memo points
[Memo Point]: Specific map area memorized
as a destination for a Warp Portal.
Type/memo in a target area to set
location as a Memo Point.

Comments: Indoor locations and Dungeon
floors cannot be memorized. Most servers will
block the ability to /memo on field maps that
contain MvPs or Boss monsters.

al_decagi.name: Decrease AGI
al_decagi.description:
Decrease Agility
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Increase Agility 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: 1 Character
Description: Reduces target's Movement
Speed and AGI stat for the skill's duration.
[Lv 1]: AGI -3, 42% success,
lasts 30(monster) or 20(player) sec
[Lv 2]: AGI -4, 44% success,
lasts 40(monster) or 25(player) sec
[Lv 3]: AGI -5, 46% success,
lasts 50(monster) or 30(player) sec
[Lv 4]: AGI -6, 48% success,
lasts 60(monster) or 35(player) sec
[Lv 5]: AGI -7, 50% success,
lasts 70(monster) or 40(player) sec
[Lv 6]: AGI -8, 52% success,
lasts 80(monster) or 45(player) sec
[Lv 7]: AGI -9, 54% success,
