Shockwave Trap 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Trap (Hidden)
Target: Ground
Description: Sets a trap which will last for 600
seconds and will display a prepared message
for the person who triggers it.
Consumes 1 Trap.

Comments: Has no combat usefulness.

ht_claymoretrap.name: Claymore Trap
ht_claymoretrap.description:
Claymore Trap
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Blast Mine 1,
Shockwave Trap 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Trap (Visible)
Target: Ground
Element: Fire
Description: Sets a trap which will inflict
splashed damage.
Consumes 2 Traps.
This skill deals damage based directly on
your stats, without looking at your ATK stat.
[Lv 1]: 1 * (75 +(DEX/2)) * ((100 +INT)/100),
20 sec duration
[Lv 2]: 2 * (75 +(DEX/2)) * ((100 +INT)/100),
40 sec duration
[Lv 3]: 3 * (75 +(DEX/2)) * ((100 +INT)/100),
60 sec duration
[Lv 4]: 4 * (75 +(DEX/2)) * ((100 +INT)/100),
80 sec duration
[Lv 5]: 5 * (75 +(DEX/2)) * ((100 +INT)/100),
100 sec duration

Comments: Cannot be placed directly under
enemies unless the server admin explicitly
enabled such setting(by default it will not).
Scales with both DEX and INT and deals Fire
element damage.
The trap can be moved in any direction using
Arrow Shower. You can push a trap
underneath a target in this manner. In PvP
and WoE, the trap does not distinguish
between friend and foe and will affect anybody
who steps on it, even the Hunter himself.

ac_chargearrow.name: Arrow Repel
ac_chargearrow.description:
Charge Arrow
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Ranged
Target: 1 Character
Description: Draws the bowstring to its limit to
fire a volley of arrows with enough force to
push the target 6 cells back.

ac_makingarrow.name: Arrow Crafting
ac_makingarrow.description:
Arrow Crafting
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Crafting
Target: Caster
Description: Creates Arrows from
specific items. The kind of Arrows
produced, as well as the amount, is
determined by the items used.
This skill fails, if the current Weight
is more than 70%.

ht_phantasmic.name: Phantasmic Arrow
ht_phantasmic.description:
Phantasmic Arrow
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Ranged
Target: 1 Character
Description: Launches an arrow of illusion
from your bow. Deals 150% ATK damage and
pushes them back 3 cells. You can use this
skill even if you have no Arrows equipped.

Comments: Follows the element of the arrows
equipped. If none are being worn, does Neutral.
Has the same SP Cost as Charge Arrow and
performs effectively the same function of
pushing enemies back, the main difference
being that Charge Arrow's push is 6 cells
and that skill has Cast Time, unlike
Phantasmic Arrow.

ht_power.name: Beast Strafing
ht_power.description:
Beast Strafing
Requirement: Double Strafe 10,
Spirit State
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Ranged
Target: 1 Character
Description: Attacks by using a modified form
of Double Strafe that was developed to cause
extra damage to Brute race monsters.
Caster's STR affects the amount of inflicted
damage.
The user must first use Double Strafe, and
then Beast Strafing.

Comments: You have a small time window to
use Beast Strafing. It works very similar to
how Esma needs to be chained after other
skills.
This skill can only be used against Beast and
Insect monsters.
Does two hits, each one dealing damage
equal to [50+(8*STR)]% ATK.

nv_firstaid.name: First Aid
nv_firstaid.description:
First Aid
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Recovery
Target: Caster
Description: Uses 3 SP to restore 5 HP.

nv_trickdead.name: Play Dead
nv_trickdead.description:
Play Dead
Requirement: Finish Quest, Novice Only
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Feigns death to avoid the
menace of nearby enemies. The Play
Dead status is canceled by casting
this skill again.

Comments: This skill ceases to function after
jobchanging to any other class, including
Super Novice. Swordsman's Provoke and
Sage's Dispel can cancel the effect. All
monsters will be fooled, even Bosses and
MvPs.

nv_basic.name: Basic Skill
nv_basic.description:
Basic Skill
Max Level: 9
Enables the use of Basic Interface Skills.
[Lv 1]: Enables Trading
Allows the trading of items with other
character.
Right click on a character to initiate.
[Lv 2]: Enables Emotions
Alt+(0~9) and Ctrl+(1,-,=.)
Alt+L opens additional Emotion icons.
[Lv 3]: Enables Sitting
Sitting doubles HP and SP regeneration
speed.
Press the Insert key or type /sit.
[Lv 4]: Enables Chat Room Creation
Alt+C to open a Chat Room or click the
Chat button in the Basic Information
Window.
[Lv 5]: Join a Party
Character can join a party.
[Lv 6]: Enables Use of Kafra Storage
Allows use of Kafra Storage.
[Lv 7]: Organize a Party
Create a party by typing
/organize ''Party Name''
Set party options in the Party Window (Alt+Z).
[Lv 9]: Enables Change to First Job Class
Qualifies character for change from Novice
to one of the First classes.

tf_double.name: Double Attack
tf_double.description:
Double Attack
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: When attacking with Dagger
class weapon, there is chance of
inflicting double attacks. This skill also affects
Left-Hand damage of Katar class weapons.
[Lv 1]: 5% chance, Katar Off-Hand +3%
[Lv 2]: 10% chance, Katar Off-Hand +5%
[Lv 3]: 15% chance, Katar Off-Hand +7%
[Lv 4]: 20% chance, Katar Off-Hand +9%
[Lv 5]: 25% chance, Katar Off-Hand +11%
[Lv 6]: 30% chance, Katar Off-Hand +13%
[Lv 7]: 35% chance, Katar Off-Hand +15%
[Lv 8]: 40% chance, Katar Off-Hand +17%
[Lv 9]: 45% chance, Katar Off-Hand +19%
[Lv 10]: 50% chance, Katar Off-Hand +21%

Comments: Double Attacks cannot crit, also
Double Attacks are calculated before crits,
therefore if you have a crit based build you do
not want Double Attacks to occur. Use a
non-Dagger weapon on the Right Hand to
inhibit the skill from functioning.
The items Sidewinder Card, Nagan and Chick
Hat allow Double Attacks to be performed with
any weapon. In those cases, if the user knows
the skill, it will use the highest level learned.
Therefore, those items will allow up to Level 10
usage of the skill with any weapon.

tf_steal.name: Steal
tf_steal.description:
Steal
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Steals an item from a monster.
Higher skill levels increase success chance.

[Lv 1]: 10% +(User DEX - Target DEX/2)
[Lv 2]: 16% +(User DEX - Target DEX/2)
[Lv 3]: 22% +(User DEX - Target DEX/2)
[Lv 4]: 28% +(User DEX - Target DEX/2)
[Lv 5]: 34% +(User DEX - Target DEX/2)
[Lv 6]: 40% +(User DEX - Target DEX/2)
[Lv 7]: 46% +(User DEX - Target DEX/2)
[Lv 8]: 52% +(User DEX - Target DEX/2)
[Lv 9]: 58% +(User DEX - Target DEX/2)
[Lv 10]: 64% +(User DEX - Target DEX/2)

Comments: Steal does not remove items
from the monster's drops table. You can steal
an item from a monster, kill it and receive the
same item again.
The success chance is affected by the user's
and target's DEX. Which item will be stolen is
also determined by DEX. Items at the
beginning of the drop table are easier to steal.
Cards can never be stolen.

Despite being one of the most used skills in
the game, it's often misunderstood by players.
When the skill is used, it attempts to steal
each item from the monster's drop table, from
top to bottom, one at a time. This method has
interesting consequences. For example, if your
goal is to steal an item at the beginning of a
monster's drop table, high DEX will increase
your odds. However, if you're aiming for an item
at the end of the list, low DEX is necessary.
This is because, if your DEX is too high, you
will always success in stealing the first few
items on the drop table, and the game will
never roll for stealing items towards the end
of the list.

tf_poison.name: Envenom
tf_poison.description:
Envenom
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: Deals Poison elemental
damage to a target that has a chance
of inflicting Poison status.
[Lv 1]: 14% chance, 100% ATK +15 ATK
[Lv 2]: 18% chance, 100% ATK +30 ATK
[Lv 3]: 22% chance, 100% ATK +45 ATK
[Lv 4]: 26% chance, 100% ATK +60 ATK
[Lv 5]: 30% chance, 100% ATK +75 ATK
[Lv 6]: 34% chance, 100% ATK +90 ATK
[Lv 7]: 38% chance, 100% ATK +105 ATK
[Lv 8]: 42% chance, 100% ATK +120 ATK
[Lv 9]: 46% chance, 100% ATK +135 ATK
[Lv 10]: 50% chance, 100% ATK +150 ATK

Comments: As in most RPGs, poisoning
enemies is rarely worth the effort.
Similar to Swordsman's Bash, using the
Poisonous Toad Card grants this skill a new
effect: shoving the target back. And in the
same manner as Bash and Bongun Card,
the shove distance increases with more cards.

From a damage perspective, Envenom has
terrible scaling. Additional skill levels only
increase the fixed damage bonus. This skill
is a pre-requirement for several Assassin
skills, however.

tf_miss.name: Improve Dodge
tf_miss.description:
Improve Dodge
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases FLEE. FLEE
receives additional bonus upon
reaching 2nd classes. This skill also
slightly enhances the Movement Speed
of Assassin classes.
[Lv 1]: FLEE +3(4 if 2nd),
Assassin MovSpeed +1%
[Lv 2]: FLEE +6(8 if 2nd),
Assassin MovSpeed +1%
[Lv 3]: FLEE +9(12 if 2nd),
Assassin MovSpeed +2%
[Lv 4]: FLEE +12(16 if 2nd),
Assassin MovSpeed +2%
[Lv 5]: FLEE +15(20 if 2nd),
Assassin MovSpeed +3%
[Lv 6]: FLEE +18(24 if 2nd),
Assassin MovSpeed +3%
[Lv 7]: FLEE +21(28 if 2nd),
Assassin MovSpeed +4%
[Lv 8]: FLEE +24(32 if 2nd),
Assassin MovSpeed +4%
[Lv 9]: FLEE +27(36 if 2nd),
Assassin MovSpeed +5%
[Lv 10]: FLEE +30(40 if 2nd),
Assassin MovSpeed +5%

tf_hiding.name: Hiding
tf_hiding.description:
Hiding
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Steal 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Hides under the ground to
avoid enemy attack. Detection skills
can cancel Hiding status. Demon, Insect
and Boss monsters can detect character
in Hiding status. Can be canceled by
using the skill again.

Comments: This is the most basic stealth skill
in the game. It prevents you from doing
anything except using Hiding again to cancel
the effect. Assassins can use Grimtooth from
hiding. Rogues can use Raid and Backstab
from hiding, as well as learn a passive skill
that permits them to move during while
hiding.

tf_detoxify.name: Detoxify
tf_detoxify.description:
Detoxify
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Envenom 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Removes Poison status from
a targeted character.

Comments: The status effect removing skills
from Acolyte and Priest job do not work on
poison. Only this skill does, although many
items such as Green Potions and Green
Herbs will also cure the status.

as_right.name: Righthand Mastery
as_right.description:
Right-Hand Mastery
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases the damage of the
Weapon in the right hand when equipped with
dual weapons. Equipping two weapons at
once reduces the Attack Power of the Weapon
in the right hand to only 50%.
[Lv 1]: 60% damage
[Lv 2]: 70% damage
[Lv 3]: 80% damage
[Lv 4]: 90% damage
[Lv 5]: 100% damage

Comments: Both Left and Righthand mastery
skills only affect auto-attacks. When using any
skill while dual yielding, the game will
calculate damage using only the atk of your
Right hand weapon and completely ignore
the ATK of your Left hand weapon. There's no
dual yielding penalty when using skills. Left
and Righthand masteries are only necessary if
you are going to auto-attack. This skill does
nothing when using a Katar.

As of the latest rAthena implementation, there
are a few things to keep in mind. All weapon
cards, whether they are on the Right or Left
hand, are only applied to the Right Hand,
which is your main weapon. While there is a
configuration option to change this, the default
is for cards to only count towards the Right
Hand. Add to that the fact that EDP now only
affects the Right Hand. As such, even on a
fully geared and carded Assassin Cross with
EDP active, the Left Hand will not be boosted,
making it entirely possible that your Left Hand
attack will be doing less than 10% of your
total damage output.

An exception to the Card application rule are
+% Crit Damage cards(bCritATKRate, such as
Mobster and The Paper). Exclusively for those,
the damage increase applies to both the
Right and Left Hand swings. However, those
are not only hard to obtain, but difficult to use,
since Double Attacks in Pre-Renewal cannot
be Critical Attacks at the same time.

as_katar.name: Katar Mastery
as_katar.description:
Katar Mastery
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases damaged inflicted with
Katar class weapons.
[Lv 1]: Damage +3
[Lv 2]: Damage +6
[Lv 3]: Damage +9
[Lv 4]: Damage +12
[Lv 5]: Damage +15
[Lv 6]: Damage +18
[Lv 7]: Damage +21
[Lv 8]: Damage +24
[Lv 9]: Damage +27
[Lv 10]: Damage +30

Comments: Mastery skills only get added up
at the end of damage calculation. In most
situations, it only results in a flat addition of
damage.

as_cloaking.name: Cloaking
as_cloaking.description:
Cloaking
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Hiding 2
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Initiates Cloaking status,
which hide the caster from enemies
without disabling movement. At Level 1
to 2, Cloaking will only work when
caster is adjacent to a wall. At higher
levels, caster can move freely in
Cloaking status, but will move more
slowly when away from walls.

[Level]: Off-Wall Speed % / On-Wall Speed %
/ Seconds between 1 SP drain ticks
[Lv 1]: 0 / 103 / 0.5
[Lv 2]: 0 / 106 / 1
[Lv 3]: 79 / 109 / 2
[Lv 4]: 82 / 112 / 3
[Lv 5]: 85 / 115 / 4
[Lv 6]: 88 / 118 / 5
[Lv 7]: 91 / 121 / 6
[Lv 8]: 94 / 124 / 7
[Lv 9]: 97 / 127 / 8
[Lv 10]: 100 / 130 / 9

Comments: Moving next to a wall gives a
movement speed bonus. Like all other stealth
skills, you can still be seen and attacked by
Demons, Insects and Bosses. Any revealing
skill, such as Sight or Ruwash, will end the
effect. AoE damage spells such as Storm
Gust and Magnum Break will hit cloaked
targets, revealing them immediately. You
can use items freely while cloaked, however
doing so in PvP or WoE will give away your
presence since the visual and sound effects
of item consumption will play, alerting the
enemies. You can attack from Cloaking,
however you will be uncloaked immediately
after doing so.

as_enchantpoison.name: Enchant Poison
as_enchantpoison.description:
Enchant Poison
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Envenom 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Temporarily enchants equipped
weapon with the Poison elemental.
Poison enchanted weapons have a chance of
inflicting targets with the Poison status.
[Lv 1]: 3.0% chance to Poison,
30 sec duration
[Lv 2]: 3.5% chance to Poison,
45 sec duration
[Lv 3]: 4.0% chance to Poison,
60 sec duration
[Lv 4]: 4.5% chance to Poison,
75 sec duration
[Lv 5]: 5.0% chance to Poison,
90 sec duration
[Lv 6]: 5.5% chance to Poison,
105 sec duration
[Lv 7]: 6.0% chance to Poison,
120 sec duration
[Lv 8]: 6.5% chance to Poison,
135 sec duration
[Lv 9]: 7.0% chance to Poison,
150 sec duration
[Lv 10]: 7.5% chance to Poison,
165 sec duration

Comments: Poison is strong versus Lv 1
and 2 Earth, Fire and Wind enemies. Not better
than using the proper opposing element but
better than using no element at all.

as_left.name: Lefthand Mastery
as_left.description:
Left-Hand Mastery
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Right-Hand Mastery 2
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases the damage of the
Weapon in the left hand when equipped with
dual weapons. Without this skill, equipping
two weapons at once reduces the Attack
Power of the Weapon in the left hand to
only 30% during auto-attacks.
[Lv 1]: 40% damage
[Lv 2]: 50% damage
[Lv 3]: 60% damage
[Lv 4]: 70% damage
[Lv 5]: 80% damage

Comments: Both Left and Righthand mastery
skills only affect auto-attacks. When using any
skill while dual yielding, the game will
calculate damage using only the atk of your
Right hand weapon and completely ignore
the ATK of your Left hand weapon. There's no
dual yielding penalty when using skills. Left
and Righthand masteries are only necessary if
you are going to auto-attack. This skill does
nothing when using a Katar.

As of the latest rAthena implementation, there
are a few things to keep in mind. All weapon
cards, whether they are on the Right or Left
hand, are only applied to the Right Hand,
which is your main weapon. While there is a
configuration option to change this, the default
is for cards to only count towards the Right
Hand. Add to that the fact that EDP now only
affects the Right Hand. As such, even on a
fully geared and carded Assassin Cross with
EDP active, the Left Hand will not be boosted,
making it entirely possible that your Left Hand
attack will be doing less than 10% of your
total damage output.

An exception to the Card application rule are
+% Crit Damage cards(bCritATKRate, such as
Mobster and The Paper). Exclusively for those,
the damage increase applies to both the
Right and Left Hand swings. However, those
are not only hard to obtain, but difficult to use,
since Double Attacks in Pre-Renewal cannot
be Critical Attacks at the same time.

as_sonicblow.name: Sonic Blow
as_sonicblow.description:
Sonic Blow
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Katar Mastery 4
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: Directs a flurry of rapid
Katar strikes that will have a chance
of inflicting the Stun status on the
target.
Requires Katar class weapon.
[Lv 1]: 440% ATK, 12% Stun chance
[Lv 2]: 480% ATK, 14% Stun chance
[Lv 3]: 520% ATK, 16% Stun chance
[Lv 4]: 560% ATK, 18% Stun chance
[Lv 5]: 600% ATK, 20% Stun chance
[Lv 6]: 640% ATK, 22% Stun chance
[Lv 7]: 680% ATK, 24% Stun chance
[Lv 8]: 720% ATK, 26% Stun chance
[Lv 9]: 760% ATK, 28% Stun chance
[Lv 10]: 800% ATK, 30% Stun chance

Comments: A strong burst damage attack that
locks the assassin in place during animation.
This skill can be boosted by being Soul
Linked, from learning Sonic Acceleration, and
from using Enchant Deadly Poison. While
the assassin may be stuck in place during
animation, he is still able to change
equipment. In PvP and WoE, assassins are
able to quickly equip defensive equipment
during the animation, in order to survive
the expected retaliation from their attack.

as_venomdust.name: Venom Dust
as_venomdust.description:
Venom Dust
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Enchant Poison 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Trap (Visible)
Target: Ground
Description: Contaminates a targeted area
with toxin that will inflict the Poison status on
enemies that come into contact with it.
Consumes 1 Red Gemstone.
[Lv 1]: 5 seconds
[Lv 2]: 10 seconds
[Lv 3]: 15 seconds
[Lv 4]: 20 seconds
[Lv 5]: 25 seconds
[Lv 6]: 30 seconds
[Lv 7]: 35 seconds
[Lv 8]: 40 seconds
[Lv 9]: 45 seconds
[Lv 10]: 50 seconds

Comments: Does not reset the duration of
already poisoned enemies.

as_poisonreact.name: Poison React
as_poisonreact.description:
Poison React
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Enchant Poison 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Once this skill activated, the
caster will automatically cast Envenom after
receiving damage from normal attacks.
[Lv 1]: +130% ATK, 1 Envenom counter,
20 seconds duration
[Lv 2]: +160% ATK, 1 Envenom counter,
25 seconds duration
[Lv 3]: +190% ATK, 2 Envenom counters,
30 seconds duration
[Lv 4]: +220% ATK, 2 Envenom counters,
35 seconds duration
[Lv 5]: +250% ATK, 3 Envenom counters,
40 seconds duration
[Lv 6]: +280% ATK, 3 Envenom counters,
45 seconds duration
[Lv 7]: +310% ATK, 4 Envenom counters,
50 seconds duration
[Lv 8]: +340% ATK, 4 Envenom counters,
55 seconds duration
[Lv 9]: +370% ATK, 5 Envenom counters,
60 seconds duration
[Lv 10]: +400% ATK, 5 Envenom counters,
60 seconds duration

Comments: Counters normal attacks and
uses Envenom on the attacking enemy. Unlike
Knight's Auto-Counter, you still take the
damage from the hit. An interesting
application of this skill is equipping a
Poisonous Toad Card, which will cause
Envenom to shove enemies back.

as_grimtooth.name: Grimtooth
as_grimtooth.description:
Grimtooth
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Sonic Blow 5, Cloaking 2
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: Strikes an enemy with Katar while
in Hiding status.
Requires Katar class weapon.
[Lv 1]: 120% ATK, 3 cell range
[Lv 2]: 140% ATK, 4 cell range
[Lv 3]: 160% ATK, 5 cell range
[Lv 4]: 180% ATK, 6 cell range
[Lv 5]: 200% ATK, 7 cell range

Comments: Levels 1 and 2 are considered
melee attacks, while 3, 4 and 5 are considered
ranged. Does 3x3 splash damage. If using
Lv 3 or higher, any status arrows equipped
will activate their effects. Popular choices for
doing this are Curse, Stun and Freezing
arrows. Works with EDP.

as_splasher.name: Venom Splasher
as_splasher.description:
Venom Splasher
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Poison React 5,
Venom Dust 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: When struck by this skill, the
target will then explode after a few seconds,
dealing splash damage around it and
Poisoning enemies by chance.
Consumes 1 Red Gemstone.
Higher skill levels not only increase damage,
but also make the timer shorter.
[Lv 1]: +550% ATK, 11 seconds to explode,
7.5 seconds cooldown
[Lv 2]: +600% ATK, 10 seconds to explode,
8.0 seconds cooldown
[Lv 3]: +650% ATK, 9 seconds to explode,
8.5 seconds cooldown
[Lv 4]: +700% ATK, 8 seconds to explode,
9.0 seconds cooldown
[Lv 5]: +750% ATK, 7 seconds to explode,
9.5 seconds cooldown
[Lv 6]: +800% ATK, 6 seconds to explode,
10.0 seconds cooldown
[Lv 7]: +850% ATK, 5 seconds to explode,
10.5 seconds cooldown
[Lv 8]: +900% ATK, 4 seconds to explode,
11.0 seconds cooldown
[Lv 9]: +950% ATK, 3 seconds to explode,
11.5 seconds cooldown
[Lv 10]: +1000% ATK, 2 seconds to explode,
12.0 seconds cooldown

Comments: The skill can only be used on an
enemy that has less than 3/4 of its HP
remaining, and does not work on Bosses.
After using the skill, it will enter a Cooldown
(you can use other skills, but cannot use
Venom Splasher). Learned levels of Poison
React increase the damage of this skill.
The damage dealt follows the element of your
equipped weapon and does not follow any +%
cards, although flat +ATK cards do work.
If the player is in Hiding or incapacitated, no
damage will be dealt. Damage is based on the
weapons and equipment being worn the
moment the explosion happens, not when it
is cast.

as_sonicaccel.name: Sonic Acceleration
as_sonicaccel.description:
Sonic Acceleration
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases Sonic Blow
accuracy by 50% and Damage by +10%.

Comments: The accuracy boost from this
passive works the same way as the Accuracy
bonus from Knight's Pierce. It is not a flat +50
added to the HIT stat if your character, it's a
multiplier added to your final chance of landing
a hit.
For example, if your HIT versus a certain
enemy's evasion were to result in a 30%
chance of landing a successful Sonic Blow,
this passive would increase that chance to 45%.
Having 66% success chance to land a hit on
a given enemy is made into 100% by this skill.

as_venomknife.name: Throw Venom Knife
as_venomknife.description:
Throw Venom Knife
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Ranged
Target: 1 Character
Description: Throws a Venom Knife with a
high chance of poisoning the target. This Skill
requires you to have a Venom Knife equipped
and uses up this item when executed.

Comments: Deals 100% ATK damage and is
affected by Enchant Deadly Poison. Can be
used as a cheap and easy ranged attack in
order to trigger debilitating effects, such as
Freeze from a Marina or Stormy Knight Card.
The chance of poisoning the enemy is equal
to the that of your learned level of Thief's
Envenom.

In classic official servers, having this skill
enabled Assassins to equip any kind of
equipment tagged as Ammunition, including
Arrows such as Cursed Arrow and Frozen Arrow.
The effects of these ammunitions triggered
when using the Grimtooth skill.
The default rAthena configuration does not
allow Assassins to equip anything other than
Venom Knife, although most servers that seek
to emulate the classic Ragnarok experience
will enable it.

nv_firstaid.name: First Aid
nv_firstaid.description:
First Aid
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Recovery
Target: Caster
Description: Uses 3 SP to restore 5 HP.

nv_trickdead.name: Play Dead
nv_trickdead.description:
Play Dead
Requirement: Finish Quest, Novice Only
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Feigns death to avoid the
menace of nearby enemies. The Play
Dead status is canceled by casting
this skill again.

Comments: This skill ceases to function after
jobchanging to any other class, including
Super Novice. Swordsman's Provoke and
Sage's Dispel can cancel the effect. All
monsters will be fooled, even Bosses and
MvPs.

tf_backsliding.name: Back Slide
tf_backsliding.description:
Back Slide
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Quickly move backwards to
position yourself safely away from threats.

Comments: An extremely useful movement
skill for getting in and out of combat. You can
control the direction you will slide into by
using /bingbing and /bangbang commands.

tf_pickstone.name: Find Stone
tf_pickstone.description:
Pick Stone
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Picks up a Stone from the ground.

Comments: Stones are needed in order to
repair Barriers in WoE 2.0. Any character can
use this skill by equipping a Stapo Card.

tf_sprinklesand.name: Sand Attack
tf_sprinklesand.description:
Sprinkle Sand
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: Kicks sand into enemy face
which will inflict 130% damage and also
chance to cause Blind status on the target.

tf_throwstone.name: Stone Fling
tf_throwstone.description:
Throw Stone
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Special Physical
Target: 1 Character
Description: Attacks an enemy with a Stone
which inflicts 50 damage that will pierce
enemy's defense and has a low chance of
causing the Stun or Blind status.
Consumes 1 Stone.

Comments: Any character can use this skill by
equipping a Stapo Card.

nv_basic.name: Basic Skill
nv_basic.description:
Basic Skill
Max Level: 9
Enables the use of Basic Interface Skills.
[Lv 1]: Enables Trading
Allows the trading of items with other
character.
Right click on a character to initiate.
[Lv 2]: Enables Emotions
Alt+(0~9) and Ctrl+(1,-,=.)
Alt+L opens additional Emotion icons.
[Lv 3]: Enables Sitting
Sitting doubles HP and SP regeneration
speed.
Press the Insert key or type /sit.
[Lv 4]: Enables Chat Room Creation
Alt+C to open a Chat Room or click the
Chat button in the Basic Information
Window.
[Lv 5]: Join a Party
Character can join a party.
[Lv 6]: Enables Use of Kafra Storage
Allows use of Kafra Storage.
[Lv 7]: Organize a Party
Create a party by typing
/organize ''Party Name''
Set party options in the Party Window (Alt+Z).
[Lv 9]: Enables Change to First Job Class
Qualifies character for change from Novice
to one of the First classes.

sm_sword.name: Sword Mastery
sm_sword.description:
Sword Mastery
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases damage with
One-Handed Sword and Dagger class weapon.
[Lv 1]: Damage +4
[Lv 2]: Damage +8
[Lv 3]: Damage +12
[Lv 4]: Damage +16
[Lv 5]: Damage +20
[Lv 6]: Damage +24
[Lv 7]: Damage +28
[Lv 8]: Damage +32
[Lv 9]: Damage +36
[Lv 10]: Damage +40

Comments: Mastery skills only get added up
at the end of damage calculation. In most
situations, it only results in a flat addition of
damage.

sm_recovery.name: Increase HP Recovery
sm_recovery.description:
Increase HP Recovery
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Restores HP every
10 seconds while idle. MaxHP affects how much
HP is restored by this skill.
[Lv 1]: HP+5 +(0.2% of Max HP)
[Lv 2]: HP+10 +(0.4% of Max HP)
[Lv 3]: HP+15 +(0.6% of Max HP)
[Lv 4]: HP+20 +(0.8% of Max HP)
[Lv 5]: HP+25 +(1.0% of Max HP)
[Lv 6]: HP+30 +(1.2% of Max HP)
[Lv 7]: HP+35 +(1.4% of Max HP)
[Lv 8]: HP+40 +(1.6% of Max HP)
[Lv 9]: HP+45 +(1.8% of Max HP)
[Lv 10]: HP+50 +(2.0% of Max HP)

Comments: Every skill level also increases
the effectiveness of HP healing items by 10%.
The healing ticks occur so long as the player
does not walk to to another tile, even if the
player is standing and in combat. The healing
ticks will not occur if the player is overweight.
It's also possible to receive healing ticks
while teleporting, so long as the player does
not walk.

sm_bash.name: Bash
sm_bash.description:
Bash
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: HITs an enemy with crushing
force. If Fatal Blow skill is learned, Bash
will have an added Stun effect at
Level 6 and higher. Damage and HIT
are increased every level.
[Lv 1]: 130% damage, +5% HIT
[Lv 2]: 160% damage, +10% HIT
[Lv 3]: 190% damage, +15% HIT
[Lv 4]: 220% damage, +20% HIT
[Lv 5]: 250% damage, +25% HIT
[Lv 6]: 280% damage, +30% HIT
[Lv 7]: 310% damage, +35% HIT
[Lv 8]: 340% damage, +40% HIT
[Lv 9]: 370% damage, +45% HIT
[Lv 10]: 400% damage, +50% HIT

Comments: Costs 8 SP up to Lv 5, after
which it costs 15.
Damage skills unlocked after jobchanging to
your next job will outclass Bash, however this
skill will continue to be relevant as a means of
stunning enemies.
Wearing Bongun Card grants this skill a new
effect: Shoving back targets 5 cells. This effect
stacks.

sm_provoke.name: Provoke
sm_provoke.description:
Provoke
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: 1 Character
Description: Enrages a target, reducing
Defense by VIT on Player and physical
defense on Monster, while increasing it's
Attack Power. Can't be used on Undead
and Boss monsters.
[Lv 1]: Damage +5%, DEF -10%
[Lv 2]: Damage +8%, DEF -15%
[Lv 3]: Damage +11%, DEF -20%
[Lv 4]: Damage +14%, DEF -25%
[Lv 5]: Damage +17%, DEF -30%
[Lv 6]: Damage +20%, DEF -35%
[Lv 7]: Damage +23%, DEF -40%
[Lv 8]: Damage +26%, DEF -45%
[Lv 9]: Damage +29%, DEF -50%
[Lv 10]: Damage +32%, DEF -55%

Comments: Provoke reduces both Hard and
Soft Defense of monsters, but only the
Soft Defense of players. Provoking frozen
targets will unfreeze them. Provoke can also
be used to interrupt skills, so long as the skill
is interruptable in the first place
Provoke counts as a hit and will cause
Rude Teleportation on monsters that are stuck
and have the ability to do so. If the skill fails
continuously against a player, you can be sure
that the player is wearing Evil Druid Card.

sm_twohand.name: Two-Handed Sword Mastery
sm_twohand.description:
Two-Handed Sword Mastery
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Sword Mastery 1
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases damage with
Two-Handed Sword class weapon.
[Lv 1]: Damage +4
[Lv 2]: Damage +8
[Lv 3]: Damage +12
[Lv 4]: Damage +16
[Lv 5]: Damage +20
[Lv 6]: Damage +24
[Lv 7]: Damage +28
[Lv 8]: Damage +32
[Lv 9]: Damage +36
[Lv 10]: Damage +40

Comments: Mastery skills only get added up
at the end of damage calculation. In most
situations, it only results in a flat addition of
damage.

sm_magnum.name: Magnum Break
sm_magnum.description:
Magnum Break
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Bash 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: Enemies around the caster
Description: Drains a small amount of the
caster's HP to inflict Fire
elemental damage on 5x5 AoE around the
caster and push enemies 2 cells backward.
For 10 seconds after Magnum Break,
caster's weapon will receive 20% Fire
elemental attack enhancement.
[Lv 1]: 120% damage, 110% Accuracy Bonus
[Lv 2]: 140% damage, 120% Accuracy Bonus
[Lv 3]: 160% damage, 130% Accuracy Bonus
[Lv 4]: 180% damage, 140% Accuracy Bonus
[Lv 5]: 200% damage, 150% Accuracy Bonus
[Lv 6]: 220% damage, 160% Accuracy Bonus
[Lv 7]: 240% damage, 170% Accuracy Bonus
[Lv 8]: 260% damage, 180% Accuracy Bonus
[Lv 9]: 280% damage, 190% Accuracy Bonus
[Lv 10]: 300% damage, 200% Accuracy Bonus

Comments: Although the damage scaling on
Magnum Break might not be large, the SP cost
is the same on all levels.
The extra Fire Damage Bonus ignores DEF.

sm_endure.name: Endure
sm_endure.description:
Endure
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Provoke 5
Requirement: Provoke 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Removes attack and movement
delay that occurs when a character receives
damage. Disabled in War of Emperium
but still grants the MDEF bonus.
[Lv 1]: 10 sec, MDEF +1
[Lv 2]: 13 sec, MDEF +2
[Lv 3]: 16 sec, MDEF +3
[Lv 4]: 19 sec, MDEF +4
[Lv 5]: 22 sec, MDEF +5
[Lv 6]: 25 sec, MDEF +6
[Lv 7]: 28 sec, MDEF +7
[Lv 8]: 31 sec, MDEF +8
[Lv 9]: 34 sec, MDEF +9
[Lv 10]: 37 sec, MDEF +10

Comments: What Endure does exactly is
preventing your character from displaying
flinching animations when taking hits. It is
extremely useful when doing any sort of
tanking, or handling a large number of
enemies.

cr_trust.name: Faith
cr_trust.description:
Faith
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases MaxHP and
resistance against Holy elemental attacks.
[Lv 1]: +200 HP, 5% Holy Resist
[Lv 2]: +400 HP, 10% Holy Resist
[Lv 3]: +600 HP, 15% Holy Resist
[Lv 4]: +800 HP, 20% Holy Resist
[Lv 5]: +1000 HP, 25% Holy Resist
[Lv 6]: +1200 HP, 30% Holy Resist
[Lv 7]: +1400 HP, 35% Holy Resist
[Lv 8]: +1600 HP, 40% Holy Resist
[Lv 9]: +1800 HP, 45% Holy Resist
[Lv 10]: +2000 HP, 50% Holy Resist

Comments: The Holy Resist you get from this
passive will help you not hurt yourself too
much while casting Grand Cross.

cr_autoguard.name: Guard
cr_autoguard.description:
Auto Guard
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active (Toggle)
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Activates Auto Guard status which
has a chance of blocking long and short range
physical attacks for skill duration.
When this skill blocks an attack, caster is
immobilized for 0.3 seconds but this time can
be reduced by increasing the skill's level.
Casting this skill again cancels it.
Requires Shield.
[Lv 1]: 5% chance to block attacks
[Lv 2]: 10% chance to block attacks
[Lv 3]: 14% chance to block attacks
[Lv 4]: 18% chance to block attacks
[Lv 5]: 21% chance to block attacks
[Lv 6]: 24% chance to block attacks
[Lv 7]: 26% chance to block attacks
[Lv 8]: 28% chance to block attacks
[Lv 9]: 29% chance to block attacks
[Lv 10]: 30% chance to block attacks

Comments: This is one of the buffs you can
pass onto another player through Devotion.

kn_spearmastery.name: Spear Mastery
kn_spearmastery.description:
Spear Mastery
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases Spear class
weapon damage. When riding a Pecopeco,
the bonus damage increased by 1 per level.
[Lv 1]: Damage +4
[Lv 2]: Damage +8
[Lv 3]: Damage +12
[Lv 4]: Damage +16
[Lv 5]: Damage +20
[Lv 6]: Damage +24
[Lv 7]: Damage +28
[Lv 8]: Damage +32
[Lv 9]: Damage +36
[Lv 10]: Damage +40

Comments: Mastery skills only get added up
at the end of damage calculation. In most
situations, it only results in a flat addition of
damage.

kn_riding.name: Peco Peco Riding
kn_riding.description:
Peco Peco Ride
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Endure 1
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Enables riding of Peco Peco.

al_cure.name: Cure
al_cure.description:
Cure
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Heal 2
Requirement: Faith 5
Requirement: Heal 2
Skill Form: Recovery
Description: Cures target from Silence,
Confusion and Blind status effects. When used
on Undead monster, this skill will inflicts
Confusion status.

Comments: You cannot cure Silence on
yourself since you cannot cast in the first
place. The Priest skill Status Recovery covers
most of the rest of common status effects.

cr_holycross.name: Holy Cross
cr_holycross.description:
Holy Cross
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Faith 7
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: Attacks an enemy with a
double hit of Holy elemental
physical attack with a chance of causing the
Blind status.
[Lv 1]: 135% ATK, 3% Blind chance
[Lv 2]: 170% ATK, 6% Blind chance
[Lv 3]: 205% ATK, 9% Blind chance
[Lv 4]: 240% ATK, 12% Blind chance
[Lv 5]: 275% ATK, 15% Blind chance
[Lv 6]: 310% ATK, 18% Blind chance
[Lv 7]: 445% ATK, 21% Blind chance
[Lv 8]: 480% ATK, 24% Blind chance
[Lv 9]: 415% ATK, 27% Blind chance
[Lv 10]: 450% ATK, 30% Blind chance

Comments: Does similar damage to Bash
while being forced Holy.

cr_shieldcharge.name: Smite
cr_shieldcharge.description:
Shield Charge
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Auto Guard 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: Smashes a Shield into an enemy,
pushing it a few cells backward with a chance
of causing Stun status.
Requires Shield.
[Lv 1]: 120% ATK, 20% chance to Stun
[Lv 2]: 140% ATK, 25% chance to Stun
[Lv 3]: 160% ATK, 30% chance to Stun
[Lv 4]: 180% ATK, 35% chance to Stun
[Lv 5]: 200% ATK, 40% chance to Stun

Comments: This is your regular pushback
skill, with a nice chance of stunning. The
damage itself is quite low though.

cr_spearquicken.name: Spear Quicken
cr_spearquicken.description:
Spear Quicken
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Spear Mastery 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Increases Attack Speed when
using Two-Handed Spear weapons for skill
duration.
[Lv 1]: 30 seconds duration, +21% ASPD
[Lv 2]: 60 seconds duration, +22% ASPD
[Lv 3]: 90 seconds duration, +23% ASPD
[Lv 4]: 120 seconds duration, +24% ASPD
[Lv 5]: 150 seconds duration, +25% ASPD
[Lv 6]: 180 seconds duration, +26% ASPD
[Lv 7]: 210 seconds duration, +27% ASPD
[Lv 8]: 240 seconds duration, +28% ASPD
[Lv 9]: 370 seconds duration, +29% ASPD
[Lv 10]: 400 seconds duration, +30% ASPD

Comments: Does not work unless the user
is equipped with any other weapon type
except Two-Handed Spears. Naturally, this
means that you cannot use any of your
skills that require a Shield while using this.

kn_cavaliermastery.name: Cavalier Mastery
kn_cavaliermastery.description:
Cavalry Mastery
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Peco Peco Ride 1
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases Attack Speed
while mounted on a Pecopeco. Mastering
this skill raises the Attack Speed so that
the penalty while mounted on a Pecopeco
is fully nullified.
[Lv 1]: 40% penalty
[Lv 2]: 30% penalty
[Lv 3]: 20% penalty
[Lv 4]: 10% penalty
[Lv 5]: 0% penalty

al_dp.name: Divine Protection
al_dp.description:
Divine Protection
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Cure 1
Description: Reduces damage taken from
Demon and Undead monsters. Character's
Level affects the damage reduction. Damage
reduction is added after final damage
is calculated.
[Lv 1]: DEF +3
[Lv 2]: DEF +6
[Lv 3]: DEF +9
[Lv 4]: DEF +12
[Lv 5]: DEF +15
[Lv 6]: DEF +18
[Lv 7]: DEF +21
[Lv 8]: DEF +24
[Lv 9]: DEF +27
[Lv 10]: DEF +30

Comments: This defense works like Soft DEF,
it's a flat reduction of the final damage.
Reductions of this level are normally
insignificant except in the case of a Monk
taking hits during Steel Body.
Players planning to jobchange into Monks
must max this skill to unlock the basic Monk
skill.

cr_grandcross.name: Grand Cross
cr_grandcross.description:
Grand Cross
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Faith 10, Holy Cross 6
Skill Form: Active
Type: Special Magical
Target: Enemies around the caster
Element: Holy
Description: Summons a cross of holy light
on the ground around the caster that will
damage enemies that come into contact with
it. Grand Cross will cause the Blind effect on
Undead and Demon monster aside from
Boss monsters.
When casted, Grand Cross will drain 20% of
caster's remaining HP and also damage the
user alongside its targets.
[Lv 1]: 140% (ATK+MATK)
[Lv 2]: 180% (ATK+MATK)
[Lv 3]: 220% (ATK+MATK)
[Lv 4]: 260% (ATK+MATK)
[Lv 5]: 300% (ATK+MATK)
[Lv 6]: 340% (ATK+MATK)
[Lv 7]: 380% (ATK+MATK)
[Lv 8]: 420% (ATK+MATK)
[Lv 9]: 460% (ATK+MATK)
[Lv 10]: 500% (ATK+MATK)

Comments: This is a very strong AoE attack
that will cause massive damage to Shadow
and Undead enemies, however it costs a 20%
if your HP on top of also damaging you.
Because the damage is Holy, if the caster has
Holy elemental armor, they will negate all
damage dealt to himself. However, obtaining
Holy armor can only be obtained by either
Angeling Card, Priest's BS Sacramenti, or
the Crusader Card combo, all of which are
difficult to obtain.
Faith's Holy Resist will reduce the damage
taken from this skill.  Demi-human resist
equipment, DEF and MDEF all help mitigate
self-inflicted damage.
Deals anywhere between 1 to 5 hits,
depending on where monsters stand, and
whether or not they are stacked on the
same cell. With the current implementation of
this skill in rAthena, Grand Cross is considered
to a magic type skill. As such, it will not activate
effects such as Hunter Fly Card, but also not
activate the SP Drain from Zipper Bear Cards.

cr_shieldboomerang.name: Shield Boomerang
cr_shieldboomerang.description:
Shield Boomerang
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Shield Charge 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Ranged
Target: 1 Character
Description: Attacks an enemy from a distance
by throwing a Shield.
The Shield's weight and refine level affect the
amount of damage that is inflicted.
Requires Shield.
The ATK used for this skill is not the same
used for your other skills, it is based on the
Shield and not the weapon.
Shield ATK: BaseATK +4 * Shield Refine Rate
+Shield's Weight
[Lv 1]: 130% ATK, 3 cells range
[Lv 2]: 160% ATK, 5 cells range
[Lv 3]: 190% ATK, 7 cells range
[Lv 4]: 220% ATK, 9 cells range
[Lv 5]: 250% ATK, 11 cells range

Comments: This skill has some very specific
properties. For starters, it is always Neutral
damage, and ignores your weapon's ATK.
However, it uses the ATK you gain from stats.
The Shield's refine rate and weight have a
large impact on this skill's damage.
Furthermore, this skill is massively improved
by being Soul Linked. Tamruan Card is also
able to boost the damage even further.

Your 'BaseATK' is simply your ATK minus the
Weapon's ATK portion. Meaning, it's how much
of it comes from your stats(specially STR) and
equipment(such as Zipper Bear and Giant
Whisper Cards).

al_demonbane.name: Demon Bane
al_demonbane.description:
Demon Bane
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Divine Protection 3
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases damage
against Demon and Undead monsters.
Base Level affects damage bonus.
Damage increased by this skill is added
after final damage is calculated.
[Lv 1]: Damage +3
[Lv 2]: Damage +6
[Lv 3]: Damage +9
[Lv 4]: Damage +12
[Lv 5]: Damage +15
[Lv 6]: Damage +18
[Lv 7]: Damage +21
[Lv 8]: Damage +24
[Lv 9]: Damage +27
[Lv 10]: Damage +30

Comments: The bonus from this skill is similar
to Weapon Masteries, in which they only offers
a flat increase at the end of damage
calculation. Players planning to jobchange
into Monks must max this skill to unlock the
basic Monk skill.

cr_reflectshield.name: Shield Reflect
cr_reflectshield.description:
Reflect Shield
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Shield Boomerang 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Reflects a certain amount of
damage back to the enemy after they inflict
damage with melee physical attack.
Requires Shield.
[Lv 1]: 13% damage reflected
[Lv 2]: 16% damage reflected
[Lv 3]: 19% damage reflected
[Lv 4]: 22% damage reflected
[Lv 5]: 25% damage reflected
[Lv 6]: 28% damage reflected
[Lv 7]: 31% damage reflected
[Lv 8]: 34% damage reflected
[Lv 9]: 37% damage reflected
[Lv 10]: 40% damage reflected

Comments: Long-range attacks do not reflect.
An interesting application of reflect effects is
pairing them with equipment that triggers
effects and skills while attacking. For such
effects, a reflect counts as an attack and will
activate these properties.
Reflection can be obtained from items such
as Orc Hero Card, Valkyrian Manteau
and Sheep Hat.
This is one of the buffs you can pass onto
another player through the Devotion skill.

cr_defender.name: Defending Aura
cr_defender.description:
Defender
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Shield Boomerang 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Reduces damage taken from long
ranged physical attacks at the cost of
decreasing ASPD and Movement Speed
for the skill's duration. Casting this skill again
cancels the Defender status.
Requires Shield.
[Lv 1]: 20% Long-Range reduction, -20% ASPD
[Lv 2]: 25% Long-Range reduction, -15% ASPD
[Lv 3]: 50% Long-Range reduction, -10% ASPD
[Lv 4]: 65% Long-Range reduction, -5% ASPD
[Lv 5]: 80% Long-Range reduction, 0% ASPD

Comments: This skill gives a massive
reduction to ranged damage. In most cases,
damage is reducted to almost negligible
levels.
This effect does not stack additively with
equipment-based ranged reduction.
This is one of the buffs you can pass onto
another player through the Devotion skill.

al_heal.name: Heal
al_heal.description:
Heal
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Faith 10, Demon Bane 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Recovery
Target: 1 Character
Description: Restores target's HP.
Skill level, caster's Base Level and
total INT affect the amount of HP
restored.

Comments: This is the most basic healing
skill in the game. Using lower levels of Heal is
an effective way of not squandering your SP.
You can shortcut several levels of Heal to your
keyboard, or use the scrolling wheel.
Using Heal on undead enemies is commonly
refeered to as 'Heal Bombing' and in order to
do so, you must either hold the shift key, or
use the /ns command.

cr_devotion.name: Sacrifice
cr_devotion.description:
Devotion
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Grand Cross 4, Reflect Shield 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Protects a party member by
receiving all damage intended for targeted
ally. Devotion only works when level difference
between caster and ally is less 10 levels
or less.
The skill's effect is canceled when the party
member moves out of the skill's range or dies.
Cannot be used on other Crusader.
[Lv 1]: 30 seconds duration,
up to 1 ally, up to 7 cells range
[Lv 2]: 45 seconds duration,
up to 2 allies, up to 8 cells range
[Lv 3]: 60 seconds duration,
up to 3 allies, up to 9 cells range
[Lv 4]: 75 seconds duration,
up to 4 allies, up to 10 cells range
[Lv 5]: 90 seconds duration,
up to 5 allies, up to 11 cells range

Comments: This is a key support skill for
doing high difficult Bosses. The Crusader
is able to pass some of his Self Buffs to
party members by using this skill.
If the ally casts skills, because the damage is
being transferred to the Crusader, they will not
have their casts interrupted.
If the Crusader dies from receiving damage,
any excess damage will NOT be returned to
the player that originally received the attack.

cr_providence.name: Resistant Souls
cr_providence.description:
Providence
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Divine Protection 5, Heal 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Temporarily increases party
member's resistance to Demon and Holy
elemental attacks. It cannot be used on
yourself and other Crusader classes.
[Lv 1]: 5% Resist
[Lv 2]: 10% Resist
[Lv 3]: 15% Resist
[Lv 4]: 20% Resist
[Lv 5]: 25% Resist

Comments: The Holy resist given by this skill
protects against Holy Attacks, not Holy Element
monsters.

cr_shrink.name: Shrink
cr_shrink.description:
Shrink
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: This skill activates when used
and deactivates if used again or the duration
expires.
If you successfully defend using Auto Guard,
there is a (5*Auto Guard LV)% chance to push
the defended enemy 2 cells away.

Comments: This skill can be incredibly
disrupting for enemies in PvP. However, it does
nothing in GvG/WoE, since you cannot push
enemies away in those maps.

nv_firstaid.name: First Aid
nv_firstaid.description:
First Aid
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Recovery
Target: Caster
Description: Uses 3 SP to restore 5 HP.

nv_trickdead.name: Play Dead
nv_trickdead.description:
Play Dead
Requirement: Finish Quest, Novice Only
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Feigns death to avoid the
menace of nearby enemies. The Play
Dead status is canceled by casting
this skill again.

Comments: This skill ceases to function after
jobchanging to any other class, including
Super Novice. Swordsman's Provoke and
Sage's Dispel can cancel the effect. All
monsters will be fooled, even Bosses and
MvPs.

sm_autoberserk.name: Auto Berserk
sm_autoberserk.description:
Auto Berserk
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active (Toggle)
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Empowered by rage,
character enters a condition that is
equivalent to Level 10 Provoke status
when HP is reduced to less than 25% of
MaxHP. Provoked status lasts until
character HP is restored to more than
25% of MaxHP or if Provoke effect is
nullified.

sm_fatalblow.name: Fatal Blow
sm_fatalblow.description:
Fatal Blow
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Inflicts Stun status on
target when using Level 6 Bash or
higher. The chance of inflicting Stun
increases with Bash skill level and
Base Level of the caster.

sm_movingrecovery.name: Moving HP-Recovery
sm_movingrecovery.description:
Moving HP Recovery
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Enables natural regen of
HP while moving. Only 25% of the HP that
is recovered while standing is restored
during movement. The Increase
HP Recovery skill does not affect Moving
HP Recovery.

nv_basic.name: Basic Skill
nv_basic.description:
Basic Skill
Max Level: 9
Enables the use of Basic Interface Skills.
[Lv 1]: Enables Trading
Allows the trading of items with other
character.
Right click on a character to initiate.
[Lv 2]: Enables Emotions
Alt+(0~9) and Ctrl+(1,-,=.)
Alt+L opens additional Emotion icons.
[Lv 3]: Enables Sitting
Sitting doubles HP and SP regeneration
speed.
Press the Insert key or type /sit.
[Lv 4]: Enables Chat Room Creation
Alt+C to open a Chat Room or click the
Chat button in the Basic Information
Window.
[Lv 5]: Join a Party
Character can join a party.
[Lv 6]: Enables Use of Kafra Storage
Allows use of Kafra Storage.
[Lv 7]: Organize a Party
Create a party by typing
/organize ''Party Name''
Set party options in the Party Window (Alt+Z).
[Lv 9]: Enables Change to First Job Class
Qualifies character for change from Novice
to one of the First classes.

al_ruwach.name: Ruwach
al_ruwach.description:
Ruwach
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Uses 10 SP to summon Holy
Spirit that will detect hidden
characters in 5x5 cells area around the
caster for 10 sec. If target is enemy,
this skill will inflict Holy elemental
magic damage that equal to 145% MATK.

Comments: Because the skill deals damage,
revealing an enemy may cause a short
animation lock.

al_heal.name: Heal
al_heal.description:
Heal
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Faith 10, Demon Bane 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Recovery
Target: 1 Character
Description: Restores target's HP.
Skill level, caster's Base Level and
total INT affect the amount of HP
restored.

Comments: This is the most basic healing
skill in the game. Using lower levels of Heal is
an effective way of not squandering your SP.
You can shortcut several levels of Heal to your
keyboard, or use the scrolling wheel.
Using Heal on undead enemies is commonly
refeered to as 'Heal Bombing' and in order to
do so, you must either hold the shift key, or
use the /ns command.

al_holywater.name: Aqua Benedicta
al_holywater.description:
Aqua Benedicta
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Crafting
Target: Caster
Description: Creates Holy Water with
1 Empty Bottle while standing in water.

Comments: The skill will only work when used
on a water tile. The underwater segments of
Byalan Dungeon are NOT water tiles. Similar
to other skills that require water tiles, they can
also be used on top of a Sage's Deluge, or a
Ninja's Water Evasion.

al_dp.name: Divine Protection
al_dp.description:
Divine Protection
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Cure 1
Description: Reduces damage taken from
Demon and Undead monsters. Character's
Level affects the damage reduction. Damage
reduction is added after final damage
is calculated.
[Lv 1]: DEF +3
[Lv 2]: DEF +6
[Lv 3]: DEF +9
[Lv 4]: DEF +12
[Lv 5]: DEF +15
[Lv 6]: DEF +18
[Lv 7]: DEF +21
[Lv 8]: DEF +24
[Lv 9]: DEF +27
[Lv 10]: DEF +30

Comments: This defense works like Soft DEF,
it's a flat reduction of the final damage.
Reductions of this level are normally
insignificant except in the case of a Monk
taking hits during Steel Body.
Players planning to jobchange into Monks
must max this skill to unlock the basic Monk
skill.

al_teleport.name: Teleport
al_teleport.description:
Teleport
Max Level: 2
Requirement: Ruwach 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Teleports caster to another area.
[Lv 1]: Teleport to a random cell
[Lv 2]: Teleport to save point

Comments: Most servers allow players to
bypass the menu when using Teleport Lv 1.
Teleporting around a map is the most efficient
way of traversing large distances or seeking
dispersed enemies. Creamy Card allows
any character to learn Lv 1 of this skill.

al_cure.name: Cure
al_cure.description:
Cure
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Heal 2
Requirement: Faith 5
Requirement: Heal 2
Skill Form: Recovery
Description: Cures target from Silence,
Confusion and Blind status effects. When used
on Undead monster, this skill will inflicts
Confusion status.

Comments: You cannot cure Silence on
yourself since you cannot cast in the first
place. The Priest skill Status Recovery covers
most of the rest of common status effects.

al_incagi.name: Increase AGI
al_incagi.description:
Increase Agility
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Heal 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Increases targeted
character's Movement and Attack Speed
for the duration of skill. Drains 15
HP from the caster after each cast
and will fail if the caster has less than 16 HP.
The increase is 2 +1 extra for every skill level.
Duration: 40 sec +20 extra for each skill level.

Comments: The increase in movement speed
is very significant.

al_blessing.name: Blessing
al_blessing.description:
Blessing
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Divine Protection 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Temporarily increases STR, DEX
and INT of the target and removes Curse and
Stone Curse effect(only on second stage). The
bonus is 1 point of STR, DEX and INT
respectively per skill level. Duration is
40 seconds +20 extra for each skill level.

Comments: When used to cure Curse status,
the target will not receive the buff. The skill can
be used offensively against Undead and
Demon monsters by holding shift, or using /ns
command. Players cannot be
offensively Blessed.

al_demonbane.name: Demon Bane
al_demonbane.description:
Demon Bane
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Divine Protection 3
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases damage
against Demon and Undead monsters.
Base Level affects damage bonus.
Damage increased by this skill is added
after final damage is calculated.
[Lv 1]: Damage +3
[Lv 2]: Damage +6
[Lv 3]: Damage +9
[Lv 4]: Damage +12
[Lv 5]: Damage +15
[Lv 6]: Damage +18
[Lv 7]: Damage +21
[Lv 8]: Damage +24
[Lv 9]: Damage +27
[Lv 10]: Damage +30

Comments: The bonus from this skill is similar
to Weapon Masteries, in which they only offers
a flat increase at the end of damage
calculation. Players planning to jobchange
into Monks must max this skill to unlock the
basic Monk skill.

al_angelus.name: Angelus
al_angelus.description:
Angelus
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Divine Protection 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster and Party Members
Description: Temporarily increases
Defense of yourself and party members on
screen for the duration of skill.
[Lv 1]: DEF +5%
[Lv 2]: DEF +10%
[Lv 3]: DEF +15%
[Lv 4]: DEF +20%
[Lv 5]: DEF +25%
[Lv 6]: DEF +30%
[Lv 7]: DEF +35%
[Lv 8]: DEF +40%
[Lv 9]: DEF +45%
[Lv 10]: DEF +50%

Comments: Soft Defense is obtained almost
exclusively from investment into VIT, and thus
only characters with significant amounts of
VIT will reap any benefits from this skill.

al_warp.name: Warp Portal
al_warp.description:
Warp Portal
Max Level: 4
Requirement: Teleport 2
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Ground
Description: Creates a Warp Portal that
will teleport those who enter it to
another area. Each Warp Portal can
teleport up to 8 people.
Consumes 1 Blue Gemstone.
[Lv 1]: Warp to Save Point
[Lv 2]: Enable 1 Memo point
[Lv 3]: Enable 2 Memo points
[Lv 4]: Enable 3 Memo points
[Memo Point]: Specific map area memorized
as a destination for a Warp Portal.
Type/memo in a target area to set
location as a Memo Point.

Comments: Indoor locations and Dungeon
floors cannot be memorized. Most servers will
block the ability to /memo on field maps that
contain MvPs or Boss monsters.

al_decagi.name: Decrease AGI
al_decagi.description:
Decrease Agility
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Increase Agility 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: 1 Character
Description: Reduces target's Movement
Speed and AGI stat for the skill's duration.
[Lv 1]: AGI -3, 42% success,
lasts 30(monster) or 20(player) sec
[Lv 2]: AGI -4, 44% success,
lasts 40(monster) or 25(player) sec
[Lv 3]: AGI -5, 46% success,
lasts 50(monster) or 30(player) sec
[Lv 4]: AGI -6, 48% success,
lasts 60(monster) or 35(player) sec
[Lv 5]: AGI -7, 50% success,
lasts 70(monster) or 40(player) sec
[Lv 6]: AGI -8, 52% success,
lasts 80(monster) or 45(player) sec
[Lv 7]: AGI -9, 54% success,
lasts 90(monster) or 50(player) sec
[Lv 8]: AGI -10, 56% success,
lasts 100(monster) or 55(player) sec
[Lv 9]: AGI -11, 58% success,
lasts 110(monster) or 60(player) sec
[Lv 10]: AGI -12, 60% success,
lasts 120(monster) or 65(player) sec

Comments: This skill is a reverse
Increase Agility, to be used against enemies.
Both skills cancel each other.

al_crucis.name: Signum Crucis
al_crucis.description:
Signum Crucis
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Demon Bane 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: Caster's View Range
Description: Reduces physical defense of
Undead elemental and Demon monsters in
the caster's vicinity.
[Lv 1]: DEF Reduction 14%,
27% success chance
[Lv 2]: DEF Reduction 18%,
31% success chance
[Lv 3]: DEF Reduction 22%,
35% success chance
[Lv 4]: DEF Reduction 26%,
39% success chance
[Lv 5]: DEF Reduction 30%,
43% success chance
[Lv 6]: DEF Reduction 34%,
47% success chance
[Lv 7]: DEF Reduction 38%,
51% success chance
[Lv 8]: DEF Reduction 42%,
55% success chance
[Lv 9]: DEF Reduction 46%,
59% success chance
[Lv 10]: DEF Reduction 50%,
63% success chance

Comments: One of the few debuffs that works
on Bosses and MvPs, shredding their Hard
DEF. Another useful aspect of this skill is that
it affects every enemy on screen, even
non-Demon/Undead. In a party, you can use
Signum Crucis to 'tap' all monsters on screen,
increasing the EXP wield.
A monster successfully affected will use
the /swt emote.

al_pneuma.name: Pneuma
al_pneuma.description:
Pneuma
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Warp Portal 4
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Ground
Description: Uses 10 SP to create
barrier in 3x3 cells around targeted
cell that for 10 sec will protect
anyone inside it from long range
physical attacks.

Comments: Pneuma is an almost absolute
defense against any ranged damage. This skill
is vital for supporting parties, in particular
against Bosses and MvPs.
Pneuma cannot be cast to overlap an existing
Pneuma or Safety Wall. Pneumas will inhibit
enemies from positioning Safety Walls.
Furthermore, Pneumas will block ranged
damage, but targets can still be affected by an
attack's other effects, such as being
Stunned or Frozen.

mo_ironhand.name: Iron Fists
mo_ironhand.description:
Iron Hand
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Demon Bane 10,
Divine Protection 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases damage with Bare
Hands and Knuckle class weapons.
[Lv 1]: Damage +3
[Lv 2]: Damage +6
[Lv 3]: Damage +9
[Lv 4]: Damage +12
[Lv 5]: Damage +15
[Lv 6]: Damage +18
[Lv 7]: Damage +21
[Lv 8]: Damage +24
[Lv 9]: Damage +27
[Lv 10]: Damage +30

Comments: Mastery skills only get added up
at the end of damage calculation. In most
situations, it only results in a flat addition of
damage.
Every Monk skill has this as a base
requirement. Therefore, every Monk needs
Max Level Demon Bane and Divine Protection
in order to unlock Iron Hand.

mo_callspirits.name: Summon Spirit Sphere
mo_callspirits.description:
Call Spirits
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Iron Hand 2
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Summons a Spirit Sphere, which
can be used to amplify different skill abilities.
Each Spirit Sphere adds 3 ATK.
[Lv 1]: Up to 1 max sphere
[Lv 2]: Up to 2 max spheres
[Lv 3]: Up to 3 max spheres
[Lv 4]: Up to 4 max spheres
[Lv 5]: Up to 5 max spheres

Comments: The bonus ATK given by Spirit
Spheres works like a Weapon Mastery
but, similar to Blacksmith's Weaponry
Research, this bonus damage ignores flee.
Even if your attack were to miss, you still do
damage based on this mastery's atk bonus.
Almost every Monk skill requires Spiritual
Spheres to be used.

mo_dodge.name: Dodge
mo_dodge.description:
Dodge
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Iron Hand 5, Call Spirits 5
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases FLEE rate.
[Lv 1]: FLEE +1
[Lv 2]: FLEE +3
[Lv 3]: FLEE +4
[Lv 4]: FLEE +6
[Lv 5]: FLEE +7
[Lv 6]: FLEE +9
[Lv 7]: FLEE +10
[Lv 8]: FLEE +12
[Lv 9]: FLEE +13
[Lv 10]: FLEE +15

mo_tripleattack.name: Raging Trifecta Blow
mo_tripleattack.description:
Triple Attack
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Dodge 5
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Enables the chance of
automatically delivering a triple attack in battle.
This skill can be followed up with
Chain Combo.
[Lv 1]: 29% activation chance, 120% ATK
[Lv 2]: 28% activation chance, 140% ATK
[Lv 3]: 27% activation chance, 160% ATK
[Lv 4]: 26% activation chance, 180% ATK
[Lv 5]: 25% activation chance, 200% ATK
[Lv 6]: 24% activation chance, 220% ATK
[Lv 7]: 23% activation chance, 240% ATK
[Lv 8]: 22% activation chance, 260% ATK
[Lv 9]: 21% activation chance, 280% ATK
[Lv 10]: 20% activation chance, 300% ATK

Comments: Every Monk combo sequence
begins with a Triple Attack activating. The
chance of a Triple goes down with each level
but the damage output goes up. Unlike
Thief's Double Attack, this skill can be copied
by Rogues and Stalkers, and will activate
even when used with a Bow.

mo_absorbspirits.name: Absorb Spirit Sphere
mo_absorbspirits.description:
Absorb Spirits
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Call Spirits 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Absorbs certain amount of
SP from a Spirit Sphere, which can be
stolen from other Monks during PvP and
WoE. When used on monsters, this skill
has a 20% chance to give the caster an
amount of SP that is determined by the
level of the targeted monster.
Ineffective against Boss monsters and
Guardians.

Comments: Stealing the Spirit Spheres
from an enemy Monk after it has started
casting a skill will not prevent the skill from
being activated.

mo_investigate.name: Occult Impaction
mo_investigate.description:
Investigate
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Call Spirits 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Special Physical
Target: 1 Character
Description: Attacks an enemy with a massive
psychic impact that will inflict more damage
when the enemy has high Defense.
Consumes 1 Spirit Sphere.
[Lv 1]: 175% ATK
[Lv 2]: 250% ATK
[Lv 3]: 325% ATK
[Lv 4]: 400% ATK
[Lv 5]: 475% ATK

Comments: This skill does more damage
based on the target's Hard and Soft DEF.
It has the same property as Ice Pick and
Thanatos Card.

mo_bladestop.name: Root
mo_bladestop.description:
Blade Stop
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Dodge 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Enemies around the caster
Description: Immobilizes both the caster and
an enemy until either one of them dies.
Increasing this skill allows the use of other
skills during the Blade Stop status.
Ineffective against Boss monsters.
Consumes 1 Spirit Sphere.
Duration and skills enabled in Blade Stop
status according to skill level:
[Lv 1]: 20 sec
[Lv 2]: 30 sec, Finger Offensive enabled
[Lv 3]: 40 sec, Investigate enabled
[Lv 4]: 50 sec, Chain Combo enabled
[Lv 5]: 60 sec, Asura Strike enabled;
Caster must be in Explosion Spirits state and
have at least 4 Spirit Spheres to use
Asura Strike.

Comments: The enemy is completely helpless
while caught in Blade Stop. If the enemy is
another Monk, they can break out of your
Blade stop by using any skills that he can
use during Blade Stop.
This skill works similar to Knight's Auto
Counter, but unlike that skill, does not require
the attack to be made from the direction you
are facing.

mo_chaincombo.name: Raging Quadruple Blow
mo_chaincombo.description:
Chain Combo
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Triple Attack 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: Only usable during Triple Attack
delay. Spins a target while attacking the
enemy with a combo hit.
This skill can be followed up with
Combo Finish.
[Lv 1]: 200% ATK
[Lv 2]: 250% ATK
[Lv 3]: 300% ATK
[Lv 4]: 350% ATK
[Lv 5]: 400% ATK

Comments: To be used as part of a combo,
the user must use the skill during the delay
of a Triple Attack.
Can also be used during Blade Stop.

mo_explosionspirits.name: Fury
mo_explosionspirits.description:
Critical Explosion
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Absorp Sprits 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Temporarily increases caster's
Critical rate for period of time. During
the Explosion Spirits status, SP regen is
disabled entirely, except for the trickle coming
from Spirits Recovery(if you have it learned).
Consumes 5 Spirit Spheres.
[Lv 1]: +10 Crit
[Lv 2]: +12 Crit
[Lv 3]: +15 Crit
[Lv 4]: +17 Crit
[Lv 5]: +20 Crit

Comments: Being Soul Linked will restore
your ability to regenerate in this state.
While under this effect, Body Relocation does
not cost Spirit Spheres.
You need to be in Critical Explosion in order to
cast Asura Strike, and the effect will be
removed after Asura Strike is cast.

mo_fingeroffensive.name: Throw Spirit Sphere
mo_fingeroffensive.description:
Finger Offensive
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Investigate 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Ranged
Target: 1 Character
Description: Attacks a distant enemy by
firing Spirit Spheres.
Consumes at least 1 Spirit Sphere.
[Lv 1]: 150% ATK per sphere,
up to 1 Sphere, 2 seconds Cast Time
[Lv 2]: 200% ATK per sphere,
up to 2 Spheres, 3 seconds Cast Time
[Lv 3]: 250% ATK per sphere,
up to 3 Spheres, 4 seconds Cast Time
[Lv 4]: 300% ATK per sphere,
up to 4 Spheres, 5 seconds Cast Time
[Lv 5]: 350% ATK per sphere,
up to 5 Spheres, 6 seconds Cast Time

Comments: Throwing 5 Spheres at MaxLv
deals up to 1750% ATK, making this one of
the strongest attacks in the game. The cost
of this massive damage is the rather large
cast time of this skill.
Finger Offensive follows the element of your
equipped weapon and will be affected by
all types of +% damage cards.

mo_spiritsrecovery.name: Spiritual Cadence
mo_spiritsrecovery.description:
Spirits Recovery
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Blade Stop 2
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Restores additional HP and
SP every 10 sec while sitting. If caster's
carried weight is over 50% of the
maximum capacity, this extra HP and SP
is recovered every 20 sec.
[Lv 1]: 4+(MaxHP/500)HP recovery ticks,
2+(MaxSP/500)SP recovery ticks
[Lv 2]: 8+(MaxHP/250)HP recovery ticks,
4+(MaxSP/250)SP recovery ticks
[Lv 3]: 12+(MaxHP/166)HP recovery ticks,
6+(MaxSP/166)SP recovery ticks
[Lv 4]: 16+(MaxHP/125)HP recovery ticks,
8+(MaxSP/125)SP recovery ticks
[Lv 5]: 20+(MaxHP/100)HP recovery ticks,
10+(MaxSP/100)SP recovery ticks

Comments: You need to be standing still
for the ticks to happen, but doesn't require
to be sitting. The user can be standing or
even in combat.
Continues to work while in Critical Explosion
status.

mo_combofinish.name: Raging Thrust
mo_combofinish.description:
Combo Finish
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Chain Combo 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: Only usable during Chain
Combo delay. This skill can be followed
up with the Asura Strike skill
if the caster is in Explosion Spirits status and
has at least 4 Spirit Sphere active.
Consumes 1 Spirit Sphere.
[Lv 1]: 300% ATK
[Lv 2]: 360% ATK
[Lv 3]: 420% ATK
[Lv 4]: 580% ATK
[Lv 5]: 540% ATK

Comments: Because a Monk can only have
up to 5 Spheres and this skill costs 1, in
order to have enough Spheres for an Asura
Strike, you must have started the combo with
the max amount of Spiritual Spheres.

mo_extremityfist.name: Asura Strike
mo_extremityfist.description:
Asura Strike
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Explosion Spirits 3,
Finger Offensive 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: Only usable during
Explosion Spirits status. Inflicts
devastating damage by consuming the
caster's remaining SP. After using
Asura Strike, the Explosion Spirits status
is automatically canceled and will not able
to restore SP for 10 seconds.
Consumes 5 Spirit Spheres.
[Lv 1]: 4.0 sec Cast Time,
3.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 2]: 3.5 sec Cast Time,
2.5 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 3]: 3.0 sec Cast Time,
2.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 4]: 2.5 sec Cast Time,
1.5 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 5]: 2.0 sec Cast Time,
1.0 sec After Cast Delay

Comments: Damage is based on the user's
ATK, your remaining SP while casting, the
SkillLv of Asura Strike and the number of
Spiritual Spheres remaining at the end of
casting.
The damage is always Neutral but will follow
+% damage cards in your equipment. The
casting can be interrupted.
Asura Strike can be used at the end of a
Combo, and when used in such way it does
not have a cast time. The skill can also be
used during Blade Stop, if the user has the
skill learned at Lv5.
SP Regeneration is disabled for 5 minutes
after Asura Strike has been used, but
you can remove this effect by relogging.

mo_steelbody.name: Mental Strength
mo_steelbody.description:
Steel Body
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Combo Finish 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Temporarily enhance caster's
Defense and Magic Defense while
decreasing Movement and Attack Speed.
While this skill is active, other skills
cannot be used.
Consumes 5 Spirit Spheres.
[Lv 1]: 30 seconds duration
[Lv 2]: 60 seconds duration
[Lv 3]: 90 seconds duration
[Lv 4]: 120 seconds duration
[Lv 5]: 150 seconds duration

Comments: This skill will set the user's
Hard DEF and Hard MDEF to exactly 90.
Any Hard DEF or MDEF on your equipment is
ignored, even if you change equipment after
casting. The cast time cannot be interrupted.
The user can still use items freely in this state.
Monks in Steel Body can still auto-cast skills.

mo_bodyrelocation.name: Snap
mo_bodyrelocation.description:
Body Relocation
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Spirit Recovery 2,
Asura Strike 3, Steel Body 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Ground
Description: Instantly teleport to a targeted
spot if there are no obstacles between the
caster and destination.
Consumes 1 Spirit Sphere
when not in Explosion Spirits status.

Comments: Body Relocation is the best
movement skill in the game, allowing
Monks and Champions to instantly move
to any cell in range. While in Critical Explosion
status, will not consume any Spirit Spheres.
Every time the skill is used, Asura Strike will
immediately enter a 3 second cooldown.

al_holylight.name: Holy Light
al_holylight.description:
Holy Light
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: 1 Character
Description: Summons a holy light to
inflict Holy elemental magic damage
to counter evil.

Comments: This will will immediately dispel
Kyrie Eleison. Being Soul Linked massively
increases this skill's damage. Cookie Cards
will increase damage by 10% each as well.

mo_balkyoung.name: Ki Explosion
mo_balkyoung.description:
Ki Explosion
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: Focus your inner energies and
attack an enemy to deal damage.
The targeted enemy receives 300% damage,
nearby monsters will be pushed away 2 cells
and Stunned for 2 sec.
Drains a 10 HP per use.

Comments: Only the targeted enemy receives
damage, and only the surrounding enemies
receive the stun and pushback.

mo_kitranslation.name: Ki Translation
mo_kitranslation.description:
Ki Translation
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Transfer one of your Spirit Spheres
to another party member. Uses up 1 Spirit
Sphere.

nv_firstaid.name: First Aid
nv_firstaid.description:
First Aid
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Recovery
Target: Caster
Description: Uses 3 SP to restore 5 HP.

nv_trickdead.name: Play Dead
nv_trickdead.description:
Play Dead
Requirement: Finish Quest, Novice Only
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Feigns death to avoid the
menace of nearby enemies. The Play
Dead status is canceled by casting
this skill again.

Comments: This skill ceases to function after
jobchanging to any other class, including
Super Novice. Swordsman's Provoke and
Sage's Dispel can cancel the effect. All
monsters will be fooled, even Bosses and
MvPs.

nv_basic.name: Basic Skill
nv_basic.description:
Basic Skill
Max Level: 9
Enables the use of Basic Interface Skills.
[Lv 1]: Enables Trading
Allows the trading of items with other
character.
Right click on a character to initiate.
[Lv 2]: Enables Emotions
Alt+(0~9) and Ctrl+(1,-,=.)
Alt+L opens additional Emotion icons.
[Lv 3]: Enables Sitting
Sitting doubles HP and SP regeneration
speed.
Press the Insert key or type /sit.
[Lv 4]: Enables Chat Room Creation
Alt+C to open a Chat Room or click the
Chat button in the Basic Information
Window.
[Lv 5]: Join a Party
Character can join a party.
[Lv 6]: Enables Use of Kafra Storage
Allows use of Kafra Storage.
[Lv 7]: Organize a Party
Create a party by typing
/organize ''Party Name''
Set party options in the Party Window (Alt+Z).
[Lv 9]: Enables Change to First Job Class
Qualifies character for change from Novice
to one of the First classes.

mg_stonecurse.name: Stone Curse
mg_stonecurse.description:
Stone Curse
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: 1 Character
Description: Inflicts Stone Curse to a
target. Consumes 1 Red Gemstone.
[Lv 1]: 24% Chance
[Lv 2]: 28% Chance
[Lv 3]: 32% Chance
[Lv 4]: 36% Chance
[Lv 5]: 40% Chance
[Lv 6]: 44% Chance
[Lv 7]: 48% Chance
[Lv 8]: 52% Chance
[Lv 9]: 56% Chance
[Lv 10]: 60% Chance

Comments: Using this skill requires a
Gemstone and is very short range, however
Stone Curse is generally considered to be a
more crippling disable than Freeze. Stone
cursed enemies are vulnerable to Fire.
Bosses and Undead are immune.
Using the skill on a target that's already stone
cursed will immediately undo the effect, even if
it's an enemy.

mg_coldbolt.name: Cold Bolt
mg_coldbolt.description:
Cold Bolt
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: Enemy
Description: Summons bolts of frigid ice
to strike at an enemy which inflicts
Water elemental magic damage per hit.
One bolt for every skill level.
[Lv 1]: 100% MATK, 0.7 sec Cast Time,
1.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 2]: 200% MATK, 1.4 sec Cast Time,
1.2 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 3]: 300% MATK, 2.1 sec Cast Time,
1.4 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 4]: 400% MATK, 2.8 sec Cast Time,
1.6 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 5]: 500% MATK, 3.5 sec Cast Time,
1.8 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 6]: 600% MATK, 4.2 sec Cast Time,
2.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 7]: 700% MATK, 4.9 sec Cast Time,
2.2 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 8]: 800% MATK, 5.6 sec Cast Time,
2.4 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 9]: 900% MATK, 6.3 sec Cast Time,
2.6 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 10]: 1000% MATK, 7.0 sec Cast Time,
2.8 sec After Cast Delay

Comments: The basic Water spell of a Mage.
Higher levels of the skill dramatically increase
SP Cost and Cast Time. Different skill levels
of this skill can be set to individual hotkeys.
The skill is greatly enhanced by using Siroma
Card.

mg_lightningbolt.name: Lightning Bolt
mg_lightningbolt.description:
Lightning Bolt
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: 1 Character
Description: Drops lightning on target
inflicting Wind elemental
magic damage per hit.
One bolt for every skill level.
[Lv 1]: 100% MATK, 0.7 sec Cast Time,
1.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 2]: 200% MATK, 1.4 sec Cast Time,
1.2 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 3]: 300% MATK, 2.1 sec Cast Time,
1.4 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 4]: 400% MATK, 2.8 sec Cast Time,
1.6 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 5]: 500% MATK, 3.5 sec Cast Time,
1.8 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 6]: 600% MATK, 4.2 sec Cast Time,
2.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 7]: 700% MATK, 4.9 sec Cast Time,
2.2 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 8]: 800% MATK, 5.6 sec Cast Time,
2.4 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 9]: 900% MATK, 6.3 sec Cast Time,
2.6 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 10]: 1000% MATK, 7.0 sec Cast Time,
2.8 sec After Cast Delay

Comments: The basic Wind spell of a mage.
Higher levels of the skill dramatically increase
SP Cost and Cast Time. Different skill levels
of this skill can be set to individual hotkeys.
Unlike Fire and Cold bolts, there is no card
that will enhance Lightning bolt in the
same manner.

mg_napalmbeat.name: Napalm Beat
mg_napalmbeat.description:
Napalm Beat
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: 1 Character
Description: Uses telekinesis power to
attack a target and 3x3 cells around it
with Ghost elemental magic. The damage
portion is divided among the targets.
[Lv 1]: 80% MATK, 1.0 sec Cast Time
[Lv 2]: 90% MATK, 1.0 sec Cast Time
[Lv 3]: 100% MATK, 1.0 sec Cast Time
[Lv 4]: 110% MATK, 0.9 sec Cast Time
[Lv 5]: 120% MATK, 0.9 sec Cast Time
[Lv 6]: 130% MATK, 0.8 sec Cast Time
[Lv 7]: 140% MATK, 0.8 sec Cast Time
[Lv 8]: 150% MATK, 0.7 sec Cast Time
[Lv 9]: 160% MATK, 0.6 sec Cast Time
[Lv 10]: 170% MATK, 0.5 sec Cast Time

Comments: Mage's Ghost spells are weak
compared to elemental bolts, however they
are much faster casting and do adequate
damage against the Undead.
Damage will be split between the targets.

mg_firebolt.name: Fire Bolt
mg_firebolt.description:
Fire Bolt
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: 1 Character
Description: Attacks a target with arrow
made of fire inflicting Fire
elemental magic damage per hit.
One bolt for every skill level.
[Lv 1]: 100% MATK, 0.7 sec Cast Time,
1.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 2]: 200% MATK, 1.4 sec Cast Time,
1.2 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 3]: 300% MATK, 2.1 sec Cast Time,
1.4 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 4]: 400% MATK, 2.8 sec Cast Time,
1.6 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 5]: 500% MATK, 3.5 sec Cast Time,
1.8 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 6]: 600% MATK, 4.2 sec Cast Time,
2.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 7]: 700% MATK, 4.9 sec Cast Time,
2.2 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 8]: 800% MATK, 5.6 sec Cast Time,
2.4 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 9]: 900% MATK, 6.3 sec Cast Time,
2.6 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 10]: 1000% MATK, 7.0 sec Cast Time,
2.8 sec After Cast Delay

Comments: The basic Fire spell of a Mage.
Higher levels of the skill dramatically increase
SP Cost and Cast Time. Different skill levels
of this skill can be set to individual hotkeys.
The skill is greatly enhanced by using Imp
Card.

mg_sight.name: Sight
mg_sight.description:
Sight
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Uses 10 SP to summon a fire
ball that for 10 seconds will detect hidden
characters in 7x7 AoE around the caster.

Comments: If the skill is used by the means of
a Horong Card, removing the item containing
the card will immediately cancel the skill,
however the visual effect persists the entire duration.
Does not work against Stalker's Chase Walk.

mg_srecovery.name: Increase SP Recovery
mg_srecovery.description:
Increase SP Recovery
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Restores SP every 10
seconds while idle. MaxSP affects how much
SP is restored by this skill.
[Lv 1]: SP+3 +(0.2% of Max SP)
[Lv 2]: SP+6 +(0.4% of Max SP)
[Lv 3]: SP+9 +(0.6% of Max SP)
[Lv 4]: SP+12 +(0.8% of Max SP)
[Lv 5]: SP+15 +(1.0% of Max SP)
[Lv 6]: SP+18 +(1.2% of Max SP)
