Description: Reduces Cast Time and After
Cast Delay by 3% and of all spells used in the
area of effect. If this song is mastered, the
After Cast Delay reduction is 50%.
The amount of Cast Time reduced by this skill
is affected by DEX and the After Cast Delay
is affected by INT. Further improved by your
Musical Lesson.
Requires Musical Instrument.
[Lv 1]: (DEX/10)+3% Cast Time reduction,
(INT/5)+3% After Cast Delay reduction
[Lv 2]: (DEX/10)+6% Cast Time reduction,
(INT/5)+6% After Cast Delay reduction
[Lv 3]: (DEX/10)+9% Cast Time reduction,
(INT/5)+9% After Cast Delay reduction
[Lv 4]: (DEX/10)+12% Cast Time reduction,
(INT/5)+12% After Cast Delay reduction
[Lv 5]: (DEX/10)+15% Cast Time reduction,
(INT/5)+15% After Cast Delay reduction
[Lv 6]: (DEX/10)+18% Cast Time reduction,
(INT/5)+18% After Cast Delay reduction
[Lv 7]: (DEX/10)+21% Cast Time reduction,
(INT/5)+21% After Cast Delay reduction
[Lv 8]: (DEX/10)+24% Cast Time reduction,
(INT/5)+24% After Cast Delay reduction
[Lv 9]: (DEX/10)+27% Cast Time reduction,
(INT/5)+27% After Cast Delay reduction
[Lv 10]: (DEX/10)+30% Cast Time reduction,
(INT/5)+50% After Cast Delay reduction
[Musical Lessons]: 1% Cast Time Reduction
and 2% After Cast Delay reduction for every
Skill Level of Musical Lessons.

Comments: Very few items are capable of
reducing After Cast Delay and these are
usually very rare. With this skill, Bards can
almost completely erase all After Cast Delay.
Keep in mind that Cool Downs are not the
same thing as After Cast Delay, and are not
affected by this skill.
After Cast Delay: Every skill is unusable.
Cool Down: Only a specific skill is unusable.
If you are Soul Linked and have mastered
this song, you will be able to perform Lv10
Fortune's Kiss. The skill will appear on the Etc
Tab of your Skill Window.

ba_appleidun.name: Song of Lutie
ba_appleidun.description:
The Apple of Idun
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Dissonance 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Song Skill
Target: Caster and Party Members
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: Increases MaxHP of all
players in the area by (5+2*SkillLV)%. Also
creates a healing zone, restoring 30+5*SkillLV
HP every 6 seconds in the area of effect for up
to 3 minutes (31 times total).
Requires Musical Instrument.
[Lv 1]: (VIT/10)+7% MaxHP,
Heals (VIT/2)+35 HP
[Lv 2]: (VIT/10)+9% MaxHP,
Heals (VIT/2)+40 HP
[Lv 3]: (VIT/10)+11% MaxHP,
Heals (VIT/2)+45 HP
[Lv 4]: (VIT/10)+13% MaxHP,
Heals (VIT/2)+50 HP
[Lv 5]: (VIT/10)+15% MaxHP,
Heals (VIT/2)+55 HP
[Lv 6]: (VIT/10)+17% MaxHP,
Heals (VIT/2)+60 HP
[Lv 7]: (VIT/10)+19% MaxHP,
Heals (VIT/2)+65 HP
[Lv 8]: (VIT/10)+21% MaxHP,
Heals (VIT/2)+70 HP
[Lv 9]: (VIT/10)+23% MaxHP,
Heals (VIT/2)+75 HP
[Lv 10]: (VIT/10)+25% MaxHP,
Heals (VIT/2)+80 HP
[Musical Lessons]: +1% HP every 2 Skill
Levels and +5 HP healed for every Skill Level.

Comments: If you are Soul Linked and have
mastered this song, you will be able to
perform Lv10 Service For You. The skill will
appear on the Etc Tab of your Skill Window.

ba_frostjoke.name: BA FROSTJOKE
ba_frostjoke.description:
Frost Joker
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Encore 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: Caster's View Range
Description: Causes Freezing status on
everything (including players) on screen.
In PvP or Guild siege area, this skill works on
caster as well.
[Lv 1]: 20% Chance to Freeze
[Lv 2]: 25% Chance to Freeze
[Lv 3]: 30% Chance to Freeze
[Lv 4]: 35% Chance to Freeze
[Lv 5]: 40% Chance to Freeze

Comments: The freezing chance only affects
party members. In PvP and WoE, if the Bard
is not in the same party as its allies, they will
not be affected by this skill.

bd_lullaby.name: Lullaby
bd_lullaby.description:
Lullaby
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Whistle 10
Requirement: Humming 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Ensemble Skill
Target: Enemies around the caster
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: Casts Sleep on all enemies
within area of effect. Effect will occur every 6
seconds for 60 seconds (11 times) and is
affected by INT of the caster, but it has a
chance to fail depending on resistances.
Requires Musical Instrument or Whip.

bd_rokisweil.name: Classical Pluck
bd_rokisweil.description:
Loki's Veil
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Assassin Cross of Sunset 10
Requirement: Please Don't Forget Me 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Ensemble Skill
Target: Enemies around the casters
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: Blocks all skill use for everything
(including players) within area of effect. Can
not be canceled by Dispell. Does not work
against Boss monsters.

bd_siegfried.name: Acoustic Rhythm
bd_siegfried.description:
Invulnerable Siegfried
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Poem of Bragi 10
Requirement: Fortune's Kiss 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Ensemble Skill
Target: Caster and Party Members
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: Increases resistance against
elemental attacks and status ailments for all
players in area of effect.
[Lv 1]: Elemental 60%, Ailments 10%
[Lv 2]: Elemental 65%, Ailments 20%
[Lv 3]: Elemental 70%, Ailments 30%
[Lv 4]: Elemental 75%, Ailments 40%
[Lv 5]: Elemental 80%, Ailments 50%

Comments: The elemental resistance offered
by this skill adds linearly with elemental
resist acquired from card and skills.
For example, wearing a Valkyrie Shield while
under this spell at max level gives 100%
resistance to Fire and Water damage.

bd_drumbattlefield.name: Battle Theme
bd_drumbattlefield.description:
A Drum on the Battlefield
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Apple of Idun 10
Requirement: Service For You 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Ensemble Skill
Target: Caster and Party Members
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: Increase ATK by 25+25*SkillLV
and DEF by 2+2*SkillLV of all party members
within area of effect.
Requires Musical Instrument or Whip.
[Lv 1]: +50 ATK, +4 DEF
[Lv 2]: +75 ATK, +6 DEF
[Lv 3]: +100 ATK, +8 DEF
[Lv 4]: +125 ATK, +10 DEF
[Lv 5]: +150 ATK, +12 DEF

bd_intoabyss.name: Power Chord
bd_intoabyss.description:
Into the Abyss
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Lullaby 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Ensemble Skill
Target: Caster and Party Members
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: All party members within the area
of effect are able to cast spells without
Gemstones and lay traps without using an
item. Cannot be canceled by Dispell.

Comments: Abracadabra still requires at
least 1 Yellow Gemstones, and Ganbantein
will still require both.

bd_eternalchaos.name: Down Tempo
bd_eternalchaos.description:
Eternal Chaos
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Loki's Wail 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Ensemble Skill
Target: Enemies around the casters
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: Reduces the Defense of enemies
to 0 within the area of effect.
Requires Musical Instrument or Whip.

bd_richmankim.name: Mental Sensing
bd_richmankim.description:
Mr. Kim A Rich Man
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Invulnerable Siegfried 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Ensemble Skill
Target: Caster and Party Members
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: Increases gained exp from mobs
killed within the area of effect by
(25+11*SkillLV)%. Cannot be canceled by
Dispell.
Requires Musical Instrument or Whip.
[Lv 1]: +36% Experience
[Lv 2]: +47% Experience
[Lv 3]: +58% Experience
[Lv 4]: +69% Experience
[Lv 5]: +80% Experience

Comments: The monsters have to be inside
the Ensemble area when they die. It's not the
players that have to be inside, only monsters.

bd_ringnibelungen.name: Harmonic Lick
bd_ringnibelungen.description:
The Ring of Nibelungen
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Drum of Battlefield 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Ensemble Skill
Target: Caster and Party Members
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: Increases damage of all Level 4
Weapons within area of effect with
DEF-ignoring 50+(25*SkillLV).
[Lv 1]: +75 Damage
[Lv 2]: +100 Damage
[Lv 3]: +125 Damage
[Lv 4]: +150 Damage
[Lv 5]: +175 Damage

ac_chargearrow.name: Arrow Repel
ac_chargearrow.description:
Charge Arrow
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Ranged
Target: 1 Character
Description: Draws the bowstring to its limit to
fire a volley of arrows with enough force to
push the target 6 cells back.

ac_makingarrow.name: Arrow Crafting
ac_makingarrow.description:
Arrow Crafting
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Crafting
Target: Caster
Description: Creates Arrows from
specific items. The kind of Arrows
produced, as well as the amount, is
determined by the items used.
This skill fails, if the current Weight
is more than 70%.

ba_pangvoice.name: Pang Voice
ba_pangvoice.description:
Pang Voice
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: 1 Character
Description: You scream out at a single target,
causing the Confusion/Chaos status ailment.
Does not work against Boss monsters.
Success chance is 70%.

Comments: Chaos and Confusion are two
names for the same effect and can be used
interchangeably.
This effect causes the character to walk in
random directions while attempting to move
by clicking the terrain.
STR, INT, LUK the Level gap between the
source and the target help resist against the
effect. LUK has a very minor effect towards
reducing the duration of the effect.

nv_firstaid.name: First Aid
nv_firstaid.description:
First Aid
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Recovery
Target: Caster
Description: Uses 3 SP to restore 5 HP.

nv_trickdead.name: Play Dead
nv_trickdead.description:
Play Dead
Requirement: Finish Quest, Novice Only
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Feigns death to avoid the
menace of nearby enemies. The Play
Dead status is canceled by casting
this skill again.

Comments: This skill ceases to function after
jobchanging to any other class, including
Super Novice. Swordsman's Provoke and
Sage's Dispel can cancel the effect. All
monsters will be fooled, even Bosses and
MvPs.

nv_basic.name: Basic Skill
nv_basic.description:
Basic Skill
Max Level: 9
Enables the use of Basic Interface Skills.
[Lv 1]: Enables Trading
Allows the trading of items with other
character.
Right click on a character to initiate.
[Lv 2]: Enables Emotions
Alt+(0~9) and Ctrl+(1,-,=.)
Alt+L opens additional Emotion icons.
[Lv 3]: Enables Sitting
Sitting doubles HP and SP regeneration
speed.
Press the Insert key or type /sit.
[Lv 4]: Enables Chat Room Creation
Alt+C to open a Chat Room or click the
Chat button in the Basic Information
Window.
[Lv 5]: Join a Party
Character can join a party.
[Lv 6]: Enables Use of Kafra Storage
Allows use of Kafra Storage.
[Lv 7]: Organize a Party
Create a party by typing
/organize ''Party Name''
Set party options in the Party Window (Alt+Z).
[Lv 9]: Enables Change to First Job Class
Qualifies character for change from Novice
to one of the First classes.

ac_double.name: Double Strafe
ac_double.description:
Double Strafing
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Vulture's Eye 10
Skill Form: Physical attack
Description: A ranged attack, that fires two
arrows. Increases attack range by 3.
Requires Bow class weapon.
Consumes 1 Arrow.
[Lv 1]: 200% damage
[Lv 2]: 220% damage
[Lv 3]: 240% damage
[Lv 4]: 260% damage
[Lv 5]: 280% damage
[Lv 6]: 300% damage
[Lv 7]: 320% damage
[Lv 8]: 340% damage
[Lv 9]: 360% damage
[Lv 10]: 380% damage

Comments: The basic skill attack for Archers.
Capable of dealing a lot of damage from a safe
distance. Increasing your Attack Speed will
allow you to spam this skill even faster.

ac_owl.name: Owl's Eye
ac_owl.description:
Owl's Eye
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases DEX.
[Lv 1]: Dex +1
[Lv 2]: Dex +2
[Lv 3]: Dex +3
[Lv 4]: Dex +4
[Lv 5]: Dex +5
[Lv 6]: Dex +6
[Lv 7]: Dex +7
[Lv 8]: Dex +8
[Lv 9]: Dex +9
[Lv 10]: Dex +10

ac_shower.name: Arrow Shower
ac_shower.description:
Arrow Shower
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Double Strafing 5
Skill Form: Physical attack
Description: A 5x5 splash attack that damages
all enemies around the target. Knock back
enemies by 2 cells.
Requires Bow class weapon.
Consumes 1 Arrow.
[Lv 1]: 80% damage
[Lv 2]: 85% damage
[Lv 3]: 90% damage
[Lv 4]: 95% damage
[Lv 5]: 100% damage
[Lv 6]: 105% damage
[Lv 7]: 110% damage
[Lv 8]: 115% damage
[Lv 9]: 120% damage
[Lv 10]: 125% damage

Comments: This skill is not good for killing
groups of enemies, both because it does low
damage and because it disperses them. The
most common use for it is to push Hunter
traps, or to spread status effects using
specialized bows.
For Trap focused Hunters in particular, this
skill is key to their gameplay. Arrow Shower is
capable if accurately pushing traps in any
direction.

ac_vulture.name: Vulture's Eye
ac_vulture.description:
Vulture's Eye
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Owl's Eye 3
Requirement: Owl's Eye 3
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases Attack Range
and HIT with Bow class weapons.
[Lv 1]: Range and HIT +1
[Lv 2]: Range and HIT +2
[Lv 3]: Range and HIT +3
[Lv 4]: Range and HIT +4
[Lv 5]: Range and HIT +5
[Lv 6]: Range and HIT +6
[Lv 7]: Range and HIT +7
[Lv 8]: Range and HIT +8
[Lv 9]: Range and HIT +9
[Lv 10]: Range and HIT +10

ac_concentration.name: Improve Concentration
ac_concentration.description:
Improve Concentration
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Vulture's Eye 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Boosts AGI and DEX
temporarily as well as detects nearby
hidden characters in 3x3 AoE.
[Lv 1]: Agi and Dex +3% for 60 sec
[Lv 2]: Agi and Dex +4% for 80 sec
[Lv 3]: Agi and Dex +5% for 100 sec
[Lv 4]: Agi and Dex +6% for 120 sec
[Lv 5]: Agi and Dex +7% for 140 sec
[Lv 6]: Agi and Dex +8% for 160 sec
[Lv 7]: Agi and Dex +9% for 180 sec
[Lv 8]: Agi and Dex +10% for 200 sec
[Lv 9]: Agi and Dex +11% for 220 sec
[Lv 10]: Agi and Dex +12% for 240 sec

bd_adaptation.name: Amp
bd_adaptation.description:
Adaptation to Circumstances
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Cancels a current song or dance.
The same song may not be performed again
immediately.

Comments: Changing weapons also causes
Songs and Dances to end.

dc_dancinglesson.name: Dance Lessons
dc_dancinglesson.description:
Dancing Lesson
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases Whip class weapon
damage and effectiveness of Dancing skills
by 3 per SkillLV. This skill also partially
counters the walking speed reduction while
performing.
[Lv 1]: Damage +3, +2.5% Walk Speed
[Lv 2]: Damage +6, +5.0% Walk Speed
[Lv 3]: Damage +9, +7.5% Walk Speed
[Lv 4]: Damage +12, +10.0% Walk Speed
[Lv 5]: Damage +15, +12.5% Walk Speed
[Lv 6]: Damage +18, +15.0% Walk Speed
[Lv 7]: Damage +21, +17.5% Walk Speed
[Lv 8]: Damage +24, +20.0% Walk Speed
[Lv 9]: Damage +27, +22.5% Walk Speed
[Lv 10]: Damage +30, +25.0% Walk Speed

Comments: The boosts to dance effects given
by this passive are very significant.

dc_uglydance.name: Hip Shaker
dc_uglydance.description:
Ugly Dance
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Adaptation to Circumstances 1,
Dancing Lesson 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Dance Skill
Target: Enemies around the caster
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: Drains SP from enemies in the
area of effect. Drains 5+5*SkillLV SP every 3
seconds (11 times total). Also occurs where
two Dances overlap.
Requires Whip.
[Lv 1]: Drains 10 SP per 3 sec
[Lv 2]: Drains 15 SP per 3 sec
[Lv 3]: Drains 20 SP per 3 sec
[Lv 4]: Drains 25 SP per 3 sec
[Lv 5]: Drains 30 SP per 3 sec

Comments: The natural Ugly Dance
caused by overlapping dances only occurs
when Dancer-Dancer songs meet, but not
when Bard-Dancer songs overlap.
If Bard-Bard songs overlap, the natural
Dissonance effect happens instead.

bd_encore.name: Encore
bd_encore.description:
Encore
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Adaptation to Circumstances 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Performs the last song or dance
again at half SP cost.

dc_throwarrow.name: Slinging Arrow
dc_throwarrow.description:
Throw Arrow
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Dancing Lesson 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Ranged
Target: 1 Character
Description: Allows the dancer to throw an
arrow with her whip as if she were firing it
from a bow. Can be used while performing
songs and dances. The Arrow's element
determines the element of this attack.
Requires Whip.
[Lv 1]: +150% damage
[Lv 2]: +175% damage
[Lv 3]: +200% damage
[Lv 4]: +225% damage
[Lv 5]: +250% damage

Comments: An excellent skill for 'tapping'
monsters for increased EXP. If the user is
equipped with Whip of Balance, this skill will
also shove enemies.

dc_humming.name: Focus Ballet
dc_humming.description:
Humming
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Ugly Dance 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Dance Skill
Target: Caster and Party Members
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: Increase HIT of players in the
area of effect. The HIT rate is affected by
DEX and Dancing Lesson.
Requires Whip.
[Lv 1]: (DEX/10) +3 HIT
[Lv 2]: (DEX/10) +5 HIT
[Lv 3]: (DEX/10) +7 HIT
[Lv 4]: (DEX/10) +9 HIT
[Lv 5]: (DEX/10) +11 HIT
[Lv 6]: (DEX/10) +13 HIT
[Lv 7]: (DEX/10) +15 HIT
[Lv 8]: (DEX/10) +17 HIT
[Lv 9]: (DEX/10) +19 HIT
[Lv 10]: (DEX/10) +21 HIT
[Dancing Lesson]: +1 HIT every Skill Level

Comments: If you are Soul Linked and have
mastered this dance, you will be able to
perform Lv10 Whistle. The skill will appear
on the Etc tab of you Skill Window.

dc_dontforgetme.name: Slow Grace
dc_dontforgetme.description:
Please Don't Forget Me
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Ugly Dance 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Dance Skill
Target: Enemies around the caster
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: Decreases Attack Speed
and Movement Speed of all enemies
in the area of effect.
Cancels any skills that increase Movement and
Attack Speed. The Attack Speed penalty
is affected by DEX and the Movement Speed
penalty by AGI.
Both are affected by Dancing Lesson.
Requires Whip.
[Lv 1]: [(DEX/10) +8]% ASPD Penalty and
[(AGI/10) +8]% Movement Speed Penalty
[Lv 2]: [(DEX/10) +11]% ASPD Penalty and
[(AGI/10) +11]% Movement Speed Penalty
[Lv 3]: [(DEX/10) +14]% ASPD Penalty and
[(AGI/10) +14]% Movement Speed Penalty
[Lv 4]: [(DEX/10) +17]% ASPD Penalty and
[(AGI/10) +17]% Movement Speed Penalty
[Lv 5]: [(DEX/10) +20]% ASPD Penalty and
[(AGI/10) +20]% Movement Speed Penalty
[Lv 6]: [(DEX/10) +23]% ASPD Penalty and
[(AGI/10) +23]% Movement Speed Penalty
[Lv 7]: [(DEX/10) +26]% ASPD Penalty and
[(AGI/10) +26]% Movement Speed Penalty
[Lv 8]: [(DEX/10) +29]% ASPD Penalty and
[(AGI/10) +29]% Movement Speed Penalty
[Lv 9]: [(DEX/10) +32]% ASPD Penalty and
[(AGI/10) +32]% Movement Speed Penalty
[Lv 10]: [(DEX/10) +35]% ASPD Penalty and
[(AGI/10) +35]% Movement Speed Penalty
[Dancing Lesson]: An extra 1% ASPD and
Movement Speed Penalty for every Skill Level.

Comments: The debuffs caused by this dance
are very severe, in particular against players.
Characters based on ASPD will be helpless
while affected by this skill.
If you are Soul Linked and have mastered this
dance, you will be able to perform Lv10
Assassin Cross of Sunset. The skill will
appear on your Etc tab on the Skill Window.

dc_fortunekiss.name: Lady Luck
dc_fortunekiss.description:
Fortune's Kiss
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Ugly Dance 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Dance Skill
Target: Caster and Party Members
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: Increases Critical rate of all
players in the area of effect. The amount of
Critical increased by this skill is affected by
Dancing Lesson skill level and LUK.
Requires Whip.
[Lv 1]: (LUK/10) +11% CRIT
[Lv 2]: (LUK/10) +12% CRIT
[Lv 3]: (LUK/10) +13% CRIT
[Lv 4]: (LUK/10) +14% CRIT
[Lv 5]: (LUK/10) +15% CRIT
[Lv 6]: (LUK/10) +16% CRIT
[Lv 7]: (LUK/10) +17% CRIT
[Lv 8]: (LUK/10) +18% CRIT
[Lv 9]: (LUK/10) +19% CRIT
[Lv 10]: (LUK/10) +20% CRIT
[Dancing Lesson]: +0.5 CRIT for every
Skill Level

Comments: If you are Soul Linked and have
mastered this dance, you will be able to
perform Lv10 Poem of Bragi. The skill will
appear on your Etc tab on the Skill Window.

dc_serviceforyou.name: Gypsy's Kiss
dc_serviceforyou.description:
Service for You
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Ugly Dance 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Dance Skill
Target: Caster and Party Members
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: Increase MaxSP of all
players in the area of effect. Reduces the SP
consumption of all skills within area of effect.
Both effects scale with your INT and known
level of Dancing Lesson.
Requires Whip.
[Lv 1]: [(INT/10) +16]% MaxSP &
[(INT/10) +23]% Less SP Usage
[Lv 2]: [(INT/10) +17]% MaxSP &
[(INT/10) +26]% Less SP Usage
[Lv 3]: [(INT/10) +18]% MaxSP &
[(INT/10) +29]% Less SP Usage
[Lv 4]: [(INT/10) +19]% MaxSP &
[(INT/10) +32]% Less SP Usage
[Lv 5]: [(INT/10) +20]% MaxSP &
[(INT/10) +35]% Less SP Usage
[Lv 6]: [(INT/10) +21]% MaxSP &
[(INT/10) +38]% Less SP Usage
[Lv 7]: [(INT/10) +22]% MaxSP &
[(INT/10) +41]% Less SP Usage
[Lv 8]: [(INT/10) +23]% MaxSP &
[(INT/10) +44]% Less SP Usage
[Lv 9]: [(INT/10) +24]% MaxSP &
[(INT/10) +47]% Less SP Usage
[Lv 10]: [(INT/10) +25]% MaxSP &
[(INT/10) +50]% Less SP Usage
[Dancing Lesson]: +1% MaxSP and +1%
Less SP Usage every two Skill Levels

Comments: The SP cost reduction given by
this skill is highly valuable in parties, allowing
a large amount of players to continuously use
their skills and spells without restraint.
The SP increase effect has a very large effect
on increasing the damage of Asura Strike.
If you are Soul Linked and have mastered this
skill, you will be able to perform Lv10 Apple
of Idun.

dc_scream.name: Dazzler
dc_scream.description:
Scream
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Encore 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: Caster's View Range
Description: Inflicts everyone (including
players) with Stun within area of effect. In PvP
or Guild siege area, this skill works on caster
as well.
[Lv 1]: 30% Chance to Stun
[Lv 2]: 35% Chance to Stun
[Lv 3]: 40% Chance to Stun
[Lv 4]: 45% Chance to Stun
[Lv 5]: 50% Chance to Stun

Comments: Works the same way as Bard's
counterpart, but for Stun. It will only stun allies
if they are in the same party. In PvP and WoE,
if an ally is not in the party, they will not be
affected.

bd_lullaby.name: Lullaby
bd_lullaby.description:
Lullaby
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Whistle 10
Requirement: Humming 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Ensemble Skill
Target: Enemies around the caster
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: Casts Sleep on all enemies
within area of effect. Effect will occur every 6
seconds for 60 seconds (11 times) and is
affected by INT of the caster, but it has a
chance to fail depending on resistances.
Requires Musical Instrument or Whip.

bd_rokisweil.name: Classical Pluck
bd_rokisweil.description:
Loki's Veil
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Assassin Cross of Sunset 10
Requirement: Please Don't Forget Me 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Ensemble Skill
Target: Enemies around the casters
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: Blocks all skill use for everything
(including players) within area of effect. Can
not be canceled by Dispell. Does not work
against Boss monsters.

bd_siegfried.name: Acoustic Rhythm
bd_siegfried.description:
Invulnerable Siegfried
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Poem of Bragi 10
Requirement: Fortune's Kiss 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Ensemble Skill
Target: Caster and Party Members
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: Increases resistance against
elemental attacks and status ailments for all
players in area of effect.
[Lv 1]: Elemental 60%, Ailments 10%
[Lv 2]: Elemental 65%, Ailments 20%
[Lv 3]: Elemental 70%, Ailments 30%
[Lv 4]: Elemental 75%, Ailments 40%
[Lv 5]: Elemental 80%, Ailments 50%

Comments: The elemental resistance offered
by this skill adds linearly with elemental
resist acquired from card and skills.
For example, wearing a Valkyrie Shield while
under this spell at max level gives 100%
resistance to Fire and Water damage.

bd_drumbattlefield.name: Battle Theme
bd_drumbattlefield.description:
A Drum on the Battlefield
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Apple of Idun 10
Requirement: Service For You 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Ensemble Skill
Target: Caster and Party Members
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: Increase ATK by 25+25*SkillLV
and DEF by 2+2*SkillLV of all party members
within area of effect.
Requires Musical Instrument or Whip.
[Lv 1]: +50 ATK, +4 DEF
[Lv 2]: +75 ATK, +6 DEF
[Lv 3]: +100 ATK, +8 DEF
[Lv 4]: +125 ATK, +10 DEF
[Lv 5]: +150 ATK, +12 DEF

bd_intoabyss.name: Power Chord
bd_intoabyss.description:
Into the Abyss
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Lullaby 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Ensemble Skill
Target: Caster and Party Members
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: All party members within the area
of effect are able to cast spells without
Gemstones and lay traps without using an
item. Cannot be canceled by Dispell.

Comments: Abracadabra still requires at
least 1 Yellow Gemstones, and Ganbantein
will still require both.

bd_eternalchaos.name: Down Tempo
bd_eternalchaos.description:
Eternal Chaos
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Loki's Wail 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Ensemble Skill
Target: Enemies around the casters
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: Reduces the Defense of enemies
to 0 within the area of effect.
Requires Musical Instrument or Whip.

bd_richmankim.name: Mental Sensing
bd_richmankim.description:
Mr. Kim A Rich Man
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Invulnerable Siegfried 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Ensemble Skill
Target: Caster and Party Members
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: Increases gained exp from mobs
killed within the area of effect by
(25+11*SkillLV)%. Cannot be canceled by
Dispell.
Requires Musical Instrument or Whip.
[Lv 1]: +36% Experience
[Lv 2]: +47% Experience
[Lv 3]: +58% Experience
[Lv 4]: +69% Experience
[Lv 5]: +80% Experience

Comments: The monsters have to be inside
the Ensemble area when they die. It's not the
players that have to be inside, only monsters.

bd_ringnibelungen.name: Harmonic Lick
bd_ringnibelungen.description:
The Ring of Nibelungen
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Drum of Battlefield 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Ensemble Skill
Target: Caster and Party Members
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: Increases damage of all Level 4
Weapons within area of effect with
DEF-ignoring 50+(25*SkillLV).
[Lv 1]: +75 Damage
[Lv 2]: +100 Damage
[Lv 3]: +125 Damage
[Lv 4]: +150 Damage
[Lv 5]: +175 Damage

ac_chargearrow.name: Arrow Repel
ac_chargearrow.description:
Charge Arrow
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Ranged
Target: 1 Character
Description: Draws the bowstring to its limit to
fire a volley of arrows with enough force to
push the target 6 cells back.

ac_makingarrow.name: Arrow Crafting
ac_makingarrow.description:
Arrow Crafting
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Crafting
Target: Caster
Description: Creates Arrows from
specific items. The kind of Arrows
produced, as well as the amount, is
determined by the items used.
This skill fails, if the current Weight
is more than 70%.

dc_winkcharm.name: Wink of Charm
dc_winkcharm.description:
Wink of Charm
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: 1 Character
Description: Charm a target by sending them
a sexy wink. For those 10 seconds, the target
monster will not attack you.
Success chance increases based on the
level gap between the user and the target.
If this skill is used on a player, it has low
chance of causing the Confusion/Chaos
status ailment.
This skill only works on Demi-Human, Angel
and Demon race monsters and, obviously,
does not work against Boss monsters.
The success chance of landing the effect on
a player is only 10%, much lower than the 70%
chance of the Bard's counterpart of this skill.

Comments: Chaos and Confusion are two
names for the same effect and can be used
interchangeably.
This effect causes the character to walk in
random directions while attempting to move
by clicking the terrain.
STR, INT, LUK the Level gap between the
source and the target help resist against the
effect. LUK has a very minor effect towards
reducing the duration of the effect.

nv_firstaid.name: First Aid
nv_firstaid.description:
First Aid
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Recovery
Target: Caster
Description: Uses 3 SP to restore 5 HP.

nv_trickdead.name: Play Dead
nv_trickdead.description:
Play Dead
Requirement: Finish Quest, Novice Only
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Feigns death to avoid the
menace of nearby enemies. The Play
Dead status is canceled by casting
this skill again.

Comments: This skill ceases to function after
jobchanging to any other class, including
Super Novice. Swordsman's Provoke and
Sage's Dispel can cancel the effect. All
monsters will be fooled, even Bosses and
MvPs.

nv_basic.name: Basic Skill
nv_basic.description:
Basic Skill
Max Level: 9
Enables the use of Basic Interface Skills.
[Lv 1]: Enables Trading
Allows the trading of items with other
character.
Right click on a character to initiate.
[Lv 2]: Enables Emotions
Alt+(0~9) and Ctrl+(1,-,=.)
Alt+L opens additional Emotion icons.
[Lv 3]: Enables Sitting
Sitting doubles HP and SP regeneration
speed.
Press the Insert key or type /sit.
[Lv 4]: Enables Chat Room Creation
Alt+C to open a Chat Room or click the
Chat button in the Basic Information
Window.
[Lv 5]: Join a Party
Character can join a party.
[Lv 6]: Enables Use of Kafra Storage
Allows use of Kafra Storage.
[Lv 7]: Organize a Party
Create a party by typing
/organize ''Party Name''
Set party options in the Party Window (Alt+Z).
[Lv 9]: Enables Change to First Job Class
Qualifies character for change from Novice
to one of the First classes.

sm_sword.name: Sword Mastery
sm_sword.description:
Sword Mastery
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases damage with
One-Handed Sword and Dagger class weapon.
[Lv 1]: Damage +4
[Lv 2]: Damage +8
[Lv 3]: Damage +12
[Lv 4]: Damage +16
[Lv 5]: Damage +20
[Lv 6]: Damage +24
[Lv 7]: Damage +28
[Lv 8]: Damage +32
[Lv 9]: Damage +36
[Lv 10]: Damage +40

Comments: Mastery skills only get added up
at the end of damage calculation. In most
situations, it only results in a flat addition of
damage.

sm_recovery.name: Increase HP Recovery
sm_recovery.description:
Increase HP Recovery
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Restores HP every
10 seconds while idle. MaxHP affects how much
HP is restored by this skill.
[Lv 1]: HP+5 +(0.2% of Max HP)
[Lv 2]: HP+10 +(0.4% of Max HP)
[Lv 3]: HP+15 +(0.6% of Max HP)
[Lv 4]: HP+20 +(0.8% of Max HP)
[Lv 5]: HP+25 +(1.0% of Max HP)
[Lv 6]: HP+30 +(1.2% of Max HP)
[Lv 7]: HP+35 +(1.4% of Max HP)
[Lv 8]: HP+40 +(1.6% of Max HP)
[Lv 9]: HP+45 +(1.8% of Max HP)
[Lv 10]: HP+50 +(2.0% of Max HP)

Comments: Every skill level also increases
the effectiveness of HP healing items by 10%.
The healing ticks occur so long as the player
does not walk to to another tile, even if the
player is standing and in combat. The healing
ticks will not occur if the player is overweight.
It's also possible to receive healing ticks
while teleporting, so long as the player does
not walk.

sm_bash.name: Bash
sm_bash.description:
Bash
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: HITs an enemy with crushing
force. If Fatal Blow skill is learned, Bash
will have an added Stun effect at
Level 6 and higher. Damage and HIT
are increased every level.
[Lv 1]: 130% damage, +5% HIT
[Lv 2]: 160% damage, +10% HIT
[Lv 3]: 190% damage, +15% HIT
[Lv 4]: 220% damage, +20% HIT
[Lv 5]: 250% damage, +25% HIT
[Lv 6]: 280% damage, +30% HIT
[Lv 7]: 310% damage, +35% HIT
[Lv 8]: 340% damage, +40% HIT
[Lv 9]: 370% damage, +45% HIT
[Lv 10]: 400% damage, +50% HIT

Comments: Costs 8 SP up to Lv 5, after
which it costs 15.
Damage skills unlocked after jobchanging to
your next job will outclass Bash, however this
skill will continue to be relevant as a means of
stunning enemies.
Wearing Bongun Card grants this skill a new
effect: Shoving back targets 5 cells. This effect
stacks.

sm_provoke.name: Provoke
sm_provoke.description:
Provoke
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: 1 Character
Description: Enrages a target, reducing
Defense by VIT on Player and physical
defense on Monster, while increasing it's
Attack Power. Can't be used on Undead
and Boss monsters.
[Lv 1]: Damage +5%, DEF -10%
[Lv 2]: Damage +8%, DEF -15%
[Lv 3]: Damage +11%, DEF -20%
[Lv 4]: Damage +14%, DEF -25%
[Lv 5]: Damage +17%, DEF -30%
[Lv 6]: Damage +20%, DEF -35%
[Lv 7]: Damage +23%, DEF -40%
[Lv 8]: Damage +26%, DEF -45%
[Lv 9]: Damage +29%, DEF -50%
[Lv 10]: Damage +32%, DEF -55%

Comments: Provoke reduces both Hard and
Soft Defense of monsters, but only the
Soft Defense of players. Provoking frozen
targets will unfreeze them. Provoke can also
be used to interrupt skills, so long as the skill
is interruptable in the first place
Provoke counts as a hit and will cause
Rude Teleportation on monsters that are stuck
and have the ability to do so. If the skill fails
continuously against a player, you can be sure
that the player is wearing Evil Druid Card.

sm_twohand.name: Two-Handed Sword Mastery
sm_twohand.description:
Two-Handed Sword Mastery
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Sword Mastery 1
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases damage with
Two-Handed Sword class weapon.
[Lv 1]: Damage +4
[Lv 2]: Damage +8
[Lv 3]: Damage +12
[Lv 4]: Damage +16
[Lv 5]: Damage +20
[Lv 6]: Damage +24
[Lv 7]: Damage +28
[Lv 8]: Damage +32
[Lv 9]: Damage +36
[Lv 10]: Damage +40

Comments: Mastery skills only get added up
at the end of damage calculation. In most
situations, it only results in a flat addition of
damage.

sm_magnum.name: Magnum Break
sm_magnum.description:
Magnum Break
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Bash 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: Enemies around the caster
Description: Drains a small amount of the
caster's HP to inflict Fire
elemental damage on 5x5 AoE around the
caster and push enemies 2 cells backward.
For 10 seconds after Magnum Break,
caster's weapon will receive 20% Fire
elemental attack enhancement.
[Lv 1]: 120% damage, 110% Accuracy Bonus
[Lv 2]: 140% damage, 120% Accuracy Bonus
[Lv 3]: 160% damage, 130% Accuracy Bonus
[Lv 4]: 180% damage, 140% Accuracy Bonus
[Lv 5]: 200% damage, 150% Accuracy Bonus
[Lv 6]: 220% damage, 160% Accuracy Bonus
[Lv 7]: 240% damage, 170% Accuracy Bonus
[Lv 8]: 260% damage, 180% Accuracy Bonus
[Lv 9]: 280% damage, 190% Accuracy Bonus
[Lv 10]: 300% damage, 200% Accuracy Bonus

Comments: Although the damage scaling on
Magnum Break might not be large, the SP cost
is the same on all levels.
The extra Fire Damage Bonus ignores DEF.

sm_endure.name: Endure
sm_endure.description:
Endure
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Provoke 5
Requirement: Provoke 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Removes attack and movement
delay that occurs when a character receives
damage. Disabled in War of Emperium
but still grants the MDEF bonus.
[Lv 1]: 10 sec, MDEF +1
[Lv 2]: 13 sec, MDEF +2
[Lv 3]: 16 sec, MDEF +3
[Lv 4]: 19 sec, MDEF +4
[Lv 5]: 22 sec, MDEF +5
[Lv 6]: 25 sec, MDEF +6
[Lv 7]: 28 sec, MDEF +7
[Lv 8]: 31 sec, MDEF +8
[Lv 9]: 34 sec, MDEF +9
[Lv 10]: 37 sec, MDEF +10

Comments: What Endure does exactly is
preventing your character from displaying
flinching animations when taking hits. It is
extremely useful when doing any sort of
tanking, or handling a large number of
enemies.

kn_twohandquicken.name: Twohand Quicken
kn_twohandquicken.description:
Two-Hand Quicken
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Two-Handed Sword Mastery 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Temporarily increases Attack
Speed for the duration of skill.
Requires Two-handed Sword.
[Lv 1]: 30 sec duration
[Lv 2]: 60 sec duration
[Lv 3]: 90 sec duration
[Lv 4]: 120 sec duration
[Lv 5]: 150 sec duration
[Lv 6]: 180 sec duration
[Lv 7]: 210 sec duration
[Lv 8]: 240 sec duration
[Lv 9]: 270 sec duration
[Lv 10]: 300 sec duration

kn_autocounter.name: Counter Attack
kn_autocounter.description:
Auto Counter
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Two-Handed Sword Mastery 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: After receiving melee damage
from an enemy, automatically retaliate with
a mighty critical attack.
[Lv 1]: 0.4 sec duration
[Lv 2]: 0.8 sec duration
[Lv 3]: 1.2 sec duration
[Lv 4]: 1.6 sec duration
[Lv 5]: 2.0 sec duration

Comments: Auto Counter will completely
negate attacks and then immediate counter
with a critical against the enemy. The Knight
must be facing the enemy or the counter will
not work. Does not work with skills, only
normal attacks. Counters work against
Bosses, therefore it's a good skill to use while
tanking. Players can spin in place by using
/bingbing and /bangbang commands, which
will help you face the right direction.

kn_riding.name: Peco Peco Riding
kn_riding.description:
Peco Peco Ride
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Endure 1
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Enables riding of Peco Peco.

kn_spearmastery.name: Spear Mastery
kn_spearmastery.description:
Spear Mastery
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases Spear class
weapon damage. When riding a Pecopeco,
the bonus damage increased by 1 per level.
[Lv 1]: Damage +4
[Lv 2]: Damage +8
[Lv 3]: Damage +12
[Lv 4]: Damage +16
[Lv 5]: Damage +20
[Lv 6]: Damage +24
[Lv 7]: Damage +28
[Lv 8]: Damage +32
[Lv 9]: Damage +36
[Lv 10]: Damage +40

Comments: Mastery skills only get added up
at the end of damage calculation. In most
situations, it only results in a flat addition of
damage.

kn_bowlingbash.name: Bowling Bash
kn_bowlingbash.description:
Bowling Bash
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Bash 10, Magnum Break 3,n Two-Handed Sword Mastery 5,n Two-Hand, Quicken 10, Auto Counter 5
4190Requirement: Auto Counter 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: Strikes an enemy with massive
force, causing it to tumble away and damage
other enemies that happen to be in its path.
[Lv 1]: 140% damage
[Lv 2]: 180% damage
[Lv 3]: 220% damage
[Lv 4]: 260% damage
[Lv 5]: 300% damage
[Lv 6]: 340% damage
[Lv 7]: 380% damage
[Lv 8]: 420% damage
[Lv 9]: 460% damage
[Lv 10]: 500% damage

Comments: Possibly one of the best AoE skills
in the game. Enemies are hit twice and
pushed back, hitting other enemies which all
get hit twice as well.
Bowling Bash has a very particular glitch in
which the skill does not function correctly
while standing on cells that are divisible by 40,
or the 2 cells adjacent to those. This effect is
commonly referred to by players as
'Gutterflines', which is an imaginary grid on the
map where the skill will not work.
Some servers will sometimes 'fix' this bug by
changing the way it functions slightly, making it
less authentic to the original game but without
the glitch.
Similar to Brandish Spear, this skill has an
invisible cast time before the skill will activate.

kn_cavaliermastery.name: Cavalier Mastery
kn_cavaliermastery.description:
Cavalry Mastery
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Peco Peco Ride 1
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases Attack Speed
while mounted on a Pecopeco. Mastering
this skill raises the Attack Speed so that
the penalty while mounted on a Pecopeco
is fully nullified.
[Lv 1]: 40% penalty
[Lv 2]: 30% penalty
[Lv 3]: 20% penalty
[Lv 4]: 10% penalty
[Lv 5]: 0% penalty

kn_pierce.name: Pierce
kn_pierce.description:
Pierce
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Spear Mastery 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: Attacks an enemy by using a
thrusting stab with a number of additional
hits that depend on the monster's size.
Requires Spear class weapon.
Small Monsters: 1 hit
Medium Monsters: 2 hits
Large Monsters: 3 hits
[Lv 1]: 110% damage, +5% Accuracy
[Lv 2]: 120% damage, +10% Accuracy
[Lv 3]: 130% damage, +15% Accuracy
[Lv 4]: 140% damage, +20% Accuracy
[Lv 5]: 150% damage, +25% Accuracy
[Lv 6]: 160% damage, +30% Accuracy
[Lv 7]: 170% damage, +35% Accuracy
[Lv 8]: 180% damage, +40% Accuracy
[Lv 9]: 190% damage, +45% Accuracy
[Lv 10]: 200% damage, +50% Accuracy

Comments: Against Medium sized targets it
will deal about the same damage as Bash for
half of the SP cost, and against Large-sized
targets it does much more damage than
a Bash.

kn_spearboomerang.name: Spear Boomerang
kn_spearboomerang.description:
Spear Boomerang
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Pierce 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Ranged
Target: 1 Character
Description: Attacks an enemy from a distance
by hurling a spear.
Requires Spear class weapon.
[Lv 1]: 150% damage
[Lv 2]: 200% damage
[Lv 3]: 250% damage
[Lv 4]: 300% damage
[Lv 5]: 350% damage

Comments: This is the longest range skill that
a Knight has access. The damage is good
but the 10 SP cost per use will quickly deplete
a Knight's meager SP pool.

kn_spearstab.name: Spear Stab
kn_spearstab.description:
Spear Stab
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Pierce 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Ranged
Target: 1 Character
Description: Attacks an enemy with a forceful
spear stab that will knock it back.
Requires Spear class weapon.
[Lv 1]: 120% damage
[Lv 2]: 140% damage
[Lv 3]: 160% damage
[Lv 4]: 180% damage
[Lv 5]: 200% damage
[Lv 6]: 220% damage
[Lv 7]: 240% damage
[Lv 8]: 260% damage
[Lv 9]: 280% damage
[Lv 10]: 300% damage

Comments: Spear Stab is technically an
AoE Splash damage skill that will damage
every monster in a line between the player and
the target. Knights however have access to
better mobbing skills and Spear Stab is
instead used for its pushback property.

kn_brandishspear.name: Brandish Spear
kn_brandishspear.description:
Brandish Spear
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Peco Peco Ride 1, Spear Stab 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Ranged
Target: 1 Character
Description: A powerful lancing strike made
while riding. Can only be performed while
mounted on a Pecopeco.
Requires Spear class weapon.
[Lv 1]: 120% damage, 1 cell splash
[Lv 2]: 140% damage, 1 cell splash
[Lv 3]: 160% damage, 1 cell splash
[Lv 4]: 180% damage, 2 cell splash
[Lv 5]: 200% damage, 2 cell splash
[Lv 6]: 220% damage, 2 cell splash
[Lv 7]: 240% damage, 3 cell splash
[Lv 8]: 260% damage, 3 cell splash
[Lv 9]: 280% damage, 3 cell splash
[Lv 10]: 300% damage, 4 cell splash

Comments: This is an AoE spear attack that
hits enemies in a 180 degrees circle in front of
the Knight. Targets are knocked back. This
skill has an invisible cast time similar to
Bowling Bash.

lk_berserk.name: Frenzy
lk_berserk.description:
Berserk
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Lord Knight Over Job Level 50
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: It triples your MaxHP and recovers
it (to the now tripled maximum), doubles your
Attack Power, increases your ASPD by 30%,
Increases your Movement Speed (does not
stack with other increase except Peco Peco),
gives the Endure effect at no further cost but
halves your FLEE rate and sets all DEF and
MDEF to 0 for the skill's duration.
It also drains 5% of your current HP every 15
seconds. You cannot chat (chat mute), change
equips, use any items or receive heals while
this skill is in effect.
You do not regain HP and SP naturally for 5
minutes after the skill ends (you can be
healed or use items though). The Skill
cancels out if your HP drops to 100 or below.

Comments: The bonus damage granted
by Berserk is actually a +100% ATK increase.
For normal attacks this results in double
damage, but if you auto-cast any skills, it will
not actually cause them to do twice as much.
The +30% ASPD stacks with Two-Hand
Quicken. Using both skills and a Berserk
Potion will allow the user to achieve 190 ASPD
with very small AGI investments.
Going back to Character Selection and
relogging into the game will cancel the skill.
The same can be done to bypass the 5
minute period in which HP/SP would not be
recovered.
While the user cannot be healed using normal
Acolyte class methods(such as Heal or
Sanctuary) or by HP Potion Pitcher, they can
still recover HP and SP using recovery gear
such as Earth/Sky Deleter, Hunter Fly or Sniper
Card.
SP Recovery methods such as Lv5 Potion
Pitcher and Soul Change can be performed
on Berserked characters normally.

lk_tensionrelax.name: Relax
lk_tensionrelax.description:
Tension Relax
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Provoke 5,
Increase HP Recovery 10, Endure 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Recovery
Target: Caster
Description: Triples your HP recovery speed
when sitting. This skill cancels out immediately
if you stand up, use items, change equip or
are hit by somebody else.

Comments: If the user is below 50% Weight,
it will cause the ticks from Increase HP
Recovery skill to occur 3x faster.
If the user is above 50% Weight but under
90% Weight, you will be able to recover HP/SP
normally and the recovery ticks will happen
at the normal interval.
At over 90% Weight capacity, nothing happens.

lk_parrying.name: Parrying
lk_parrying.description:
Parry
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Provoke 5,
Two-Handed Sword Mastery 10,
Two-Hand Quicken 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Blocks damage from physical
attacks using your Two-Handed Sword. When
successfully blocking an attack, the user will
be forced to stop for a short moment.
Requires Two Handed Sword.
[Lv 1]: 5% block chance
[Lv 2]: 10% block chance
[Lv 3]: 15% block chance
[Lv 4]: 20% block chance
[Lv 5]: 25% block chance
[Lv 6]: 30% block chance
[Lv 7]: 35% block chance
[Lv 8]: 40% block chance
[Lv 9]: 45% block chance
[Lv 10]: 50% block chance

Comments: Has the same blocking properties
as Crusader's Auto Guard.

lk_aurablade.name: Aura Blade
lk_aurablade.description:
Aura Blade
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Bash 5, Magnum Break 5,
Two Handed Sword Mastery 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Enchants equipped weapon with
an aura that will grant additional damage.
Switching weapons cancels the effect.
[Lv 1]: Damage +20
[Lv 2]: Damage +40
[Lv 3]: Damage +60
[Lv 4]: Damage +80
[Lv 5]: Damage +100

Comments: Aura Blade's bonus damage
has properties very similar to those of
Weapon Mastery skills.
Spiral Pierce is not affected by this skill's
bonus damage, but +% damage cards do
increase it.

lk_concentration.name: Concentration
lk_concentration.description:
Concentration
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Increase HP Recovery 5,
Spear Mastery 5, Riding 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: When activated, this skill endows
the caster with the Endure effect and
increased ATK and HIT, but will also
temporarily reduces caster's Defense.
[Lv 1]: HIT +10, ATK +5%, DEF -5%
[Lv 2]: HIT +20, ATK +10%, DEF -10%
[Lv 3]: HIT +30, ATK +15%, DEF -15%
[Lv 4]: HIT +40, ATK +20%, DEF -20%
[Lv 5]: HIT +50, ATK +25%, DEF -25%

Comments: Both Hard and Soft DEF are
reduced while the skill is active.
The Endure effect given by this skill is Lv1,
meaning that it will also grant +1 MDEF.
Furthermore, the Endure effect granted by
Concentration has the a max hit limit, same as
normal Endure. It's possible for the Endure
effect to end before Concentration's effect
does. If this happens, the +1 MDEF effect
will also disappear.

lk_headcrush.name: Traumatic Blow
lk_headcrush.description:
Head Crush
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Spear Mastery 9, Riding 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: Brutally strikes an enemy with the
chance of causing the Bleeding status. This
status effect not only drains HP, it also prevents
targets from recovering SP.
[Lv 1]: 140% damage
[Lv 2]: 180% damage
[Lv 3]: 220% damage
[Lv 4]: 260% damage
[Lv 5]: 300% damage

Comments: Skill will fail against Bosses.
Non-boss Demon and Undead will receive
damage but never the Bleeding effect, since
these two are naturally immune to it.

lk_spiralpierce.name: Spiral Pierce
lk_spiralpierce.description:
Spiral Pierce
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Spear Mastery 5, Pierce 5,
Riding 1, Spear Stab 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Ranged
Target: 1 Character
Description: Hits an enemy with spiraling
strikes that immobilize it for a moment and
inflict an amount of damage determined by
Skill Level and the weight of the equipped
Spear.
This skill's level also affects its cast time and
delay.
Requires Spear class weapon.
[Lv 1]: 150% factor x5 hits, 0.3 sec Cast Time,
1.2 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 2]: 200% factor x5 hits, 0.5 sec Cast Time,
1.4 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 3]: 250% factor x5 hits, 0.7 sec Cast Time,
1.6 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 4]: 300% factor x5 hits, 0.9 sec Cast Time,
1.8 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 5]: 350% factor x5 hits, 1.0 sec Cast Time,
2.0 sec After Cast Delay

Comments: This skill uses your weapon's
weight to calculate damage, not your ATK.
The Base ATK for calculating Spiral Pierce is
80% of the Spear's weight, multiplied by the
factor listed above. It is further incremented
by STR and the weapon's refine rate, although
both of those have only a minor effect on the
damage output.
This skill has its own unique size modifiers.
Deals 125% damage to Small, 100% to
Medium and 75% to Large.
Since ATK is ignored, using flat +ATK gear
does not help Spiral Pierce. However, using
+% damage cards will work.
This skill completely ignores enemy DEF and
follows weapon element.
The stopping power of Spiral Pierce is about
one second long.
Because the Cast Time and After Cast Delay
are so long, Spiral Pierce will greatly benefit
from receiving Poem of Bragi support.
The heaviest and best Spear available in the
vanilla game is Pole Axe, which was
eventually surpassed by Hunting Spear and
later, the Cardo.

lk_jointbeat.name: Vital Strike
lk_jointbeat.description:
Joint Beat
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Spear Mastery 9,
Riding 1, Cavalry Mastery 3, Head Crush 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Ranged
Target: 1 Character
Description: Strikes an enemy's vital point to
cause various abnormal statuses.
This skill's level affects the Damage and the
success rate of causing effects.
Requires Spear class weapon.
[Lv 1]: 60% ATK, Base Chance 10%,
0.8 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 2]: 70% ATK, Base Chance 15%,
0.8 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 3]: 80% ATK, Base Chance 20%,
0.8 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 4]: 90% ATK, Base Chance 25%,
0.8 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 5]: 100% ATK, Base Chance 30%,
0.8 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 6]: 110% ATK, Base Chance 35%,
1.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 7]: 120% ATK, Base Chance 40%,
1.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 8]: 130% ATK, Base Chance 45%,
1.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 9]: 140% ATK, Base Chance 50%,
1.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 10]: 150% ATK, Base Chance 55%,
1.0 sec After Cast Delay
Waist Break: -25% ATK and -25% Soft DEF
Shoulder Break: -50% Soft DEF
Ankle Break: -50% Movement Speed
Knee Break: -30% Move Speed, -10% ASPD
Wrist Break: -25% ASPD
Neck Break: Bleeding, take 2x damage from
this skill

Comments: Each hit of Joint Beat can only
cause one of the 6 ailments. It is possible for
a target to be inflicted with multiple Breaks by
continuously using the skill against them.
There is no visual way to determine success
or which debuff was applied. However, since
the Movement Speed and ASPD penalties are
very significant, you should be able to confirm
it as soon as the target moves or attacks.
Every time you land a Break other than Neck,
the duration timer for all other breaks goes
back to full(default is 30 seconds and reduced
by AGI and LUK). However, if the target
received Neck Break, he will not receive any
more Break effects or refresh the duration
until it has expired.
The 2x Damage from Break Neck is only for
this skill, it doesn't make them receive 2x
Damage from anything else.
Every point of STR the target has will reduce
the success chance by 0.27%, and they will
become immune at 204 STR.

kn_chargeatk.name: Charge Attack
kn_chargeatk.description:
Charge Attack
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: Charge at the single enemy that's
away from you at range immediately.
Further the enemy is from you, higher your
damage will be, but also increase your casting
time of this skill.

Comments: Damage is 100% ATK for every
3 cells of distance. The user will move to the
cell adjacent to the target, while the target will
be pushed back in the same direction. The
distance which the target is moved is equal
to the distance the knight moved plus 1 cell.

kn_onehand.name: Onehand Quicken
kn_onehand.description:
One-Hand Quicken
Requirement: Two Hand Quicken 10,
Spirit State
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Increases Attack Speed when
using a One-Handed Sword class weapons.
Activating this skill cancels the effect of any
Potions that have a similar effect, but it is
possible to use these Potions after One Hand
Quicken has been cast.
Unequipping the Sword will cancel
this skill's effect.

Comments: Has the same ASPD boost of
a Lv10 Two-Hand Quicken.
In order to use this, you must have mastered
Two-Hand Quicken and be Soul Linked.

nv_firstaid.name: First Aid
nv_firstaid.description:
First Aid
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Recovery
Target: Caster
Description: Uses 3 SP to restore 5 HP.

nv_trickdead.name: Play Dead
nv_trickdead.description:
Play Dead
Requirement: Finish Quest, Novice Only
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Feigns death to avoid the
menace of nearby enemies. The Play
Dead status is canceled by casting
this skill again.

Comments: This skill ceases to function after
jobchanging to any other class, including
Super Novice. Swordsman's Provoke and
Sage's Dispel can cancel the effect. All
monsters will be fooled, even Bosses and
MvPs.

sm_autoberserk.name: Auto Berserk
sm_autoberserk.description:
Auto Berserk
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active (Toggle)
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Empowered by rage,
character enters a condition that is
equivalent to Level 10 Provoke status
when HP is reduced to less than 25% of
MaxHP. Provoked status lasts until
character HP is restored to more than
25% of MaxHP or if Provoke effect is
nullified.

sm_fatalblow.name: Fatal Blow
sm_fatalblow.description:
Fatal Blow
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Inflicts Stun status on
target when using Level 6 Bash or
higher. The chance of inflicting Stun
increases with Bash skill level and
Base Level of the caster.

sm_movingrecovery.name: Moving HP-Recovery
sm_movingrecovery.description:
Moving HP Recovery
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Enables natural regen of
HP while moving. Only 25% of the HP that
is recovered while standing is restored
during movement. The Increase
HP Recovery skill does not affect Moving
HP Recovery.

nv_basic.name: Basic Skill
nv_basic.description:
Basic Skill
Max Level: 9
Enables the use of Basic Interface Skills.
[Lv 1]: Enables Trading
Allows the trading of items with other
character.
Right click on a character to initiate.
[Lv 2]: Enables Emotions
Alt+(0~9) and Ctrl+(1,-,=.)
Alt+L opens additional Emotion icons.
[Lv 3]: Enables Sitting
Sitting doubles HP and SP regeneration
speed.
Press the Insert key or type /sit.
[Lv 4]: Enables Chat Room Creation
Alt+C to open a Chat Room or click the
Chat button in the Basic Information
Window.
[Lv 5]: Join a Party
Character can join a party.
[Lv 6]: Enables Use of Kafra Storage
Allows use of Kafra Storage.
[Lv 7]: Organize a Party
Create a party by typing
/organize ''Party Name''
Set party options in the Party Window (Alt+Z).
[Lv 9]: Enables Change to First Job Class
Qualifies character for change from Novice
to one of the First classes.

al_ruwach.name: Ruwach
al_ruwach.description:
Ruwach
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Uses 10 SP to summon Holy
Spirit that will detect hidden
characters in 5x5 cells area around the
caster for 10 sec. If target is enemy,
this skill will inflict Holy elemental
magic damage that equal to 145% MATK.

Comments: Because the skill deals damage,
revealing an enemy may cause a short
animation lock.

al_heal.name: Heal
al_heal.description:
Heal
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Faith 10, Demon Bane 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Recovery
Target: 1 Character
Description: Restores target's HP.
Skill level, caster's Base Level and
total INT affect the amount of HP
restored.

Comments: This is the most basic healing
skill in the game. Using lower levels of Heal is
an effective way of not squandering your SP.
You can shortcut several levels of Heal to your
keyboard, or use the scrolling wheel.
Using Heal on undead enemies is commonly
refeered to as 'Heal Bombing' and in order to
do so, you must either hold the shift key, or
use the /ns command.

al_holywater.name: Aqua Benedicta
al_holywater.description:
Aqua Benedicta
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Crafting
Target: Caster
Description: Creates Holy Water with
1 Empty Bottle while standing in water.

Comments: The skill will only work when used
on a water tile. The underwater segments of
Byalan Dungeon are NOT water tiles. Similar
to other skills that require water tiles, they can
also be used on top of a Sage's Deluge, or a
Ninja's Water Evasion.

al_dp.name: Divine Protection
al_dp.description:
Divine Protection
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Cure 1
Description: Reduces damage taken from
Demon and Undead monsters. Character's
Level affects the damage reduction. Damage
reduction is added after final damage
is calculated.
[Lv 1]: DEF +3
[Lv 2]: DEF +6
[Lv 3]: DEF +9
[Lv 4]: DEF +12
[Lv 5]: DEF +15
[Lv 6]: DEF +18
[Lv 7]: DEF +21
[Lv 8]: DEF +24
[Lv 9]: DEF +27
[Lv 10]: DEF +30

Comments: This defense works like Soft DEF,
it's a flat reduction of the final damage.
Reductions of this level are normally
insignificant except in the case of a Monk
taking hits during Steel Body.
Players planning to jobchange into Monks
must max this skill to unlock the basic Monk
skill.

al_teleport.name: Teleport
al_teleport.description:
Teleport
Max Level: 2
Requirement: Ruwach 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Teleports caster to another area.
[Lv 1]: Teleport to a random cell
[Lv 2]: Teleport to save point

Comments: Most servers allow players to
bypass the menu when using Teleport Lv 1.
Teleporting around a map is the most efficient
way of traversing large distances or seeking
dispersed enemies. Creamy Card allows
any character to learn Lv 1 of this skill.

al_cure.name: Cure
al_cure.description:
Cure
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Heal 2
Requirement: Faith 5
Requirement: Heal 2
Skill Form: Recovery
Description: Cures target from Silence,
Confusion and Blind status effects. When used
on Undead monster, this skill will inflicts
Confusion status.

Comments: You cannot cure Silence on
yourself since you cannot cast in the first
place. The Priest skill Status Recovery covers
most of the rest of common status effects.

al_incagi.name: Increase AGI
al_incagi.description:
Increase Agility
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Heal 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Increases targeted
character's Movement and Attack Speed
for the duration of skill. Drains 15
HP from the caster after each cast
and will fail if the caster has less than 16 HP.
The increase is 2 +1 extra for every skill level.
Duration: 40 sec +20 extra for each skill level.

Comments: The increase in movement speed
is very significant.

al_blessing.name: Blessing
al_blessing.description:
Blessing
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Divine Protection 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Temporarily increases STR, DEX
and INT of the target and removes Curse and
Stone Curse effect(only on second stage). The
bonus is 1 point of STR, DEX and INT
respectively per skill level. Duration is
40 seconds +20 extra for each skill level.

Comments: When used to cure Curse status,
the target will not receive the buff. The skill can
be used offensively against Undead and
Demon monsters by holding shift, or using /ns
command. Players cannot be
offensively Blessed.

al_demonbane.name: Demon Bane
al_demonbane.description:
Demon Bane
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Divine Protection 3
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases damage
against Demon and Undead monsters.
Base Level affects damage bonus.
Damage increased by this skill is added
after final damage is calculated.
[Lv 1]: Damage +3
[Lv 2]: Damage +6
[Lv 3]: Damage +9
[Lv 4]: Damage +12
[Lv 5]: Damage +15
[Lv 6]: Damage +18
[Lv 7]: Damage +21
[Lv 8]: Damage +24
[Lv 9]: Damage +27
[Lv 10]: Damage +30

Comments: The bonus from this skill is similar
to Weapon Masteries, in which they only offers
a flat increase at the end of damage
calculation. Players planning to jobchange
into Monks must max this skill to unlock the
basic Monk skill.

al_angelus.name: Angelus
al_angelus.description:
Angelus
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Divine Protection 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster and Party Members
Description: Temporarily increases
Defense of yourself and party members on
screen for the duration of skill.
[Lv 1]: DEF +5%
[Lv 2]: DEF +10%
[Lv 3]: DEF +15%
[Lv 4]: DEF +20%
[Lv 5]: DEF +25%
[Lv 6]: DEF +30%
[Lv 7]: DEF +35%
[Lv 8]: DEF +40%
[Lv 9]: DEF +45%
[Lv 10]: DEF +50%

Comments: Soft Defense is obtained almost
exclusively from investment into VIT, and thus
only characters with significant amounts of
VIT will reap any benefits from this skill.

al_warp.name: Warp Portal
al_warp.description:
Warp Portal
Max Level: 4
Requirement: Teleport 2
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Ground
Description: Creates a Warp Portal that
will teleport those who enter it to
another area. Each Warp Portal can
teleport up to 8 people.
Consumes 1 Blue Gemstone.
[Lv 1]: Warp to Save Point
[Lv 2]: Enable 1 Memo point
[Lv 3]: Enable 2 Memo points
[Lv 4]: Enable 3 Memo points
[Memo Point]: Specific map area memorized
as a destination for a Warp Portal.
Type/memo in a target area to set
location as a Memo Point.

Comments: Indoor locations and Dungeon
floors cannot be memorized. Most servers will
block the ability to /memo on field maps that
contain MvPs or Boss monsters.

al_decagi.name: Decrease AGI
al_decagi.description:
Decrease Agility
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Increase Agility 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: 1 Character
Description: Reduces target's Movement
Speed and AGI stat for the skill's duration.
[Lv 1]: AGI -3, 42% success,
lasts 30(monster) or 20(player) sec
[Lv 2]: AGI -4, 44% success,
lasts 40(monster) or 25(player) sec
[Lv 3]: AGI -5, 46% success,
lasts 50(monster) or 30(player) sec
[Lv 4]: AGI -6, 48% success,
lasts 60(monster) or 35(player) sec
[Lv 5]: AGI -7, 50% success,
lasts 70(monster) or 40(player) sec
[Lv 6]: AGI -8, 52% success,
lasts 80(monster) or 45(player) sec
[Lv 7]: AGI -9, 54% success,
lasts 90(monster) or 50(player) sec
[Lv 8]: AGI -10, 56% success,
lasts 100(monster) or 55(player) sec
[Lv 9]: AGI -11, 58% success,
lasts 110(monster) or 60(player) sec
[Lv 10]: AGI -12, 60% success,
lasts 120(monster) or 65(player) sec

Comments: This skill is a reverse
Increase Agility, to be used against enemies.
Both skills cancel each other.

al_crucis.name: Signum Crucis
al_crucis.description:
Signum Crucis
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Demon Bane 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: Caster's View Range
Description: Reduces physical defense of
Undead elemental and Demon monsters in
the caster's vicinity.
[Lv 1]: DEF Reduction 14%,
27% success chance
[Lv 2]: DEF Reduction 18%,
31% success chance
[Lv 3]: DEF Reduction 22%,
35% success chance
[Lv 4]: DEF Reduction 26%,
39% success chance
[Lv 5]: DEF Reduction 30%,
43% success chance
[Lv 6]: DEF Reduction 34%,
47% success chance
[Lv 7]: DEF Reduction 38%,
51% success chance
[Lv 8]: DEF Reduction 42%,
55% success chance
[Lv 9]: DEF Reduction 46%,
59% success chance
[Lv 10]: DEF Reduction 50%,
63% success chance

Comments: One of the few debuffs that works
on Bosses and MvPs, shredding their Hard
DEF. Another useful aspect of this skill is that
it affects every enemy on screen, even
non-Demon/Undead. In a party, you can use
Signum Crucis to 'tap' all monsters on screen,
increasing the EXP wield.
A monster successfully affected will use
the /swt emote.

al_pneuma.name: Pneuma
al_pneuma.description:
Pneuma
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Warp Portal 4
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Ground
Description: Uses 10 SP to create
barrier in 3x3 cells around targeted
cell that for 10 sec will protect
anyone inside it from long range
physical attacks.

Comments: Pneuma is an almost absolute
defense against any ranged damage. This skill
is vital for supporting parties, in particular
against Bosses and MvPs.
Pneuma cannot be cast to overlap an existing
Pneuma or Safety Wall. Pneumas will inhibit
enemies from positioning Safety Walls.
Furthermore, Pneumas will block ranged
damage, but targets can still be affected by an
attack's other effects, such as being
Stunned or Frozen.

pr_kyrie.name: Kyrie Eleison
pr_kyrie.description:
Kyrie Eleison
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Angelus 2
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Creates a perfect barrier
around a character that will be able to
withstand a certain number of hits,
before it breaks, for 120 seconds. The barrier
strength and number of hits is affected
by the skill's level. The Holy Light skill
immediately cancels this skill.
[Lv 1]: 12% of MaxHP, block 5 attacks
[Lv 2]: 14% of MaxHP, block 6 attacks
[Lv 3]: 16% of MaxHP, block 6 attacks
[Lv 4]: 18% of MaxHP, block 7 attacks
[Lv 5]: 20% of MaxHP, block 7 attacks
[Lv 6]: 22% of MaxHP, block 8 attacks
[Lv 7]: 24% of MaxHP, block 8 attacks
[Lv 8]: 26% of MaxHP, block 9 attacks
[Lv 9]: 28% of MaxHP, block 9 attacks
[Lv 10]: 30% of MaxHP, block 10 attacks

Comments: The barrier will end if the
maximum amount of attacks was reached,
even if the total damage didn't add up to the
barrier's health. Assumptio and Kyrie cancel
each other. In PvP scenarios, you can cast
Lv1 Kyrie on an Enemy with Assumptio to
remove it from him.

pr_magnificat.name: Magnificat
pr_magnificat.description:
Magnificat
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster and Party Members
Description: Doubles the caster and
party's SP regen for the duration of the skill.
[Lv 1]: 30 Seconds
[Lv 2]: 45 Seconds
[Lv 3]: 60 Seconds
[Lv 4]: 75 Seconds
[Lv 5]: 90 Seconds

Comments: Extra levels of this skill do not
make the effect better, but instead increase the
duration of the buff. Doubling HP/SP Recovery
has a great impact in large parties.

pr_strecovery.name: Status Recovery
pr_strecovery.description:
Status Recovery
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Recovery
Description: Cancels abnormal status effects
such as Stun, Frozen or Stone Curse.
Causes Blind effect on the Undead.

Comments: Casting the skill on an attacking
monster will cause it to change targets. If the
monster was originally passive, it will stop
attacking.

mg_srecovery.name: Increase SP Recovery
mg_srecovery.description:
Increase SP Recovery
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Restores SP every 10
seconds while idle. MaxSP affects how much
SP is restored by this skill.
[Lv 1]: SP+3 +(0.2% of Max SP)
[Lv 2]: SP+6 +(0.4% of Max SP)
[Lv 3]: SP+9 +(0.6% of Max SP)
[Lv 4]: SP+12 +(0.8% of Max SP)
[Lv 5]: SP+15 +(1.0% of Max SP)
[Lv 6]: SP+18 +(1.2% of Max SP)
[Lv 7]: SP+21 +(1.4% of Max SP)
[Lv 8]: SP+24 +(1.6% of Max SP)
[Lv 9]: SP+27 +(1.8% of Max SP)
[Lv 10]: SP+30 +(2.0% of Max SP)

Comments: Every skill level also increases
the effectiveness of SP healing items by 10%.
The healing ticks occur so long as the player
does not walk to to another tile, even if the
player is standing and in combat. The healing
ticks will not occur if the player is overweight.
It's also possible to receive healing ticks
while teleporting, so long as the player does
not walk.

pr_lexdivina.name: Lex Divina
pr_lexdivina.description:
Lex Divina
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Ruwach 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: 1 Character
Description: Silences an enemy, temporarily
disabling its use of skills, for a set duration.
[Lv 1]: 30 Seconds
[Lv 2]: 35 Seconds
[Lv 3]: 40 Seconds
[Lv 4]: 45 Seconds
[Lv 5]: 50 Seconds
[Lv 6~10]: 60 Seconds

Comments: Similar to Mage's Stone Curse,
using it on an enemy already affected will undo
the effect. Therefore, do not spam this on a
single enemy. Can be used on party member
by holding Shift.
Skill levels above 5 reduce the SP cost.

pr_impositio.name: Impositio Manus
pr_impositio.description:
Impositio Manus
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Blesses a targeted player by
increasing the weapon damage of that
character for 1 minute.
[Lv 1]: Damage +5
[Lv 2]: Damage +10
[Lv 3]: Damage +15
[Lv 4]: Damage +20
[Lv 5]: Damage +25

Comments: Lower levels will overwrite
higher levels.

pr_sanctuary.name: Sanctuary
pr_sanctuary.description:
Sanctuary
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Heal 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Recovery
Target: Ground
Description: Creates a Holy area on the
ground that will provide continuous HP
restoration for the skill's duration.
Consumes 1 Blue Gemstone.
[Lv 1]: 4 seconds, 4 targets, 100 HP Heal
[Lv 2]: 7 seconds, 5 targets, 200 HP Heal
[Lv 3]: 10 seconds, 6 targets, 300 HP Heal
[Lv 4]: 13 seconds, 7 targets, 400 HP Heal
[Lv 5]: 16 seconds, 8 targets, 500 HP Heal
[Lv 6]: 19 seconds, 9 targets, 600 HP Heal
[Lv 7]: 22 seconds, 10 targets, 777 HP Heal
[Lv 8]: 25 seconds, 11 targets, 777 HP Heal
[Lv 9]: 28 seconds, 12 targets, 777 HP Heal
[Lv 10]: 29 seconds, 13 targets, 777 HP Heal

Comments: Undead and Demon monsters
that attempt to walk into the Sanctuary will be
damaged and pushed back. Sanctuary is
capable of healing Emperiums during
War of Emperium.

pr_gloria.name: Gloria
pr_gloria.description:
Gloria
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Kyrie Eleison 4, Magnificat 3
4190Requirement: Sanctuary 7
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster and Party Members
Description: Adds 30 LUK to the caster and
party members for the duration of the skill.
[Lv 1]: 10 Seconds
[Lv 2]: 15 Seconds
[Lv 3]: 20 Seconds
[Lv 4]: 25 Seconds
[Lv 5]: 30 Seconds

Comments: Extra levels of this do not make
the effect better, but instead increase the
duration of the Buff. The main purpose of this
skill is to improve the stats of Blacksmiths and
Alchemists during crafting.
Also useful for improving your own LUK
when using Turn Undead.

pr_slowpoison.name: Slow Poison
pr_slowpoison.description:
Slow Poison
Max Level: 4
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Slows the effect of Poison
on a character that is affected by
Poison status.
[Lv 1]: 10 seconds
[Lv 2]: 20 seconds
[Lv 3]: 30 seconds
[Lv 4]: 40 seconds

Comments: This skill prevents the HP Drain
from being poisoned, without actually removing
the Poison or stopping its other effects.
The only skill that can cure Poison status is
Thief's Detoxify, which can be obtained
with a Poporing Card.

all_resurrection.name: Resurrection
all_resurrection.description:
Resurrection
Max Level: 4
Requirement: Increase SP Recovery 4,
Status Recovery 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Recovery
Target: 1 Character
Description: Revives KO'ed character.
When used on Undead element monsters, it
has a chance to instantly kill or at least
damage in the same way as Turn Undead
at the same level.
Consumes 1 Blue Gemstone.
[Lv 1]: Revive at 10% HP, 6 sec Cast Time,
0 sec After Delay
[Lv 2]: Revive at 30% HP, 4 sec Cast Time,
1 sec After Delay
[Lv 3]: Revive at 50% HP, 2 sec Cast Time,
2 sec After Delay
[Lv 4]: Revive at 80% HP, 0 sec Cast Time,
3 sec After Delay

Comments: Any player can cast this skill
using Yggdrasil Leaf, and when used that way
doesn't require the gemstone.

pr_lexaeterna.name: Lex Aeterna
pr_lexaeterna.description:
Lex Aeterna
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Lex Divina 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: 1 Character
Description: Weakens an enemy so that it will
receive twice as much damage from the next
attack that hits it. Ineffective against enemies
afflicted by the Frozen or Stone Curse status.

Comments: If an attack does multiple
independent hits(such as Wizard's Water Ball),
it will only affect the first one. However, if the
attack is a single calculation with divided hits
such as Spiral Pierce), it will affect all hits.
Lex will be consumed even if the damage was
nullified by Guard, Parry or Kaupe.

pr_suffragium.name: Suffragium
pr_suffragium.description:
Suffragium
Max Level: 3
Requirement: Impositio Manus 2
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: This invocation can only be used
on others and will not work on caster.
Reduces cast time of a skill for a single cast.
[Lv 1]: 15% reduction, 30 sec
[Lv 2]: 30% reduction, 20 sec
[Lv 3]: 45% reduction, 10 sec

pr_aspersio.name: Aspersio
pr_aspersio.description:
Aspersio
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Aqua Benedicta 1,
Impositio Manus 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Endows the targeted
player's weapon with the Holy elemental
for the skill's duration.
Consumes 1 Holy Water.
[Lv 1]: 60 sec duration
[Lv 2]: 90 sec duration
[Lv 3]: 120 sec duration
[Lv 4]: 150 sec duration
[Lv 5]: 180 sec duration

Comments: Aspersio overides the user's
current element. A priest may use this skill
offensively against players, in particular
during War of Emperium. Because the
Emperium is Holy, using it against a player
attacking it will prevent them from damaging
the stone. The Undead will take damage from
this skill, and therefore a player may use Evil
Druid Card to prevent being affected by
Aspersio by an enemy Priest.

pr_benedictio.name: B.S. Sacramenti
pr_benedictio.description:
Benedictio Sanctissimi Sacramenti
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Aspersio 5, Gloria 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster and Party Members
Description: This Benedictio Sanctissimi
Sacramenti blessing endows the armor of
all onscreen party members with the Holy
elemental. This skill requires an
Acolyte or Priest classes to be adjacent
to the caster in order to function. Undead
and Demon monsters within the range of
the skill will be damaged by Holy
elemental magic damage.
[Lv 1]: 40 Seconds
[Lv 2]: 80 Seconds
[Lv 3]: 120 Second
[Lv 4]: 160 Seconds
[Lv 5]: 200 Seconds

Comments: The skill affects a 3x3 area around
the user. The two Acolyte-class characters
must be standing on both sides of the casting
character, in a Horizontal line.
The two Acolytes do not need to be in the
same guild, party or even alive in order for the
skill to work. 10 SP is drained from both.
Switching armors does not cancel the effect.
The skill is prevented by Land Protector.

pr_macemastery.name: Mace Mastery
pr_macemastery.description:
Mace Mastery
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases damage with Mace
class weapons.
[Lv 1]: Damage +3
[Lv 2]: Damage +6
[Lv 3]: Damage +9
[Lv 4]: Damage +12
[Lv 5]: Damage +15
[Lv 6]: Damage +18
[Lv 7]: Damage +21
[Lv 8]: Damage +24
[Lv 9]: Damage +27
[Lv 10]: Damage +30

Comments: Mastery skills only get added up
at the end of damage calculation. In most
situations, it only results in a flat addition of
damage.

pr_turnundead.name: Turn Undead
pr_turnundead.description:
Turn Undead
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Resurrection 1, Lex Divina 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: 1 Character
Element: Holy
Description: Attacks a Undead monster with
an exorcist skill that has the chance of
instantly killing the targeted Undead
monster. If it fails, it will inflict 30%
MATK magical damage.
[Lv 1]: Base success chance 2%
[Lv 2]: Base success chance 4%
[Lv 3]: Base success chance 6%
[Lv 4]: Base success chance 8%
[Lv 5]: Base success chance 10%
[Lv 6]: Base success chance 12%
[Lv 7]: Base success chance 14%
[Lv 8]: Base success chance 16%
[Lv 9]: Base success chance 18%
[Lv 10]: Base success chance 20%

Comments: Success chance is increased
by 0.1% for each Base Level, point of INT and
point of LUK, capped at 70%. Does a small
amount of damage if it fails.
Can be used on Bosses but will always fail.
Keep in mind that Undead is both a Race and
an Element, and this skill by default only
affects Undead Element, unless the server
configuration extends it to also affect
Undead Race.
Can be used against players using Evil
Druid Card.

mg_safetywall.name: Safety Wall
mg_safetywall.description:
Safety Wall
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Napalm Beat 7, Soul Strike 5
Requirement: Napalm Beat 7, Soul Strike 5
Requirement: Aspersio 4, Sanctuary 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Ground
Description: Creates a magic barrier on a
targeted spot that will block melee physical
attacks for the duration of the Safety Wall.
Consumes 1 Blue Gemstone.
[Lv 1]: Blocks 2 Hits, 4.0 sec Cast Time,
5 sec duration
[Lv 2]: Blocks 3 Hits, 3.5 sec Cast Time,
10 sec duration
[Lv 3]: Blocks 4 Hits, 3.0 sec Cast Time,
15 sec duration
[Lv 4]: Blocks 5 Hits, 2.5 sec Cast Time,
20 sec duration
[Lv 5]: Blocks 6 Hits, 2.0 sec Cast Time,
25 sec duration
[Lv 6]: Blocks 7 Hits, 1.5 sec Cast Time,
30 sec duration
[Lv 7]: Blocks 8 Hits, 1.0 sec Cast Time,
35 sec duration
[Lv 8]: Blocks 9 Hits, 1.0 sec Cast Time,
40 sec duration
[Lv 9]: Blocks 10 Hits, 1.0 sec Cast Time,
45 sec duration
[Lv 10]: Blocks 11 Hits, 1.0 sec Cast Time,
50 sec duration

Comments: Safety Wall blocks 1 melee hit,
regardless of how much damage it would
have dealt. This is a key skill for both
self preservation and to support allies,
in particular against MvPs.
Pneuma and Safety wall are mutually
exclusive, and where one exists the other
is inhibited. You can deny the use of Pneuma
by placing a Safety Wall near a target.

pr_magnus.name: Magnus Exorcismus
pr_magnus.description:
Magnus Exorcismus
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Safety Wall 1, Lex Aeterna 1,
Turn Undead 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: Ground
Element: Holy
Description: Summons a purifying cross on
the ground to exterminate Demon and
Undead monsters.
Consumes 1 Blue Gemstone.
[Lv 1]: 1 HIT/Wave, 5 Seconds duration
[Lv 2]: 2 HIT/Wave, 6 Seconds duration
[Lv 3]: 3 HIT/Wave, 7 Seconds duration
[Lv 4]: 4 HIT/Wave, 8 Seconds duration
[Lv 5]: 5 HIT/Wave, 9 Seconds duration
[Lv 6]: 6 HIT/Wave, 10 Seconds duration
[Lv 7]: 7 HIT/Wave, 11 Seconds duration
[Lv 8]: 8 HIT/Wave, 12 Seconds duration
[Lv 9]: 9 HIT/Wave, 13 Seconds duration
[Lv 10]: 10 HIT/Wave, 14 Seconds duration

Comments: This skill has an enormous 15
second cast time but will deal massive
damage to any enemies it can hit. It also has a
very large After Cast delay, which leaves the
Priest vulnerable to attacks from
monsters. If you're able to beat the Cast Time
and After Cast(for example, using a Bard's
Bragi), multiple instances of the skill can be
placed simultaneously.
On some servers, Magnus Exorcismus tiles
may be consumed if too many monsters take
damage from the same tile.
Keep in mind that Undead is both a Race and
an Element, and this skill by default only affect
Undead Element, unless the server
configuration extends it to also affect
Undead Race.

hp_assumptio.name: Assumptio
hp_assumptio.description:
Assumptio
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Angelus 1,
Increase SP Recovery 3, Impositio Manus 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Reduce damage taken from
enemies by half for the spell's duration.
Cannot be cast inside a guild castle, but
retains its effect after entering one.
Kyrie Eleison and Assumptio cancel each
other and cannot be used simultaneously.
The damage taken in PvP, WoE and BG
maps is reduced from 1/2 to 2/3.
[Lv 1]: Duration 20 Sec
[Lv 2]: Duration 40 Sec
[Lv 3]: Duration 60 Sec
[Lv 4]: Duration 80 Sec
[Lv 5]: Duration 100 Sec

Comments: On PvP/WoE/BG scenarios, Priests
can cancel an enemy player's Assumptio by
overwriting it with a low level of Kyrie.

hp_basilica.name: Basilica
hp_basilica.description:
Basilica
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Gloria 2, Increase SP Recovery 1,
Kyrie Eleison 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: This skill creates an absolutely
perfect defense zone of 5x5 cells around the
caster that blocks any type of attack out of,
or into this area.
Anyone can come in, but people who are
inside cannot attack. The High Priest cannot
move or use skills for the duration, except
using Basilica again to cancel it. Does not
work against Boss monsters and can't be
used during the War of Emperium.
Enemies attempting to enter the area will
be continuously pushed back.
This skill requires 1 Blue Gemstone,
1 Yellow Gemstone, 1 Red Gemstone and
1 Holy Water.
[Lv 1]: Duration 20 Sec
[Lv 2]: Duration 25 Sec
[Lv 3]: Duration 30 Sec
[Lv 4]: Duration 35 Sec
[Lv 5]: Duration 40 Sec

Comments: In PvP, the effect can be removed
