by Dispeling the High Priest. Enemy players
will be pushed back just as monsters would.
The skill fails if there would be any walls
or impassable obstacles inside the affected
area.

hp_meditatio.name: Meditatio
hp_meditatio.description:
Meditatio
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Increase SP Recovery 5,
Lex Divina 5, Aspersio 3
Skill Form: Passive
Description: When meditating (sitting), you will
have a better SP Recovery. Also increases
your MaxSP and the power
of your Heal skill.
[Lv 1]: MaxSP +1%, SP regen +3% and
Heal +2%
[Lv 2]: MaxSP +2%, SP regen +6% and
Heal +4%
[Lv 3]: MaxSP +3%, SP regen +9% and
Heal +6%
[Lv 4]: MaxSP +4%, SP regen +12% and
Heal 8%
[Lv 5]: MaxSP +5%, SP regen +15% and
Heal +10%
[Lv 6]: MaxSP +6%, SP regen +18% and
Heal +12%
[Lv 7]: MaxSP +7%, SP regen +21% and
Heal +14%
[Lv 8]: MaxSP +8%, SP regen +24% and
Heal +16%
[Lv 9]: MaxSP +9%, SP regen +27% and
Heal +18%
[Lv 10]: MaxSP +10%, SP regen +30% and
Heal +20%

hp_manarecharge.name: Mana Recharge
hp_manarecharge.description:
Mana Recharge
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Mace Mastery 10,
Demon Bane 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Decreases SP Cost of all your skills.
[Lv 1]: SP Cost for all skills -4%
[Lv 2]: SP Cost for all skills -8%
[Lv 3]: SP Cost for all skills -12%
[Lv 4]: SP Cost for all skills -16%
[Lv 5]: SP Cost for all skills -20%

Comments: This cost reduction stacks with
other SP Cost Reduction effects, such as
Service for You, Pharaoh Card and Ulle's Cap
combo effect.

al_holylight.name: Holy Light
al_holylight.description:
Holy Light
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: 1 Character
Description: Summons a holy light to
inflict Holy elemental magic damage
to counter evil.

Comments: This will will immediately dispel
Kyrie Eleison. Being Soul Linked massively
increases this skill's damage. Cookie Cards
will increase damage by 10% each as well.

nv_firstaid.name: First Aid
nv_firstaid.description:
First Aid
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Recovery
Target: Caster
Description: Uses 3 SP to restore 5 HP.

nv_trickdead.name: Play Dead
nv_trickdead.description:
Play Dead
Requirement: Finish Quest, Novice Only
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Feigns death to avoid the
menace of nearby enemies. The Play
Dead status is canceled by casting
this skill again.

Comments: This skill ceases to function after
jobchanging to any other class, including
Super Novice. Swordsman's Provoke and
Sage's Dispel can cancel the effect. All
monsters will be fooled, even Bosses and
MvPs.

pr_redemptio.name: Redemptio
pr_redemptio.description:
Redemptio
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Recovery
Target: Caster and Party Members
Description: Reduce your HP to 1 and your SP
to 0 in order to revive every party member
on screen. Using this skill will cost 1% of your
current EXP towards the next level.
All revived players will have 50% of their MaxHP.
For each party member revived this way, the
EXP penalty is reduced by 20%.
Casting Time is 4 seconds, not reduced by DEX.
Will not work if your current EXP is below 1%.
For players at the Max Level, the cost is
1 million EXP.

Comments: Reviving at least 5 people results
in no EXP being lost.
Players at the level cap continue to earn EXP,
the amount can be seen on the Character
Selection screen. That EXP is what Redemptio
uses to pay for the 1% per cast.

Can revive players even beyond the Priest's
line of sight, such as behind walls.

nv_basic.name: Basic Skill
nv_basic.description:
Basic Skill
Max Level: 9
Enables the use of Basic Interface Skills.
[Lv 1]: Enables Trading
Allows the trading of items with other
character.
Right click on a character to initiate.
[Lv 2]: Enables Emotions
Alt+(0~9) and Ctrl+(1,-,=.)
Alt+L opens additional Emotion icons.
[Lv 3]: Enables Sitting
Sitting doubles HP and SP regeneration
speed.
Press the Insert key or type /sit.
[Lv 4]: Enables Chat Room Creation
Alt+C to open a Chat Room or click the
Chat button in the Basic Information
Window.
[Lv 5]: Join a Party
Character can join a party.
[Lv 6]: Enables Use of Kafra Storage
Allows use of Kafra Storage.
[Lv 7]: Organize a Party
Create a party by typing
/organize ''Party Name''
Set party options in the Party Window (Alt+Z).
[Lv 9]: Enables Change to First Job Class
Qualifies character for change from Novice
to one of the First classes.

mg_stonecurse.name: Stone Curse
mg_stonecurse.description:
Stone Curse
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: 1 Character
Description: Inflicts Stone Curse to a
target. Consumes 1 Red Gemstone.
[Lv 1]: 24% Chance
[Lv 2]: 28% Chance
[Lv 3]: 32% Chance
[Lv 4]: 36% Chance
[Lv 5]: 40% Chance
[Lv 6]: 44% Chance
[Lv 7]: 48% Chance
[Lv 8]: 52% Chance
[Lv 9]: 56% Chance
[Lv 10]: 60% Chance

Comments: Using this skill requires a
Gemstone and is very short range, however
Stone Curse is generally considered to be a
more crippling disable than Freeze. Stone
cursed enemies are vulnerable to Fire.
Bosses and Undead are immune.
Using the skill on a target that's already stone
cursed will immediately undo the effect, even if
it's an enemy.

mg_coldbolt.name: Cold Bolt
mg_coldbolt.description:
Cold Bolt
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: Enemy
Description: Summons bolts of frigid ice
to strike at an enemy which inflicts
Water elemental magic damage per hit.
One bolt for every skill level.
[Lv 1]: 100% MATK, 0.7 sec Cast Time,
1.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 2]: 200% MATK, 1.4 sec Cast Time,
1.2 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 3]: 300% MATK, 2.1 sec Cast Time,
1.4 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 4]: 400% MATK, 2.8 sec Cast Time,
1.6 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 5]: 500% MATK, 3.5 sec Cast Time,
1.8 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 6]: 600% MATK, 4.2 sec Cast Time,
2.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 7]: 700% MATK, 4.9 sec Cast Time,
2.2 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 8]: 800% MATK, 5.6 sec Cast Time,
2.4 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 9]: 900% MATK, 6.3 sec Cast Time,
2.6 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 10]: 1000% MATK, 7.0 sec Cast Time,
2.8 sec After Cast Delay

Comments: The basic Water spell of a Mage.
Higher levels of the skill dramatically increase
SP Cost and Cast Time. Different skill levels
of this skill can be set to individual hotkeys.
The skill is greatly enhanced by using Siroma
Card.

mg_lightningbolt.name: Lightning Bolt
mg_lightningbolt.description:
Lightning Bolt
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: 1 Character
Description: Drops lightning on target
inflicting Wind elemental
magic damage per hit.
One bolt for every skill level.
[Lv 1]: 100% MATK, 0.7 sec Cast Time,
1.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 2]: 200% MATK, 1.4 sec Cast Time,
1.2 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 3]: 300% MATK, 2.1 sec Cast Time,
1.4 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 4]: 400% MATK, 2.8 sec Cast Time,
1.6 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 5]: 500% MATK, 3.5 sec Cast Time,
1.8 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 6]: 600% MATK, 4.2 sec Cast Time,
2.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 7]: 700% MATK, 4.9 sec Cast Time,
2.2 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 8]: 800% MATK, 5.6 sec Cast Time,
2.4 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 9]: 900% MATK, 6.3 sec Cast Time,
2.6 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 10]: 1000% MATK, 7.0 sec Cast Time,
2.8 sec After Cast Delay

Comments: The basic Wind spell of a mage.
Higher levels of the skill dramatically increase
SP Cost and Cast Time. Different skill levels
of this skill can be set to individual hotkeys.
Unlike Fire and Cold bolts, there is no card
that will enhance Lightning bolt in the
same manner.

mg_napalmbeat.name: Napalm Beat
mg_napalmbeat.description:
Napalm Beat
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: 1 Character
Description: Uses telekinesis power to
attack a target and 3x3 cells around it
with Ghost elemental magic. The damage
portion is divided among the targets.
[Lv 1]: 80% MATK, 1.0 sec Cast Time
[Lv 2]: 90% MATK, 1.0 sec Cast Time
[Lv 3]: 100% MATK, 1.0 sec Cast Time
[Lv 4]: 110% MATK, 0.9 sec Cast Time
[Lv 5]: 120% MATK, 0.9 sec Cast Time
[Lv 6]: 130% MATK, 0.8 sec Cast Time
[Lv 7]: 140% MATK, 0.8 sec Cast Time
[Lv 8]: 150% MATK, 0.7 sec Cast Time
[Lv 9]: 160% MATK, 0.6 sec Cast Time
[Lv 10]: 170% MATK, 0.5 sec Cast Time

Comments: Mage's Ghost spells are weak
compared to elemental bolts, however they
are much faster casting and do adequate
damage against the Undead.
Damage will be split between the targets.

mg_firebolt.name: Fire Bolt
mg_firebolt.description:
Fire Bolt
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: 1 Character
Description: Attacks a target with arrow
made of fire inflicting Fire
elemental magic damage per hit.
One bolt for every skill level.
[Lv 1]: 100% MATK, 0.7 sec Cast Time,
1.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 2]: 200% MATK, 1.4 sec Cast Time,
1.2 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 3]: 300% MATK, 2.1 sec Cast Time,
1.4 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 4]: 400% MATK, 2.8 sec Cast Time,
1.6 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 5]: 500% MATK, 3.5 sec Cast Time,
1.8 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 6]: 600% MATK, 4.2 sec Cast Time,
2.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 7]: 700% MATK, 4.9 sec Cast Time,
2.2 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 8]: 800% MATK, 5.6 sec Cast Time,
2.4 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 9]: 900% MATK, 6.3 sec Cast Time,
2.6 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 10]: 1000% MATK, 7.0 sec Cast Time,
2.8 sec After Cast Delay

Comments: The basic Fire spell of a Mage.
Higher levels of the skill dramatically increase
SP Cost and Cast Time. Different skill levels
of this skill can be set to individual hotkeys.
The skill is greatly enhanced by using Imp
Card.

mg_sight.name: Sight
mg_sight.description:
Sight
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Uses 10 SP to summon a fire
ball that for 10 seconds will detect hidden
characters in 7x7 AoE around the caster.

Comments: If the skill is used by the means of
a Horong Card, removing the item containing
the card will immediately cancel the skill,
however the visual effect persists the entire duration.
Does not work against Stalker's Chase Walk.

mg_srecovery.name: Increase SP Recovery
mg_srecovery.description:
Increase SP Recovery
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Restores SP every 10
seconds while idle. MaxSP affects how much
SP is restored by this skill.
[Lv 1]: SP+3 +(0.2% of Max SP)
[Lv 2]: SP+6 +(0.4% of Max SP)
[Lv 3]: SP+9 +(0.6% of Max SP)
[Lv 4]: SP+12 +(0.8% of Max SP)
[Lv 5]: SP+15 +(1.0% of Max SP)
[Lv 6]: SP+18 +(1.2% of Max SP)
[Lv 7]: SP+21 +(1.4% of Max SP)
[Lv 8]: SP+24 +(1.6% of Max SP)
[Lv 9]: SP+27 +(1.8% of Max SP)
[Lv 10]: SP+30 +(2.0% of Max SP)

Comments: Every skill level also increases
the effectiveness of SP healing items by 10%.
The healing ticks occur so long as the player
does not walk to to another tile, even if the
player is standing and in combat. The healing
ticks will not occur if the player is overweight.
It's also possible to receive healing ticks
while teleporting, so long as the player does
not walk.

mg_frostdiver.name: Frost Diver
mg_frostdiver.description:
Frost Diver
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Cold Bolt 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical, Debuff
Target: 1 Character
Description: Inflicts Water magic
damage on a target, which has a chance to
inflict Freezing status. The Freezing
chance and duration are affected
by target's MDEF.
[Lv 1]: 110% MATK, 3 sec Freeze Duration,
38% Freeze Chance
[Lv 2]: 120% MATK, 6 sec Freeze Duration,
41% Freeze Chance
[Lv 3]: 130% MATK, 9 sec Freeze Duration,
44% Freeze Chance
[Lv 4]: 140% MATK, 12 sec Freeze Duration,
47% Freeze Chance
[Lv 5]: 150% MATK, 15 sec Freeze Duration,
50% Freeze Chance
[Lv 6]: 160% MATK, 18 sec Freeze Duration,
53% Freeze Chance
[Lv 7]: 170% MATK, 21 sec Freeze Duration,
56% Freeze Chance
[Lv 8]: 180% MATK, 24 sec Freeze Duration,
59% Freeze Chance
[Lv 9]: 190% MATK, 27 sec Freeze Duration,
62% Freeze Chance
[Lv 10]: 200% MATK, 30 sec Freeze Duration,
65% Freeze Chance

Comments: Frost Diver is a Mage's disabling
skill. Frozen targets cannot retaliate until the
freeze duration ends. Keep in mind that
enemies that are Undead Element cannot be
frozen, and enemies with high MDEF have
lower chance of being frozen, and will remain
frozen for less time.

mg_thunderstorm.name: Thunderstorm
mg_thunderstorm.description:
Thunder Storm
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Lightning Bolt 4
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: Ground
Description: Drops lightning bolt on
specific location, inflicting Wind
elemental magic per hit in a 5x5 cell area.
[Lv 1]: 80% MATK, 1 sec Cast Time
[Lv 2]: 160% MATK, 2 sec Cast Time
[Lv 3]: 240% MATK, 3 sec Cast Time
[Lv 4]: 320% MATK, 4 sec Cast Time
[Lv 5]: 400% MATK, 5 sec Cast Time
[Lv 6]: 480% MATK, 6 sec Cast Time
[Lv 7]: 560% MATK, 7 sec Cast Time
[Lv 8]: 640% MATK, 8 sec Cast Time
[Lv 9]: 720% MATK, 9 sec Cast Time
[Lv 10]: 800% MATK, 10 sec Cast Time

Comments: The strongest AoE spell available
to Mages, however it also has a massive 10
second cast at max level.

mg_soulstrike.name: Soul Strike
mg_soulstrike.description:
Soul Strike
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Napalm Beat 4
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: 1 Character
Description: Summons holy spirit to
inflict 100% MATK Ghost elemental
magical damage per hit on a target.
This skill inflicts additional damage
against Undead monsters.
[Lv 1]: 1 Hit, 1.2 sec After Cast Delay,
+5% damage to Undead
[Lv 2]: 1 Hit, 1.4 sec After Cast Delay,
+10% damage to Undead
[Lv 3]: 2 Hits, 1.6 sec After Cast Delay,
+15% damage to Undead
[Lv 4]: 2 Hits, 1.8 sec After Cast Delay,
+20% damage to Undead
[Lv 5]: 3 Hits, 2.0 sec After Cast Delay,
+25% damage to Undead
[Lv 6]: 3 Hits, 2.2 sec After Cast Delay,
+30% damage to Undead
[Lv 7]: 4 Hits, 2.4 sec After Cast Delay,
+35% damage to Undead
[Lv 8]: 4 Hits, 2.6 sec After Cast Delay,
+40% damage to Undead
[Lv 9]: 5 Hits, 2.8 sec After Cast Delay,
+45% damage to Undead
[Lv 10]: 5 Hits, 2.7 sec After Cast Delay,
+50% damage to Undead

Comments: Cast time is 0.5 sec at all levels.
Additional levels of this skill increase damage
at the cost of longer delays after cast.

mg_fireball.name: Fire Ball
mg_fireball.description:
Fire Ball
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Fire Bolt 4
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical, AoE
Target: 1 Character
Description: Summons a fire ball to
damage a target and all enemies within
x5 cells area with Fire elemental
magical damage. Nearby enemies receives
3/4 of the damage given to the
center enemy. Cast Time and After Cast
Delay are reduced upon learning level 6
or higher.
[Lv 1]: 80% MATK, 1.5 sec Cast Time,
1.5 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 2]: 90% MATK, 1.5 sec Cast Time,
1.5 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 3]: 100% MATK, 1.5 sec Cast Time,
1.5 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 4]: 110% MATK, 1.5 sec Cast Time,
1.5 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 5]: 120% MATK, 1.5 sec Cast Time,
1.5 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 6]: 130% MATK, 1.0 sec Cast Time,
1.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 7]: 140% MATK, 1.0 sec Cast Time,
1.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 8]: 150% MATK, 1.0 sec Cast Time,
1.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 9]: 160% MATK, 1.0 sec Cast Time,
1.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 10]: 170% MATK, 1.0 sec Cast Time,
1.0 sec After Cast Delay

Comments: Weak but very quick casting.

mg_safetywall.name: Safety Wall
mg_safetywall.description:
Safety Wall
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Napalm Beat 7, Soul Strike 5
Requirement: Napalm Beat 7, Soul Strike 5
Requirement: Aspersio 4, Sanctuary 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Ground
Description: Creates a magic barrier on a
targeted spot that will block melee physical
attacks for the duration of the Safety Wall.
Consumes 1 Blue Gemstone.
[Lv 1]: Blocks 2 Hits, 4.0 sec Cast Time,
5 sec duration
[Lv 2]: Blocks 3 Hits, 3.5 sec Cast Time,
10 sec duration
[Lv 3]: Blocks 4 Hits, 3.0 sec Cast Time,
15 sec duration
[Lv 4]: Blocks 5 Hits, 2.5 sec Cast Time,
20 sec duration
[Lv 5]: Blocks 6 Hits, 2.0 sec Cast Time,
25 sec duration
[Lv 6]: Blocks 7 Hits, 1.5 sec Cast Time,
30 sec duration
[Lv 7]: Blocks 8 Hits, 1.0 sec Cast Time,
35 sec duration
[Lv 8]: Blocks 9 Hits, 1.0 sec Cast Time,
40 sec duration
[Lv 9]: Blocks 10 Hits, 1.0 sec Cast Time,
45 sec duration
[Lv 10]: Blocks 11 Hits, 1.0 sec Cast Time,
50 sec duration

Comments: Safety Wall blocks 1 melee hit,
regardless of how much damage it would
have dealt. This is a key skill for both
self preservation and to support allies,
in particular against MvPs.
Pneuma and Safety wall are mutually
exclusive, and where one exists the other
is inhibited. You can deny the use of Pneuma
by placing a Safety Wall near a target.

mg_firewall.name: Fire Wall
mg_firewall.description:
Fire Wall
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Sight 1, Fire Ball 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: Ground
Description: Uses 40 SP to create a fire
barrier that inflicts 50% MATK Fire
elemental magic damage on upcoming enemies
and knock them 2 cells backward.
The Undead are not affected by the pushback.
Duration is 4 seconds +1 extra for every
skill level.

Comments: The wall occupies three cells and
is placed perpendicular from the line between
the caster and the target cell. Each cell can do
2 hits +1 per skill level. Because undead
enemies are not pushed back, they will be
instantly hit with every single 'charge' of the
Fire Wall tile. Using the skill on
the tile where the caster stands will result in a
North-South Fire Wall.

wz_estimation.name: Sense
wz_estimation.description:
Sense
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Reveals detailed information
about a targeted monster to the caster and
members in caster's party.

Comments: Opens a separate window that
displays a monster's stats. The displayed
numbers for DEF and MDEF are the Hard
values.

wz_icewall.name: Ice Wall
wz_icewall.description:
Ice Wall
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Stone Curse 1, Frost Diver 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Ground
Description: Creates a frozen wall of ice that
will block enemies.
[Lv 1]: 400 Durability
[Lv 2]: 600 Durability
[Lv 3]: 800 Durability
[Lv 4]: 1000 Durability
[Lv 5]: 1200 Durability
[Lv 6]: 1400 Durability
[Lv 7]: 1600 Durability
[Lv 8]: 1800 Durability
[Lv 9]: 2000 Durability
[Lv 10]: 2200 Durability

Comments: Ice Walls are placed
perpendicular in relation to a line between the
caster and the targeted cell. Ice Walls lose 50
durability every second until vanishing and may
take damage from attacks.
Ice Walls prevent players and monsters from
walking through them and are considered
snipable walls(you can shoot over them, but
not walk). It's possible to trap monsters
pathing to the player by placing Ice Walls on
the cell they stand, as long as they are
moving West->East or South->North. Ice Walls
can also be cast on the top of players in order
to shield them from AoE spells.
If a monster is attacked from behind an
Ice Wall, in a way that doesn't allow it to
retaliate, it will activate it's Rude Attacked AI
and probably teleport.
Ice Walls can quickly be removed using skills
such as Magnum Break and Sighthrasher.

wz_jupitel.name: Jupitel Thunder
wz_jupitel.description:
Jupitel Thunder
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Napalm Beat 1, Lightning Bolt 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: 1 Character
Description: Fires a ball of crackling
lightning that inflicts 100% MATK Wind
elemental magic damage and knock back
the targeted enemy. The number of hits
increases with the skill level.

[Lv 1]: 3 Hits, 2.5 Second Cast Time
[Lv 2]: 4 Hits, 3.0 Second Cast Time
[Lv 3]: 5 Hits, 3.5 Second Cast Time
[Lv 4]: 6 Hits, 4.0 Second Cast Time
[Lv 5]: 7 Hits, 4.5 Second Cast Time
[Lv 6]: 8 Hits, 5.0 Second Cast Time
[Lv 7]: 9 Hits, 5.5 Second Cast Time
[Lv 8]: 10 Hits, 6.0 Second Cast Time
[Lv 9]: 11 Hits, 6.5 Second Cast Time
[Lv 10]: 12 Hits, 7.0 Second Cast Time

Comments: An excellent skill combined with
Storm Gust, or any other skill that can freeze
an enemy. Hill Wind Card improves the
damage.

wz_earthspike.name: Earth Spike
wz_earthspike.description:
Earth Spike
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Stone Curse 1
Requirement: Seismic Weapon 1
4190Requirement: Stone Curse 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: 1 Character
Element: Earth
Description: Commands the ground beneath a
targeted enemy to rise into pikes.
[Lv 1]: 100% MATK, 0.7 seconds Cast Time
[Lv 2]: 200% MATK, 1.4 seconds Cast Time
[Lv 3]: 300% MATK, 2.1 seconds Cast Time
[Lv 4]: 400% MATK, 2.8 seconds Cast Time
[Lv 5]: 500% MATK, 3.5 seconds Cast Time

Comments: Despite being similar to Mage's
basic Bolt skills, it is not considered to be as
such, and therefore not affected by
Professor's Double Casting. It can be used
on Hidden enemies(Thief skill Hide), so
long as the user is equipped to see them.
Pitman Card improves the damage of this skill.

wz_sightrasher.name: Sightrasher
wz_sightrasher.description:
Sightrasher
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Sight 1, Lightning Bolt 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: Enemies around the caster
Description: Attacks enemies by shooting
fireballs, which are first summoned by the
Sight skill, in 8 directions that radiate
away from the caster and inflicting Fire
elemental magic damage as well as
knockback the enemies by 2 cells.
[Lv 1]: 120% MATK
[Lv 2]: 140% MATK
[Lv 3]: 160% MATK
[Lv 4]: 180% MATK
[Lv 5]: 200% MATK
[Lv 6]: 220% MATK
[Lv 7]: 240% MATK
[Lv 8]: 260% MATK
[Lv 9]: 280% MATK
[Lv 10]: 300% MATK

Comments: First you must use Sight, and
then Sighthrasher. Enemies hit by the skill will
be pushed back.

wz_firepillar.name: Fire Pillar
wz_firepillar.description:
Fire Pillar
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Fire Wall 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: Ground
Element: Fire
Description: Summons a pillar of flame
on a targeted spot that will deal Fire
elemental magic damage to enemies
that come into contact with it.
Consumes 1 Blue Gemstone at level 6
and higher.
[Lv 1]: 3 Hits, 3.0 Second Cast Time
[Lv 2]: 4 Hits, 2.7 Second Cast Time
[Lv 3]: 5 Hits, 2.4 Second Cast Time
[Lv 4]: 6 Hits, 2.1 Second Cast Time
[Lv 5]: 7 Hits, 1.8 Second Cast Time
[Lv 6]: 8 Hits, 1.5 Second Cast Time
[Lv 7]: 9 Hits, 1.2 Second Cast Time
[Lv 8]: 10 Hits, 0.9 Second Cast Time
[Lv 9]: 11 Hits, 0.6 Second Cast Time
[Lv 10]: 12 Hits, 0.3 Second Cast Time

Comments: Fire Pillars are placed on the
ground as traps, detonating when enemies
step on them. The most distinguished feature
of Fire Pillars is ignoring a target's Defense.
A total of 5 instances can be placed at once,
per Wizard.

wz_frostnova.name: Frost Nova
wz_frostnova.description:
Frost Nova
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Frost Diver 1, Ice Wall 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: Enemies around the caster
Element: Water
Description: Creates an aura of icy cold that
will simultaneously Freeze enemies around
the caster.
[Lv 1]: 73% MATK, 6.0 sec Cast Time,
38% chance to Freeze
[Lv 2]: 80% MATK, 6.0 sec Cast Time,
43% chance to Freeze
[Lv 3]: 87% MATK, 5.5 sec Cast Time,
48% chance to Freeze
[Lv 4]: 93% MATK, 5.5 sec Cast Time,
53% chance to Freeze
[Lv 5]: 100% MATK, 5.0 sec Cast Time,
58% chance to Freeze
[Lv 6]: 107% MATK, 5.0 sec Cast Time,
63% chance to Freeze
[Lv 7]: 113% MATK, 4.5 sec Cast Time,
68% chance to Freeze
[Lv 8]: 120% MATK, 4.5 sec Cast Time,
73% chance to Freeze
[Lv 9]: 127% MATK, 4.0 sec Cast Time,
78% chance to Freeze
[Lv 10]: 133% MATK, 4.0 sec Cast Time,
83% chance to Freeze

Comments: The skill does not require a target
and affects every enemy in a 5x5 area. Does
not damage targets already frozen, meaning
you can continuously cast without breaking
free enemies that already froze.

wz_vermilion.name: Lord of Vermilion
wz_vermilion.description:
Lord of Vermillion
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Thunder Storm 1,
Jupitel Thunder 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: Ground
Element: Wind
Description: Summons explosive lightning to
strike a targeted area. Increasing skill level will
increase damage and skill cast time.
[Lv 1]: 100% MATK/Wave, 4% chance to Blind
[Lv 2]: 120% MATK/Wave, 8% chance to Blind
[Lv 3]: 140% MATK/Wave, 12% chance to Blind
[Lv 4]: 160% MATK/Wave, 16% chance to Blind
[Lv 5]: 180% MATK/Wave, 20% chance to Blind
[Lv 6]: 200% MATK/Wave, 24% chance to Blind
[Lv 7]: 220% MATK/Wave, 28% chance to Blind
[Lv 8]: 240% MATK/Wave, 32% chance to Blind
[Lv 9]: 260% MATK/Wave, 36% chance to Blind
[Lv 10]: 280% MATK/Wave, 40% chance to Blind

Comments: One of Wizard's three major
spells. Cover the entire area of the spell,
with a chance to Blind on every hit. Stacking
multiple instances of this skill layered on top
of each other are no better than just one.
Cast Time decreases with skill levels.

wz_heavendrive.name: Heaven's Drive
wz_heavendrive.description:
Heaven's Drive
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Earth Spike 3
Requirement: Earth Spike 1
4190Requirement: Earth Spike 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: Ground
Element: Earth
Description: Commands the ground in a
targeted area to rise into spikes in order to
damage enemies within its range.
[Lv 1]: 100% MATK, 1 second Cast Time
[Lv 2]: 200% MATK, 2 seconds Cast Time
[Lv 3]: 300% MATK, 3 seconds Cast Time
[Lv 4]: 400% MATK, 4 seconds Cast Time
[Lv 5]: 500% MATK, 5 seconds Cast Time

Comments: Capable of hitting enemies in
Hiding(Thief skill Hide). Does not require
a target and does 5x5 AoE damage.

wz_meteor.name: Meteor Storm
wz_meteor.description:
Meteor Storm
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Thunder Storm 1, Sightrasher 2
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: Ground
Description: Summons meteors towards a
targeted area to inflict Fire
elemental magic damage upon enemies.
[Lv 1]: 2 Meteors, 1 HIT/Meteor
[Lv 2]: 3 Meteors, 1 HIT/Meteor
[Lv 3]: 3 Meteors, 2 HITs/Meteor
[Lv 4]: 4 Meteors, 2 HITs/Meteor
[Lv 5]: 4 Meteors, 3 HITs/Meteor
[Lv 6]: 5 Meteors, 3 HITs/Meteor
[Lv 7]: 5 Meteors, 4 HITs/Meteor
[Lv 8]: 6 Meteors, 4 HITs/Meteor
[Lv 9]: 6 Meteors, 5 HITs/Meteor
[Lv 10]: 7 Meteors, 5 HITs/Meteor

Comments: One of Wizard's three major
spells. Each meteor is a small splash attack
that falls randomly around the targeted cell.
It's possible that an enemy inside the area
might not be hit by any of the meteors.
Meteors can stun enemies when they do hit.
Meteors that land on invalid cells do nothing,
avoid using the skill near edges of the map.
Meteor Storm is the only skill among the
three major Wizard spells that can be stacked
on the same area. What this means is that
continuously casting Lord of Vermilion or
Storm Gust in the same area does not cause
more damage or hits, but continuously
raining meteors in the same area will actually
result in more hits and damage. Salamander
Card improves the damage.

wz_waterball.name: Water Ball
wz_waterball.description:
Water Ball
Max Level: 5 or 10
Requirement: Cold Bolt 1, Lightning Bolt 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: 1 Character
Element: Water
Description: Hurls spheres of water at high
velocity at a targeted enemy.
Caster must be standing in water in order to
cast Water Ball and cannot be used in an
underwater map.
Wizards can learn the skill up to Lv5, but
Rogues and Stalkers can copy up to Lv10
from MvPs.
[Lv 1]: 130% MATK, 1x1 water consumed,
1 sec Cast Time, 1 Waterball
[Lv 2]: 160% MATK, 3x3 water consumed,
2 sec Cast Time, 9 Waterball
[Lv 3]: 190% MATK, 3x3 water consumed,
3 sec Cast Time, 9 Waterball
[Lv 4]: 220% MATK, 5x5 water consumed,
4 sec Cast Time, 25 Waterball
[Lv 5]: 250% MATK, 5x5 water consumed,
5 sec Cast Time, 25 Waterball
[Lv 6]: 280% MATK, 5x5 water consumed,
6 sec Cast Time, 25 Waterball
[Lv 7]: 310% MATK, 5x5 water consumed,
7 sec Cast Time, 25 Waterball
[Lv 8]: 340% MATK, 5x5 water consumed,
8 sec Cast Time, 25 Waterball
[Lv 9]: 370% MATK, 5x5 water consumed,
9 sec Cast Time, 25 Waterball
[Lv 10]: 400% MATK, 5x5 water consumed,
10 sec Cast Time, 25 Waterball

Comments: Requires the user to be standing
on a water tile. However, for the damage to be
maximized, you need water tiles all around the
user. Can used on top of a Sage's Deluge or
Ninja's Water Evasion but will consume the
tiles on use.
Each hit of the skill is an independent hit and
the Wizard can begin casting again before all
hits are done being thrown.
Rogues and Stalkers can copy Water Ball Lv10
from Drake and Ktullanux MvPs.

wz_quagmire.name: Quagmire
wz_quagmire.description:
Quagmire
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Heaven's Drive 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: Ground
Description: Temporarily converts
targeted area into marshland that will
reduce the Movement Speed, AGI
and DEX of all targets by half.
The reduction of those stats is capped
at 50% for monsters and 25% for players.
[Lv 1]: 5 seconds Duration, -10 AGI/DEX
[Lv 2]: 10 seconds Duration, -20 AGI/DEX
[Lv 3]: 15 seconds Duration, -30 AGI/DEX
[Lv 4]: 20 seconds Duration, -40 AGI/DEX
[Lv 5]: 25 seconds Duration, -50 AGI/DEX

Comments: When a player steps into an
enemy's Quagmire, speed buffs such as
Increase Agility, Twohand Quicken and
Adrenaline Rush are cancelled. Monsters are
affected by the reduced movement speed for
some time after leaving Quagmire, but
players will go back to their normal walk
speed as soon as they exit the affected area.

wz_stormgust.name: Storm Gust
wz_stormgust.description:
Storm Gust
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Frost Diver 1, Jupitel 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: Ground
Element: Water
Description: Summons a blizzard on a
targeted spot to damage enemies within
Storm Gust's range.
[Lv 1]: 140% MATK, 6 seconds Cast Time
[Lv 2]: 180% MATK, 7 seconds Cast Time
[Lv 3]: 220% MATK, 8 seconds Cast Time
[Lv 4]: 260% MATK, 9 seconds Cast Time
[Lv 5]: 300% MATK, 10 seconds Cast Time
[Lv 6]: 340% MATK, 11 seconds Cast Time
[Lv 7]: 380% MATK, 12 seconds Cast Time
[Lv 8]: 420% MATK, 13 seconds Cast Time
[Lv 9]: 460% MATK, 14 seconds Cast Time
[Lv 10]: 500% MATK, 15 seconds Cast Time

Comments: One of Wizard's three major
spells. Every hit after the second one has a
150% chance of freezing enemies. A frozen
enemy will not be hit while inside Storm Gust,
and thus stops receiving damage.
Higher levels have dramatically higher cast
times, and so if the user only wishes to freeze
enemies, using Lv1 is enough for that
purpose. Because Bosses and the Undead
do not freeze, they will continuously take
damage from Storm Gust.

hw_ganbantein.name: Ganbantein
hw_ganbantein.description:
Ganbantein
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Sense 1, Ice Wall 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Ground
Description: Enables the chance of canceling
ground targeting magic spell cast on a 3*3
cell area around the targeted spot.
This skill will cancel Land Protector on areas
that have been enchanted by that skill.
This skill is unaffected by items or skills that
remove Gemstone requirements.
Has 5 second cast delay.
Consumes 1 Blue Gemstone and
Yellow Gemstone.

Comments: The purpose of this skill is to
delete any AoE effects that can be placed on
the ground. A very effective way to deal with
skills such as Land Protector, Pneuma or
Safety Wall

hw_magiccrasher.name: Stave Crasher
hw_magiccrasher.description:
Magic Crasher
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Increase SP Recovery 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: 1 Character
Description: Perform an attack that calculates
damage using your MATK instead of ATK but is
decreased using enemy's DEF, not MDEF.
This skills overall damage is affected by cards
you have in your weapon, weapon element,
size and element of the target and it might
miss depending on your HIT.

hw_souldrain.name: Soul Drain
hw_souldrain.description:
Soul Drain
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Increase SP Recovery 5,
Soul Strike 7
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Every time you kill an enemy
using spells, you will receive a certain amount
of SP back, depending on the monster level.
Regained SP is multiplied by the
monster's level.
This skill also increases your MaxSP by 2%
per Skill LV. The SP drain only works for
targeted spells, not area spells.
[Lv 1]: MaxSP +2%, 110% Drain
[Lv 2]: MaxSP +4%, 125% Drain
[Lv 3]: MaxSP +6%, 140% Drain
[Lv 4]: MaxSP +8%, 155% Drain
[Lv 5]: MaxSP +10%, 170% Drain
[Lv 6]: MaxSP +12%, 185% Drain
[Lv 7]: MaxSP +14%, 200% Drain
[Lv 8]: MaxSP +16%, 215% Drain
[Lv 9]: MaxSP +18%, 230% Drain
[Lv 10]: MaxSP +20%, 245% Drain

hw_napalmvulcan.name: Napalm Vulcan
hw_napalmvulcan.description:
Napalm Vulcan
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Napalm Beat 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: 1 Character
Element: Ghost
Description: Delivers multiple psychokinetic
blows at an enemy with a low chance of
causing Curse. This skill's level affects the
number of strikes and does 3x3 Splash
Damage.
[Lv 1]: 125% x 1 MATK, 5% chance to Curse
[Lv 2]: 125% x 2 MATK, 10% chance to Curse
[Lv 3]: 125% x 3 MATK, 15% chance to Curse
[Lv 4]: 125% x 4 MATK, 20% chance to Curse
[Lv 5]: 125% x 5 MATK, 25% chance to Curse

hw_magicpower.name: Mystical Amplification
hw_magicpower.description:
Amplify Magic Power
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Boosts your MATK for the next
damage dealing magical spell. Lasts only
for one spell.
[Lv 1]: MATK +5%
[Lv 2]: MATK +10%
[Lv 3]: MATK +15%
[Lv 4]: MATK +20%
[Lv 5]: MATK +25%
[Lv 6]: MATK +30%
[Lv 7]: MATK +35%
[Lv 8]: MATK +40%
[Lv 9]: MATK +45%
[Lv 10]: MATK +50%

Comments: The game discerns between
non-damage and non-magical skills. Using
such skills will not waste the buff.

hw_gravitation.name: Gravitation Field
hw_gravitation.description:
Gravitation Field
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Quagmire 1,
Magic Crasher 1,
Mystical Amplification 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: Ground
Description: Increases the gravity in a 5*5 AoE
which will decrease the Attack Speed of
enemies and cause continuous damage that
ignore Defense.
When skill is active, the caster's movement
and attacks are disabled.
This skill's effect on Attack and
Movement Speeds does not apply to Boss
monsters.
Consumes 1 Blue Gemstone.
Has 2 second cast delay.
[Lv 1]: 400 Dmg/Sec, -5% ASPD, 5 sec
[Lv 2]: 600 Dmg/Sec, -10% ASPD, 6 sec
[Lv 3]: 800 Dmg/Sec, -15% ASPD, 7 sec
[Lv 4]: 1000 Dmg/Sec, -20% ASPD, 8 sec
[Lv 5]: 1200 Dmg/Sec, -25% ASPD, 9 sec

Comments: This skill has some very unique
properties. The damage it deals is fixed and
cannot be increased or decreased by any
buffs, skills or equipments. Furthermore, the
damage is not affected by WoE, GvG or
Battegrounds modifiers or reductions. If your
server has PK Mode enabled, it DOES check
for those damage modifiers.
Gravitation Field is the only skill capable of
damaging the Emperium during WoE, and
one of the few ways to bypass the effect of
Crusader's Devotion, dealing damage to the
target directly.

The damage dealt by this skill also have a
secret property: they count as auto-attacks.
Because of this, it's possible to combine this
skill with equipment that auto-casts skills on
attack.

mg_energycoat.name: Energy Coat
mg_energycoat.description:
Energy Coat
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Creates a barrier of spiritual
energy that will buffer attacks at the caster.
Caster's remaining SP affects the amount of
damage reduced by the barrier. More SP
is drained as attacks buffered by the barrier
accumulate.
[100~81% SP]: 30% reduction, 3.0% per hit
[80~61% SP]: 24% reduction, 2.5% per hit
[60~41% SP]: 18% reduction, 2.0% per hit
[40~21% SP]: 12% reduction, 1.5% per hit
[20~11% SP]: 6% reduction, 1.0% per hit

Comments: The damage reduction from this
skill is very substantial, however the SP drain
will quickly deplete the character since it
drains a % of your SP. Against fast attacking
enemies that will hit you many times, perhaps
it's better not to use this skill at all.

nv_firstaid.name: First Aid
nv_firstaid.description:
First Aid
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Recovery
Target: Caster
Description: Uses 3 SP to restore 5 HP.

nv_trickdead.name: Play Dead
nv_trickdead.description:
Play Dead
Requirement: Finish Quest, Novice Only
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Feigns death to avoid the
menace of nearby enemies. The Play
Dead status is canceled by casting
this skill again.

Comments: This skill ceases to function after
jobchanging to any other class, including
Super Novice. Swordsman's Provoke and
Sage's Dispel can cancel the effect. All
monsters will be fooled, even Bosses and
MvPs.

wz_sightblaster.name: Sight Blaster
wz_sightblaster.description:
Sight Blaster
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: Caster
Description: Summons a fireball that circles
around you and hits enemies attempting to
attack you at close range.
When an enemy steps next to you, he will be
hit by a Fire elemental attack and pushed back.
The Fireball disappears after hitting an enemy.

Comments: Deal 100% MATK damage and
only shields you once.

nv_basic.name: Basic Skill
nv_basic.description:
Basic Skill
Max Level: 9
Enables the use of Basic Interface Skills.
[Lv 1]: Enables Trading
Allows the trading of items with other
character.
Right click on a character to initiate.
[Lv 2]: Enables Emotions
Alt+(0~9) and Ctrl+(1,-,=.)
Alt+L opens additional Emotion icons.
[Lv 3]: Enables Sitting
Sitting doubles HP and SP regeneration
speed.
Press the Insert key or type /sit.
[Lv 4]: Enables Chat Room Creation
Alt+C to open a Chat Room or click the
Chat button in the Basic Information
Window.
[Lv 5]: Join a Party
Character can join a party.
[Lv 6]: Enables Use of Kafra Storage
Allows use of Kafra Storage.
[Lv 7]: Organize a Party
Create a party by typing
/organize ''Party Name''
Set party options in the Party Window (Alt+Z).
[Lv 9]: Enables Change to First Job Class
Qualifies character for change from Novice
to one of the First classes.

mc_inccarry.name: Enlarge Weight Limit
mc_inccarry.description:
Enlarge Weight Limit
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases maximum Weight Limit.
[Lv 1]: Weight capacity +200
[Lv 2]: Weight capacity +400
[Lv 3]: Weight capacity +600
[Lv 4]: Weight capacity +800
[Lv 5]: Weight capacity +1000
[Lv 6]: Weight capacity +1200
[Lv 7]: Weight capacity +1400
[Lv 8]: Weight capacity +1600
[Lv 9]: Weight capacity +1800
[Lv 10]: Weight capacity +2000

Comments: It is possible to have both this
skill and the Gym Pass version of this skill
simultaneously.

mc_mammonite.name: Mammonite
mc_mammonite.description:
Mammonite
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: Uses the power of greed to
strike a single target with a strong
blow, dealing high damage. Consumes
some Zeny.
[Lv 1]: 150% damage, Cost 100 Zeny
[Lv 2]: 200% damage, Cost 200 Zeny
[Lv 3]: 250% damage, Cost 300 Zeny
[Lv 4]: 300% damage, Cost 400 Zeny
[Lv 5]: 350% damage, Cost 500 Zeny
[Lv 6]: 400% damage, Cost 600 Zeny
[Lv 7]: 450% damage, Cost 700 Zeny
[Lv 8]: 500% damage, Cost 800 Zeny
[Lv 9]: 550% damage, Cost 900 Zeny
[Lv 10]: 600% damage, Cost 1000 Zeny

Comments: The common way to use
Mammonite is to look for 'Zeny Positive'
monsters, whose drops will sell for more
than the cost of killing them.

mc_identify.name: Item Appraisal
mc_identify.description:
Item Appraisal
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Identifies an unknown item,
making it available for use.

mc_discount.name: Discount
mc_discount.description:
Discount
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Enlarge Weight Limit 3
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Decreases the price of
items sold by NPC shops.
[Lv 1]: 7% Discount
[Lv 2]: 9% Discount
[Lv 3]: 11% Discount
[Lv 4]: 13% Discount
[Lv 5]: 15% Discount
[Lv 6]: 17% Discount
[Lv 7]: 19% Discount
[Lv 8]: 21% Discount
[Lv 9]: 23% Discount
[Lv 10]: 24% Discount

mc_pushcart.name: Pushcart
mc_pushcart.description:
Pushcart
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Enlarge Weight Limit 5
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Enables rental and use of
Pushcart which provide additional
storage for items, although items cannot
be directly used or equipped from
a Pushcart. Pushcart can be rented
from Kafra Employees.
Pushcart shortcut: (Alt+W)
[Lv 1]: 55% Movement speed
[Lv 2]: 60% Movement speed
[Lv 3]: 65% Movement speed
[Lv 4]: 70% Movement speed
[Lv 5]: 75% Movement speed
[Lv 6]: 80% Movement speed
[Lv 7]: 85% Movement speed
[Lv 8]: 90% Movement speed
[Lv 9]: 95% Movement speed
[Lv 10]: 100% Movement speed

mc_cartdecorate.name: Decorate Cart
mc_cartdecorate.description:
Change Cart 2
Requirement: Finish Quest
Type: Supportive
Description: You can choose a variety of
cute designs carts.

mc_overcharge.name: Overcharge
mc_overcharge.description:
Overcharge
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Discount 3
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases amount of Zeny
received for items sold to NPC shops.
[Lv 1]: 7% Overcharge
[Lv 2]: 9% Overcharge
[Lv 3]: 11% Overcharge
[Lv 4]: 13% Overcharge
[Lv 5]: 15% Overcharge
[Lv 6]: 17% Overcharge
[Lv 7]: 19% Overcharge
[Lv 8]: 21% Overcharge
[Lv 9]: 23% Overcharge
[Lv 10]: 24% Overcharge

mc_vending.name: Vending
mc_vending.description:
Vending
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Pushcart 3
Skill Form: Active
Description: Opens a street stall for
selling items to other players. Skill
level affects the number of items that
can be vended at a time. The items you
want to sell must be in the Pushcart, and the
character must have his Pushcart equipped.
[Lv 1]: Vend 3 items
[Lv 2]: Vend 4 items
[Lv 3]: Vend 5 items
[Lv 4]: Vend 6 items
[Lv 5]: Vend 7 items
[Lv 6]: Vend 8 items
[Lv 7]: Vend 9 items
[Lv 8]: Vend 10 items
[Lv 9]: Vend 11 items
[Lv 10]: Vend 12 items

Comments: Double check your items to make
sure you're not selling things at the wrong
value! Depending on your server's rules and
configuration, there might be a predetermined
area for opening shops. Also depending on
server configuration, you may have to pay tax
on every sale. You must remain logged in for
the shop to be visible to players, unless the
server allows the use of @autotrade
command.

bs_iron.name: Iron Tempering
bs_iron.description:
Iron Tempering
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Enables the tempering of
1 Iron with 1 Iron Ore and 1 Mini Furnace.
[Lv 1]: 45% Success chance
[Lv 2]: 50% Success chance
[Lv 3]: 55% Success chance
[Lv 4]: 60% Success chance
[Lv 5]: 65% Success chance

bs_hiltbinding.name: Hilt Binding
bs_hiltbinding.description:
Hilt Binding
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases the duration of
the Adrenaline Rush, Power Thrust and
Weapon Perfection skills by 10%.
This skill also adds +1 STR and +4 ATK.

bs_skintemper.name: Skin Tempering
bs_skintemper.description:
Skin Tempering
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases resistance to
Fire and Neutral elemental attacks.
[Lv 1]: Fire +5%, Neutral +1%
[Lv 2]: Fire +10%, Neutral +2%
[Lv 3]: Fire +15%, Neutral +3%
[Lv 4]: Fire +20%, Neutral +4%
[Lv 5]: Fire +25%, Neutral +5%

Comments: All normal attacks from monsters
are Neutral Property, and therefore this skill
reduces their damage by up to 5%. The fire
damage reduction is also highly substantial,
specially on maps such as Magma Dungeon
and Thor's Volcano, in which monsters are
capable of high damage bursts with Fire.

bs_hammerfall.name: Hammer Fall
bs_hammerfall.description:
Hammer Fall
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: Ground
Description: Pounds a targeted cell to Stun
enemies on the impact's vicinity.
This can only be used when Axe or
Mace class weapons are equipped.
[Lv 1]: 30% chance to Stun
[Lv 2]: 40% chance to Stun
[Lv 3]: 50% chance to Stun
[Lv 4]: 60% chance to Stun
[Lv 5]: 70% chance to Stun


Comments: Highly spammable but does not
do any damage.

bs_dagger.name: Smith Dagger
bs_dagger.description:
Smith Dagger
Max Level: 3
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Enables forging of Dagger class
weapons.

bs_steel.name: Steel Tempering
bs_steel.description:
Steel Tempering
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Iron Tempering 1
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Enables the tempering of
1 Steel with 5 Iron, 1 Coal and 1 Mini Furnace.
[Lv 1]: 35% Success chance
[Lv 2]: 40% Success chance
[Lv 3]: 45% Success chance
[Lv 4]: 50% Success chance
[Lv 5]: 55% Success chance

bs_enchantedstone.name: Enchanted Stone Craft
bs_enchantedstone.description:
Enchanted Stone Craft
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Iron Tempering 1
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Enables the refining of
enchanted ores with 10 Green Live, 10
Wind of Verdures, 10 Red Blood, 10
Crystal Blue or 10 Star Dust with a
Mini Furnace.
[Lv 1]: 15% Success chance
[Lv 2]: 20% Success chance
[Lv 3]: 25% Success chance
[Lv 4]: 30% Success chance
[Lv 5]: 35% Success chance

bs_weaponresearch.name: Weaponry Research
bs_weaponresearch.description:
Weaponry Research
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Hilt Binding 1
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Improves weapon knowledge in
order to create arms of higher quality.
In addition, there is a secret effect to this skill:
For every skill point assign to it, your final
chance to hit is improved by 2%. This bonus
is of the same type as Swordman's Bash,
Magnum Break, and Knight's Pierce. It's a
modifier upon the final chance to hit.
[Lv 1]: HIT/ATK+2, +1% Forge success
[Lv 2]: HIT/ATK+4, +2% Forge success
[Lv 3]: HIT/ATK+6, +3% Forge success
[Lv 4]: HIT/ATK+8, +4% Forge success
[Lv 5]: HIT/ATK+10, +5% Forge success
[Lv 6]: HIT/ATK+12, +6% Forge success
[Lv 7]: HIT/ATK+14, +7% Forge success
[Lv 8]: HIT/ATK+16, +8% Forge success
[Lv 9]: HIT/ATK+18, +9% Forge success
[Lv 10]: HIT/ATK+20, +10% Forge success

Comments: The damage bonuses granted by
this skill work the same way as Weapon
Masteries, however it never misses. If a
Whitesmith were to use Cart Termination on
an enemy and miss, so long as he has
Weaponry Research, he will still do a small
amount of damage and have a chance of
inflicting Stun(which is a property of Cart
Termination).

bs_adrenaline.name: Adrenaline Rush
bs_adrenaline.description:
Adrenaline Rush
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Hammerfall 2
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster and Party Members
Description: Improves the Attack Speed of Axe
and Mace weapon for the duration of skill.
[Lv 1]: 30 seconds duration
[Lv 2]: 60 seconds duration
[Lv 3]: 90 seconds duration
[Lv 4]: 120 seconds duration
[Lv 5]: 150 seconds duration

Comments: Gives 30% ASPD increase for
Blacksmiths and 25% to every party member
also using an Axe or Mace on screen.

bs_spear.name: Smith Spear
bs_spear.description:
Smith Spear
Max Level: 3
Requirement: Smith Dagger 2
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Enables forging of Spear class
weapons.

bs_sword.name: Smith Sword
bs_sword.description:
Smith Sword
Max Level: 3
Requirement: Smith Dagger 1
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Enables forging of Sword class
weapons.

bs_knuckle.name: Smith Knucklebrace
bs_knuckle.description:
Smith Brass Knuckle
Max Level: 3
Requirement: Smith Dagger 1
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Enables forging of Knuckle class
weapons.

bs_findingore.name: Ore Discovery
bs_findingore.description:
Finding Ore
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Hilt Binding 1,
Steel Tempering 1
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases the success rate of
finding ores dropped from monsters.

Comments: Elemental Stones, Enchanted
Stones, Emperium, Gold, Oridecon and
Elunium are among the list of possible drops,
although at extremely low chances.

bs_orideocon.name: Oridecon Research
bs_orideocon.description:
Research Oridecon
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Enchanted Stone Craft 1
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases the success rate of
forging items with Oridecon.

bs_repairweapon.name: Weapon Repair
bs_repairweapon.description:
Repair Weapon
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Weaponry Research 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Repairs damaged weapons.
Names of weapons that have been damaged
are displayed in red color.
Armors: Steel
Level 1 Weapon: Iron Ore
Level 2 Weapon: Iron
Level 3 Weapon: Steel
Level 4 Weapon: Rough Oridecon

Comments: Despite the name, you can repair
armors as well. A Whitesmith can break an
enemy player's Weapon and Armor(using
Meltdown) and then use Weapon Repair on
them, in order to take a glimpse at what they
are wearing.

bs_weaponperfect.name: Weapon Perfection
bs_weaponperfect.description:
Weapon Perfection
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Adrenaline Rush 2,
Weaponry Research 2
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster and Party Members
Description: Nullifies any reduction in damage
resulting from monster size.
[Lv 1]: 10 second duration
[Lv 2]: 20 second duration
[Lv 3]: 30 second duration
[Lv 4]: 40 second duration
[Lv 5]: 50 second duration

Comments: Every party member on screen
also receives the effect.

bs_overthrust.name: Power-Thrust
bs_overthrust.description:
Over Thrust
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Adrenaline Rush 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster and Party Members
Description: Enhances the Attack Power of
equipped Weapon with a 0.1% chance of
damaging that Weapon.
[Lv 1]: Damage +5%
[Lv 2]: Damage +10%
[Lv 3]: Damage +15%
[Lv 4]: Damage +20%
[Lv 5]: Damage +25%

Comments: Every party member on screen
receives the effect, which results in a very
significant increase in damage. However,
because of the 0.1% chance to break weapon
on every hit, you probably want to have repair
materials for your party members on hand.
Because Axes and Maces are naturally
indestructible, and those are the two most
common weapons a Blacksmith will want to
use, the destruction chance is usually
meaningless during solo play.
The damage boost granted by Overthrust is
linear, not a multiplier applied to final damage.
For example, when using Lv10 Mammonite
with Overthrust, the resulting attack will do
625% ATK damage.

bs_twohandsword.name: Smith Two-handed Sword
bs_twohandsword.description:
Smith Two-Handed Sword
Max Level: 3
Requirement: Smith Sword 1
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Enables forging of Two-Handed
Sword class weapons.

bs_mace.name: Smith Mace
bs_mace.description:
Smith Mace
Max Level: 3
Requirement: Smith Brass Knuckle 1
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Enables forging of Mace class
weapons.

bs_maximize.name: Maximize Power
bs_maximize.description:
Maximize Power
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Weapon Perfection 3,
Over Thrust 2
Skill Form: Active (Toggle)
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Amplifies Weapon Attack Power
by continuously draining a specific amount of
SP while skill is active.
This skill can be canceled by casting it once
again.
[Lv 1]: 1 SP drained every 1 second
[Lv 2]: 1 SP drained every 2 seconds
[Lv 3]: 1 SP drained every 3 seconds
[Lv 4]: 1 SP drained every 4 seconds
[Lv 5]: 1 SP drained every 5 seconds

Comments: This buff only has to be used
once and will remain permanently active until
it is used again(toggle on/off) or the user
dies. What Maximize Power does exactly is
eliminate almost all damage variation on
attacks, so that every hit does max damage.

bs_axe.name: Smith Axe
bs_axe.description:
Smith Axe
Max Level: 3
Requirement: Smith Sword 2
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Enables forging of Axe class
weapons.

ws_cartboost.name: Cart Boost
ws_cartboost.description:
Cart Boost
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Push Cart 5, Hilt Binding 1,
Cart Revolution, Change Cart
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Increases Movement Speed
when a Pushcart is equipped.
Any debuffs that reduce Movement Speed will
cancel this effect.

Comments: In order to unlock this skill, you
must have Change Cart and Cart Revolution,
both which are Quest Skills for Merchant.
As of a recent rAthena update, Dancer's skill
Please Don't Forget me no longer removes
this buff, it only prevents it from being refreshed.
The classic behavior was that the Dancer's
debuff would immediately cancel the effect,
effectively shutting down the Whitesmith's
ability to use their main damage skill.

ws_meltdown.name: Shattering Strike
ws_meltdown.description:
Melt Down
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Skin Tempering 3,
Hilt Binding 1, Weaponry Research 5,
Power Thrust 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: This skill has the chance of
destroying an equipped Weapon or Armor
when used in PvP zones, or to decrease
Attack Power or Defense when used on
monsters.
This skill's level affects its duration and rate of
success.
[Lv 1]: 1.0% for breaking Weapon,
0.7% for breaking Armor, 15 sec duration
[Lv 2]: 2.0% for breaking Weapon,
1.4% for breaking Armor, 20 sec duration
[Lv 3]: 3.0% for breaking Weapon,
2.1% for breaking Armor, 25 sec duration
[Lv 4]: 4.0% for breaking Weapon,
2.8% for breaking Armor, 30 sec duration
[Lv 5]: 5.0% for breaking Weapon,
3.5% for breaking Armor, 35 sec duration
[Lv 6]: 6.0% for breaking Weapon,
4.2% for breaking Armor, 40 sec duration
[Lv 7]: 7.0% for breaking Weapon,
4.9% for breaking Armor, 45 sec duration
[Lv 8]: 8.0% for breaking Weapon,
5.6% for breaking Armor, 50 sec duration
[Lv 9]: 9.0% for breaking Weapon,
6.3% for breaking Armor, 55 sec duration
[Lv 10]: 10.0% for breaking Weapon,
7.0% for breaking Armor, 60 sec duration

Comments: Cart Termination and Throw
Tomahawk do not trigger this buff's effect, but
auto attacks and any other skill will work.

ws_weaponrefine.name: Upgrade Weapon
ws_weaponrefine.description:
Weapon Refine
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Weaponry Research 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Crafting
Target: Caster
Description: Refines weapons to increase their
refinement. Unlike weapon smithing, which is
affected by DEX and LUK, this skill's success
rate is affected by the user's Job Level alone.
Whitesmith has same rate of success as Item
Upgrade NPCs at Job Level 50, has 5%
greater chance of success than Item Upgrade
NPCs at Job Level 60, and have a 10% greater
chance of success at Job Level 70.
If upgrade attempt fails, the weapon will be
destroyed.
Level 1 Weapon require 1 Phracon.
Level 2 Weapon require 1 Emveretarcon.
Level 3-4 Weapon requires 1 Oridecon.
[Lv 1]: Up to +1 maximum refine level
[Lv 2]: Up to +2 maximum refine level
[Lv 3]: Up to +3 maximum refine level
[Lv 4]: Up to +4 maximum refine level
[Lv 5]: Up to +5 maximum refine level
[Lv 6]: Up to +6 maximum refine level
[Lv 7]: Up to +7 maximum refine level
[Lv 8]: Up to +8 maximum refine level
[Lv 9]: Up to +9 maximum refine level
[Lv 10]: Up to +10 maximum refine level

Comments: This skill is only for Weapons, not
Armors. The success chance increases by
0.5% for each Job Level above 50. If the
Whitesmith is below Job50, the chance of
success is lower than the normal NPC.

ws_overthrustmax.name: Maximum Power Thrust
ws_overthrustmax.description:
Maximum Over Thrust
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Over Thrust 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Increases Weapon Damage by
spending a certain amount of Zeny.
Unlike regular Overthrust, only affects the
user. Has 0.1% chance of destroying user's
weapon every time when attacking.
[Lv 1]: 20% damage, 3,000 zeny
[Lv 2]: 40% damage, 3,500 zeny
[Lv 3]: 60% damage, 4,000 zeny
[Lv 4]: 80% damage, 4,000 zeny
[Lv 5]: 100% damage, 5,000 zeny

Comments: This skill is a direct upgrade over
the normal Overthrust skill, having the exact
same properties.

ws_carttermination.name: Cart Termination
ws_carttermination.description:
Cart Termination
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Hammerfall 5,
Mammonite 10, Cart Boost 1
Description: This skill is only enabled during
Cart Boost status.
Spends a certain amount of Zeny to smash
the Pushcart into an enemy with a chance of
inflicting the Stun status.
This skill's damage is affected by the weight
of the Pushcart..
[Lv 1]: ATK*(Weight/15) Damage, 600 zeny,
5% Stun chance
[Lv 2]: ATK*(Weight/14) Damage, 700 zeny,
10% Stun chance
[Lv 3]: ATK*(Weight/13) Damage, 800 zeny,
15% Stun chance
[Lv 4]: ATK*(Weight/12) Damage, 900 zeny,
20% Stun chance
[Lv 5]: ATK*(Weight/11) Damage, 1,000 zeny,
25% Stun chance
[Lv 6]: ATK*(Weight/10) Damage, 1,100 zeny,
30% Stun chance
[Lv 7]: ATK*(Weight/9) Damage, 1,200 zeny,
35% Stun chance
[Lv 8]: ATK*(Weight/8) Damage, 1,300 zeny,
40% Stun chance
[Lv 9]: ATK*(Weight/7) Damage, 1,400 zeny,
45% Stun chance
[Lv 10]: ATK*(Weight/6) Damage, 1,500 zeny,
50% Stun chance

Comments: If you have a completely filled
Pushcart, at 8000/8000 capacity, using this
skill at Max Level will result in 1.333% ATK
damage.
When using this skill with either Overthrust or
Maximum Overthrust, the bonuses are added
linearly to the ATK modifier. Using the same
example above, it results in 1.358% ATK using
Overthrust, and 1433% using Max Overthrust.
A particularly useful property of this skill is
the fact that it is capable of bypassing several
defensive effects. Auto-Guard, Parrying, Energy
Coat, Cicada Skin Shedding and all Reflect
Damage effects(both from skills and gear).
This skill's damage is not affected by any
+% damage cards, only flat +ATK bonuses
will work. The effects of Ice Pick and Thanatos
Card work with this skill.

bs_adrenaline2.name: Advanced Adrenaline Rush
bs_adrenaline2.description:
Full Adrenaline Rush
Requirement: Adrenaline Rush 5,
Spirit State
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Increases character's
Attack Speed with every Weapon by 30%.
Increases nearby party member's Attack Speed
with every Weapons except ranged by 20%.
Does not stack with other skills that directly
increase Attack Speed.

bs_greed.name: Greed
bs_greed.description:
Greed
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 2 cells around the caster
Description: When you use this skill, all items
within 2 cells of the Blacksmith are picked up.
It is not possible to use this skill during the
War of Emperium or in PvP.
Do note this skill does not bypass the order of
who gets an item first, so you cannot use this
skill to snatch an item when another player has
the first priority over the item dropped.

bs_unfairlytrick.name: Unfair Trick
bs_unfairlytrick.description:
Unfair Trick
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Reduces the Zeny cost of
Mammonite by 10%.

mc_cartrevolution.name: Cart Revolution
mc_cartrevolution.description:
Cart Revolution
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Special Physical, AoE
Target: 1 Character
Description: A splashed damage attack in
which a Pushcart is smashed into a target.
Inflicts 150% of the damage of a normal attack
+1% for every 1% of the cart's max capacity
filled.

mc_changecart.name: Change Cart
mc_changecart.description:
Change Cart
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Changes the Pushcart
appearance. There are five different Pushcart
styles that are chosen according to the
character's Base Level.

mc_loud.name: Crazy Uproar
mc_loud.description:
Crazy Uproar
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Screams with battle vigor to
add +4 STR for 5 minutes.

nv_firstaid.name: First Aid
nv_firstaid.description:
First Aid
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Recovery
Target: Caster
Description: Uses 3 SP to restore 5 HP.

nv_trickdead.name: Play Dead
nv_trickdead.description:
Play Dead
Requirement: Finish Quest, Novice Only
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Feigns death to avoid the
menace of nearby enemies. The Play
Dead status is canceled by casting
this skill again.

Comments: This skill ceases to function after
jobchanging to any other class, including
Super Novice. Swordsman's Provoke and
Sage's Dispel can cancel the effect. All
monsters will be fooled, even Bosses and
MvPs.

nv_basic.name: Basic Skill
nv_basic.description:
Basic Skill
Max Level: 9
Enables the use of Basic Interface Skills.
[Lv 1]: Enables Trading
Allows the trading of items with other
character.
Right click on a character to initiate.
[Lv 2]: Enables Emotions
Alt+(0~9) and Ctrl+(1,-,=.)
Alt+L opens additional Emotion icons.
[Lv 3]: Enables Sitting
Sitting doubles HP and SP regeneration
speed.
Press the Insert key or type /sit.
[Lv 4]: Enables Chat Room Creation
Alt+C to open a Chat Room or click the
Chat button in the Basic Information
Window.
[Lv 5]: Join a Party
Character can join a party.
[Lv 6]: Enables Use of Kafra Storage
Allows use of Kafra Storage.
[Lv 7]: Organize a Party
Create a party by typing
/organize ''Party Name''
Set party options in the Party Window (Alt+Z).
[Lv 9]: Enables Change to First Job Class
Qualifies character for change from Novice
to one of the First classes.

ac_double.name: Double Strafe
ac_double.description:
Double Strafing
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Vulture's Eye 10
Skill Form: Physical attack
Description: A ranged attack, that fires two
arrows. Increases attack range by 3.
Requires Bow class weapon.
Consumes 1 Arrow.
[Lv 1]: 200% damage
[Lv 2]: 220% damage
[Lv 3]: 240% damage
[Lv 4]: 260% damage
[Lv 5]: 280% damage
[Lv 6]: 300% damage
[Lv 7]: 320% damage
[Lv 8]: 340% damage
[Lv 9]: 360% damage
[Lv 10]: 380% damage

Comments: The basic skill attack for Archers.
Capable of dealing a lot of damage from a safe
distance. Increasing your Attack Speed will
allow you to spam this skill even faster.

ac_owl.name: Owl's Eye
ac_owl.description:
Owl's Eye
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases DEX.
[Lv 1]: Dex +1
[Lv 2]: Dex +2
[Lv 3]: Dex +3
[Lv 4]: Dex +4
[Lv 5]: Dex +5
[Lv 6]: Dex +6
[Lv 7]: Dex +7
[Lv 8]: Dex +8
[Lv 9]: Dex +9
[Lv 10]: Dex +10

ac_shower.name: Arrow Shower
ac_shower.description:
Arrow Shower
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Double Strafing 5
Skill Form: Physical attack
Description: A 5x5 splash attack that damages
all enemies around the target. Knock back
enemies by 2 cells.
Requires Bow class weapon.
Consumes 1 Arrow.
[Lv 1]: 80% damage
[Lv 2]: 85% damage
[Lv 3]: 90% damage
[Lv 4]: 95% damage
[Lv 5]: 100% damage
[Lv 6]: 105% damage
[Lv 7]: 110% damage
[Lv 8]: 115% damage
[Lv 9]: 120% damage
[Lv 10]: 125% damage

Comments: This skill is not good for killing
groups of enemies, both because it does low
damage and because it disperses them. The
most common use for it is to push Hunter
traps, or to spread status effects using
specialized bows.
For Trap focused Hunters in particular, this
skill is key to their gameplay. Arrow Shower is
capable if accurately pushing traps in any
direction.

ac_vulture.name: Vulture's Eye
ac_vulture.description:
Vulture's Eye
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Owl's Eye 3
Requirement: Owl's Eye 3
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases Attack Range
and HIT with Bow class weapons.
[Lv 1]: Range and HIT +1
[Lv 2]: Range and HIT +2
[Lv 3]: Range and HIT +3
[Lv 4]: Range and HIT +4
[Lv 5]: Range and HIT +5
[Lv 6]: Range and HIT +6
[Lv 7]: Range and HIT +7
[Lv 8]: Range and HIT +8
[Lv 9]: Range and HIT +9
[Lv 10]: Range and HIT +10

ac_concentration.name: Improve Concentration
ac_concentration.description:
Improve Concentration
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Vulture's Eye 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Boosts AGI and DEX
temporarily as well as detects nearby
hidden characters in 3x3 AoE.
[Lv 1]: Agi and Dex +3% for 60 sec
[Lv 2]: Agi and Dex +4% for 80 sec
[Lv 3]: Agi and Dex +5% for 100 sec
[Lv 4]: Agi and Dex +6% for 120 sec
[Lv 5]: Agi and Dex +7% for 140 sec
[Lv 6]: Agi and Dex +8% for 160 sec
[Lv 7]: Agi and Dex +9% for 180 sec
[Lv 8]: Agi and Dex +10% for 200 sec
[Lv 9]: Agi and Dex +11% for 220 sec
[Lv 10]: Agi and Dex +12% for 240 sec

ht_beastbane.name: Beast Bane
ht_beastbane.description:
Beast Bane
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases Attack Power
against Brute and Insect race monsters.
[Lv 1]: Damage +4
[Lv 2]: Damage +8
[Lv 3]: Damage +12
[Lv 4]: Damage +16
[Lv 5]: Damage +20
[Lv 6]: Damage +24
[Lv 7]: Damage +28
[Lv 8]: Damage +32
[Lv 9]: Damage +36
[Lv 10]: Damage +40

Comments: The bonus from this skill is similar
to Weapon Masteries, in which they only offer a
flat increase at the end of damage calculation.

ht_skidtrap.name: Skid Trap
ht_skidtrap.description:
Skid Trap
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Trap (Hidden)
Target: Ground
Description: Sets a trap which will make an
enemy slide in the direction that the caster was
facing at the moment the trap was set.
Consumes 1 Trap.
[Lv 1]: 6 cell sliding range, 300 sec
[Lv 2]: 7 cell sliding range, 240 sec
[Lv 3]: 8 cell sliding range, 180 sec
[Lv 4]: 9 cell sliding range, 120 sec
[Lv 5]: 10 cell sliding range, 60 sec

Comments: Cannot be placed directly under
enemies, unless the server admin explicitly
enabled such setting(by default it will not).
Takes a little practice but surprisingly easy to
use after you understand how it works. The
trap can be moved in any direction using Arrow
Shower. You can push a trap underneath a
target in this manner.
Pushback effects are disabled in WoE and
GvG but in normal PvP scenarios, this skill will
trigger when the user(or allies) steps on it, or
pushes the trap underneath himself.

ht_landmine.name: Land Mine
ht_landmine.description:
Land Mine
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Trap (Hidden)
Target: Ground
Element: Earth
Description: Sets a trap which will explode
once an enemy steps on it.
Consumes 1 Trap.
This skill deals damage based directly on
your stats, without looking at your ATK stat.
[Lv 1]: 1 * (DEX +75) * ((100 +INT)/100),
200 sec duration
[Lv 2]: 2 * (DEX +75) * ((100 +INT)/100),
160 sec duration
[Lv 3]: 3 * (DEX +75) * ((100 +INT)/100),
120 sec duration
[Lv 4]: 4 * (DEX +75) * ((100 +INT)/100),
80 sec duration
[Lv 5]: 5 * (DEX +75) * ((100 +INT)/100),
40 sec duration

Comments: Cannot be placed directly under
enemies unless the server admin explicitly
enabled such setting(by default it will not).
Scales with both DEX and INT and deals Earth
element damage.
The trap can be moved in any direction using
Arrow Shower. You can push a trap
underneath a target in this manner. In PvP
and WoE, the trap does not distinguish
between friend and foe and will affect anybody
who steps on it.
Older descriptions will erroneously state that
this skill deals damage based on your ATK
but that is incorrect. Numbers displayed here
taken directly from the source code.

ht_falcon.name: Falconry Mastery
ht_falcon.description:
Falconry Mastery
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Beastbane 1
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Enables renting of a Falcon from
the Hunter Guild.

ht_flasher.name: Flasher
ht_flasher.description:
Flasher
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Skid Trap 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Trap (Hidden)
Target: Ground
Description: Sets a trap which will emit intense
light, which may inflict the target with the Blind
status.
Consumes 2 Traps.
[Lv 1]: 150 sec duration
[Lv 2]: 120 sec duration
[Lv 3]: 90 sec duration
[Lv 4]: 60 sec duration
[Lv 5]: 30 sec duration

Comments: Cannot be placed directly under
enemies unless the server admin explicitly
enabled such setting(by default it will not).
The trap can be moved in any direction using
Arrow Shower. You can push a trap
underneath a target in this manner. In PvP
and WoE, the trap does not distinguish
between friend and foe and will affect anybody
who steps on it, even the Hunter himself.

ht_anklesnare.name: Ankle Snare
ht_anklesnare.description:
Ankle Snare
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Skid Trap 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Trap (Hidden)
Target: Ground
Description: Sets a trap that will bind an enemy
to the ground for the skill's duration, which is
affected by the AGI of the target.
Consumes 1 Trap.
[Lv 1]: 250 seconds on the ground,
4 seconds ensnared
[Lv 2]: 200 seconds on the ground,
8 seconds ensnared
[Lv 3]: 150 seconds on the ground,
12 seconds ensnared
[Lv 4]: 100 seconds on the ground,
16 seconds ensnared
[Lv 5]: 50 seconds on the ground,
20 seconds ensnared

Comments: Cannot be placed directly under
enemies unless the server admin explicitly
enabled such setting(by default it will not).
Arguably the most powerful of all trap skills.
Traps last 4x longer in WoE. In PvP and WoE,
Ankle Snares will ensnare anything, including
the user and his allies, if they step on it. Boss
monsters can be ensnared and will NOT
activate their Rude Attacked AI skill, but
will only be caught for 1/5 of the duration. This
trap cannot be pushed around with Arrow
Shower.

ht_removetrap.name: Remove Trap
ht_removetrap.description:
Remove Trap
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Land Mine 1
Requirement: Double Strafe 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Ground
Description: Removes a trap that has been
set on the ground, as well as regain that Trap.

Comments: Removing a trap returns 1 trap to
your inventory, but since some traps require
2 to be placed, you might not be getting all
traps back by doing this. You can and should
remove traps placed by enemies in PvP and
WoE. You can use this skill to remove an
Ankle Snare currently ensnaring a player(or
yourself), releasing them immediately.

ht_blitzbeat.name: Blitz Beat
ht_blitzbeat.description:
Blitz Beat
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Falconry Mastery 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Special Physical
Target: 1 Character
Description: Commands Falcon to attack a
targeted enemy. Leveling this skill also
adds a chance for auto-attacks to passively
activate this skill, but only with
Bow class weapons.
The Falcon's Attack Range is equal to the
level of Vulture's Eye skill +5.
[Lv 1]: 1 HIT
[Lv 2]: 2 HITs
[Lv 3]: 3 HITs
[Lv 4]: 4 HITs
[Lv 5]: 5 HITs

Comments: Damage scales with INT and
DEX, as well as your learned level of Steel
Crow. Damage is forced Neutral and is not
affected by any cards or equipment that
increase ATK or damage. Any equipment
that triggers effects on attack will not trigger
with Blitz Beat.
While auto-attacking, so long as you have
learned the skill, there's a chance of
auto-activating Blitz Beat on every attack. This
chance increases by 1% for every 3 points
of LUK.
Blitz Beat does damage in a 3x3 area to every
enemy. If the skill was auto-cast from a normal
attack, the damage will be split among all
targets. Otherwise, every target receives full
damage.

ht_sandman.name: Sandman
ht_sandman.description:
Sandman
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Flasher 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Trap (Hidden)
Target: Ground
Description: Sets a trap that will cause the
enemy that steps on it, as well as enemies
within the trap's range, to fall asleep.
Consumes 1 Trap.
[Lv 1]: 150 sec duration, 50% chance
[Lv 2]: 120 sec duration, 60% chance
[Lv 3]: 90 sec duration, 70% chance
[Lv 4]: 60 sec duration, 80% chance
[Lv 5]: 30 sec duration, 90% chance

Comments: Cannot be placed directly under
enemies unless the server admin explicitly
enabled such setting(by default it will not). Will
cause the effect on a 5x5 area when activated.
The trap can be moved in any direction using
Arrow Shower. You can push a trap
underneath a target in this manner. In PvP
and WoE, the trap does not distinguish
between friend and foe and will affect anybody
who steps on it, even the Hunter himself.

ht_freezingtrap.name: Freezing Trap
ht_freezingtrap.description:
Freezing Trap
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Flasher 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Trap (Hidden)
Target: Ground
Element: Water
Description: Sets a trap which will Freeze an
enemy once it has been triggered.
Damage is equal to 100% of your ATK, chance
to freeze is 100%(can be reduced by factors
such as MDEF and equipment). Higher skill
levels place traps that last less time but the
duration of the Freeze effect increases.
Consumes 2 Traps.
[Lv 1]: 150 sec trap duration, 3 seconds
Freeze duration
[Lv 2]: 120 sec trap duration, 6 seconds
Freeze duration
[Lv 3]: 90 sec trap duration, 7 seconds
Freeze duration
[Lv 4]: 60 sec trap duration, 12 seconds
Freeze duration
[Lv 5]: 30 sec trap duration, 15 seconds
Freeze duration

Comments: Cannot be placed directly under
enemies unless the server admin explicitly
enabled such setting(by default it will not).
Unlike skills such as Frost Nova and Storm
Gust, if a frozen enemy is hit by a Freezing
Trap, it will take damage and be released.
Does Water damage but unlike other damage
traps, does not scale with INT.
The trap can be moved in any direction using
Arrow Shower. You can push a trap
underneath a target in this manner. In PvP
and WoE, the trap does not distinguish
between friend and foe and will affect anybody
who steps on it, even the Hunter himself.

ht_shockwave.name: Shockwave Trap
ht_shockwave.description:
Shockwave Trap
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Anklesnare 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Trap (Hidden)
Target: Ground
Description: Sets a trap which will drain SP
away from enemies.
Consumes 2 Traps.
[Lv 1]: 20% MaxSP drain, 200 sec duration
[Lv 2]: 35% MaxSP drain, 160 sec duration
[Lv 3]: 50% MaxSP drain, 120 sec duration
[Lv 4]: 65% MaxSP drain, 80 sec duration
[Lv 5]: 80% MaxSP drain, 40 sec duration

Comments: Cannot be placed directly under
enemies unless the server admin explicitly
enabled such setting(by default it will not).
Shockwaves can be used anywhere but really
only have any effect against players,
wrecking their SP. The trap can be moved in
any direction using Arrow Shower. It is
possible to push Shockwave Traps
underneath targets by doing this. In PvP and
WoE, the trap does not distinguish between
friend and foe and will drain the SP of anybody
who steps on it, including the Hunter himself.

ht_springtrap.name: Spring Trap
ht_springtrap.description:
Spring Trap
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Remove Trap 1,
Falconry Mastery 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Ground
Description: Commands Falcon to remove a
set trap from a distance.

Comments: Destroys a trap from a safe
distance. Unlike the regular Remove Trap skill,
you do not regain the Trap item by destroying
it with this skill. This skill is very useful in WoE,
allowing a Hunter or Sniper to destroy an
enemy Guild's traps from distance.

ht_detecting.name: Detect
ht_detecting.description:
Detect
Max Level: 4
Requirement: Improve Concentration 1,
Falconry Mastery 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Ground
Description: Commands a Falcon to detect
hidden enemies from a distance.
[Lv 1]: 3 cells range
[Lv 2]: 5 cells range
[Lv 3]: 7 cells range
[Lv 4]: 9 cells range

Comments: Reveals any stealthed enemies
around the area. Because you are stuck in
animation lock while using this skill, it's
possible that an enemy will go into stealth
again before you're able to attack it.
Does not reveal targets stealthed by Stalker's
Chase work, but will work on Cloaking
and Hiding.

ht_steelcrow.name: Steel Crow
ht_steelcrow.description:
Steel Crow
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Blitz Beat 5
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases the damage
inflicted by Falcon.
[Lv 1]: Damage +6
[Lv 2]: Damage +12
[Lv 3]: Damage +18
[Lv 4]: Damage +24
[Lv 5]: Damage +30
[Lv 6]: Damage +36
[Lv 7]: Damage +42
[Lv 8]: Damage +48
[Lv 9]: Damage +54
[Lv 10]: Damage +60

ht_blastmine.name: Blast Mine
ht_blastmine.description:
Blast Mine
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Sandman 1,
Land Mine 1, Freezing Trap 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Trap (Hidden)
Target: Ground
Element: Wind
Description: Sets a trap that will automatically
explode after a specific time period
determined by the level of the skill.
Consumes 1 Trap.
This skill deals damage based directly on
your stats, without looking at your ATK stat.
[Lv 1]: 1 * (50 +(DEX/2)) * ((100 +INT)/100),
25 sec duration
[Lv 2]: 2 * (50 +(DEX/2)) * ((100 +INT)/100),
20 sec duration
[Lv 3]: 3 * (50 +(DEX/2)) * ((100 +INT)/100),
15 sec duration
[Lv 4]: 4 * (50 +(DEX/2)) * ((100 +INT)/100),
10 sec duration
[Lv 5]: 5 * (50 +(DEX/2)) * ((100 +INT)/100),
5 sec duration

Comments: Cannot be placed directly under
enemies unless the server admin explicitly
enabled such setting(by default it will not).
Scales with both DEX and INT and deals Wind
element damage.
The trap can be moved in any direction using
Arrow Shower. You can push a trap
underneath a target in this manner. In PvP
and WoE, the trap does not distinguish
between friend and foe and will affect anybody
who steps on it, even the Hunter himself.

ht_talkiebox.name: Talkie Box
ht_talkiebox.description:
Talkie Box
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Remove Trap 1,
Shockwave Trap 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Trap (Hidden)
Target: Ground
Description: Sets a trap which will last for 600
seconds and will display a prepared message
for the person who triggers it.
Consumes 1 Trap.

Comments: Has no combat usefulness.

ht_claymoretrap.name: Claymore Trap
ht_claymoretrap.description:
Claymore Trap
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Blast Mine 1,
Shockwave Trap 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Trap (Visible)
Target: Ground
Element: Fire
Description: Sets a trap which will inflict
splashed damage.
Consumes 2 Traps.
This skill deals damage based directly on
your stats, without looking at your ATK stat.
[Lv 1]: 1 * (75 +(DEX/2)) * ((100 +INT)/100),
20 sec duration
[Lv 2]: 2 * (75 +(DEX/2)) * ((100 +INT)/100),
40 sec duration
[Lv 3]: 3 * (75 +(DEX/2)) * ((100 +INT)/100),
60 sec duration
[Lv 4]: 4 * (75 +(DEX/2)) * ((100 +INT)/100),
80 sec duration
[Lv 5]: 5 * (75 +(DEX/2)) * ((100 +INT)/100),
100 sec duration

Comments: Cannot be placed directly under
enemies unless the server admin explicitly
enabled such setting(by default it will not).
Scales with both DEX and INT and deals Fire
element damage.
The trap can be moved in any direction using
Arrow Shower. You can push a trap
underneath a target in this manner. In PvP
and WoE, the trap does not distinguish
between friend and foe and will affect anybody
who steps on it, even the Hunter himself.

sn_sharpshooting.name: Focused Arrow Strike
sn_sharpshooting.description:
Sharp Shooting
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Double Strafe 5,
Improve Concentration 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Ranged
Target: 1 Character
Range: 9 cells
Description: Shoots an arrow with incredible
might directly towards a targeted spot, greatly
damaging any enemies in its path.
This skill can cause Critical Damage and has
a natural Critical +20 bonus at all levels.
[Lv 1]: 250% ATK
[Lv 2]: 300% ATK
[Lv 3]: 350% ATK
[Lv 4]: 400% ATK
[Lv 5]: 450% ATK

Comments: Sharpshooting is one of the very
few skills in the game that can Crit. Only items
and bonuses that show up in the Status
Window will affect the chance. As such, items
such as Drosera and Assaulter Card do not
help.
This skill's area of effect is a 14x3 Corridor AoE
that runs along a line between the caster and
the target, doing full damage to everything
in its path. The default and official behavior of
this skill is that the AoE is fixed as one of the
4 linear(+) and 4 diagonal(x) directions. Server
admins can bypass this limitation by disabling
eightpath_algorithm within the server's
configuration.

sn_windwalk.name: Wind Walker
sn_windwalk.description:
Wind Walk
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Improve Concentration 9
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster and Party Members
Description: Increases Movement Speed
and FLEE rate of the caster and Party Members.
The Movement Speed bonus will not stack
with any other Movement Speed buffs, such
as Increase Agility and Cart Boost.
Skills which decrease Movement Speed, such
as Quagmire, cancel the effect.
[Lv 1]: +2% Movement Speed, +1 FLEE,
130 seconds duration
[Lv 2]: +4% Movement Speed, +1 FLEE,
160 seconds duration
[Lv 3]: +6% Movement Speed, +2 FLEE,
190 seconds duration
[Lv 4]: +8% Movement Speed, +2 FLEE,
220 seconds duration
[Lv 5]: +10% Movement Speed, +3 FLEE,
250 seconds duration
[Lv 6]: +12% Movement Speed, +3 FLEE,
280 seconds duration
[Lv 7]: +14% Movement Speed, +4 FLEE,
310 seconds duration
[Lv 8]: +16% Movement Speed, +4 FLEE,
340 seconds duration
[Lv 9]: +18% Movement Speed, +5 FLEE,
370 seconds duration
[Lv 10]: +20% Movement Speed, +5 FLEE,
400 seconds duration

sn_sight.name: Falcon Eyes
sn_sight.description:
True Sight
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Owl's Eye 10,
Vulture's Eye 10, Improve Concentration 10,
Falconry Mastery 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Adds +5 to all Stats. Increases
HIT rate, damage and Critical.
[Lv 1]: HIT +3, Damage +2%, CRIT +1
[Lv 2]: HIT +6, Damage +4%, CRIT +2
[Lv 3]: HIT +9, Damage +6%, CRIT +3
[Lv 4]: HIT +12, Damage +8%, CRIT +4
[Lv 5]: HIT +15, Damage +10%, CRIT +5
[Lv 6]: HIT +18, Damage +12%, CRIT +6
[Lv 7]: HIT +21, Damage +14%, CRIT +7
[Lv 8]: HIT +24, Damage +16%, CRIT +8
[Lv 9]: HIT +27, Damage +18%, CRIT +9
[Lv 10]: HIT +30, Damage +20%, CRIT +10

sn_falconassault.name: Falcon Assault
sn_falconassault.description:
Falcon Assault
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Vulture's Eye 5,
