8+(MaxSP/125)SP recovery ticks
[Lv 5]: 20+(MaxHP/100)HP recovery ticks,
10+(MaxSP/100)SP recovery ticks

Comments: You need to be standing still
for the ticks to happen, but doesn't require
to be sitting. The user can be standing or
even in combat.
Continues to work while in Critical Explosion
status.

mo_combofinish.name: Raging Thrust
mo_combofinish.description:
Combo Finish
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Chain Combo 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: Only usable during Chain
Combo delay. This skill can be followed
up with the Asura Strike skill
if the caster is in Explosion Spirits status and
has at least 4 Spirit Sphere active.
Consumes 1 Spirit Sphere.
[Lv 1]: 300% ATK
[Lv 2]: 360% ATK
[Lv 3]: 420% ATK
[Lv 4]: 580% ATK
[Lv 5]: 540% ATK

Comments: Because a Monk can only have
up to 5 Spheres and this skill costs 1, in
order to have enough Spheres for an Asura
Strike, you must have started the combo with
the max amount of Spiritual Spheres.

mo_extremityfist.name: Asura Strike
mo_extremityfist.description:
Asura Strike
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Explosion Spirits 3,
Finger Offensive 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: Only usable during
Explosion Spirits status. Inflicts
devastating damage by consuming the
caster's remaining SP. After using
Asura Strike, the Explosion Spirits status
is automatically canceled and will not able
to restore SP for 10 seconds.
Consumes 5 Spirit Spheres.
[Lv 1]: 4.0 sec Cast Time,
3.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 2]: 3.5 sec Cast Time,
2.5 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 3]: 3.0 sec Cast Time,
2.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 4]: 2.5 sec Cast Time,
1.5 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 5]: 2.0 sec Cast Time,
1.0 sec After Cast Delay

Comments: Damage is based on the user's
ATK, your remaining SP while casting, the
SkillLv of Asura Strike and the number of
Spiritual Spheres remaining at the end of
casting.
The damage is always Neutral but will follow
+% damage cards in your equipment. The
casting can be interrupted.
Asura Strike can be used at the end of a
Combo, and when used in such way it does
not have a cast time. The skill can also be
used during Blade Stop, if the user has the
skill learned at Lv5.
SP Regeneration is disabled for 5 minutes
after Asura Strike has been used, but
you can remove this effect by relogging.

mo_steelbody.name: Mental Strength
mo_steelbody.description:
Steel Body
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Combo Finish 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Temporarily enhance caster's
Defense and Magic Defense while
decreasing Movement and Attack Speed.
While this skill is active, other skills
cannot be used.
Consumes 5 Spirit Spheres.
[Lv 1]: 30 seconds duration
[Lv 2]: 60 seconds duration
[Lv 3]: 90 seconds duration
[Lv 4]: 120 seconds duration
[Lv 5]: 150 seconds duration

Comments: This skill will set the user's
Hard DEF and Hard MDEF to exactly 90.
Any Hard DEF or MDEF on your equipment is
ignored, even if you change equipment after
casting. The cast time cannot be interrupted.
The user can still use items freely in this state.
Monks in Steel Body can still auto-cast skills.

mo_bodyrelocation.name: Snap
mo_bodyrelocation.description:
Body Relocation
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Spirit Recovery 2,
Asura Strike 3, Steel Body 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Ground
Description: Instantly teleport to a targeted
spot if there are no obstacles between the
caster and destination.
Consumes 1 Spirit Sphere
when not in Explosion Spirits status.

Comments: Body Relocation is the best
movement skill in the game, allowing
Monks and Champions to instantly move
to any cell in range. While in Critical Explosion
status, will not consume any Spirit Spheres.
Every time the skill is used, Asura Strike will
immediately enter a 3 second cooldown.

ch_palmstrike.name: Raging Palm Strike
ch_palmstrike.description:
Palm Push Strike
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Iron Hand 7,
Call Spirits 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: Strikes an enemy using your
palms, pushing back the enemy and causing
damage after a 1 second delay.
This skill can only be used during the
Critical Explosion status.
[Lv 1]: 300% damage
[Lv 2]: 400% damage
[Lv 3]: 500% damage
[Lv 4]: 600% damage
[Lv 5]: 700% damage

Comments: This skill has a very unique
property, in which damage and pushback
are delayed after activation. This has a number
of uses. It is possible, for example, to push
an enemy out of Safety Wall in order to expose
them to an Asura Strike. Because the shove
is delayed, you can start casting Asura before
the pushback actually happens, giving the
enemy no time to react.
By activating the skill multiple times on the
same target, it's possible to queue up several
instances of Palm Push Strike, which will all
cause damage and push back the enemy.
You can queue up as many instances as you
can fit in the 1 second window before the first
one activates. Having high ASPD lets you do it
faster, and therefore more times.
Very useful for overwhelming Ninja's Cicada
skin Shed.
The direction the enemy will be pushed
towards depends on the user's location
when the effect takes place, not when the skill
was used, which can be used to further
confuse enemies. Applying Palm Push Strike
to an enemy and then Body Relocating into the
same cell he is standing will result on a
Westward push.

ch_soulcollect.name: Zen
ch_soulcollect.description:
Dangerous Soul Collect
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Explosion Spirits 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Summons 5 Spirit Spheres once.
The cast time of this skill is twice the cast time
of the Call Spirits skill and can be interrupted.

ch_tigerfist.name: Glacier Fist
ch_tigerfist.description:
Tiger Fist
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Iron Hand 5,
Triple Attack 5, Combo Finish 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: A combo skill that can be cast
after using Combo Finish or
Chain Crush Combo.
An enemy hit by this skill is immobilized for a
short period of time by chance.
Consumes 1 Spirit Sphere.
[Lv 1]: 140% ATK, immobilized chance 20%
[Lv 2]: 240% ATK, immobilized chance 30%
[Lv 3]: 340% ATK, immobilized chance 40%
[Lv 4]: 440% ATK, immobilized chance 50%
[Lv 5]: 540% ATK, immobilized chance 60%

Comments: The length of time for which an
enemy is imobilized depends on the target's
AGI.

ch_chaincrush.name: Chain Crush Combo
ch_chaincrush.description:
Chain Crush Combo
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Iron Hand 5,
Call Spirits 5, Tiger Fist 2
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: Also a combination skill, can only
be chained after Combo Finish or Tiger
Fist. Tiger Fist can not be
chained after this, but Asura Strike can.
[Lv 1]: 500% damage
[Lv 2]: 600% damage
[Lv 3]: 700% damage
[Lv 4]: 800% damage
[Lv 5]: 900% damage
[Lv 6]: 1000% damage
[Lv 7]: 1100% damage
[Lv 8]: 1200% damage
[Lv 9]: 1300% damage
[Lv 10]: 1400% damage

Comments: Just like Combo Finish, Asura
Strike can be used without any Cast Time
when used at the end of a combo.
The longest combo a Champion can perform
is Triple Attack -> Chain Combo -> Combo
Finish -> Tiger Knuckle Fist -> Chain Crush
Combo -> Asura Strike. You need to start the
combo with all five Spirit Spheres in order
to have enough to perform each skill.

al_holylight.name: Holy Light
al_holylight.description:
Holy Light
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: 1 Character
Description: Summons a holy light to
inflict Holy elemental magic damage
to counter evil.

Comments: This will will immediately dispel
Kyrie Eleison. Being Soul Linked massively
increases this skill's damage. Cookie Cards
will increase damage by 10% each as well.

mo_balkyoung.name: Ki Explosion
mo_balkyoung.description:
Ki Explosion
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: Focus your inner energies and
attack an enemy to deal damage.
The targeted enemy receives 300% damage,
nearby monsters will be pushed away 2 cells
and Stunned for 2 sec.
Drains a 10 HP per use.

Comments: Only the targeted enemy receives
damage, and only the surrounding enemies
receive the stun and pushback.

mo_kitranslation.name: Ki Translation
mo_kitranslation.description:
Ki Translation
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Transfer one of your Spirit Spheres
to another party member. Uses up 1 Spirit
Sphere.

nv_firstaid.name: First Aid
nv_firstaid.description:
First Aid
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Recovery
Target: Caster
Description: Uses 3 SP to restore 5 HP.

nv_trickdead.name: Play Dead
nv_trickdead.description:
Play Dead
Requirement: Finish Quest, Novice Only
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Feigns death to avoid the
menace of nearby enemies. The Play
Dead status is canceled by casting
this skill again.

Comments: This skill ceases to function after
jobchanging to any other class, including
Super Novice. Swordsman's Provoke and
Sage's Dispel can cancel the effect. All
monsters will be fooled, even Bosses and
MvPs.

nv_basic.name: Basic Skill
nv_basic.description:
Basic Skill
Max Level: 9
Enables the use of Basic Interface Skills.
[Lv 1]: Enables Trading
Allows the trading of items with other
character.
Right click on a character to initiate.
[Lv 2]: Enables Emotions
Alt+(0~9) and Ctrl+(1,-,=.)
Alt+L opens additional Emotion icons.
[Lv 3]: Enables Sitting
Sitting doubles HP and SP regeneration
speed.
Press the Insert key or type /sit.
[Lv 4]: Enables Chat Room Creation
Alt+C to open a Chat Room or click the
Chat button in the Basic Information
Window.
[Lv 5]: Join a Party
Character can join a party.
[Lv 6]: Enables Use of Kafra Storage
Allows use of Kafra Storage.
[Lv 7]: Organize a Party
Create a party by typing
/organize ''Party Name''
Set party options in the Party Window (Alt+Z).
[Lv 9]: Enables Change to First Job Class
Qualifies character for change from Novice
to one of the First classes.

mg_stonecurse.name: Stone Curse
mg_stonecurse.description:
Stone Curse
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: 1 Character
Description: Inflicts Stone Curse to a
target. Consumes 1 Red Gemstone.
[Lv 1]: 24% Chance
[Lv 2]: 28% Chance
[Lv 3]: 32% Chance
[Lv 4]: 36% Chance
[Lv 5]: 40% Chance
[Lv 6]: 44% Chance
[Lv 7]: 48% Chance
[Lv 8]: 52% Chance
[Lv 9]: 56% Chance
[Lv 10]: 60% Chance

Comments: Using this skill requires a
Gemstone and is very short range, however
Stone Curse is generally considered to be a
more crippling disable than Freeze. Stone
cursed enemies are vulnerable to Fire.
Bosses and Undead are immune.
Using the skill on a target that's already stone
cursed will immediately undo the effect, even if
it's an enemy.

mg_coldbolt.name: Cold Bolt
mg_coldbolt.description:
Cold Bolt
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: Enemy
Description: Summons bolts of frigid ice
to strike at an enemy which inflicts
Water elemental magic damage per hit.
One bolt for every skill level.
[Lv 1]: 100% MATK, 0.7 sec Cast Time,
1.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 2]: 200% MATK, 1.4 sec Cast Time,
1.2 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 3]: 300% MATK, 2.1 sec Cast Time,
1.4 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 4]: 400% MATK, 2.8 sec Cast Time,
1.6 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 5]: 500% MATK, 3.5 sec Cast Time,
1.8 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 6]: 600% MATK, 4.2 sec Cast Time,
2.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 7]: 700% MATK, 4.9 sec Cast Time,
2.2 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 8]: 800% MATK, 5.6 sec Cast Time,
2.4 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 9]: 900% MATK, 6.3 sec Cast Time,
2.6 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 10]: 1000% MATK, 7.0 sec Cast Time,
2.8 sec After Cast Delay

Comments: The basic Water spell of a Mage.
Higher levels of the skill dramatically increase
SP Cost and Cast Time. Different skill levels
of this skill can be set to individual hotkeys.
The skill is greatly enhanced by using Siroma
Card.

mg_lightningbolt.name: Lightning Bolt
mg_lightningbolt.description:
Lightning Bolt
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: 1 Character
Description: Drops lightning on target
inflicting Wind elemental
magic damage per hit.
One bolt for every skill level.
[Lv 1]: 100% MATK, 0.7 sec Cast Time,
1.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 2]: 200% MATK, 1.4 sec Cast Time,
1.2 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 3]: 300% MATK, 2.1 sec Cast Time,
1.4 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 4]: 400% MATK, 2.8 sec Cast Time,
1.6 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 5]: 500% MATK, 3.5 sec Cast Time,
1.8 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 6]: 600% MATK, 4.2 sec Cast Time,
2.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 7]: 700% MATK, 4.9 sec Cast Time,
2.2 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 8]: 800% MATK, 5.6 sec Cast Time,
2.4 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 9]: 900% MATK, 6.3 sec Cast Time,
2.6 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 10]: 1000% MATK, 7.0 sec Cast Time,
2.8 sec After Cast Delay

Comments: The basic Wind spell of a mage.
Higher levels of the skill dramatically increase
SP Cost and Cast Time. Different skill levels
of this skill can be set to individual hotkeys.
Unlike Fire and Cold bolts, there is no card
that will enhance Lightning bolt in the
same manner.

mg_napalmbeat.name: Napalm Beat
mg_napalmbeat.description:
Napalm Beat
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: 1 Character
Description: Uses telekinesis power to
attack a target and 3x3 cells around it
with Ghost elemental magic. The damage
portion is divided among the targets.
[Lv 1]: 80% MATK, 1.0 sec Cast Time
[Lv 2]: 90% MATK, 1.0 sec Cast Time
[Lv 3]: 100% MATK, 1.0 sec Cast Time
[Lv 4]: 110% MATK, 0.9 sec Cast Time
[Lv 5]: 120% MATK, 0.9 sec Cast Time
[Lv 6]: 130% MATK, 0.8 sec Cast Time
[Lv 7]: 140% MATK, 0.8 sec Cast Time
[Lv 8]: 150% MATK, 0.7 sec Cast Time
[Lv 9]: 160% MATK, 0.6 sec Cast Time
[Lv 10]: 170% MATK, 0.5 sec Cast Time

Comments: Mage's Ghost spells are weak
compared to elemental bolts, however they
are much faster casting and do adequate
damage against the Undead.
Damage will be split between the targets.

mg_firebolt.name: Fire Bolt
mg_firebolt.description:
Fire Bolt
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: 1 Character
Description: Attacks a target with arrow
made of fire inflicting Fire
elemental magic damage per hit.
One bolt for every skill level.
[Lv 1]: 100% MATK, 0.7 sec Cast Time,
1.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 2]: 200% MATK, 1.4 sec Cast Time,
1.2 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 3]: 300% MATK, 2.1 sec Cast Time,
1.4 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 4]: 400% MATK, 2.8 sec Cast Time,
1.6 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 5]: 500% MATK, 3.5 sec Cast Time,
1.8 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 6]: 600% MATK, 4.2 sec Cast Time,
2.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 7]: 700% MATK, 4.9 sec Cast Time,
2.2 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 8]: 800% MATK, 5.6 sec Cast Time,
2.4 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 9]: 900% MATK, 6.3 sec Cast Time,
2.6 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 10]: 1000% MATK, 7.0 sec Cast Time,
2.8 sec After Cast Delay

Comments: The basic Fire spell of a Mage.
Higher levels of the skill dramatically increase
SP Cost and Cast Time. Different skill levels
of this skill can be set to individual hotkeys.
The skill is greatly enhanced by using Imp
Card.

mg_sight.name: Sight
mg_sight.description:
Sight
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Uses 10 SP to summon a fire
ball that for 10 seconds will detect hidden
characters in 7x7 AoE around the caster.

Comments: If the skill is used by the means of
a Horong Card, removing the item containing
the card will immediately cancel the skill,
however the visual effect persists the entire duration.
Does not work against Stalker's Chase Walk.

mg_srecovery.name: Increase SP Recovery
mg_srecovery.description:
Increase SP Recovery
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Restores SP every 10
seconds while idle. MaxSP affects how much
SP is restored by this skill.
[Lv 1]: SP+3 +(0.2% of Max SP)
[Lv 2]: SP+6 +(0.4% of Max SP)
[Lv 3]: SP+9 +(0.6% of Max SP)
[Lv 4]: SP+12 +(0.8% of Max SP)
[Lv 5]: SP+15 +(1.0% of Max SP)
[Lv 6]: SP+18 +(1.2% of Max SP)
[Lv 7]: SP+21 +(1.4% of Max SP)
[Lv 8]: SP+24 +(1.6% of Max SP)
[Lv 9]: SP+27 +(1.8% of Max SP)
[Lv 10]: SP+30 +(2.0% of Max SP)

Comments: Every skill level also increases
the effectiveness of SP healing items by 10%.
The healing ticks occur so long as the player
does not walk to to another tile, even if the
player is standing and in combat. The healing
ticks will not occur if the player is overweight.
It's also possible to receive healing ticks
while teleporting, so long as the player does
not walk.

mg_frostdiver.name: Frost Diver
mg_frostdiver.description:
Frost Diver
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Cold Bolt 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical, Debuff
Target: 1 Character
Description: Inflicts Water magic
damage on a target, which has a chance to
inflict Freezing status. The Freezing
chance and duration are affected
by target's MDEF.
[Lv 1]: 110% MATK, 3 sec Freeze Duration,
38% Freeze Chance
[Lv 2]: 120% MATK, 6 sec Freeze Duration,
41% Freeze Chance
[Lv 3]: 130% MATK, 9 sec Freeze Duration,
44% Freeze Chance
[Lv 4]: 140% MATK, 12 sec Freeze Duration,
47% Freeze Chance
[Lv 5]: 150% MATK, 15 sec Freeze Duration,
50% Freeze Chance
[Lv 6]: 160% MATK, 18 sec Freeze Duration,
53% Freeze Chance
[Lv 7]: 170% MATK, 21 sec Freeze Duration,
56% Freeze Chance
[Lv 8]: 180% MATK, 24 sec Freeze Duration,
59% Freeze Chance
[Lv 9]: 190% MATK, 27 sec Freeze Duration,
62% Freeze Chance
[Lv 10]: 200% MATK, 30 sec Freeze Duration,
65% Freeze Chance

Comments: Frost Diver is a Mage's disabling
skill. Frozen targets cannot retaliate until the
freeze duration ends. Keep in mind that
enemies that are Undead Element cannot be
frozen, and enemies with high MDEF have
lower chance of being frozen, and will remain
frozen for less time.

mg_thunderstorm.name: Thunderstorm
mg_thunderstorm.description:
Thunder Storm
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Lightning Bolt 4
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: Ground
Description: Drops lightning bolt on
specific location, inflicting Wind
elemental magic per hit in a 5x5 cell area.
[Lv 1]: 80% MATK, 1 sec Cast Time
[Lv 2]: 160% MATK, 2 sec Cast Time
[Lv 3]: 240% MATK, 3 sec Cast Time
[Lv 4]: 320% MATK, 4 sec Cast Time
[Lv 5]: 400% MATK, 5 sec Cast Time
[Lv 6]: 480% MATK, 6 sec Cast Time
[Lv 7]: 560% MATK, 7 sec Cast Time
[Lv 8]: 640% MATK, 8 sec Cast Time
[Lv 9]: 720% MATK, 9 sec Cast Time
[Lv 10]: 800% MATK, 10 sec Cast Time

Comments: The strongest AoE spell available
to Mages, however it also has a massive 10
second cast at max level.

mg_soulstrike.name: Soul Strike
mg_soulstrike.description:
Soul Strike
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Napalm Beat 4
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: 1 Character
Description: Summons holy spirit to
inflict 100% MATK Ghost elemental
magical damage per hit on a target.
This skill inflicts additional damage
against Undead monsters.
[Lv 1]: 1 Hit, 1.2 sec After Cast Delay,
+5% damage to Undead
[Lv 2]: 1 Hit, 1.4 sec After Cast Delay,
+10% damage to Undead
[Lv 3]: 2 Hits, 1.6 sec After Cast Delay,
+15% damage to Undead
[Lv 4]: 2 Hits, 1.8 sec After Cast Delay,
+20% damage to Undead
[Lv 5]: 3 Hits, 2.0 sec After Cast Delay,
+25% damage to Undead
[Lv 6]: 3 Hits, 2.2 sec After Cast Delay,
+30% damage to Undead
[Lv 7]: 4 Hits, 2.4 sec After Cast Delay,
+35% damage to Undead
[Lv 8]: 4 Hits, 2.6 sec After Cast Delay,
+40% damage to Undead
[Lv 9]: 5 Hits, 2.8 sec After Cast Delay,
+45% damage to Undead
[Lv 10]: 5 Hits, 2.7 sec After Cast Delay,
+50% damage to Undead

Comments: Cast time is 0.5 sec at all levels.
Additional levels of this skill increase damage
at the cost of longer delays after cast.

mg_fireball.name: Fire Ball
mg_fireball.description:
Fire Ball
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Fire Bolt 4
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical, AoE
Target: 1 Character
Description: Summons a fire ball to
damage a target and all enemies within
x5 cells area with Fire elemental
magical damage. Nearby enemies receives
3/4 of the damage given to the
center enemy. Cast Time and After Cast
Delay are reduced upon learning level 6
or higher.
[Lv 1]: 80% MATK, 1.5 sec Cast Time,
1.5 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 2]: 90% MATK, 1.5 sec Cast Time,
1.5 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 3]: 100% MATK, 1.5 sec Cast Time,
1.5 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 4]: 110% MATK, 1.5 sec Cast Time,
1.5 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 5]: 120% MATK, 1.5 sec Cast Time,
1.5 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 6]: 130% MATK, 1.0 sec Cast Time,
1.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 7]: 140% MATK, 1.0 sec Cast Time,
1.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 8]: 150% MATK, 1.0 sec Cast Time,
1.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 9]: 160% MATK, 1.0 sec Cast Time,
1.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 10]: 170% MATK, 1.0 sec Cast Time,
1.0 sec After Cast Delay

Comments: Weak but very quick casting.

mg_safetywall.name: Safety Wall
mg_safetywall.description:
Safety Wall
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Napalm Beat 7, Soul Strike 5
Requirement: Napalm Beat 7, Soul Strike 5
Requirement: Aspersio 4, Sanctuary 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Ground
Description: Creates a magic barrier on a
targeted spot that will block melee physical
attacks for the duration of the Safety Wall.
Consumes 1 Blue Gemstone.
[Lv 1]: Blocks 2 Hits, 4.0 sec Cast Time,
5 sec duration
[Lv 2]: Blocks 3 Hits, 3.5 sec Cast Time,
10 sec duration
[Lv 3]: Blocks 4 Hits, 3.0 sec Cast Time,
15 sec duration
[Lv 4]: Blocks 5 Hits, 2.5 sec Cast Time,
20 sec duration
[Lv 5]: Blocks 6 Hits, 2.0 sec Cast Time,
25 sec duration
[Lv 6]: Blocks 7 Hits, 1.5 sec Cast Time,
30 sec duration
[Lv 7]: Blocks 8 Hits, 1.0 sec Cast Time,
35 sec duration
[Lv 8]: Blocks 9 Hits, 1.0 sec Cast Time,
40 sec duration
[Lv 9]: Blocks 10 Hits, 1.0 sec Cast Time,
45 sec duration
[Lv 10]: Blocks 11 Hits, 1.0 sec Cast Time,
50 sec duration

Comments: Safety Wall blocks 1 melee hit,
regardless of how much damage it would
have dealt. This is a key skill for both
self preservation and to support allies,
in particular against MvPs.
Pneuma and Safety wall are mutually
exclusive, and where one exists the other
is inhibited. You can deny the use of Pneuma
by placing a Safety Wall near a target.

mg_firewall.name: Fire Wall
mg_firewall.description:
Fire Wall
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Sight 1, Fire Ball 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: Ground
Description: Uses 40 SP to create a fire
barrier that inflicts 50% MATK Fire
elemental magic damage on upcoming enemies
and knock them 2 cells backward.
The Undead are not affected by the pushback.
Duration is 4 seconds +1 extra for every
skill level.

Comments: The wall occupies three cells and
is placed perpendicular from the line between
the caster and the target cell. Each cell can do
2 hits +1 per skill level. Because undead
enemies are not pushed back, they will be
instantly hit with every single 'charge' of the
Fire Wall tile. Using the skill on
the tile where the caster stands will result in a
North-South Fire Wall.

sa_advancedbook.name: Study
sa_advancedbook.description:
Advanced Book
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases Attack Speed
and damage with Book class weapons.
[Lv 1]: Damage +3, ASPD +0.5%
[Lv 2]: Damage +6, ASPD +1%
[Lv 3]: Damage +9, ASPD +1.5%
[Lv 4]: Damage +12, ASPD +2%
[Lv 5]: Damage +15, ASPD +2.5%
[Lv 6]: Damage +18, ASPD +3%
[Lv 7]: Damage +21, ASPD +3.5%
[Lv 8]: Damage +24, ASPD +4%
[Lv 9]: Damage +27, ASPD +4.5%
[Lv 10]: Damage +30, ASPD +5%

Comments: Mastery skills only get added up
at the end of damage calculation. In most
situations, it only results in a flat addition of
damage.

wz_estimation.name: Sense
wz_estimation.description:
Sense
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Reveals detailed information
about a targeted monster to the caster and
members in caster's party.

Comments: Opens a separate window that
displays a monster's stats. The displayed
numbers for DEF and MDEF are the Hard
values.

sa_dragonology.name: Dragonology
sa_dragonology.description:
Dragonology
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Advanced Book 9
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases resistance,
physical and magical damage against Dragon
monsters. As skill level increases,
the INT bonus goes up to a maximum of 3.
[Lv 1]: INT +1,
ATK +4% and MATK +2% against Dragons
[Lv 2]: INT +1,
ATK +8% and MATK +4% against Dragons
[Lv 3]: INT +2,
ATK +12% and MATK +6% against Dragons
[Lv 4]: INT +2,
ATK +16% and MATK +8% against Dragons
[Lv 5]: INT +3,
ATK +20% and MATK +10% against Dragons

sa_seismicweapon.name: Endow Quake
sa_seismicweapon.description:
Seismic Weapon
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Stone Curse 1, Advanced Book 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Endows a party member's
weapon with Earth elemental for the skill's
duration. If the skill fails, the weapon being
endowed will be destroyed.
Consumes 1 Green Live.
[Lv 1]: 70% success chance, 20 minutes
[Lv 2]: 80% success chance, 20 minutes
[Lv 3]: 90% success chance, 20 minutes
[Lv 4]: 100% success chance, 20 minutes
[Lv 5]: 100% success chance, 30 minutes

Comments: The Sage must be either in the
same party, or the same guild as the target.

sa_castcancel.name: Cast Cancel
sa_castcancel.description:
Cast Cancel
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Advanced Book 2
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Only usable while casting a
skill that has Cast Time. Interrupts the cast
and refunds a portion of the consumed SP.
[Lv 1]: 10% Refunded
[Lv 2]: 30% Refunded
[Lv 3]: 50% Refunded
[Lv 4]: 70% Refunded
[Lv 5]: 90% Refunded

Comments: Anybody can learn this skill
by equipping a Beholder Card.

sa_magicrod.name: Magic Rod
sa_magicrod.description:
Magic Rod
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Advanced Book 4
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Upon being attacked with a skill,
using Magic Rod has a chance of giving the SP
that the enemy has used for the skill to the
caster instead of damage.
Countering Spell Breaker with Magic Rod will
reduce the target's SP by 20% when it is
successful.
[Lv 1]: 0.4 seconds duration,
20% of cost absorbed
[Lv 2]: 0.6 seconds duration,
40% of cost absorbed
[Lv 3]: 0.8 seconds duration,
60% of cost absorbed
[Lv 4]: 1.0 seconds duration,
80% of cost absorbed
[Lv 5]: 1.2 seconds duration,
100% of cost absorbed

Comments: Magic Rod is a counter skill,
very similar to Knight's Auto Counter.
Upon using the skill, nothing visually will
happen. However, if you do absorb a skill,
you will see an animation and hear a sound
effect.
Different from Knight's Auto Counter is the
fact that you can absorb an unlimited number
of spells during the skill's duration. This
allows the Sage to absorb Double Casted
bolts, every hit of a Waterball, or even magical
damage being casted from multiple sources
simultaneously.
Only work against magical spells that are
targeted.

sa_frostweapon.name: Endow Tsunami
sa_frostweapon.description:
Frost Weapon
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Cold Bolt 1, Advanced Book 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Endows a party member's
weapon with Water elemental for the skill's
duration. If the skill fails, the weapon being
endowed will be destroyed.
Consumes 1 Crystal Blue.
[Lv 1]: 70% success chance, 20 minutes
[Lv 2]: 80% success chance, 20 minutes
[Lv 3]: 90% success chance, 20 minutes
[Lv 4]: 100% success chance, 20 minutes
[Lv 5]: 100% success chance, 30 minutes

Comments: The Sage must be either in the
same party, or the same guild as the target.

sa_lightningloader.name: Endow Tornado
sa_lightningloader.description:
Lightning Loader
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Lightning Bolt 1,
Advanced Book 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Endows a party member's
weapon with Wind elemental for the skill's
duration. If the skill fails, the weapon being
endowed will be destroyed.
Consumes 1 Wind of Verdure.
[Lv 1]: 70% success chance, 20 minutes
[Lv 2]: 80% success chance, 20 minutes
[Lv 3]: 90% success chance, 20 minutes
[Lv 4]: 100% success chance, 20 minutes
[Lv 5]: 100% success chance, 30 minutes

Comments: The Sage must be either in the
same party, or the same guild as the target.

sa_flamelauncher.name: Endow Blaze
sa_flamelauncher.description:
Flare Launcher
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Fire Bolt 1, Advanced Book 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Endows a party member's
weapon with Fire elemental for the skill's
duration. If the skill fails, the weapon being
endowed will be destroyed.
Consumes 1 Red Blood.
[Lv 1]: 70% success chance, 20 minutes
[Lv 2]: 80% success chance, 20 minutes
[Lv 3]: 90% success chance, 20 minutes
[Lv 4]: 100% success chance, 20 minutes
[Lv 5]: 100% success chance, 30 minutes

Comments: The Sage must be either in the
same party, or the same guild as the target.

wz_earthspike.name: Earth Spike
wz_earthspike.description:
Earth Spike
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Stone Curse 1
Requirement: Seismic Weapon 1
4190Requirement: Stone Curse 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: 1 Character
Element: Earth
Description: Commands the ground beneath a
targeted enemy to rise into pikes.
[Lv 1]: 100% MATK, 0.7 seconds Cast Time
[Lv 2]: 200% MATK, 1.4 seconds Cast Time
[Lv 3]: 300% MATK, 2.1 seconds Cast Time
[Lv 4]: 400% MATK, 2.8 seconds Cast Time
[Lv 5]: 500% MATK, 3.5 seconds Cast Time

Comments: Despite being similar to Mage's
basic Bolt skills, it is not considered to be as
such, and therefore not affected by
Professor's Double Casting. It can be used
on Hidden enemies(Thief skill Hide), so
long as the user is equipped to see them.
Pitman Card improves the damage of this skill.

sa_freecast.name: Free Cast
sa_freecast.description:
Free Cast
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Cast Cancel 1
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Enables moving and
attacking during the casting of magic spells.
[Lv 1]: 30% Move Speed/55% ASPD
[Lv 2]: 35% Move Speed/60% 55% ASPD
[Lv 3]: 40% Move Speed/65% 55% ASPD
[Lv 4]: 45% Move Speed/70% 55% ASPD
[Lv 5]: 50% Move Speed/75% 55% ASPD
[Lv 6]: 55% Move Speed/80% 55% ASPD
[Lv 7]: 60% Move Speed/85% 55% ASPD
[Lv 8]: 65% Move Speed/90% 55% ASPD
[Lv 9]: 70% Move Speed/95% 55% ASPD
[Lv 10]: 75% Move Speed/100% 55% ASPD

Comments: With this skill, you can walk and
auto-attack while casting any spell with a
Cast Time. Auto Casting spells with Auto
Spell does not get in the way of manually
casting skills.

sa_spellbreaker.name: Spell Breaker
sa_spellbreaker.description:
Spell Breaker
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Magic Rod 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Interrupts a magic spell cast by
an enemy and receive the SP the enemy used
to cast that spell, as well as reduce 2% of the
enemy's HP.
At skill 5 and above, half of this HP damage is
absorbed by the caster.
HP cannot be drained from Boss monsters
and Guardians, but this skill does have
10% chance of interrupting Boss monster
spells.
[Lv 1]: 0% SP absorbed
[Lv 2]: 20% SP absorbed
[Lv 3]: 40% SP absorbed
[Lv 4]: 60% SP absorbed
[Lv 5]: 100% SP absorbed

Comments: In PvP, you can use this against
players and it will interrupt casts even if the
player has Cast Interruption immunity effects,
such as Phen Card or Orlean's Gown.

sa_deluge.name: Deluge
sa_deluge.description:
Deluge
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Frost Weapon 2
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Ground
Description: Enchants an area on the ground
so that it will amplify all Water elemental
attacks. Water elemental targets
inside the enchanted area will also gain
bonus MaxHP.
This area will also enable the use of Water
Ball and Aqua Benedicta.
Other Sage skills that target the ground can't
be cast over Deluge.
Initial cast requires 1 Yellow Gemstone, but
casting the skill again while the previous
instance is still active will move the Deluge
and not consume a Gemstones.
[Lv 1]: +10% Water Damage, +5% MaxHP,
60 seconds duration
[Lv 2]: +14% Water Damage, +9% MaxHP,
120 seconds duration
[Lv 3]: +17% Water Damage, +12% MaxHP,
180 seconds duration
[Lv 4]: +19% Water Damage, +14% MaxHP,
240 seconds duration
[Lv 5]: +20% Water Damage, +15% MaxHP,
300 seconds duration

Comments: Players can only benefit from the
bonus HP granted by this skill if they are
wearing water armor, such as when using
Swordfish Card.
Volcano, Deluge and Violent Gale can all be
used interchangeably without consuming
Gemstones each time you recast the skill.

sa_violentgale.name: Whirlwind
sa_violentgale.description:
Violent Gale
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Lightning Loader 2
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Ground
Description: Enchants an area on the ground
so that it will amplify all Wind attacks. Wind
elemental targets inside the
enchanted area will also gain bonus FLEE.
This area will also increase the duration of
Fire Wall so that it lasts 1.5 times longer.
Other Sage skills that target the ground can't
be cast over Violent Gale.
Initial cast requires 1 Yellow Gemstone, but
multiple casting of this skill will not consume
Gemstones throughout Violent Gale's active
duration.
[Lv 1]: +10% Wind Damage, +3 FLEE,
60 seconds duration
[Lv 2]: +14% Wind Damage, +6 FLEE,
120 seconds duration
[Lv 3]: +17% Wind Damage, +9 FLEE,
180 seconds duration
[Lv 4]: +19% Wind Damage, +12 FLEE,
240 seconds duration
[Lv 5]: +20% Wind Damage, +15 FLEE,
300 seconds duration

Comments: Players can only benefit from the
bonus FLEE granted by this skill if they are
wearing wind armor, such as when using
Dokkebi Card.
Volcano, Deluge and Violent Gale can all be
used interchangeably without consuming
Gemstones each time you recast the skill.

sa_volcano.name: Volcano
sa_volcano.description:
Volcano
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Flame Launcher 2
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Ground
Description: Enchants an area on the ground
so that it will amplify all Fire elemental attacks.
Fire elemental targets inside
the enchanted area will also gain bonus ATK.
Ice Wall and Sage skills that target the ground
can't be cast over Volcano.
Initial cast requires 1 Yellow Gemstone, but
casting the skill again while the previous
instance is still active will move the Volcano
and not consume a Gemstones.
[Lv 1]: +10% Fire Damage, +10 ATK to Fire,
60 seconds duration
[Lv 2]: +14% Fire Damage, +20 ATK to Fire,
120 seconds duration
[Lv 3]: +17% Fire Damage, +30 ATK to Fire,
180 seconds duration
[Lv 4]: +19% Fire Damage, +40 ATK to Fire,
240 seconds duration
[Lv 5]: +20% Fire Damage, +50 ATK to Fire,
3000 seconds duration

Comments: Players can only benefit from the
bonus ATK granted by this skill if they are
wearing fire armor, such as when using
Pasana Card.
Volcano, Deluge and Violent Gale can all be
used interchangeably without consuming
Gemstones each time you recast the skill.

wz_heavendrive.name: Heaven's Drive
wz_heavendrive.description:
Heaven's Drive
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Earth Spike 3
Requirement: Earth Spike 1
4190Requirement: Earth Spike 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: Ground
Element: Earth
Description: Commands the ground in a
targeted area to rise into spikes in order to
damage enemies within its range.
[Lv 1]: 100% MATK, 1 second Cast Time
[Lv 2]: 200% MATK, 2 seconds Cast Time
[Lv 3]: 300% MATK, 3 seconds Cast Time
[Lv 4]: 400% MATK, 4 seconds Cast Time
[Lv 5]: 500% MATK, 5 seconds Cast Time

Comments: Capable of hitting enemies in
Hiding(Thief skill Hide). Does not require
a target and does 5x5 AoE damage.

sa_autospell.name: Hindsight
sa_autospell.description:
Auto Spell
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Free Cast 4
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Autocasts certain magic spells
by a certain chance while attacking enemies
with physical attack.
Spells that are auto cast through Auto Spell
only consume 2/3 of the required SP. Spells
that are not learned by the caster cannot
be cast.
[Lv 2]: Level 1  Cold, Fire or Lightning Bolt
[Lv 3]: Level 2  Cold, Fire or Lightning Bolt
[Lv 4]: Level 3  Cold, Fire or Lightning Bolt
[Lv 5]: Level 1  Soul Strike
[Lv 6]: Level 2  Soul Strike
[Lv 7]: Level 3  Soul Strike
[Lv 8]: Level 1  Fire Ball
[Lv 9]: Level 2  Fire Ball
[Lv 10]: Level 1  Frost Diver
The level of the skill cast by Auto Spell is
randomly determined and limited to the
highest level learned by the caster.

Comments: Being Soul Linked will cause
Auto Spell to use the max learned level of
skills you've learned to be used, allowing
the Sage to potentially cast Lv 10 Bolts.
Auto Casted spell have no cast time.
If the user is a Professor that has learned
Double Casting, it will interact with this skill,
causing even more bolts to activate.
If upon using the skill the user closes the
window without picking an option, he will be
glitched and be unable to use any skills until
he has relogged.

sa_dispell.name: Dispell
sa_dispell.description:
Dispell
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Spell Breaker 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Casting Dispell has a chance of
canceling all magic effects that have been
cast on a target.
Consumes 1 Yellow Gemstone.
[Lv 1]: 60% success chance
[Lv 2]: 70% success chance
[Lv 3]: 80% success chance
[Lv 4]: 90% success chance
[Lv 5]: 100% success chance

Comments: This skill can be cast on bosses,
however some monster-only self buffs used
by Bosses and MvPs cannot be dispeled.
This skill can be used on allies by holding
down shift while clicking the skill.
Although Dispel will remove most buffs on an
enemy player, some buffs are notably not
removable by this skill. The list includes:
Chemical Protection, Enchant Deadly Poison,
Cart Boost, buffs gained by consuming food
or cash shop consumables, Gunslinger
self-buffs, and most of Taekwon and Star
Gladiator's self buffs.
Soul Linkers are naturally immune to this
spell, even if they are using buffs that would
normally be removed, such as Increase
Agility and Blessing. Stalkers that have
received Soul Link are also entirely immune.
In Renewal, Mechanics and Meisters riding
MADO Gear are also immune to this skill.

In many older descriptions of this skill, it was
erroneously stated that MDEF reduces the
chance of success, however this has never
been the case.

sa_landprotector.name: Magnetic Earth
sa_landprotector.description:
Land Protector
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Volcano 3, Deluge 3,
Violent Gale 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Ground
Description: Casts a spell that will block or
cancel all ground targeting spells or
enchantments. Other Sage skills that target
the ground can't be cast in the area enchanted
by Land Protector.
Consumes 1 Blue Gemstone and
1 Yellow Gemstone.
[Lv 1]: 7x7 Size, 120 seconds duration
[Lv 2]: 7x7 Size, 165 seconds duration
[Lv 3]: 9x9 Size, 210 seconds duration
[Lv 4]: 9x9 Size, 255 seconds duration
[Lv 5]: 11x11 Size, 300 seconds duration

Comments: This spell basically negates
the use of any and all ground based spells in
the game. Using this skill on top of an affected
area spell will remove it both immediately
remove it and prevent the placement of a new
instance.
Wizard's AoE spells, Pneuma, Safety Wall,
and Grand Cross are some of the most
obvious effects blocked by this skill. However,
Land Protector will also block thing such as
Desperado.
Bard and Dancer's single use songs work
normally while performed on top of a Land
Protector and ignore it completely, however
Ensembles are nullified. Hunter Traps also
are not affected, as well as Professor's
Spider Web.
If an enemy's Land Protector is placed on
top of an existing instance of the skill, the
overlapping tiles erase each other. As such,
you can remove an enemy's instance this way.
Land Protector blocks your own placements
even in non-PvP environments.

sa_abracadabra.name: Hocus-pocus
sa_abracadabra.description:
Abracadabra
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Auto Spell 5, Dispell 1,
Land Protector 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Undefined
Target: Undefined
Description: Casts a random skill. Leveling
this skill increases the variety of skills that are
cast through Abracadabra.
Consumes 2 Yellow Gemstones.

Comments: Using Abracadabra will cast
a random skill from a pre-selected list.
The main appeal of this spell is its ability
to use unique skills that are impossible to
obtain otherwise.  List of unique effects:
Taming Monster: Attempts to tame a monster
into becoming a pet. Only works if the target
can become a pet in the first place. Usually
this is used to tame pets whose taming items
are not easy to drop, or not available at all.
Class Change: Turns the target into a random
MvP Monster. The list of what can be invoked
this way depends on the server.
Coma: Casts coma on yourself.
Fortune: Steals zeny from a target monster,
based on their level.
Reverse Orcish: Changes the appearance
of your head. Many monsters can do this to
a player.
Death: Kills the target immediately with no
EXP or Drops.
Monocell: Turns the target into a Poring.
Summon Monster: Spawns are random
monsters, similar to how Dead Branches work.
Full Recovery: Restores all your HP and SP.
Instant Death: Kills the user immediately.

If this skill is used on top of an Into the Abyss
ensemble, or if the user has Mistress Card,
the cost of each use of this skill is reduced
from 2 to 1 Yellow Gemstones.
When an exclusive skill was successfully
selected by Abracadabra, the skill name
displayed on top of the screen will display
'????' as the skill name.

pf_spiderweb.name: Fiber Lock
pf_spiderweb.description:
Spider Web
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Dragonology 4
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Shoots a spider web that will bind
and immobilize a target, decreasing its FLEE
by half for 8 seconds.
Fire elemental attacks will cause 2x more
damage on Fiber Locked targets and cancel
the Fiber Locked status.
A maximum of 3 Spider Webs can be shot
at once.
Consumes 1 Cobweb.

Comments: Duration is halved in PvP, GvG,
WoE and Battlegrounds.

pf_soulchange.name: Soul Exhale
pf_soulchange.description:
Soul Change
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Magic Rod 3, Spell Breaker 2
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Exchange SP of the target with
your SP. Neither the user or the target can
receive more SP than their MaxSP limit.
If you use this on a monster, you regain 3% of
your SP. You can't use the skill again on the
same monster. You can use this skill in
Siege Mode(WoE).

Comments: Combined with the skill
Health Conversion, Professors can supply
endless SP to a group of players.
This skill can also be used offensively. If your
SP is nearly depleted, using this against an
enemy will steal their SP pool while giving
them nothing.

pf_fogwall.name: Blinding Mist
pf_fogwall.description:
Wall of Fog
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Violent Gale 2, Deluge 2
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Ground
Description: Creates a Wall of Fog on a 5x3
cell area that will cause the Blind status on
players and monsters.
All long ranged attacks aimed at players within
the skill's range will have a greater chance of
missing and have reduced damage.
Negative effects only apply to monsters in
normal fields, but will also apply to players in
PvP zones. Up to two instances can be placed
at once. When used atop a Deluge, duration
is doubled. Cannot be used atop Volcano
or Violent Gale.

Comments: This skill works by very simple
mechanics but has an enormous effect on
gameplay.
While inside a Wall of Fog, every skill in the
game aimed at you has a 75% chance of
failing. Not just missing, the skills fails to use
outright. If a skill passes the fail check and
lands, it will do -25% damage if it's a Melee
skill, or -75% damage if it is ranged. Melee
auto-attacks do full damage but Long Range
ones also suffer from the -75% penalty.
On top of all this, Ranged Attacks of any kind
have a -50 HIT reduction, which is stacked on
top of the HIT reduction caused by the Blind
effect.
Monsters that enter Wall of Fog will continue to
be Blind for 30 seconds after leaving, but for
enemy players the effects end immediately.

pf_hpconversion.name: Indulge
pf_hpconversion.description:
Health Conversion
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Increase SP Recovery 1,
Magic Rod 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Converts 10% of your HP into SP.
The higher the skill level the more effective the
conversion will be. The conversion rate is
10:1 modified by SkillLV, so a 2000 HP
Professor with Health Conversion LV 3 would
consume 2000*10%=200 HP and obtain a
total of 200*30%=60 SP.
[Lv 1]: 10% of the converted HP,
1.0 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 2]: 20% of the converted HP,
1.2 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 3]: 30% of the converted HP,
1.4 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 4]: 40% of the converted HP,
1.6 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 5]: 50% of the converted HP,
1.8 sec After Cast Delay

Comments: The skill itself requires SP to be
used, meaning that an user at 0 SP won't be
able to convert any SP.
Combined with a Vitata Card, it's possible to
sustain oneself indefinitely by simply turning
HP into SP and then healing yourself.

pf_doublecasting.name: Double Casting
pf_doublecasting.description:
Double Casting
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Auto Spell 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: During the skill's duration, all
Bolt-type spells (including Auto-Spells) have a
chance of being used a second time instantly.
[Lv 1]: 40% Chance
[Lv 2]: 50% Chance
[Lv 3]: 60% Chance
[Lv 4]: 70% Chance
[Lv 5]: 80% Chance

Comments: This skill's cast time cannot be
reduced by DEX. Earth Spike is not considered
to be a Bolt skill.

pf_memorize.name: Foresight
pf_memorize.description:
Memorize
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Advanced Book 5, Auto Spell 1,
Free Cast 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Reduces the Cast Time for the
next 5 skills. This effect is canceled when the
user dies, but otherwise it has no duration.
Memorize has a 5 second Cast Time that
cannot be reduced by DEX.

Comments: The five 'charges' you have to
spend are consumed every time you use a
skill. Even if a skill has no Cast Time or isn't
magic, it will consume a charge.

pf_soulburn.name: Soul Siphon
pf_soulburn.description:
Soul Burn
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Cast Cancel 5,
Magic Rod 3, Dispell 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Magical
Target: 1 Character
Description: This skill will burn all SP the
target has. When the skill is mastered, the
burned SP will cause damage to the victim.
If you fail this skill, the effect will bounce
back, burning YOUR SP and potentially
causing damage to yourself.
[Lv 1]: 40% Success Rate, 10 sec Cooldown
[Lv 2]: 50% Success Rate, 10 sec Cooldown
[Lv 3]: 60% Success Rate, 10 sec Cooldown
[Lv 4]: 70% Success Rate, 10 sec Cooldown
[Lv 5]: 70% Success Rate, Damage=2x SP,
15 sec Cooldown

Comments: Only really useful in PvP since
monsters don't have SP. Even if you fail the
skill against an enemy, all you need to do is
recover a bit of SP with a recovery item and
use Soul Change on the enemy.
It should be noted that Soul Burn's limiter is
a Cooldown, not After Cast Delay. This means
that you can use any other skill during the
10~15 second period, just not Soul Burn.

pf_mindbreaker.name: Mind Breaker
pf_mindbreaker.description:
Mind Breaker
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Increase SP Recovery 3,
Soul Burn 2
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: 1 Character
Description: Induces mental turmoil on an
enemy that will reduce its MDEF, but will
also increases its MATK. Bosses and the
Undead are immune.
This skill's level affects its rate of success.
[Lv 1]: MATK +20%, 60% Success Chance,
Soft MDEF -12%
[Lv 2]: MATK +40%, 65% Success Chance,
Soft MDEF -24%
[Lv 3]: MATK +60%, 70% Success Chance,
Soft MDEF -36%
[Lv 4]: MATK +80%, 75% Success Chance,
Soft MDEF -48%
[Lv 5]: MATK +100%, 80% Success Chance,
Soft MDEF -60%

Comments: This is Provoke for magic.
The increase in MATK is massive and is often
used as a Buff in PvP and WoE scenario.
Because this is considered a Debuff by the
game, you can only use it against enemies,
meaning you cannot Mind Break party or
guild members.

mg_energycoat.name: Energy Coat
mg_energycoat.description:
Energy Coat
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Creates a barrier of spiritual
energy that will buffer attacks at the caster.
Caster's remaining SP affects the amount of
damage reduced by the barrier. More SP
is drained as attacks buffered by the barrier
accumulate.
[100~81% SP]: 30% reduction, 3.0% per hit
[80~61% SP]: 24% reduction, 2.5% per hit
[60~41% SP]: 18% reduction, 2.0% per hit
[40~21% SP]: 12% reduction, 1.5% per hit
[20~11% SP]: 6% reduction, 1.0% per hit

Comments: The damage reduction from this
skill is very substantial, however the SP drain
will quickly deplete the character since it
drains a % of your SP. Against fast attacking
enemies that will hit you many times, perhaps
it's better not to use this skill at all.

nv_firstaid.name: First Aid
nv_firstaid.description:
First Aid
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Recovery
Target: Caster
Description: Uses 3 SP to restore 5 HP.

nv_trickdead.name: Play Dead
nv_trickdead.description:
Play Dead
Requirement: Finish Quest, Novice Only
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Feigns death to avoid the
menace of nearby enemies. The Play
Dead status is canceled by casting
this skill again.

Comments: This skill ceases to function after
jobchanging to any other class, including
Super Novice. Swordsman's Provoke and
Sage's Dispel can cancel the effect. All
monsters will be fooled, even Bosses and
MvPs.

sa_createcon.name: Create Elemental Converter
sa_createcon.description:
Create Elemental Converter
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Crafting
Target: Caster
Description: Create an Elemental Converter.
Recipes:
- Flame Elemental Converter:
3 Scorpion Tail +1 Blank Scroll
- Frost Elemental Converter:
3 Snail's Shell +1 Blank Scroll
- Lightning Elemental Converter:
3 Rainbow Shell +1 Blank Scroll
- Seismic Elemental Converter:
3 Horn +1 Blank Scroll

Comments: The scrolls produced by this skill
last 3 minutes.

sa_elementfire.name: Elemental Change Fire
sa_elementfire.description:
Elemental Change (Fire)
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: 1 Character
Description: Change the target monster's
element to Fire, uses up an Elemental
Converter[Fire].

Comments: Only works on non-Boss monsters.
Does nothing against Players or Bosses.
Once a monster's element is changed, it
cannot be changed again. No Dispel effect
can revert the change.

sa_elementground.name: Elemental Change Earth
sa_elementground.description:
Elemental Change (Earth)
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: 1 Character
Description: Change the target monster's
element to Earth, uses up an Elemental
Converter[Earth].

Comments: Only works on non-Boss monsters.
Does nothing against Players or Bosses.
Once a monster's element is changed, it
cannot be changed again. No Dispel effect
can revert the change.

sa_elementwater.name: Elemental Change Water
sa_elementwater.description:
Elemental Change (Water)
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: 1 Character
Description: Change the target monster's
element to Water, uses up an Elemental
Converter[Water].

Comments: Only works on non-Boss monsters.
Does nothing against Players or Bosses.
Once a monster's element is changed, it
cannot be changed again. No Dispel effect
can revert the change.

sa_elementwind.name: Elemental Change Wind
sa_elementwind.description:
Elemental Change (Wind)
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: 1 Character
Description: Change the target monster's
element to Wind, uses up an Elemental
Converter[Wind].

Comments: Only works on non-Boss monsters.
Does nothing against Players or Bosses.
Once a monster's element is changed, it
cannot be changed again. No Dispel effect
can revert the change.

nv_basic.name: Basic Skill
nv_basic.description:
Basic Skill
Max Level: 9
Enables the use of Basic Interface Skills.
[Lv 1]: Enables Trading
Allows the trading of items with other
character.
Right click on a character to initiate.
[Lv 2]: Enables Emotions
Alt+(0~9) and Ctrl+(1,-,=.)
Alt+L opens additional Emotion icons.
[Lv 3]: Enables Sitting
Sitting doubles HP and SP regeneration
speed.
Press the Insert key or type /sit.
[Lv 4]: Enables Chat Room Creation
Alt+C to open a Chat Room or click the
Chat button in the Basic Information
Window.
[Lv 5]: Join a Party
Character can join a party.
[Lv 6]: Enables Use of Kafra Storage
Allows use of Kafra Storage.
[Lv 7]: Organize a Party
Create a party by typing
/organize ''Party Name''
Set party options in the Party Window (Alt+Z).
[Lv 9]: Enables Change to First Job Class
Qualifies character for change from Novice
to one of the First classes.

tf_double.name: Double Attack
tf_double.description:
Double Attack
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: When attacking with Dagger
class weapon, there is chance of
inflicting double attacks. This skill also affects
Left-Hand damage of Katar class weapons.
[Lv 1]: 5% chance, Katar Off-Hand +3%
[Lv 2]: 10% chance, Katar Off-Hand +5%
[Lv 3]: 15% chance, Katar Off-Hand +7%
[Lv 4]: 20% chance, Katar Off-Hand +9%
[Lv 5]: 25% chance, Katar Off-Hand +11%
[Lv 6]: 30% chance, Katar Off-Hand +13%
[Lv 7]: 35% chance, Katar Off-Hand +15%
[Lv 8]: 40% chance, Katar Off-Hand +17%
[Lv 9]: 45% chance, Katar Off-Hand +19%
[Lv 10]: 50% chance, Katar Off-Hand +21%

Comments: Double Attacks cannot crit, also
Double Attacks are calculated before crits,
therefore if you have a crit based build you do
not want Double Attacks to occur. Use a
non-Dagger weapon on the Right Hand to
inhibit the skill from functioning.
The items Sidewinder Card, Nagan and Chick
Hat allow Double Attacks to be performed with
any weapon. In those cases, if the user knows
the skill, it will use the highest level learned.
Therefore, those items will allow up to Level 10
usage of the skill with any weapon.

tf_steal.name: Steal
tf_steal.description:
Steal
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Steals an item from a monster.
Higher skill levels increase success chance.

[Lv 1]: 10% +(User DEX - Target DEX/2)
[Lv 2]: 16% +(User DEX - Target DEX/2)
[Lv 3]: 22% +(User DEX - Target DEX/2)
[Lv 4]: 28% +(User DEX - Target DEX/2)
[Lv 5]: 34% +(User DEX - Target DEX/2)
[Lv 6]: 40% +(User DEX - Target DEX/2)
[Lv 7]: 46% +(User DEX - Target DEX/2)
[Lv 8]: 52% +(User DEX - Target DEX/2)
[Lv 9]: 58% +(User DEX - Target DEX/2)
[Lv 10]: 64% +(User DEX - Target DEX/2)

Comments: Steal does not remove items
from the monster's drops table. You can steal
an item from a monster, kill it and receive the
same item again.
The success chance is affected by the user's
and target's DEX. Which item will be stolen is
also determined by DEX. Items at the
beginning of the drop table are easier to steal.
Cards can never be stolen.

Despite being one of the most used skills in
the game, it's often misunderstood by players.
When the skill is used, it attempts to steal
each item from the monster's drop table, from
top to bottom, one at a time. This method has
interesting consequences. For example, if your
goal is to steal an item at the beginning of a
monster's drop table, high DEX will increase
your odds. However, if you're aiming for an item
at the end of the list, low DEX is necessary.
This is because, if your DEX is too high, you
will always success in stealing the first few
items on the drop table, and the game will
never roll for stealing items towards the end
of the list.

tf_poison.name: Envenom
tf_poison.description:
Envenom
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: Deals Poison elemental
damage to a target that has a chance
of inflicting Poison status.
[Lv 1]: 14% chance, 100% ATK +15 ATK
[Lv 2]: 18% chance, 100% ATK +30 ATK
[Lv 3]: 22% chance, 100% ATK +45 ATK
[Lv 4]: 26% chance, 100% ATK +60 ATK
[Lv 5]: 30% chance, 100% ATK +75 ATK
[Lv 6]: 34% chance, 100% ATK +90 ATK
[Lv 7]: 38% chance, 100% ATK +105 ATK
[Lv 8]: 42% chance, 100% ATK +120 ATK
[Lv 9]: 46% chance, 100% ATK +135 ATK
[Lv 10]: 50% chance, 100% ATK +150 ATK

Comments: As in most RPGs, poisoning
enemies is rarely worth the effort.
Similar to Swordsman's Bash, using the
Poisonous Toad Card grants this skill a new
effect: shoving the target back. And in the
same manner as Bash and Bongun Card,
the shove distance increases with more cards.

From a damage perspective, Envenom has
terrible scaling. Additional skill levels only
increase the fixed damage bonus. This skill
is a pre-requirement for several Assassin
skills, however.

tf_miss.name: Improve Dodge
tf_miss.description:
Improve Dodge
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases FLEE. FLEE
receives additional bonus upon
reaching 2nd classes. This skill also
slightly enhances the Movement Speed
of Assassin classes.
[Lv 1]: FLEE +3(4 if 2nd),
Assassin MovSpeed +1%
[Lv 2]: FLEE +6(8 if 2nd),
Assassin MovSpeed +1%
[Lv 3]: FLEE +9(12 if 2nd),
Assassin MovSpeed +2%
[Lv 4]: FLEE +12(16 if 2nd),
Assassin MovSpeed +2%
[Lv 5]: FLEE +15(20 if 2nd),
Assassin MovSpeed +3%
[Lv 6]: FLEE +18(24 if 2nd),
Assassin MovSpeed +3%
[Lv 7]: FLEE +21(28 if 2nd),
Assassin MovSpeed +4%
[Lv 8]: FLEE +24(32 if 2nd),
Assassin MovSpeed +4%
[Lv 9]: FLEE +27(36 if 2nd),
Assassin MovSpeed +5%
[Lv 10]: FLEE +30(40 if 2nd),
Assassin MovSpeed +5%

tf_hiding.name: Hiding
tf_hiding.description:
Hiding
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Steal 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Hides under the ground to
avoid enemy attack. Detection skills
can cancel Hiding status. Demon, Insect
and Boss monsters can detect character
in Hiding status. Can be canceled by
using the skill again.

Comments: This is the most basic stealth skill
in the game. It prevents you from doing
anything except using Hiding again to cancel
the effect. Assassins can use Grimtooth from
hiding. Rogues can use Raid and Backstab
from hiding, as well as learn a passive skill
that permits them to move during while
hiding.

tf_detoxify.name: Detoxify
tf_detoxify.description:
Detoxify
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Envenom 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Removes Poison status from
a targeted character.

Comments: The status effect removing skills
from Acolyte and Priest job do not work on
poison. Only this skill does, although many
items such as Green Potions and Green
Herbs will also cure the status.

ac_vulture.name: Vulture's Eye
ac_vulture.description:
Vulture's Eye
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Owl's Eye 3
Requirement: Owl's Eye 3
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases Attack Range
and HIT with Bow class weapons.
[Lv 1]: Range and HIT +1
[Lv 2]: Range and HIT +2
[Lv 3]: Range and HIT +3
[Lv 4]: Range and HIT +4
[Lv 5]: Range and HIT +5
[Lv 6]: Range and HIT +6
[Lv 7]: Range and HIT +7
[Lv 8]: Range and HIT +8
[Lv 9]: Range and HIT +9
[Lv 10]: Range and HIT +10

rg_tunneldrive.name: Stalk
rg_tunneldrive.description:
Tunnel Drive
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Hiding 1
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Enables movement while in
Hiding status. Movement speed is slower than
normal walk.
[Lv 1]: 46.7% Movement Speed
[Lv 2]: 48.0% Movement Speed
[Lv 3]: 49.5% Movement Speed
[Lv 4]: 51.0% Movement Speed
[Lv 5]: 52.6% Movement Speed

Comments: Movement while hidden is
extremely slow, it's better not to move in this
state unless you're setting up for an attack.

rg_snatcher.name: Gank
rg_snatcher.description:
Snatcher
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Steal 1
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Automatically steals item from
monsters while attacking them.
The success rate of stealing items is affected
by the skill level of the Thief skill, Steal.
[Lv 1]: 7.0% Auto-Steal chance
[Lv 2]: 8.5% Auto-Steal chance
[Lv 3]: 10.0% Auto-Steal chance
[Lv 4]: 11.5% Auto-Steal chance
[Lv 5]: 13.0% Auto-Steal chance
[Lv 6]: 14.5% Auto-Steal chance
[Lv 7]: 16.0% Auto-Steal chance
[Lv 8]: 17.5% Auto-Steal chance
[Lv 9]: 19.0% Auto-Steal chance
[Lv 10]: 20.5% Auto-Steal chance

Comments: Does not work when
auto-attacking with a bow.

rg_striphelm.name: Divest Helm
rg_striphelm.description:
Strip Helm
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Steal Coin 2
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: 1 Character
Description: Forcibly strips the Helmet off a
target. In PvP, targeted character temporarily
cannot re-equip Helmets. On
monsters, this skill will temporarily
reduce their INT by 40%.
For the calculations below, uDEX is the user's
own DEX, and tDEX is the target's DEX.
[Lv 2]: 15% +[2*(uDEX - tDEX)]% chance,
90 seconds duration
[Lv 3]: 20% +[2*(uDEX - tDEX)]% chance,
105 seconds duration
[Lv 4]: 25% +[2*(uDEX - tDEX)]% chance,
120 seconds duration
[Lv 5]: 30% +[2*(uDEX - tDEX)]% chance,
135 seconds duration

Comments: Cannot be interrupted. Fails if
a Helmet is not being worn.
Success chance depends on the difference
between the user's DEX, and the target's DEX.
Paladin's Gospel will immediately clear the
effect. Relogging will also get rid of the debuff.
You can be sure a target was stripped if the
animation played.
Upon failure, the user will receive a 'Skill has
failed' warning, unless they have used /skillfail
to silence this message.
Duration increases 0.5 seconds for every point
of DEX you have over the target, lasts 15 more
seconds on monsters. Does not work on MvPs
and Bosses.

sm_sword.name: Sword Mastery
sm_sword.description:
Sword Mastery
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases damage with
One-Handed Sword and Dagger class weapon.
[Lv 1]: Damage +4
[Lv 2]: Damage +8
[Lv 3]: Damage +12
[Lv 4]: Damage +16
[Lv 5]: Damage +20
[Lv 6]: Damage +24
[Lv 7]: Damage +28
[Lv 8]: Damage +32
[Lv 9]: Damage +36
[Lv 10]: Damage +40

Comments: Mastery skills only get added up
at the end of damage calculation. In most
situations, it only results in a flat addition of
damage.

ac_double.name: Double Strafe
ac_double.description:
Double Strafing
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Vulture's Eye 10
Skill Form: Physical attack
Description: A ranged attack, that fires two
arrows. Increases attack range by 3.
Requires Bow class weapon.
Consumes 1 Arrow.
[Lv 1]: 200% damage
[Lv 2]: 220% damage
[Lv 3]: 240% damage
[Lv 4]: 260% damage
[Lv 5]: 280% damage
[Lv 6]: 300% damage
[Lv 7]: 320% damage
[Lv 8]: 340% damage
[Lv 9]: 360% damage
[Lv 10]: 380% damage

Comments: The basic skill attack for Archers.
Capable of dealing a lot of damage from a safe
distance. Increasing your Attack Speed will
allow you to spam this skill even faster.

rg_stealcoin.name: Mug
rg_stealcoin.description:
Steal Coin
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Snatcher 4
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Steals zeny from monsters. Its
success rate rises as the skill evel is
increased. Zeny can only be stolen once from
each monster, and using this skill will draw
the target monster's aggression.
[Lv 1]: 1% success chance
[Lv 2]: 2% success chance
[Lv 3]: 3% success chance
[Lv 4]: 4% success chance
[Lv 5]: 5% success chance
[Lv 6]: 6% success chance
[Lv 7]: 7% success chance
[Lv 8]: 8% success chance
[Lv 9]: 9% success chance
[Lv 10]: 10% success chance

Comments: Success chance affected by DEX,
LUK and the level gap between the monster
and the player.

rg_stripshield.name: Divest Shield
rg_stripshield.description:
Strip Shield
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Strip Helm 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: 1 Character
Description: Forcibly strips the Shield off a
target. In PvP, targeted character temporarily
cannot re-equip Shields.
On monsters, this skill will temporarily reduce
their Defense by 15%.
For the calculations below, uDEX is the user's
own DEX, and tDEX is the target's DEX.
[Lv 2]: 15% +[2*(uDEX - tDEX)]% chance,
90 seconds duration
[Lv 3]: 20% +[2*(uDEX - tDEX)]% chance,
105 seconds duration
[Lv 4]: 25% +[2*(uDEX - tDEX)]% chance,
120 seconds duration
[Lv 5]: 30% +[2*(uDEX - tDEX)]% chance,
135 seconds duration

Comments: Cannot be interrupted. Fails if
a Shield is not being worn.
Success chance depends on the difference
between the user's DEX, and the target's DEX.
Paladin's Gospel will immediately clear the
effect. Relogging will also get rid of the debuff.
You can be sure a target was stripped if the
animation played.
Upon failure, the user will receive a 'Skill has
failed' warning, unless they have used /skillfail
to silence this message.
Duration increases 0.5 seconds for every point
of DEX you have over the target, lasts 15 more
seconds on monsters. Does not work on MvPs
and Bosses.

rg_gangster.name: Slyness
rg_gangster.description:
Gangster's Paradise
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Strip Shield 3
Skill Form: Passive
Description: When more than 2 Rogues sit
beside each other, they will not be attacked by
monsters with the exception of Bosses.

ht_removetrap.name: Remove Trap
ht_removetrap.description:
Remove Trap
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Land Mine 1
Requirement: Double Strafe 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Ground
Description: Removes a trap that has been
set on the ground, as well as regain that Trap.

Comments: Removing a trap returns 1 trap to
your inventory, but since some traps require
2 to be placed, you might not be getting all
traps back by doing this. You can and should
remove traps placed by enemies in PvP and
WoE. You can use this skill to remove an
Ankle Snare currently ensnaring a player(or
yourself), releasing them immediately.

rg_backstap.name: Back Stab
rg_backstap.description:
Back Stab
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Steal Coin 4
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: Back Stab is only usable when
the caster is facing the enemy's rear. This skill
never misses its target, but the target will face
the user after it is hit.
When used with a Bow, this skill's damage is
reduced by half. Back Stab can be used when
in Hiding status, but it will cancel Hiding.
[Lv 1]: 340% ATK
[Lv 2]: 380% ATK
[Lv 3]: 420% ATK
[Lv 4]: 460% ATK
[Lv 5]: 500% ATK
[Lv 6]: 540% ATK
[Lv 7]: 580% ATK
[Lv 8]: 620% ATK
[Lv 9]: 660% ATK
[Lv 10]: 700% ATK

Comments: Deals massive damage but is
very difficult to use repeatedly since it turns the
target around.

rg_striparmor.name: Divest Armor
rg_striparmor.description:
Strip Armor
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Strip Shield 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: 1 Character
Description: Forcibly strips the Armor off a
target. In PvP, targeted character temporarily
cannot re-equip Armors.
On monsters, this skill will temporarily reduce
their VIT by 40%.
For the calculations below, uDEX is the user's
own DEX, and tDEX is the target's DEX.
[Lv 2]: 15% +[2*(uDEX - tDEX)]% chance,
90 seconds duration
[Lv 3]: 20% +[2*(uDEX - tDEX)]% chance,
105 seconds duration
[Lv 4]: 25% +[2*(uDEX - tDEX)]% chance,
120 seconds duration
[Lv 5]: 30% +[2*(uDEX - tDEX)]% chance,
135 seconds duration

Comments: Cannot be interrupted. Fails if
an Armor is not being worn.
Success chance depends on the difference
between the user's DEX, and the target's DEX.
Paladin's Gospel will immediately clear the
effect. Relogging will also get rid of the debuff.
You can be sure a target was stripped if the
animation played.
Upon failure, the user will receive a 'Skill has
failed' warning, unless they have used /skillfail
to silence this message.
Duration increases 0.5 seconds for every point
of DEX you have over the target, lasts 15 more
seconds on monsters. Does not work on MvPs
and Bosses.

rg_cleaner.name: Remover
rg_cleaner.description:
Cleaner
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Gangster Paradise 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Guild Flag
Description: Removes graffiti from a guild flag.
Requires 1 Wet Duster.

Comments: This skill was never implemented
by Gravity and has never worked, probably
never will.

rg_compulsion.name: Haggle
rg_compulsion.description:
Compulsion Discount
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Gangster Paradise 1
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Purchases item from NPC shops
at lower prices.
[Level 1]: Discount Rate 9%
[Level 2]: Discount Rate 13%
[Level 3]: Discount Rate 17%
[Level 4]: Discount Rate 21%
[Level 5]: Discount Rate 25%

rg_raid.name: Sightless Mind
rg_raid.description:
Raid
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Tunnel Drive 2, Back Stab 2
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: Enemies around the caster
Range: 3x3 AoE
Description: Only usable while in Hiding
status and will cancel Hiding once used.
This attack has a chance of causing Stun
and Blind statuses on targets within the skill's
range.
[Lv 1]: 140% ATK, 13% Stun/Blind chance
[Lv 2]: 180% ATK, 16% Stun/Blind chance
[Lv 3]: 220% ATK, 19% Stun/Blind chance
[Lv 4]: 260% ATK, 22% Stun/Blind chance
[Lv 5]: 300% ATK, 25% Stun/Blind chance

Comments: Does damage in a 3x3 AoE and
can be spammed by alternating Hiding +Raid.
The Renewal version of this skill also
applies a buff that increases damage received,
however this effect is not present in
Pre-Renewal servers.

rg_stripweapon.name: Divest Weapon
rg_stripweapon.description:
Strip Weapon
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Strip Armor 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: 1 Character
Description: Forcibly strips the Weapon off a
target. In PvP, targeted character temporarily
cannot re-equip Weapons.
On monsters, this skill will temporarily reduce
their Attack Power by 25%.
For the calculations below, uDEX is the user's
own DEX, and tDEX is the target's DEX.
[Lv 2]: 15% +[2*(uDEX - tDEX)]% chance,
90 seconds duration
[Lv 3]: 20% +[2*(uDEX - tDEX)]% chance,
105 seconds duration
[Lv 4]: 25% +[2*(uDEX - tDEX)]% chance,
120 seconds duration
[Lv 5]: 30% +[2*(uDEX - tDEX)]% chance,
135 seconds duration

Comments: Cannot be interrupted. Fails if
nothing is being worn on the Right Hand.
If the enemy is dual wielding, both weapons
are stripped, but they will still be able to use
shields.
Success chance depends on the difference
between the user's DEX, and the target's DEX.
Paladin's Gospel will immediately clear the
effect. Relogging will also get rid of the debuff.
You can be sure a target was stripped if the
animation played.
Upon failure, the user will receive a 'Skill has
failed' warning, unless they have used /skillfail
to silence this message.
Duration increases 0.5 seconds for every point
of DEX you have over the target, lasts 15 more
seconds on monsters. Does not work on MvPs
and Bosses.

rg_flaggraffiti.name: Piece
rg_flaggraffiti.description:
Flag Graffiti
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Cleaner 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Guild Flag
Description: Paints graffiti over a guild's flag
which will be shown instead of the guild's
emblem. This skill's level affects the amount
of graffiti that can be painted.
Requires 1 Giant Paint Brush.

Comments: This skill was never implemented
by Gravity and has never worked, probably
never will.

rg_intimidate.name: Snatch
rg_intimidate.description:
Intimidate
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Back Stab 4, Raid 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: Strikes a target and forcibly
teleport it with the caster to a random location
on the same map.
This skill's success rate is affected by the
level difference between caster and target.
Boss monsters are unaffected by Intimidate.
[Lv 1]: 130% ATK,
[Lv 2]: 160% ATK
[Lv 3]: 190% ATK
[Lv 4]: 220% ATK
[Lv 5]: 250% ATK
[Lv 6]: 280% ATK
[Lv 7]: 310% ATK
[Lv 8]: 340% ATK
[Lv 9]: 370% ATK
[Lv 10]: 400% ATK

rg_graffiti.name: Scribble
rg_graffiti.description:
Graffiti
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Flag Graffiti 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Ground
Description: Scribbles graffiti around a
targeted cell with a message of up to 20
characters. Graffiti cannot be overlapped or
painted over before it disappears.
Requires 1 Red Gemstone.

rg_plagiarism.name: Intimidate
rg_plagiarism.description:
Plagiarism
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Intimidate 5
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Enables the use of the last skill
that was inflicted by an enemy.
This can only be used to copy character skills,
and cannot enable the use of skills exclusive
to monsters. Raising skill level will affect
the level of skill that copied.

Comments: Cannot copy Transcendant skills.
You can learn Heal and Magnus Exorcismus
by wearing an Evil Druid Card and being hit by
another player. You can learn skills at higher
levels than a class can naturally learn. For
example, a Rogue can copy Lv10 Water Ball
from Drake or Ktullanux. Being hit by any other
copiable skill will cause the user to lose the
learned skill, unless they've transcended
and learned Preserve.

st_chasewalk.name: Stealth
st_chasewalk.description:
Chase Walk
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Hiding 5, Tunnel Drive 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Enters a special Hiding status in
which the caster can move without being
revealed by detecting skills.
The caster will leave footprints and can be
damaged by skills that target the ground.
Ineffective against Insect, Demon
and Boss monsters.
After 10 seconds in this state, the user will
receive a buff that increases his STR.
During WoE, this skill will consume 5 times
as much SP.
[Lv 1]: 70% Movement Speed,
12 SP/10 sec, +1 STR after 10 seconds.
[Lv 2]: 75% Movement Speed,
14 SP/10 sec, +2 STR after 10 seconds.
[Lv 3]: 80% Movement Speed,
16 SP/10 sec, +4 STR after 10 seconds.
[Lv 4]: 85% Movement Speed,
18 SP/10 sec, +8 STR after 10 seconds.
[Lv 5]: 90% Movement Speed,
20 SP/10 sec, +16 STR after 10 seconds.

Comments: Unlike Assassin's Cloaking, you
cannot attack from Chase Walk. The user must
manually end the Stealth before attacking.
While in this state, all the Stealth revealing
skills in the game will not work against you.
This includes Sight, Ruwach, Detect and
Attention Concentrate.
AoE spells will do damage to the Stalker and
reveal you.
This skill is massively improved by being
Soul Linked, allowing Stalkers to reach the
maximum Movement Speed. This happens
because the Soul Link bonus stacks with
Increase Agility.
Also while Soul Linked, the +STR bonus will
last 300 seconds instead of 30.

st_fullstrip.name: Divest All
st_fullstrip.description:
Full Strip
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Strip Weapon 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: 1 Character
Description: Attempt to Strip Weapon, Armor,
Shield and Helm all at once.
Similar to the individual Strip skills, the gap
between the user's DEX and the target's DEX
will greatly influence the chance of success.
[Lv 1]: 7% Base Chance +[2*(uDEX - tDEX)],
75 seconds duration
[Lv 2]: 9% Base Chance +[2*(uDEX - tDEX)],
90 seconds duration
[Lv 3]: 11% Base Chance +[2*(uDEX - tDEX)],
105 seconds duration
[Lv 4]: 13% Base Chance +[2*(uDEX - tDEX)],
120 seconds duration
[Lv 5]: 15% Base Chance +[2*(uDEX - tDEX)],
135 seconds duration

Comments: The DEX gap value can only
benefit the user by increasing the chance of
success. If the target's DEX is higher than the
user's, the chance applied is the base value
without being reduced.
There is no partial success, you either fail or
succeed, applying every strip that is possible.
If the target does not have anything equipped
on the slot, the debuff preventing them from
re-equipping items will not be given. An enemy
that feels the imminent danger of being
stripped may unequip items before suffering
the debuff and, in this manner, preventing the
effect to take place. It is also possible for an
enemy that had a Two-Handed weapon
stripped to equip a shield, since they will not
have the debuff preventing Shields from
re-equipping.
Depending on the game version, failing to Strip
may not display the skill name on top of the
user's character, and may not cause the
character to perform an animation.
Full Strip does not have a Cast Time.
Upon failure, the user will receive a 'Skill has
failed' warning, unless he has used /skillfail
to silence this message.
Duration increases 0.5 seconds for every point
of DEX you have over the target, lasts 15 more
seconds on monsters. Does not work on MvPs
and Bosses.

st_rejectsword.name: Counter Instinct
st_rejectsword.description:
Sword Reject
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Strip Weapon 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: If an enemy is using either a
Sword or Dagger class weapon, Reject
Sword will activate, deflecting attacks and
reducing damage by half.
A total of 3 attacks can be deflected.
[Lv 1]: 15% Chance of Reflection
[Lv 2]: 30% Chance of Reflection
[Lv 3]: 45% Chance of Reflection
[Lv 4]: 60% Chance of Reflection
[Lv 5]: 75% Chance of Reflection

Comments: Both One and Two Handed
Swords will activate the effect. Unlike the
Swordsman skills for blocking, Reject Sword
will cause you to take half damage, while
the other half is sent back to the attacker.
Extremely useful against Ninjas, specially if
they try to use Final Strike/Killing Stroke, so
long as they are not using a Huuma type
weapon.

st_preserve.name: Preserve
st_preserve.description:
Preserve
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Plagiarism 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Prevents the automatic copying of
skills through the Plagiarism skill.

Comments: Can be Dispelled unless you are
Soul Linked. Relogging into the character
from the Character Selection screen will
remove the effect.

nv_firstaid.name: First Aid
nv_firstaid.description:
First Aid
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Recovery
Target: Caster
Description: Uses 3 SP to restore 5 HP.

nv_trickdead.name: Play Dead
nv_trickdead.description:
Play Dead
Requirement: Finish Quest, Novice Only
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Feigns death to avoid the
menace of nearby enemies. The Play
Dead status is canceled by casting
this skill again.

Comments: This skill ceases to function after
jobchanging to any other class, including
Super Novice. Swordsman's Provoke and
Sage's Dispel can cancel the effect. All
monsters will be fooled, even Bosses and
MvPs.

rg_closeconfine.name: Close Confine
rg_closeconfine.description:
Close Confine
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: 1 Character
Description: For 10 seconds, you grab a single
enemy, preventing both from moving.
While you grab onto someone, you will have
+10 bonus to FLEE rate.
If either you or the target dies or moves from
their current cell, the effect ends.

Comments: Moving either the Rogue or the
target will cancel the skill. Any skill that can
push back an enemy will disrupt this effect in
PvP, but not in GvG/WoE since pushback does
not work in these modes.
While binding an enemy, you can attack and use skills freely, including Strip/Divest skills.

tf_backsliding.name: Back Slide
tf_backsliding.description:
Back Slide
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Quickly move backwards to
position yourself safely away from threats.

Comments: An extremely useful movement
skill for getting in and out of combat. You can
control the direction you will slide into by
using /bingbing and /bangbang commands.

tf_pickstone.name: Find Stone
tf_pickstone.description:
Pick Stone
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Picks up a Stone from the ground.

Comments: Stones are needed in order to
repair Barriers in WoE 2.0. Any character can
use this skill by equipping a Stapo Card.

tf_sprinklesand.name: Sand Attack
tf_sprinklesand.description:
Sprinkle Sand
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: Kicks sand into enemy face
which will inflict 130% damage and also
chance to cause Blind status on the target.

tf_throwstone.name: Stone Fling
tf_throwstone.description:
Throw Stone
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Special Physical
Target: 1 Character
Description: Attacks an enemy with a Stone
which inflicts 50 damage that will pierce
enemy's defense and has a low chance of
causing the Stun or Blind status.
Consumes 1 Stone.

Comments: Any character can use this skill by
equipping a Stapo Card.

nv_basic.name: Basic Skill
