nv_basic.description:
Basic Skill
Max Level: 9
Enables the use of Basic Interface Skills.
[Lv 1]: Enables Trading
Allows the trading of items with other
character.
Right click on a character to initiate.
[Lv 2]: Enables Emotions
Alt+(0~9) and Ctrl+(1,-,=.)
Alt+L opens additional Emotion icons.
[Lv 3]: Enables Sitting
Sitting doubles HP and SP regeneration
speed.
Press the Insert key or type /sit.
[Lv 4]: Enables Chat Room Creation
Alt+C to open a Chat Room or click the
Chat button in the Basic Information
Window.
[Lv 5]: Join a Party
Character can join a party.
[Lv 6]: Enables Use of Kafra Storage
Allows use of Kafra Storage.
[Lv 7]: Organize a Party
Create a party by typing
/organize ''Party Name''
Set party options in the Party Window (Alt+Z).
[Lv 9]: Enables Change to First Job Class
Qualifies character for change from Novice
to one of the First classes.

mc_inccarry.name: Enlarge Weight Limit
mc_inccarry.description:
Enlarge Weight Limit
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases maximum Weight Limit.
[Lv 1]: Weight capacity +200
[Lv 2]: Weight capacity +400
[Lv 3]: Weight capacity +600
[Lv 4]: Weight capacity +800
[Lv 5]: Weight capacity +1000
[Lv 6]: Weight capacity +1200
[Lv 7]: Weight capacity +1400
[Lv 8]: Weight capacity +1600
[Lv 9]: Weight capacity +1800
[Lv 10]: Weight capacity +2000

Comments: It is possible to have both this
skill and the Gym Pass version of this skill
simultaneously.

mc_mammonite.name: Mammonite
mc_mammonite.description:
Mammonite
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: 1 Character
Description: Uses the power of greed to
strike a single target with a strong
blow, dealing high damage. Consumes
some Zeny.
[Lv 1]: 150% damage, Cost 100 Zeny
[Lv 2]: 200% damage, Cost 200 Zeny
[Lv 3]: 250% damage, Cost 300 Zeny
[Lv 4]: 300% damage, Cost 400 Zeny
[Lv 5]: 350% damage, Cost 500 Zeny
[Lv 6]: 400% damage, Cost 600 Zeny
[Lv 7]: 450% damage, Cost 700 Zeny
[Lv 8]: 500% damage, Cost 800 Zeny
[Lv 9]: 550% damage, Cost 900 Zeny
[Lv 10]: 600% damage, Cost 1000 Zeny

Comments: The common way to use
Mammonite is to look for 'Zeny Positive'
monsters, whose drops will sell for more
than the cost of killing them.

mc_identify.name: Item Appraisal
mc_identify.description:
Item Appraisal
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Identifies an unknown item,
making it available for use.

mc_discount.name: Discount
mc_discount.description:
Discount
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Enlarge Weight Limit 3
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Decreases the price of
items sold by NPC shops.
[Lv 1]: 7% Discount
[Lv 2]: 9% Discount
[Lv 3]: 11% Discount
[Lv 4]: 13% Discount
[Lv 5]: 15% Discount
[Lv 6]: 17% Discount
[Lv 7]: 19% Discount
[Lv 8]: 21% Discount
[Lv 9]: 23% Discount
[Lv 10]: 24% Discount

mc_pushcart.name: Pushcart
mc_pushcart.description:
Pushcart
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Enlarge Weight Limit 5
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Enables rental and use of
Pushcart which provide additional
storage for items, although items cannot
be directly used or equipped from
a Pushcart. Pushcart can be rented
from Kafra Employees.
Pushcart shortcut: (Alt+W)
[Lv 1]: 55% Movement speed
[Lv 2]: 60% Movement speed
[Lv 3]: 65% Movement speed
[Lv 4]: 70% Movement speed
[Lv 5]: 75% Movement speed
[Lv 6]: 80% Movement speed
[Lv 7]: 85% Movement speed
[Lv 8]: 90% Movement speed
[Lv 9]: 95% Movement speed
[Lv 10]: 100% Movement speed

mc_cartdecorate.name: Decorate Cart
mc_cartdecorate.description:
Change Cart 2
Requirement: Finish Quest
Type: Supportive
Description: You can choose a variety of
cute designs carts.

mc_overcharge.name: Overcharge
mc_overcharge.description:
Overcharge
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Discount 3
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases amount of Zeny
received for items sold to NPC shops.
[Lv 1]: 7% Overcharge
[Lv 2]: 9% Overcharge
[Lv 3]: 11% Overcharge
[Lv 4]: 13% Overcharge
[Lv 5]: 15% Overcharge
[Lv 6]: 17% Overcharge
[Lv 7]: 19% Overcharge
[Lv 8]: 21% Overcharge
[Lv 9]: 23% Overcharge
[Lv 10]: 24% Overcharge

mc_vending.name: Vending
mc_vending.description:
Vending
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Pushcart 3
Skill Form: Active
Description: Opens a street stall for
selling items to other players. Skill
level affects the number of items that
can be vended at a time. The items you
want to sell must be in the Pushcart, and the
character must have his Pushcart equipped.
[Lv 1]: Vend 3 items
[Lv 2]: Vend 4 items
[Lv 3]: Vend 5 items
[Lv 4]: Vend 6 items
[Lv 5]: Vend 7 items
[Lv 6]: Vend 8 items
[Lv 7]: Vend 9 items
[Lv 8]: Vend 10 items
[Lv 9]: Vend 11 items
[Lv 10]: Vend 12 items

Comments: Double check your items to make
sure you're not selling things at the wrong
value! Depending on your server's rules and
configuration, there might be a predetermined
area for opening shops. Also depending on
server configuration, you may have to pay tax
on every sale. You must remain logged in for
the shop to be visible to players, unless the
server allows the use of @autotrade
command.

am_learningpotion.name: Potion Research
am_learningpotion.description:
Learning Potion
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases effectiveness of
HP Recovery Potions, as well as increases
Potion creation success rate.
[Lv 1]: +5% Restorative Power,
+1% success chance when crafting
[Lv 2]: +10% Restorative Power,
+2% success chance when crafting
[Lv 3]: +15% Restorative Power,
+3% success chance when crafting
[Lv 4]: +20% Restorative Power,
+4% success chance when crafting
[Lv 5]: +25% Restorative Power,
+5% success chance when crafting
[Lv 6]: +30% Restorative Power,
+6% success chance when crafting
[Lv 7]: +35% Restorative Power,
+7% success chance when crafting
[Lv 8]: +40% Restorative Power,
+8% success chance when crafting
[Lv 9]: +45% Restorative Power,
+9% success chance when crafting
[Lv 10]: +50% Restorative Power,
+10% success chance when crafting

Comments: The restorative bonus works
with any healing item. it also helps when
using Potion Pitcher and Slim Potion Pitcher.

am_spheremine.name: Summon Marine Sphere
am_spheremine.description:
Summon Marine Sphere
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Pharmacy 2
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Ground
Description: Summons a Marine Sphere to a
targeted cell. Marine Spheres will cast
Self-Destruct upon receiving damage.
Consumes 1 Marine Sphere Bottle.
[Lv 1]: 2400 HP
[Lv 2]: 2800 HP
[Lv 3]: 3200 HP
[Lv 4]: 3600 HP
[Lv 5]: 4000 HP

Comments: Self-Destruct deals Fire damage
in a considerably large area, damaging
enemies only. If you're in a PvP, GvG or PK
zone, the sphere can hurt you and your allies.
Once you tap the sphere, it will drift in the
direction of your attack and then explode
shortly after. Damage is based on how much
HP the Marine sphere has remaining.

am_axemastery.name: Axe Mastery
am_axemastery.description:
Axe Mastery
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases damage inflicted
with Axe and One-Handed Sword class weapons.
[Lv 1]: Damage +3
[Lv 2]: Damage +6
[Lv 3]: Damage +9
[Lv 4]: Damage +12
[Lv 5]: Damage +15
[Lv 6]: Damage +18
[Lv 7]: Damage +21
[Lv 8]: Damage +24
[Lv 9]: Damage +27
[Lv 10]: Damage +30

Comments: Mastery skills only get added up
at the end of damage calculation. In most
situations, it only results in a flat addition of
damage.

am_cp_helm.name: Biochemical Helm
am_cp_helm.description:
Chemical Protection Helm
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Pharmacy 2
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Protects a targeted ally's Helmet
from damage in battle for a set duration.
Consumes 1 Glistening Coat.

am_pharmacy.name: Prepare Potion
am_pharmacy.description:
Pharmacy
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Learning Potion 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Crafting
Target: Caster
Description: Enables crafting of
Potions and Chemicals. The correct Potion
Creation Guide is needed for the
creation of specific Potions.
Consumes 1 Medicine Bowl.

Comments: This is the basic Alchemist
crafting skill. Higher levels result in better
odds when crafting potions and usables.
Every cast of the skill will consume a
Medicine Bowl. Nothing can be crafted if you
do not have a Creation Guide book in your
inventory. Success chances increases with
DEX and LUK.

am_potionpitcher.name: Aid Potion
am_potionpitcher.description:
Potion Pitcher
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Pharmacy 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Recovery
Target: 1 Character
Description: Throws a Potion to an ally that will
immediately take effect. Skill level determines
the type of Potion thrown, so increasing this
skill's level makes more kinds of Potions
usable with this skill.
[Lv 1]: Red Potion
[Lv 2]: Orange Potion
[Lv 3]: Yellow Potion
[Lv 4]: White Potion
[Lv 5]: Blue Potion

Comments: Heals more than regularly
consuming the potion. Affected by the learned
level of Learning Potion.
Being Soul Linked will further improve the
effect of this skill, giving it BaseLv scaling.
This skill is one of the few ways a Homunculus
can be directly healed.

am_cp_shield.name: Synthesized Shield
am_cp_shield.description:
Chemical Protection Shield
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Chemical Protection Helm 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Protects a targeted ally's Shield
from damage in battle for a set duration.
Consumes 1 Glistening Coat.

am_rest.name: Vaporize
am_rest.description:
Rest
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Bioethics 1
Skill Form: Active
Description: Vaporizes Homunculus into a
form that is much easier to carry around.
This skill is only usable if Homunculus has at
least 80% of its MaxHP.
Vaporized Homunculus can be restored with
the Call Homunculus skill.

Comments: Rest and Call are needed in
order to put Homunculi away. When it is
put away(in Rest mode), its hunger will not
tick down.

am_demonstration.name: Bomb
am_demonstration.description:
Demonstration
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Pharmacy 4
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Melee
Target: Ground
Element: Fire
Description: Targets an area and set it on fire
by throwing a Fire Bottle to inflict
Fire elemental physical damage.
The flames will not push back enemies within
their range, but they do have a chance of
damaging the Weapons of enemies.
Consumes 1 Bottle Grenade.
[Lv 1]: 120% ATK, 1% chance to Break Weapon
[Lv 2]: 140% ATK, 1% chance to Break Weapon
[Lv 3]: 160% ATK, 1% chance to Break Weapon
[Lv 4]: 180% ATK, 1% chance to Break Weapon
[Lv 5]: 200% ATK, 1% chance to Break Weapon

Comments: Bottle Grenades are a very
precious resource. The best usage of this
skill is in PvP and WoE, in order to break
an enemy's Weapon.

am_cp_armor.name: Synthetic Armor
am_cp_armor.description:
Chemical Protection Armor
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Chemical Protection Shield 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Protects a targeted ally's Armor
from damage in battle for a set duration.
Consumes 1 Glistening Coat.

am_callhomun.name: Call Homunculus
am_callhomun.description:
Call Homunculus
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Rest 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Homunculus
Description: Summons an existing
Homunculus that was stored by using the
Rest skill.
Consumes 1 Embryo on first use.

Comments: Rest and Call are needed in
order to put Homunculi away. When it is
put away(in Rest mode), its hunger will not
tick down.
If you do not have a Homunculus yet, using
this skill with a Embryo in your inventory
will randomly generate one for you.

am_acidterror.name: Acid Terror
am_acidterror.description:
Acid Terror
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Pharmacy 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Ranged
Target: 1 Character
Description: Flings a bottle of acid at an enemy
that has the chance of damaging the target's
armor or causing the Bleeding effect.
Consumes 1 Acid Bottle.
[Lv 1]: 140% ATK, 3% Armor Break chance,
3% Bleeding chance
[Lv 2]: 180% ATK, 7% Armor Break chance,
6% Bleeding chance
[Lv 3]: 220% ATK, 10% Armor Break chance,
9% Bleeding chance
[Lv 4]: 260% ATK, 12% Armor Break chance,
12% Bleeding chance
[Lv 5]: 300% ATK, 13% Armor Break chance,
15% Bleeding chance

Comments: Ignores Hard DEF and flee, but
not Soft DEF. If the skill is blocked by Pneuma,
the Armor Break chance can still occur. If the
Armor Break occurs, the victim will use the
/omg emote.
Damage is affected only by your ATK, does
not use any +% damage card and is always
Neutral element.

am_cp_weapon.name: Alchemical Weapon
am_cp_weapon.description:
Chemical Protection Weapon
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Chemical Protection Armor 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Protects a targeted ally's Weapon
from damage in battle for a set duration.
Consumes 1 Glistening Coat.

am_resurrecthomun.name: Homunculus Resurrection
am_resurrecthomun.description:
Resurrect Homunculus
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Call Homunculus 1
Skill Form: Active
Description: Resurrect a killed Homunculus.

am_cannibalize.name: Summon Flora
am_cannibalize.description:
Bio Cannibalize
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Pharmacy 6
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Ground
Description: Summons a Plant monster to a
targeted cell. Monster will disappear after the
skill's duration.
Skill level affects the type of Plant monster that
is summoned, as well as the monster's
MaxHP.
Consumes 1 Plant Bottle.
[Lv 1]: Summon up to 5 Mandragoras
[Lv 2]: Summon up to 4 Hydras
[Lv 3]: Summon up to 3 Floras
[Lv 4]: Summon up to 2 Parasites
[Lv 5]: Summon up to 1 Geographer


Comments: Summoned plants are not
attacked by monsters. They also use their
regular AI skills. This means that, for example,
a summoned Geographer will heal its master
and allies, since it knows Heal.

cr_slimpitcher.name: Aid Condensed Potion
cr_slimpitcher.description:
Slim Potion Pitcher
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Potion Pitcher 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Recovery
Target: Ground
Description: Consumes 1 Slim Potion to heal
all Party Members within a 7*7 cell area around
the targeted spot.
[Lv 1]: 110% efficiency, Red Slim Potion
[Lv 2]: 120% efficiency, Red Slim Potion
[Lv 3]: 130% efficiency, Red Slim Potion
[Lv 4]: 140% efficiency, Red Slim Potion
[Lv 5]: 150% efficiency, Red Slim Potion
[Lv 6]: 160% efficiency, Yellow Slim Potion
[Lv 7]: 170% efficiency, Yellow Slim Potion
[Lv 8]: 180% efficiency, Yellow Slim Potion
[Lv 9]: 190% efficiency, Yellow Slim Potion
[Lv 10]: 200% efficiency, White Slim Potion

Comments: The learned level of this skill will
influence the healing power, even if you select
a lower skill level(in order to use a different
slim potion). The learned level of Potion
Pitcher and Learning Potion also influence the
heal power of this skill.

cr_aciddemonstration.name: Acid Demonstration
cr_aciddemonstration.description:
Acid Demonstration
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Demonstration 5, Acid Terror 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Ranged
Target: 1 Character
Description: Attacks an enemy by throwing
both a Bottle Grenade and an Acid Bottle,
inflicting an amount of damage that is affected
by the skill's level, the caster's INT and the
target's VIT.
This skill only inflicts 50% of its damage on
other players, but it has the chance of
damaging that player's Weapon or Armor.
The damage dealt by each hit of Acid
Demonstration is:
[0.7 * (INT^2) * VIT] / (INT +VIT).
Consumes 1 Bottle Grenade and 1 Acid Bottle.
[Lv 1]: 1 Hit, 1% chance of destroying
[Lv 2]: 2 Hits, 2% chance of destroying
[Lv 3]: 3 Hits, 3% chance of destroying
[Lv 4]: 4 Hits, 4% chance of destroying
[Lv 5]: 5 Hits, 5% chance of destroying
[Lv 6]: 6 Hits, 6% chance of destroying
[Lv 7]: 7 Hits, 7% chance of destroying
[Lv 8]: 8 Hits, 8% chance of destroying
[Lv 9]: 9 Hits, 9% chance of destroying
[Lv 10]: 10 Hits, 10% chance of destroying

Comments: This skill deals massive
damage to just about anything in the game, but
even more so to enemies with high VIT.
This skill's damage is forced Neutral, ignores
enemy's DEF and FLEE and bypasses
Auto-Guard, Parrying, Cicada Skin Shedding,
and Mirror Image.
Crusader's Defender does not reduce Acid
Demonstration's damage, but equipment
based Anti-Ranged reductions such as
Horn Card and Alligator Card will work.
Pneuma, Wall of Fog, Kaupe and Flip
Tatami are all effective counters to this skill.
If the target has 0 VIT, the skill will miss entirely.
This can be achieved by using equipment
such as Succubus Card or Dimik Card.
Acid Demonstration's damage cannot be
increased by +% damage effects, flat +ATK
effects, buffs or anything else. It only looks at
your INT, the target's VIT and the target's
reductions. Demi-Human, Anti-Ranged and
Anti-Neutral reductions are all effective.

cr_fullprotection.name: Full Protection
cr_fullprotection.description:
Full Chemical Protection
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Chemical Protection
(Helm, Shield, Armor, and Weapon) 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Protects the targeted character
with all four kinds of chemical protection.
Consumes 1 Glistening Coat.
[Lv 1]: 120 sec
[Lv 2]: 240 sec
[Lv 3]: 360 sec
[Lv 4]: 480 sec
[Lv 5]: 600 sec

Comments: If a player has all four Chemical
Protection buffs active at once, any enemy
player attempting to strip will receive a warning
on their chat window stating that the character
is fully protected.
Will only apply to piece of equipment that they
actually have equipped. For example, if the
character has Helm, Armor and Weapon but
not a Shield, they will receive the Chemical
Protection buff for all except Shield.
Fails if the target does not have any of the
four types of equipment currently equipped.
If the user has been Stripped, using FCP will
not clear the debuffs.

am_berserkpitcher.name: Aid Berserk Potion
am_berserkpitcher.description:
Berserk Pitcher
Requirement: Spirit State
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Throws two Berserk Potions at an
ally. Can be used on any class, even jobs that
normally would not be allowed to use Berserk
Potions, but the target still needs to be Base
Level 85 or higher.

Comments: Costs 2 Berserk Pots and lasts
half of the time.

am_bioethics.name: Bioethics
am_bioethics.description:
Bioethics
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Passive
Description: A skill that is fundamental in
enabling the creation of Homunculus.

Comments: You need to learn this skill
via a Quest, before you can put points
into Homunculus related skills.

am_twilight1.name: Twilight Alchemy 1
am_twilight1.description:
Twilight Alchemy I
Requirement: Pharmacy 10,
Spirit State
Skill Form: Active
Type: Crafting
Target: Caster
Description: Makes 200 attempts to create
White Potions. This skill has the same
success rate as the Pharmacy skill. If there
are not enough ingredients to create all 200
at once, the skill will fail.
Check the Potion Creation Guide for the
necessary ingredients.

Comments: Be very careful when using these
skills. If you do not have enough weight
capacity to carry the resulting items, the items
will be consumed and nothing will be given
to you in return.

am_twilight2.name: Twilight Alchemy 2
am_twilight2.description:
Twilight Alchemy II
Requirement: Pharmacy 10,
Spirit State
Skill Form: Active
Type: Crafting
Target: Caster
Description: Makes 200 attempts to create
White Slim Potions. This skill has the
same success rate as the Pharmacy skill. If
there are not enough ingredients to create all
200 at once, the skill will fail.
Check the Condensed Potion Creation Guide
for the necessary ingredients.
Note: You need a Soul Linker and
Super Novice on your party for this skill to work.

Comments: Be very careful when using these
skills. If you do not have enough weight
capacity to carry the resulting items, the items
will be consumed and nothing will be given
to you in return.

am_twilight3.name: Twilight Alchemy 3
am_twilight3.description:
Twilight Alchemy III
Requirement: Pharmacy 10,
Spirit State
Skill Form: Active
Type: Crafting
Target: Caster
Description: Creates 100 Alcohols,
50 Acid Bottles and 50 Fire Bottles. Each cast
requires enough materials to craft the
produced items all at once.
If there are not enough ingredients to create
them all at once, the skill will fail.
Check the Alcohol Creation Guide, Acid
Bottle Creation Guide and Bottle Grenade
Creation Guide for the necessary ingredients.
Note: You need a Taekwon on your party
for this skill to work.

Comments: Be very careful when using these
skills. If you do not have enough weight
capacity to carry the resulting items, the items
will be consumed and nothing will be given
to you in return.

mc_cartrevolution.name: Cart Revolution
mc_cartrevolution.description:
Cart Revolution
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Special Physical, AoE
Target: 1 Character
Description: A splashed damage attack in
which a Pushcart is smashed into a target.
Inflicts 150% of the damage of a normal attack
+1% for every 1% of the cart's max capacity
filled.

mc_changecart.name: Change Cart
mc_changecart.description:
Change Cart
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Changes the Pushcart
appearance. There are five different Pushcart
styles that are chosen according to the
character's Base Level.

mc_loud.name: Crazy Uproar
mc_loud.description:
Crazy Uproar
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Screams with battle vigor to
add +4 STR for 5 minutes.

nv_firstaid.name: First Aid
nv_firstaid.description:
First Aid
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Recovery
Target: Caster
Description: Uses 3 SP to restore 5 HP.

nv_trickdead.name: Play Dead
nv_trickdead.description:
Play Dead
Requirement: Finish Quest, Novice Only
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Feigns death to avoid the
menace of nearby enemies. The Play
Dead status is canceled by casting
this skill again.

Comments: This skill ceases to function after
jobchanging to any other class, including
Super Novice. Swordsman's Provoke and
Sage's Dispel can cancel the effect. All
monsters will be fooled, even Bosses and
MvPs.

nv_basic.name: Basic Skill
nv_basic.description:
Basic Skill
Max Level: 9
Enables the use of Basic Interface Skills.
[Lv 1]: Enables Trading
Allows the trading of items with other
character.
Right click on a character to initiate.
[Lv 2]: Enables Emotions
Alt+(0~9) and Ctrl+(1,-,=.)
Alt+L opens additional Emotion icons.
[Lv 3]: Enables Sitting
Sitting doubles HP and SP regeneration
speed.
Press the Insert key or type /sit.
[Lv 4]: Enables Chat Room Creation
Alt+C to open a Chat Room or click the
Chat button in the Basic Information
Window.
[Lv 5]: Join a Party
Character can join a party.
[Lv 6]: Enables Use of Kafra Storage
Allows use of Kafra Storage.
[Lv 7]: Organize a Party
Create a party by typing
/organize ''Party Name''
Set party options in the Party Window (Alt+Z).
[Lv 9]: Enables Change to First Job Class
Qualifies character for change from Novice
to one of the First classes.

ac_double.name: Double Strafe
ac_double.description:
Double Strafing
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Vulture's Eye 10
Skill Form: Physical attack
Description: A ranged attack, that fires two
arrows. Increases attack range by 3.
Requires Bow class weapon.
Consumes 1 Arrow.
[Lv 1]: 200% damage
[Lv 2]: 220% damage
[Lv 3]: 240% damage
[Lv 4]: 260% damage
[Lv 5]: 280% damage
[Lv 6]: 300% damage
[Lv 7]: 320% damage
[Lv 8]: 340% damage
[Lv 9]: 360% damage
[Lv 10]: 380% damage

Comments: The basic skill attack for Archers.
Capable of dealing a lot of damage from a safe
distance. Increasing your Attack Speed will
allow you to spam this skill even faster.

ac_owl.name: Owl's Eye
ac_owl.description:
Owl's Eye
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases DEX.
[Lv 1]: Dex +1
[Lv 2]: Dex +2
[Lv 3]: Dex +3
[Lv 4]: Dex +4
[Lv 5]: Dex +5
[Lv 6]: Dex +6
[Lv 7]: Dex +7
[Lv 8]: Dex +8
[Lv 9]: Dex +9
[Lv 10]: Dex +10

ac_shower.name: Arrow Shower
ac_shower.description:
Arrow Shower
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Double Strafing 5
Skill Form: Physical attack
Description: A 5x5 splash attack that damages
all enemies around the target. Knock back
enemies by 2 cells.
Requires Bow class weapon.
Consumes 1 Arrow.
[Lv 1]: 80% damage
[Lv 2]: 85% damage
[Lv 3]: 90% damage
[Lv 4]: 95% damage
[Lv 5]: 100% damage
[Lv 6]: 105% damage
[Lv 7]: 110% damage
[Lv 8]: 115% damage
[Lv 9]: 120% damage
[Lv 10]: 125% damage

Comments: This skill is not good for killing
groups of enemies, both because it does low
damage and because it disperses them. The
most common use for it is to push Hunter
traps, or to spread status effects using
specialized bows.
For Trap focused Hunters in particular, this
skill is key to their gameplay. Arrow Shower is
capable if accurately pushing traps in any
direction.

ac_vulture.name: Vulture's Eye
ac_vulture.description:
Vulture's Eye
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Owl's Eye 3
Requirement: Owl's Eye 3
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases Attack Range
and HIT with Bow class weapons.
[Lv 1]: Range and HIT +1
[Lv 2]: Range and HIT +2
[Lv 3]: Range and HIT +3
[Lv 4]: Range and HIT +4
[Lv 5]: Range and HIT +5
[Lv 6]: Range and HIT +6
[Lv 7]: Range and HIT +7
[Lv 8]: Range and HIT +8
[Lv 9]: Range and HIT +9
[Lv 10]: Range and HIT +10

ac_concentration.name: Improve Concentration
ac_concentration.description:
Improve Concentration
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Vulture's Eye 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Boosts AGI and DEX
temporarily as well as detects nearby
hidden characters in 3x3 AoE.
[Lv 1]: Agi and Dex +3% for 60 sec
[Lv 2]: Agi and Dex +4% for 80 sec
[Lv 3]: Agi and Dex +5% for 100 sec
[Lv 4]: Agi and Dex +6% for 120 sec
[Lv 5]: Agi and Dex +7% for 140 sec
[Lv 6]: Agi and Dex +8% for 160 sec
[Lv 7]: Agi and Dex +9% for 180 sec
[Lv 8]: Agi and Dex +10% for 200 sec
[Lv 9]: Agi and Dex +11% for 220 sec
[Lv 10]: Agi and Dex +12% for 240 sec

bd_adaptation.name: Amp
bd_adaptation.description:
Adaptation to Circumstances
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Cancels a current song or dance.
The same song may not be performed again
immediately.

Comments: Changing weapons also causes
Songs and Dances to end.

ba_musicallesson.name: Music Lessons
ba_musicallesson.description:
Musical Lesson
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases Musical
Instrument class weapon damage by 3
per SkillLV, and increases effects of Songs.
This skill also partially
counters the walking speed reduction while
performing.
[Lv 1]: Damage +3, +2.5% Walk Speed
[Lv 2]: Damage +6, +5.0% Walk Speed
[Lv 3]: Damage +9, +7.5% Walk Speed
[Lv 4]: Damage +12, +10.0% Walk Speed
[Lv 5]: Damage +15, +12.5% Walk Speed
[Lv 6]: Damage +18, +15.0% Walk Speed
[Lv 7]: Damage +21, +17.5% Walk Speed
[Lv 8]: Damage +24, +20.0% Walk Speed
[Lv 9]: Damage +27, +22.5% Walk Speed
[Lv 10]: Damage +30, +25.0% Walk Speed

Comments: The boosts to song effects given
by this passive are very significant.

ba_dissonance.name: Unchained Serenade
ba_dissonance.description:
Dissonance
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Adaptation to Circumstances 1,
Musical Lesson 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Song Skill
Target: Enemies around the caster
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: HITs enemies in area with a slow
sonic attack, piercing their defense. Deals
damage every 3 seconds for 30 seconds
(11 attacks). Also occurs where two Bard
Songs overlap.
Requires Musical Instrument.
[Lv 1]: 40 ATK
[Lv 2]: 50 ATK
[Lv 3]: 60 ATK
[Lv 4]: 70 ATK
[Lv 5]: 80 ATK

Comments: The natural Dissonance caused
by overlapping songs only occurs when
Bard-Bard songs meet, but not when
Bard-Dancer songs overlap.
If a monster kills a Bard or Dancer that is
causing Dissonance, it is possible that the
left over Dissonance tile will damage the
monster, triggering its Rude Attack AI.
This is undesirable since doing so will usually
cause monsters to immediately Teleport or,
for some MvPs, to fully heal.

bd_encore.name: Encore
bd_encore.description:
Encore
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Adaptation to Circumstances 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Performs the last song or dance
again at half SP cost.

ba_musicalstrike.name: Melody Strike
ba_musicalstrike.description:
Musical Strike
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Musical Lesson 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Ranged
Target: 1 Character
Description: Fires a powerful arrow at the
enemy, and may be used during songs.
The Arrow's element
determines the element of this attack.
Requires Musical Instrument.
[Lv 1]: 150% ATK
[Lv 2]: 175% ATK
[Lv 3]: 200% ATK
[Lv 4]: 225% ATK
[Lv 5]: 250% ATK

Comments: An excellent skill for 'tapping'
monsters for increased EXP. If the user is
equipped Cello, this skill will also shove
enemies.

ba_whistle.name: Perfect Tablature
ba_whistle.description:
Whistle
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Dissonance 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Song Skill
Target: Caster and Party Members
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: Raises FLEE Rate by SkillLV and
Perfect Dodge by SkillLV/2 rounded down of all
players in the area of effect.
The FLEE rate is affected by AGI and Perfect
Dodge rate is affected by LUK. Both are
affected by Musical Lesson.
Requires Musical Instrument.
[Lv 1]: (AGI/10) +1 FLEE Rate,
(LUK/30) +1 Perfect Dodge
[Lv 2]: (AGI/10) +2 FLEE Rate,
(LUK/30) +1 Perfect Dodge
[Lv 3]: (AGI/10) +3 FLEE Rate,
(LUK/30) +2 Perfect Dodge
[Lv 4]: (AGI/10) +4 FLEE Rate,
(LUK/30) +2 Perfect Dodge
[Lv 5]: (AGI/10) +5 FLEE Rate,
(LUK/30) +3 Perfect Dodge
[Lv 6]: (AGI/10) +6 FLEE Rate,
(LUK/30) +3 Perfect Dodge
[Lv 7]: (AGI/10) +7 FLEE Rate,
(LUK/30) +4 Perfect Dodge
[Lv 8]: (AGI/10) +8 FLEE Rate,
(LUK/30) +5 Perfect Dodge
[Lv 9]: (AGI/10) +9 FLEE Rate,
(LUK/30) +5 Perfect Dodge
[Lv 10]: (AGI/10) +10 FLEE Rate,
(LUK/30) +5 Perfect Dodge
[Musical Lessons]: +1 FLEE every 2 Skill Levels,
+1 Perfect Dodge every 5 Skill Levels

Comments: If you are Soul Linked and have
mastered this song, you will be able to
perform Lv10 Humming. The skill will appear
on your Etc Tab of your Skill Window.

ba_assassincross.name: Impressive Riff
ba_assassincross.description:
Assassin Cross of Sunset
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Dissonance 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Song Skill
Target: Caster and Party Members
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: Decreases the After Attack
Delay of all players in the area of
effect by (5+SkillLV)%. Stacks with Speed Potions
but not with Adrenaline Rush or
Weapon Quicken. Does not work
when using Ranged Weapons. Further
improved by your Musical Lesson.
Requires Musical Instrument.
[Lv 1]: (AGI/20)+6% ASPD
[Lv 2]: (AGI/20)+7% ASPD
[Lv 3]: (AGI/20)+8% ASPD
[Lv 4]: (AGI/20)+9% ASPD
[Lv 5]: (AGI/20)+10% ASPD
[Lv 6]: (AGI/20)+11% ASPD
[Lv 7]: (AGI/20)+12% ASPD
[Lv 8]: (AGI/20)+13% ASPD
[Lv 9]: (AGI/20)+14% ASPD
[Lv 10]: (AGI/20)+15% ASPD
[Musical Lessons]: +1% ASPD every 2 Skill
Levels

Comments: If a player receiving this buff
has a Bow or Gun equipped, the skill will do
nothing. The same will also happen if the
player has an ASPD buff skill such as
Adrenaline Rush or Two-Hand Quicken.
If you are Soul Linked and have mastered
this song, you will be able to perform Lv10
Please Don't Forget Me. The skill will appear
on the Etc Tab of your Skill Window.

ba_poembragi.name: Magic Strings
ba_poembragi.description:
Poem of Bragi
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Dissonance 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Song Skill
Target: Caster and Party Members
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: Reduces Cast Time and After
Cast Delay by 3% and of all spells used in the
area of effect. If this song is mastered, the
After Cast Delay reduction is 50%.
The amount of Cast Time reduced by this skill
is affected by DEX and the After Cast Delay
is affected by INT. Further improved by your
Musical Lesson.
Requires Musical Instrument.
[Lv 1]: (DEX/10)+3% Cast Time reduction,
(INT/5)+3% After Cast Delay reduction
[Lv 2]: (DEX/10)+6% Cast Time reduction,
(INT/5)+6% After Cast Delay reduction
[Lv 3]: (DEX/10)+9% Cast Time reduction,
(INT/5)+9% After Cast Delay reduction
[Lv 4]: (DEX/10)+12% Cast Time reduction,
(INT/5)+12% After Cast Delay reduction
[Lv 5]: (DEX/10)+15% Cast Time reduction,
(INT/5)+15% After Cast Delay reduction
[Lv 6]: (DEX/10)+18% Cast Time reduction,
(INT/5)+18% After Cast Delay reduction
[Lv 7]: (DEX/10)+21% Cast Time reduction,
(INT/5)+21% After Cast Delay reduction
[Lv 8]: (DEX/10)+24% Cast Time reduction,
(INT/5)+24% After Cast Delay reduction
[Lv 9]: (DEX/10)+27% Cast Time reduction,
(INT/5)+27% After Cast Delay reduction
[Lv 10]: (DEX/10)+30% Cast Time reduction,
(INT/5)+50% After Cast Delay reduction
[Musical Lessons]: 1% Cast Time Reduction
and 2% After Cast Delay reduction for every
Skill Level of Musical Lessons.

Comments: Very few items are capable of
reducing After Cast Delay and these are
usually very rare. With this skill, Bards can
almost completely erase all After Cast Delay.
Keep in mind that Cool Downs are not the
same thing as After Cast Delay, and are not
affected by this skill.
After Cast Delay: Every skill is unusable.
Cool Down: Only a specific skill is unusable.
If you are Soul Linked and have mastered
this song, you will be able to perform Lv10
Fortune's Kiss. The skill will appear on the Etc
Tab of your Skill Window.

ba_appleidun.name: Song of Lutie
ba_appleidun.description:
The Apple of Idun
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Dissonance 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Song Skill
Target: Caster and Party Members
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: Increases MaxHP of all
players in the area by (5+2*SkillLV)%. Also
creates a healing zone, restoring 30+5*SkillLV
HP every 6 seconds in the area of effect for up
to 3 minutes (31 times total).
Requires Musical Instrument.
[Lv 1]: (VIT/10)+7% MaxHP,
Heals (VIT/2)+35 HP
[Lv 2]: (VIT/10)+9% MaxHP,
Heals (VIT/2)+40 HP
[Lv 3]: (VIT/10)+11% MaxHP,
Heals (VIT/2)+45 HP
[Lv 4]: (VIT/10)+13% MaxHP,
Heals (VIT/2)+50 HP
[Lv 5]: (VIT/10)+15% MaxHP,
Heals (VIT/2)+55 HP
[Lv 6]: (VIT/10)+17% MaxHP,
Heals (VIT/2)+60 HP
[Lv 7]: (VIT/10)+19% MaxHP,
Heals (VIT/2)+65 HP
[Lv 8]: (VIT/10)+21% MaxHP,
Heals (VIT/2)+70 HP
[Lv 9]: (VIT/10)+23% MaxHP,
Heals (VIT/2)+75 HP
[Lv 10]: (VIT/10)+25% MaxHP,
Heals (VIT/2)+80 HP
[Musical Lessons]: +1% HP every 2 Skill
Levels and +5 HP healed for every Skill Level.

Comments: If you are Soul Linked and have
mastered this song, you will be able to
perform Lv10 Service For You. The skill will
appear on the Etc Tab of your Skill Window.

ba_frostjoke.name: BA FROSTJOKE
ba_frostjoke.description:
Frost Joker
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Encore 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: Caster's View Range
Description: Causes Freezing status on
everything (including players) on screen.
In PvP or Guild siege area, this skill works on
caster as well.
[Lv 1]: 20% Chance to Freeze
[Lv 2]: 25% Chance to Freeze
[Lv 3]: 30% Chance to Freeze
[Lv 4]: 35% Chance to Freeze
[Lv 5]: 40% Chance to Freeze

Comments: The freezing chance only affects
party members. In PvP and WoE, if the Bard
is not in the same party as its allies, they will
not be affected by this skill.

bd_lullaby.name: Lullaby
bd_lullaby.description:
Lullaby
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Whistle 10
Requirement: Humming 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Ensemble Skill
Target: Enemies around the caster
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: Casts Sleep on all enemies
within area of effect. Effect will occur every 6
seconds for 60 seconds (11 times) and is
affected by INT of the caster, but it has a
chance to fail depending on resistances.
Requires Musical Instrument or Whip.

bd_rokisweil.name: Classical Pluck
bd_rokisweil.description:
Loki's Veil
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Assassin Cross of Sunset 10
Requirement: Please Don't Forget Me 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Ensemble Skill
Target: Enemies around the casters
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: Blocks all skill use for everything
(including players) within area of effect. Can
not be canceled by Dispell. Does not work
against Boss monsters.

bd_siegfried.name: Acoustic Rhythm
bd_siegfried.description:
Invulnerable Siegfried
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Poem of Bragi 10
Requirement: Fortune's Kiss 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Ensemble Skill
Target: Caster and Party Members
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: Increases resistance against
elemental attacks and status ailments for all
players in area of effect.
[Lv 1]: Elemental 60%, Ailments 10%
[Lv 2]: Elemental 65%, Ailments 20%
[Lv 3]: Elemental 70%, Ailments 30%
[Lv 4]: Elemental 75%, Ailments 40%
[Lv 5]: Elemental 80%, Ailments 50%

Comments: The elemental resistance offered
by this skill adds linearly with elemental
resist acquired from card and skills.
For example, wearing a Valkyrie Shield while
under this spell at max level gives 100%
resistance to Fire and Water damage.

bd_drumbattlefield.name: Battle Theme
bd_drumbattlefield.description:
A Drum on the Battlefield
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Apple of Idun 10
Requirement: Service For You 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Ensemble Skill
Target: Caster and Party Members
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: Increase ATK by 25+25*SkillLV
and DEF by 2+2*SkillLV of all party members
within area of effect.
Requires Musical Instrument or Whip.
[Lv 1]: +50 ATK, +4 DEF
[Lv 2]: +75 ATK, +6 DEF
[Lv 3]: +100 ATK, +8 DEF
[Lv 4]: +125 ATK, +10 DEF
[Lv 5]: +150 ATK, +12 DEF

bd_intoabyss.name: Power Chord
bd_intoabyss.description:
Into the Abyss
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Lullaby 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Ensemble Skill
Target: Caster and Party Members
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: All party members within the area
of effect are able to cast spells without
Gemstones and lay traps without using an
item. Cannot be canceled by Dispell.

Comments: Abracadabra still requires at
least 1 Yellow Gemstones, and Ganbantein
will still require both.

bd_eternalchaos.name: Down Tempo
bd_eternalchaos.description:
Eternal Chaos
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Loki's Wail 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Ensemble Skill
Target: Enemies around the casters
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: Reduces the Defense of enemies
to 0 within the area of effect.
Requires Musical Instrument or Whip.

bd_richmankim.name: Mental Sensing
bd_richmankim.description:
Mr. Kim A Rich Man
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Invulnerable Siegfried 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Ensemble Skill
Target: Caster and Party Members
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: Increases gained exp from mobs
killed within the area of effect by
(25+11*SkillLV)%. Cannot be canceled by
Dispell.
Requires Musical Instrument or Whip.
[Lv 1]: +36% Experience
[Lv 2]: +47% Experience
[Lv 3]: +58% Experience
[Lv 4]: +69% Experience
[Lv 5]: +80% Experience

Comments: The monsters have to be inside
the Ensemble area when they die. It's not the
players that have to be inside, only monsters.

bd_ringnibelungen.name: Harmonic Lick
bd_ringnibelungen.description:
The Ring of Nibelungen
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Drum of Battlefield 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Ensemble Skill
Target: Caster and Party Members
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: Increases damage of all Level 4
Weapons within area of effect with
DEF-ignoring 50+(25*SkillLV).
[Lv 1]: +75 Damage
[Lv 2]: +100 Damage
[Lv 3]: +125 Damage
[Lv 4]: +150 Damage
[Lv 5]: +175 Damage

cg_arrowvulcan.name: Vulcan Arrow
cg_arrowvulcan.description:
Arrow Vulcan
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Musical Strike 1,
Requirement: Throw Arrow 1,
Double Strafe 5, Arrow Shower 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Ranged
Target: 1 Character
Description: Fires an awesome flurry of
arrows at a targeted enemy.
Requires Musical Instrument for Clown and
Whip for Gypsy.
[Lv 1]: 300% damage, 0.8 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 2]: 400% damage, 0.8 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 3]: 500% damage, 0.8 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 4]: 600% damage, 0.8 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 5]: 700% damage, 0.8 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 6]: 800% damage, 1 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 7]: 900% damage, 1 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 8]: 1000% damage, 1 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 9]: 1100% damage, 1 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 10]: 1200% damage, 1 sec After Cast Delay

Comments: A burst damage attack that can
be performed with an instrument or whip.
The user is stuck in place during the long
animation delay.
The attacks's element follows your weapon
or arrow element and uses +% damage
effects for increasing damage.

cg_moonlit.name: Sheltering Bliss
cg_moonlit.description:
Moonlit Water Mill
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Musical Lesson 7,
Requirement: Dancing Lesson 7,
Improve Concentration 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Ensemble Skill
Target: Enemies around the caster
Range: 5x5 AoE
Upkeep SP Cost: 4*SkillLV SP every 10 sec
Description: Clown and Gypsy ensemble skill
that creates a 5*5 cell area around the
casters where other players and monsters
cannot enter.
It only prevents players and monsters from
approaching, it doesn't prevent them from
attacking with ranged attacks.
This skill cannot be cast in areas that are
adjacent to obstacles.
Cannot be used in WoE.
[Lv 1]: 20 sec duration
[Lv 2]: 25 sec duration
[Lv 3]: 30 sec duration
[Lv 4]: 35 sec duration
[Lv 5]: 40 sec duration

cg_marionette.name: Marionette Control
cg_marionette.description:
Marionette Control
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Musical Lesson 5,
Requirement: Dancing Lesson 5,
Improve Concentration 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Targeted Party Member
receives a bonus to all Stats equal to half of
the Stats of the caster.
Those bonuses cap at the point where a
stat would reach 99(base+bonus).
This skill is cancelled if this Party Member is
more than 7 cells away from the caster.
To use the skill, hold shift and click the Party
Member. You MUST hold shift key every time.

Comments: When a Clown or Gypsy uses
Marionette Control, first all of their stats are
halved(only the base, not bonuses), and the
amount subtracted from the user is given to
the party member as bonus stats. If a stat were
to go over 99, it caps at 99.
This skill's bonuses snapshot the moment the
skill is applied, meaning that it's possible to
take off all your equipment, get Marionette
Controlled, put all your equipment back(to
regain bonus stats granted by items) and then
receive external buffs like Blessing and
Increase Agility. This way, you can go over the
99 cap limitation. This can be useful for
crafting potions, for instance.
Unlike Devotion, you can use Marionette
Control on any character regardless of Base
Level gap. You can even give massive stat
bonuses to a Lv1 Novice.
You cannot use this on another Bard or Dancer.

cg_hermode.name: Wand of Hermode
cg_hermode.description:
Wand of Hermode
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Improve Concentration 10,n Musical Lesson 10
Requirement: Improve Concentration 10,n Dancing Lesson 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Song, Dance Skill
Target: 7x7 cells around the caster
Description: This skill can only be used near
Warp Portals inside WoE maps during WoE.
Hermode's Rod will make allies inside it's
range immune to magic, as long as they do
not exit the area.
Entering a friendly Hermode's Rod will
immediately cancel all buffs and effects on
your character(except Lord Knight's Berserk).
[Lv 1]: 10 Sec duration
[Lv 2]: 20 Sec duration
[Lv 3]: 30 Sec duration
[Lv 4]: 40 Sec duration
[Lv 5]: 50 Sec duration

Comments: A skill that can only be used in
in War of Emperium, it was made specifically
as an answer to Precast meta. The magic
immunity granted by this skill is the same
type obtained by Golden Thief Bug Card.
The Clown or Gypsy performing this song
cannot end it prematurely by using Adaptation
to Circumstances.
From the game's perspective, this is like an
Ensemble, except your partner is the Warp
Portal instead of another performer. The skill
Longing for Freedom can be used while
performing Hermod's Rod.
Old skill descriptions stated that players
within this skill's protection could not use any
skills, this however is not true.
It is important to note that the player performing
Wand of Hermod is NOT under its protection
and can be hit by magic, unless they are
Soul Linked.

cg_specialsinger.name: CG SPECIALSINGER
cg_specialsinger.description: No English description: add skillinfo/skilldescript.lub or skillinfo/skill_db.yml.

cg_tarotcard.name: Tarot Card of Fate
cg_tarotcard.description:
Tarot Card of Fate
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Dissonance 3,n Improve Concentration 10
Requirement: Ugly Dance 3,n Improve Concentration 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: 1 Character
Description: Cast a randomly chosen effect
from one out of 14 tarot cards.
The level of this skill affects the chance of
success.
[Lv 1]: 8% Success Chance
[Lv 2]: 16% Success Chance
[Lv 3]: 24% Success Chance
[Lv 4]: 32% Success Chance
[Lv 5]: 40% Success Chance
The Fool: Set SP to 0.
The Magician: Cuts MATK by half, 30 seconds.
The High Priestess: Removes every effect.
The Chariot: 1000 Damage, breaks a random
piece of armor(Top Helm, Armor, Shield).
Strength: Cuts ATK by half, 30 seconds.
The Lovers: Teleports target, heals 2000 on
the user.
Wheel of Fortune: Causes the effect of two
Tarot Cards at once, picked at random.
The Hanged Man: Causes either Freeze, Stone
Curse or Stop on the target at 100% chance.
Temperance: Chaos/Confusion effect, 30
seconds.
The Devil: 6666 Damage, cuts both ATK
and MATK by half and causes Curse for
30 seconds.
Death: Causes Coma, Curse and Poison all
at once.
The Tower: 4444 Damage.
The Star: Stuns the target..
The Sun: ATK, MATK, FLEE, HIT and DEF are
cut by 20% for 30 seconds.

Comments: For the Tarot Cards that deal
damage, that damage is fixed and cannot be
reduced or prevented by any means.
For cards that cause status effects, these will
still check for immunities on the target.
The buff removal effect from The High
Priestess will remove everything, even buffs
which Dispel would not work on, such as
Enchant Deadly Poison and Chemical
Protection.
Each Tarot Card has a unique visual
representation that will display above the
target. Learning which card is associated with
each effect will help you figure out what has
been done to the target.

ac_chargearrow.name: Arrow Repel
ac_chargearrow.description:
Charge Arrow
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Ranged
Target: 1 Character
Description: Draws the bowstring to its limit to
fire a volley of arrows with enough force to
push the target 6 cells back.

ac_makingarrow.name: Arrow Crafting
ac_makingarrow.description:
Arrow Crafting
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Crafting
Target: Caster
Description: Creates Arrows from
specific items. The kind of Arrows
produced, as well as the amount, is
determined by the items used.
This skill fails, if the current Weight
is more than 70%.

ba_pangvoice.name: Pang Voice
ba_pangvoice.description:
Pang Voice
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: 1 Character
Description: You scream out at a single target,
causing the Confusion/Chaos status ailment.
Does not work against Boss monsters.
Success chance is 70%.

Comments: Chaos and Confusion are two
names for the same effect and can be used
interchangeably.
This effect causes the character to walk in
random directions while attempting to move
by clicking the terrain.
STR, INT, LUK the Level gap between the
source and the target help resist against the
effect. LUK has a very minor effect towards
reducing the duration of the effect.

nv_firstaid.name: First Aid
nv_firstaid.description:
First Aid
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Recovery
Target: Caster
Description: Uses 3 SP to restore 5 HP.

nv_trickdead.name: Play Dead
nv_trickdead.description:
Play Dead
Requirement: Finish Quest, Novice Only
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Feigns death to avoid the
menace of nearby enemies. The Play
Dead status is canceled by casting
this skill again.

Comments: This skill ceases to function after
jobchanging to any other class, including
Super Novice. Swordsman's Provoke and
Sage's Dispel can cancel the effect. All
monsters will be fooled, even Bosses and
MvPs.

nv_basic.name: Basic Skill
nv_basic.description:
Basic Skill
Max Level: 9
Enables the use of Basic Interface Skills.
[Lv 1]: Enables Trading
Allows the trading of items with other
character.
Right click on a character to initiate.
[Lv 2]: Enables Emotions
Alt+(0~9) and Ctrl+(1,-,=.)
Alt+L opens additional Emotion icons.
[Lv 3]: Enables Sitting
Sitting doubles HP and SP regeneration
speed.
Press the Insert key or type /sit.
[Lv 4]: Enables Chat Room Creation
Alt+C to open a Chat Room or click the
Chat button in the Basic Information
Window.
[Lv 5]: Join a Party
Character can join a party.
[Lv 6]: Enables Use of Kafra Storage
Allows use of Kafra Storage.
[Lv 7]: Organize a Party
Create a party by typing
/organize ''Party Name''
Set party options in the Party Window (Alt+Z).
[Lv 9]: Enables Change to First Job Class
Qualifies character for change from Novice
to one of the First classes.

ac_double.name: Double Strafe
ac_double.description:
Double Strafing
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Vulture's Eye 10
Skill Form: Physical attack
Description: A ranged attack, that fires two
arrows. Increases attack range by 3.
Requires Bow class weapon.
Consumes 1 Arrow.
[Lv 1]: 200% damage
[Lv 2]: 220% damage
[Lv 3]: 240% damage
[Lv 4]: 260% damage
[Lv 5]: 280% damage
[Lv 6]: 300% damage
[Lv 7]: 320% damage
[Lv 8]: 340% damage
[Lv 9]: 360% damage
[Lv 10]: 380% damage

Comments: The basic skill attack for Archers.
Capable of dealing a lot of damage from a safe
distance. Increasing your Attack Speed will
allow you to spam this skill even faster.

ac_owl.name: Owl's Eye
ac_owl.description:
Owl's Eye
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases DEX.
[Lv 1]: Dex +1
[Lv 2]: Dex +2
[Lv 3]: Dex +3
[Lv 4]: Dex +4
[Lv 5]: Dex +5
[Lv 6]: Dex +6
[Lv 7]: Dex +7
[Lv 8]: Dex +8
[Lv 9]: Dex +9
[Lv 10]: Dex +10

ac_shower.name: Arrow Shower
ac_shower.description:
Arrow Shower
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Double Strafing 5
Skill Form: Physical attack
Description: A 5x5 splash attack that damages
all enemies around the target. Knock back
enemies by 2 cells.
Requires Bow class weapon.
Consumes 1 Arrow.
[Lv 1]: 80% damage
[Lv 2]: 85% damage
[Lv 3]: 90% damage
[Lv 4]: 95% damage
[Lv 5]: 100% damage
[Lv 6]: 105% damage
[Lv 7]: 110% damage
[Lv 8]: 115% damage
[Lv 9]: 120% damage
[Lv 10]: 125% damage

Comments: This skill is not good for killing
groups of enemies, both because it does low
damage and because it disperses them. The
most common use for it is to push Hunter
traps, or to spread status effects using
specialized bows.
For Trap focused Hunters in particular, this
skill is key to their gameplay. Arrow Shower is
capable if accurately pushing traps in any
direction.

ac_vulture.name: Vulture's Eye
ac_vulture.description:
Vulture's Eye
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Owl's Eye 3
Requirement: Owl's Eye 3
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases Attack Range
and HIT with Bow class weapons.
[Lv 1]: Range and HIT +1
[Lv 2]: Range and HIT +2
[Lv 3]: Range and HIT +3
[Lv 4]: Range and HIT +4
[Lv 5]: Range and HIT +5
[Lv 6]: Range and HIT +6
[Lv 7]: Range and HIT +7
[Lv 8]: Range and HIT +8
[Lv 9]: Range and HIT +9
[Lv 10]: Range and HIT +10

ac_concentration.name: Improve Concentration
ac_concentration.description:
Improve Concentration
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Vulture's Eye 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Boosts AGI and DEX
temporarily as well as detects nearby
hidden characters in 3x3 AoE.
[Lv 1]: Agi and Dex +3% for 60 sec
[Lv 2]: Agi and Dex +4% for 80 sec
[Lv 3]: Agi and Dex +5% for 100 sec
[Lv 4]: Agi and Dex +6% for 120 sec
[Lv 5]: Agi and Dex +7% for 140 sec
[Lv 6]: Agi and Dex +8% for 160 sec
[Lv 7]: Agi and Dex +9% for 180 sec
[Lv 8]: Agi and Dex +10% for 200 sec
[Lv 9]: Agi and Dex +11% for 220 sec
[Lv 10]: Agi and Dex +12% for 240 sec

bd_adaptation.name: Amp
bd_adaptation.description:
Adaptation to Circumstances
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Cancels a current song or dance.
The same song may not be performed again
immediately.

Comments: Changing weapons also causes
Songs and Dances to end.

dc_dancinglesson.name: Dance Lessons
dc_dancinglesson.description:
Dancing Lesson
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive
Description: Increases Whip class weapon
damage and effectiveness of Dancing skills
by 3 per SkillLV. This skill also partially
counters the walking speed reduction while
performing.
[Lv 1]: Damage +3, +2.5% Walk Speed
[Lv 2]: Damage +6, +5.0% Walk Speed
[Lv 3]: Damage +9, +7.5% Walk Speed
[Lv 4]: Damage +12, +10.0% Walk Speed
[Lv 5]: Damage +15, +12.5% Walk Speed
[Lv 6]: Damage +18, +15.0% Walk Speed
[Lv 7]: Damage +21, +17.5% Walk Speed
[Lv 8]: Damage +24, +20.0% Walk Speed
[Lv 9]: Damage +27, +22.5% Walk Speed
[Lv 10]: Damage +30, +25.0% Walk Speed

Comments: The boosts to dance effects given
by this passive are very significant.

dc_uglydance.name: Hip Shaker
dc_uglydance.description:
Ugly Dance
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Adaptation to Circumstances 1,
Dancing Lesson 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Dance Skill
Target: Enemies around the caster
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: Drains SP from enemies in the
area of effect. Drains 5+5*SkillLV SP every 3
seconds (11 times total). Also occurs where
two Dances overlap.
Requires Whip.
[Lv 1]: Drains 10 SP per 3 sec
[Lv 2]: Drains 15 SP per 3 sec
[Lv 3]: Drains 20 SP per 3 sec
[Lv 4]: Drains 25 SP per 3 sec
[Lv 5]: Drains 30 SP per 3 sec

Comments: The natural Ugly Dance
caused by overlapping dances only occurs
when Dancer-Dancer songs meet, but not
when Bard-Dancer songs overlap.
If Bard-Bard songs overlap, the natural
Dissonance effect happens instead.

bd_encore.name: Encore
bd_encore.description:
Encore
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Adaptation to Circumstances 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Performs the last song or dance
again at half SP cost.

dc_throwarrow.name: Slinging Arrow
dc_throwarrow.description:
Throw Arrow
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Dancing Lesson 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Ranged
Target: 1 Character
Description: Allows the dancer to throw an
arrow with her whip as if she were firing it
from a bow. Can be used while performing
songs and dances. The Arrow's element
determines the element of this attack.
Requires Whip.
[Lv 1]: +150% damage
[Lv 2]: +175% damage
[Lv 3]: +200% damage
[Lv 4]: +225% damage
[Lv 5]: +250% damage

Comments: An excellent skill for 'tapping'
monsters for increased EXP. If the user is
equipped with Whip of Balance, this skill will
also shove enemies.

dc_humming.name: Focus Ballet
dc_humming.description:
Humming
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Ugly Dance 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Dance Skill
Target: Caster and Party Members
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: Increase HIT of players in the
area of effect. The HIT rate is affected by
DEX and Dancing Lesson.
Requires Whip.
[Lv 1]: (DEX/10) +3 HIT
[Lv 2]: (DEX/10) +5 HIT
[Lv 3]: (DEX/10) +7 HIT
[Lv 4]: (DEX/10) +9 HIT
[Lv 5]: (DEX/10) +11 HIT
[Lv 6]: (DEX/10) +13 HIT
[Lv 7]: (DEX/10) +15 HIT
[Lv 8]: (DEX/10) +17 HIT
[Lv 9]: (DEX/10) +19 HIT
[Lv 10]: (DEX/10) +21 HIT
[Dancing Lesson]: +1 HIT every Skill Level

Comments: If you are Soul Linked and have
mastered this dance, you will be able to
perform Lv10 Whistle. The skill will appear
on the Etc tab of you Skill Window.

dc_dontforgetme.name: Slow Grace
dc_dontforgetme.description:
Please Don't Forget Me
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Ugly Dance 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Dance Skill
Target: Enemies around the caster
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: Decreases Attack Speed
and Movement Speed of all enemies
in the area of effect.
Cancels any skills that increase Movement and
Attack Speed. The Attack Speed penalty
is affected by DEX and the Movement Speed
penalty by AGI.
Both are affected by Dancing Lesson.
Requires Whip.
[Lv 1]: [(DEX/10) +8]% ASPD Penalty and
[(AGI/10) +8]% Movement Speed Penalty
[Lv 2]: [(DEX/10) +11]% ASPD Penalty and
[(AGI/10) +11]% Movement Speed Penalty
[Lv 3]: [(DEX/10) +14]% ASPD Penalty and
[(AGI/10) +14]% Movement Speed Penalty
[Lv 4]: [(DEX/10) +17]% ASPD Penalty and
[(AGI/10) +17]% Movement Speed Penalty
[Lv 5]: [(DEX/10) +20]% ASPD Penalty and
[(AGI/10) +20]% Movement Speed Penalty
[Lv 6]: [(DEX/10) +23]% ASPD Penalty and
[(AGI/10) +23]% Movement Speed Penalty
[Lv 7]: [(DEX/10) +26]% ASPD Penalty and
[(AGI/10) +26]% Movement Speed Penalty
[Lv 8]: [(DEX/10) +29]% ASPD Penalty and
[(AGI/10) +29]% Movement Speed Penalty
[Lv 9]: [(DEX/10) +32]% ASPD Penalty and
[(AGI/10) +32]% Movement Speed Penalty
[Lv 10]: [(DEX/10) +35]% ASPD Penalty and
[(AGI/10) +35]% Movement Speed Penalty
[Dancing Lesson]: An extra 1% ASPD and
Movement Speed Penalty for every Skill Level.

Comments: The debuffs caused by this dance
are very severe, in particular against players.
Characters based on ASPD will be helpless
while affected by this skill.
If you are Soul Linked and have mastered this
dance, you will be able to perform Lv10
Assassin Cross of Sunset. The skill will
appear on your Etc tab on the Skill Window.

dc_fortunekiss.name: Lady Luck
dc_fortunekiss.description:
Fortune's Kiss
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Ugly Dance 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Dance Skill
Target: Caster and Party Members
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: Increases Critical rate of all
players in the area of effect. The amount of
Critical increased by this skill is affected by
Dancing Lesson skill level and LUK.
Requires Whip.
[Lv 1]: (LUK/10) +11% CRIT
[Lv 2]: (LUK/10) +12% CRIT
[Lv 3]: (LUK/10) +13% CRIT
[Lv 4]: (LUK/10) +14% CRIT
[Lv 5]: (LUK/10) +15% CRIT
[Lv 6]: (LUK/10) +16% CRIT
[Lv 7]: (LUK/10) +17% CRIT
[Lv 8]: (LUK/10) +18% CRIT
[Lv 9]: (LUK/10) +19% CRIT
[Lv 10]: (LUK/10) +20% CRIT
[Dancing Lesson]: +0.5 CRIT for every
Skill Level

Comments: If you are Soul Linked and have
mastered this dance, you will be able to
perform Lv10 Poem of Bragi. The skill will
appear on your Etc tab on the Skill Window.

dc_serviceforyou.name: Gypsy's Kiss
dc_serviceforyou.description:
Service for You
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Ugly Dance 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Dance Skill
Target: Caster and Party Members
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: Increase MaxSP of all
players in the area of effect. Reduces the SP
consumption of all skills within area of effect.
Both effects scale with your INT and known
level of Dancing Lesson.
Requires Whip.
[Lv 1]: [(INT/10) +16]% MaxSP &
[(INT/10) +23]% Less SP Usage
[Lv 2]: [(INT/10) +17]% MaxSP &
[(INT/10) +26]% Less SP Usage
[Lv 3]: [(INT/10) +18]% MaxSP &
[(INT/10) +29]% Less SP Usage
[Lv 4]: [(INT/10) +19]% MaxSP &
[(INT/10) +32]% Less SP Usage
[Lv 5]: [(INT/10) +20]% MaxSP &
[(INT/10) +35]% Less SP Usage
[Lv 6]: [(INT/10) +21]% MaxSP &
[(INT/10) +38]% Less SP Usage
[Lv 7]: [(INT/10) +22]% MaxSP &
[(INT/10) +41]% Less SP Usage
[Lv 8]: [(INT/10) +23]% MaxSP &
[(INT/10) +44]% Less SP Usage
[Lv 9]: [(INT/10) +24]% MaxSP &
[(INT/10) +47]% Less SP Usage
[Lv 10]: [(INT/10) +25]% MaxSP &
[(INT/10) +50]% Less SP Usage
[Dancing Lesson]: +1% MaxSP and +1%
Less SP Usage every two Skill Levels

Comments: The SP cost reduction given by
this skill is highly valuable in parties, allowing
a large amount of players to continuously use
their skills and spells without restraint.
The SP increase effect has a very large effect
on increasing the damage of Asura Strike.
If you are Soul Linked and have mastered this
skill, you will be able to perform Lv10 Apple
of Idun.

dc_scream.name: Dazzler
dc_scream.description:
Scream
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Encore 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: Caster's View Range
Description: Inflicts everyone (including
players) with Stun within area of effect. In PvP
or Guild siege area, this skill works on caster
as well.
[Lv 1]: 30% Chance to Stun
[Lv 2]: 35% Chance to Stun
[Lv 3]: 40% Chance to Stun
[Lv 4]: 45% Chance to Stun
[Lv 5]: 50% Chance to Stun

Comments: Works the same way as Bard's
counterpart, but for Stun. It will only stun allies
if they are in the same party. In PvP and WoE,
if an ally is not in the party, they will not be
affected.

bd_lullaby.name: Lullaby
bd_lullaby.description:
Lullaby
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Whistle 10
Requirement: Humming 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Ensemble Skill
Target: Enemies around the caster
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: Casts Sleep on all enemies
within area of effect. Effect will occur every 6
seconds for 60 seconds (11 times) and is
affected by INT of the caster, but it has a
chance to fail depending on resistances.
Requires Musical Instrument or Whip.

bd_rokisweil.name: Classical Pluck
bd_rokisweil.description:
Loki's Veil
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Assassin Cross of Sunset 10
Requirement: Please Don't Forget Me 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Ensemble Skill
Target: Enemies around the casters
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: Blocks all skill use for everything
(including players) within area of effect. Can
not be canceled by Dispell. Does not work
against Boss monsters.

bd_siegfried.name: Acoustic Rhythm
bd_siegfried.description:
Invulnerable Siegfried
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Poem of Bragi 10
Requirement: Fortune's Kiss 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Ensemble Skill
Target: Caster and Party Members
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: Increases resistance against
elemental attacks and status ailments for all
players in area of effect.
[Lv 1]: Elemental 60%, Ailments 10%
[Lv 2]: Elemental 65%, Ailments 20%
[Lv 3]: Elemental 70%, Ailments 30%
[Lv 4]: Elemental 75%, Ailments 40%
[Lv 5]: Elemental 80%, Ailments 50%

Comments: The elemental resistance offered
by this skill adds linearly with elemental
resist acquired from card and skills.
For example, wearing a Valkyrie Shield while
under this spell at max level gives 100%
resistance to Fire and Water damage.

bd_drumbattlefield.name: Battle Theme
bd_drumbattlefield.description:
A Drum on the Battlefield
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Apple of Idun 10
Requirement: Service For You 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Ensemble Skill
Target: Caster and Party Members
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: Increase ATK by 25+25*SkillLV
and DEF by 2+2*SkillLV of all party members
within area of effect.
Requires Musical Instrument or Whip.
[Lv 1]: +50 ATK, +4 DEF
[Lv 2]: +75 ATK, +6 DEF
[Lv 3]: +100 ATK, +8 DEF
[Lv 4]: +125 ATK, +10 DEF
[Lv 5]: +150 ATK, +12 DEF

bd_intoabyss.name: Power Chord
bd_intoabyss.description:
Into the Abyss
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Lullaby 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Ensemble Skill
Target: Caster and Party Members
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: All party members within the area
of effect are able to cast spells without
Gemstones and lay traps without using an
item. Cannot be canceled by Dispell.

Comments: Abracadabra still requires at
least 1 Yellow Gemstones, and Ganbantein
will still require both.

bd_eternalchaos.name: Down Tempo
bd_eternalchaos.description:
Eternal Chaos
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Loki's Wail 1
Skill Form: Active
Type: Ensemble Skill
Target: Enemies around the casters
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: Reduces the Defense of enemies
to 0 within the area of effect.
Requires Musical Instrument or Whip.

bd_richmankim.name: Mental Sensing
bd_richmankim.description:
Mr. Kim A Rich Man
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Invulnerable Siegfried 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Ensemble Skill
Target: Caster and Party Members
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: Increases gained exp from mobs
killed within the area of effect by
(25+11*SkillLV)%. Cannot be canceled by
Dispell.
Requires Musical Instrument or Whip.
[Lv 1]: +36% Experience
[Lv 2]: +47% Experience
[Lv 3]: +58% Experience
[Lv 4]: +69% Experience
[Lv 5]: +80% Experience

Comments: The monsters have to be inside
the Ensemble area when they die. It's not the
players that have to be inside, only monsters.

bd_ringnibelungen.name: Harmonic Lick
bd_ringnibelungen.description:
The Ring of Nibelungen
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Drum of Battlefield 3
Skill Form: Active
Type: Ensemble Skill
Target: Caster and Party Members
Range: 9x9 AoE
Description: Increases damage of all Level 4
Weapons within area of effect with
DEF-ignoring 50+(25*SkillLV).
[Lv 1]: +75 Damage
[Lv 2]: +100 Damage
[Lv 3]: +125 Damage
[Lv 4]: +150 Damage
[Lv 5]: +175 Damage

cg_arrowvulcan.name: Vulcan Arrow
cg_arrowvulcan.description:
Arrow Vulcan
Max Level: 10
Requirement: Musical Strike 1,
Requirement: Throw Arrow 1,
Double Strafe 5, Arrow Shower 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Ranged
Target: 1 Character
Description: Fires an awesome flurry of
arrows at a targeted enemy.
Requires Musical Instrument for Clown and
Whip for Gypsy.
[Lv 1]: 300% damage, 0.8 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 2]: 400% damage, 0.8 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 3]: 500% damage, 0.8 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 4]: 600% damage, 0.8 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 5]: 700% damage, 0.8 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 6]: 800% damage, 1 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 7]: 900% damage, 1 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 8]: 1000% damage, 1 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 9]: 1100% damage, 1 sec After Cast Delay
[Lv 10]: 1200% damage, 1 sec After Cast Delay

Comments: A burst damage attack that can
be performed with an instrument or whip.
The user is stuck in place during the long
animation delay.
The attacks's element follows your weapon
or arrow element and uses +% damage
effects for increasing damage.

cg_moonlit.name: Sheltering Bliss
cg_moonlit.description:
Moonlit Water Mill
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Musical Lesson 7,
Requirement: Dancing Lesson 7,
Improve Concentration 5
Skill Form: Active
Type: Ensemble Skill
Target: Enemies around the caster
Range: 5x5 AoE
Upkeep SP Cost: 4*SkillLV SP every 10 sec
Description: Clown and Gypsy ensemble skill
that creates a 5*5 cell area around the
casters where other players and monsters
cannot enter.
It only prevents players and monsters from
approaching, it doesn't prevent them from
attacking with ranged attacks.
This skill cannot be cast in areas that are
adjacent to obstacles.
Cannot be used in WoE.
[Lv 1]: 20 sec duration
[Lv 2]: 25 sec duration
[Lv 3]: 30 sec duration
[Lv 4]: 35 sec duration
[Lv 5]: 40 sec duration

cg_marionette.name: Marionette Control
cg_marionette.description:
Marionette Control
Max Level: 1
Requirement: Musical Lesson 5,
Requirement: Dancing Lesson 5,
Improve Concentration 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: 1 Character
Description: Targeted Party Member
receives a bonus to all Stats equal to half of
the Stats of the caster.
Those bonuses cap at the point where a
stat would reach 99(base+bonus).
This skill is cancelled if this Party Member is
more than 7 cells away from the caster.
To use the skill, hold shift and click the Party
Member. You MUST hold shift key every time.

Comments: When a Clown or Gypsy uses
Marionette Control, first all of their stats are
halved(only the base, not bonuses), and the
amount subtracted from the user is given to
the party member as bonus stats. If a stat were
to go over 99, it caps at 99.
This skill's bonuses snapshot the moment the
skill is applied, meaning that it's possible to
take off all your equipment, get Marionette
Controlled, put all your equipment back(to
regain bonus stats granted by items) and then
receive external buffs like Blessing and
Increase Agility. This way, you can go over the
99 cap limitation. This can be useful for
crafting potions, for instance.
Unlike Devotion, you can use Marionette
Control on any character regardless of Base
Level gap. You can even give massive stat
bonuses to a Lv1 Novice.
You cannot use this on another Bard or Dancer.

cg_hermode.name: Wand of Hermode
cg_hermode.description:
Wand of Hermode
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Improve Concentration 10,n Musical Lesson 10
Requirement: Improve Concentration 10,n Dancing Lesson 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Song, Dance Skill
Target: 7x7 cells around the caster
Description: This skill can only be used near
Warp Portals inside WoE maps during WoE.
Hermode's Rod will make allies inside it's
range immune to magic, as long as they do
not exit the area.
Entering a friendly Hermode's Rod will
immediately cancel all buffs and effects on
your character(except Lord Knight's Berserk).
[Lv 1]: 10 Sec duration
[Lv 2]: 20 Sec duration
[Lv 3]: 30 Sec duration
[Lv 4]: 40 Sec duration
[Lv 5]: 50 Sec duration

Comments: A skill that can only be used in
in War of Emperium, it was made specifically
as an answer to Precast meta. The magic
immunity granted by this skill is the same
type obtained by Golden Thief Bug Card.
The Clown or Gypsy performing this song
cannot end it prematurely by using Adaptation
to Circumstances.
From the game's perspective, this is like an
Ensemble, except your partner is the Warp
Portal instead of another performer. The skill
Longing for Freedom can be used while
performing Hermod's Rod.
Old skill descriptions stated that players
within this skill's protection could not use any
skills, this however is not true.
It is important to note that the player performing
Wand of Hermod is NOT under its protection
and can be hit by magic, unless they are
Soul Linked.

cg_specialsinger.name: CG SPECIALSINGER
cg_specialsinger.description: No English description: add skillinfo/skilldescript.lub or skillinfo/skill_db.yml.

cg_tarotcard.name: Tarot Card of Fate
cg_tarotcard.description:
Tarot Card of Fate
Max Level: 5
Requirement: Dissonance 3,n Improve Concentration 10
Requirement: Ugly Dance 3,n Improve Concentration 10
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: 1 Character
Description: Cast a randomly chosen effect
from one out of 14 tarot cards.
The level of this skill affects the chance of
success.
[Lv 1]: 8% Success Chance
[Lv 2]: 16% Success Chance
[Lv 3]: 24% Success Chance
[Lv 4]: 32% Success Chance
[Lv 5]: 40% Success Chance
The Fool: Set SP to 0.
The Magician: Cuts MATK by half, 30 seconds.
The High Priestess: Removes every effect.
The Chariot: 1000 Damage, breaks a random
piece of armor(Top Helm, Armor, Shield).
Strength: Cuts ATK by half, 30 seconds.
The Lovers: Teleports target, heals 2000 on
the user.
Wheel of Fortune: Causes the effect of two
Tarot Cards at once, picked at random.
The Hanged Man: Causes either Freeze, Stone
Curse or Stop on the target at 100% chance.
Temperance: Chaos/Confusion effect, 30
seconds.
The Devil: 6666 Damage, cuts both ATK
and MATK by half and causes Curse for
30 seconds.
Death: Causes Coma, Curse and Poison all
at once.
The Tower: 4444 Damage.
The Star: Stuns the target..
The Sun: ATK, MATK, FLEE, HIT and DEF are
cut by 20% for 30 seconds.

Comments: For the Tarot Cards that deal
damage, that damage is fixed and cannot be
reduced or prevented by any means.
For cards that cause status effects, these will
still check for immunities on the target.
The buff removal effect from The High
Priestess will remove everything, even buffs
which Dispel would not work on, such as
Enchant Deadly Poison and Chemical
Protection.
Each Tarot Card has a unique visual
representation that will display above the
target. Learning which card is associated with
each effect will help you figure out what has
been done to the target.

ac_chargearrow.name: Arrow Repel
ac_chargearrow.description:
Charge Arrow
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Physical Ranged
Target: 1 Character
Description: Draws the bowstring to its limit to
fire a volley of arrows with enough force to
push the target 6 cells back.

ac_makingarrow.name: Arrow Crafting
ac_makingarrow.description:
Arrow Crafting
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Crafting
Target: Caster
Description: Creates Arrows from
specific items. The kind of Arrows
produced, as well as the amount, is
determined by the items used.
This skill fails, if the current Weight
is more than 70%.

dc_winkcharm.name: Wink of Charm
dc_winkcharm.description:
Wink of Charm
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Debuff
Target: 1 Character
Description: Charm a target by sending them
a sexy wink. For those 10 seconds, the target
monster will not attack you.
Success chance increases based on the
level gap between the user and the target.
If this skill is used on a player, it has low
chance of causing the Confusion/Chaos
status ailment.
This skill only works on Demi-Human, Angel
and Demon race monsters and, obviously,
does not work against Boss monsters.
The success chance of landing the effect on
a player is only 10%, much lower than the 70%
chance of the Bard's counterpart of this skill.

Comments: Chaos and Confusion are two
names for the same effect and can be used
interchangeably.
This effect causes the character to walk in
random directions while attempting to move
by clicking the terrain.
STR, INT, LUK the Level gap between the
source and the target help resist against the
effect. LUK has a very minor effect towards
reducing the duration of the effect.

nv_firstaid.name: First Aid
nv_firstaid.description:
First Aid
Requirement: Finish Quest
Skill Form: Active
Type: Recovery
Target: Caster
Description: Uses 3 SP to restore 5 HP.

nv_trickdead.name: Play Dead
nv_trickdead.description:
Play Dead
Requirement: Finish Quest, Novice Only
Skill Form: Active
Type: Supportive
Target: Caster
Description: Feigns death to avoid the
menace of nearby enemies. The Play
Dead status is canceled by casting
this skill again.

Comments: This skill ceases to function after
jobchanging to any other class, including
Super Novice. Swordsman's Provoke and
Sage's Dispel can cancel the effect. All
monsters will be fooled, even Bosses and
MvPs.
